## 📄 FILE: force-app/main/default/classes/AIBulkProcessingControllerTest.cls

```apex
/**
 * @description Test class for AIBulkProcessingController
 * @author RouteLogic Team
 * @date 2025-01-17
 */
@IsTest
private class AIBulkProcessingControllerTest {
    
    @TestSetup
    static void setupTestData() {
        // Create test account and contact
        Account testAccount = new Account(Name = 'Test Account');
        insert testAccount;
        
        Contact testContact = new Contact(
            FirstName = 'Test',
            LastName = 'Contact',
            Email = 'test@example.com',
            AccountId = testAccount.Id
        );
        insert testContact;
        
        // Create test cases
        List<Case> testCases = new List<Case>();
        for (Integer i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
            testCases.add(new Case(
                Subject = 'Test Case ' + i,
                Description = 'Test description for case ' + i,
                Priority = 'Medium',
                Status = 'New',
                AccountId = testAccount.Id,
                ContactId = testContact.Id
            ));
        }
        insert testCases;
        
        // Create AI provider credentials
        List<AIProviderCredential__c> credentials = new List<AIProviderCredential__c>();
        credentials.add(new AIProviderCredential__c(
            Name = 'TestProvider1',
            API_Key__c = 'test-api-key-1',
            Endpoint_URL__c = 'https://api.testprovider1.com',
            IsActive__c = true
        ));
        credentials.add(new AIProviderCredential__c(
            Name = 'TestProvider2',
            API_Key__c = 'test-api-key-2',
            Endpoint_URL__c = 'https://api.testprovider2.com',
            IsActive__c = true
        ));
        credentials.add(new AIProviderCredential__c(
            Name = 'InactiveProvider',
            API_Key__c = 'test-api-key-3',
            Endpoint_URL__c = 'https://api.inactive.com',
            IsActive__c = false
        ));
        insert credentials;
        
        // Create test processing status records
        List<AI_Processing_Status__c> statusRecords = new List<AI_Processing_Status__c>();
        List<Case> cases = [SELECT Id FROM Case];
        
        for (Integer i = 0; i < cases.size(); i++) {
            String status = 'Pending';
            Boolean success = false;
            
            if (i < 3) {
                status = 'Completed';
                success = true;
            } else if (i < 6) {
                status = 'Failed';
                success = false;
            } else if (i < 8) {
                status = 'Processing';
                success = false;
            }
            
            statusRecords.add(new AI_Processing_Status__c(
                Case__c = cases[i].Id,
                AI_Provider__c = 'TestProvider1',
                Status__c = status,
                Success__c = success,
                Request_Time__c = DateTime.now().addMinutes(-30),
                Response_Time__c = success ? DateTime.now().addMinutes(-25) : null
            ));
        }
        insert statusRecords;
        
        // Create test retry requests
        List<AI_Retry_Request__c> retryRequests = new List<AI_Retry_Request__c>();
        for (Integer i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
            retryRequests.add(new AI_Retry_Request__c(
                Case__c = cases[i].Id,
                Provider__c = 'TestProvider1',
                Request_Type__c = 'Bulk Process',
                Request_Data__c = '{"caseId":"' + cases[i].Id + '","provider":"TestProvider1"}',
                Retry_Count__c = i % 3,
                Max_Retries__c = 3,
                Status__c = 'Pending'
            ));
        }
        insert retryRequests;
        
        // Create test metrics
        List<AI_Bulk_Processing_Metrics__c> metrics = new List<AI_Bulk_Processing_Metrics__c>();
        for (Integer i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
            metrics.add(new AI_Bulk_Processing_Metrics__c(
                Batch_Id__c = 'TEST_BATCH_' + i,
                Total_Requests__c = 10 + i,
                Successful_Requests__c = 8 + i,
                Failed_Requests__c = 2,
                Error_Requests__c = 0,
                Rate_Limit_Exceeded__c = 0,
                Processing_Time_Ms__c = 5000 + (i * 1000),
                Average_Time_Per_Request__c = 500 + (i * 100)
            ));
        }
        insert metrics;
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testGetProcessingStatus() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Get processing status
        AIBulkProcessingCoordinator.ProcessingStatus status = 
            AIBulkProcessingController.getProcessingStatus();
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify status data
        System.assertNotEquals(null, status, 'Should return processing status');
        System.assertEquals(3, status.completedCount, 'Should have 3 completed requests');
        System.assertEquals(3, status.failedCount, 'Should have 3 failed requests');
        System.assertEquals(2, status.processingCount, 'Should have 2 processing requests');
        System.assertEquals(2, status.pendingCount, 'Should have 2 pending requests');
        System.assertEquals(5, status.retryQueueCount, 'Should have 5 retry requests');
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testInitiateBulkProcessing() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Initiate bulk processing
        String jobId = AIBulkProcessingController.initiateBulkProcessing(100);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Job ID might be null if no pending requests are found
        // This tests the controller method execution without errors
        System.assert(true, 'Method should execute without throwing exceptions');
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testProcessRetryQueue() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Process retry queue
        Integer processedCount = AIBulkProcessingController.processRetryQueue();
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify method executes successfully
        System.assert(processedCount >= 0, 'Should return non-negative processed count');
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testCancelAllJobs() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Cancel all jobs
        Integer cancelledCount = AIBulkProcessingController.cancelAllJobs();
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // In test context, no actual jobs will be running
        System.assertEquals(0, cancelledCount, 'Should return 0 cancelled jobs in test context');
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testGetDetailedMetrics() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Get detailed metrics
        List<AIBulkProcessingController.ProcessingMetric> metrics = 
            AIBulkProcessingController.getDetailedMetrics();
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify metrics data
        System.assertNotEquals(null, metrics, 'Should return metrics list');
        System.assertEquals(5, metrics.size(), 'Should return 5 metrics records');
        
        // Verify metric data structure
        for (AIBulkProcessingController.ProcessingMetric metric : metrics) {
            System.assertNotEquals(null, metric.batchId, 'Batch ID should not be null');
            System.assert(metric.totalRequests > 0, 'Total requests should be positive');
            System.assert(metric.successRate >= 0 && metric.successRate <= 100, 
                'Success rate should be between 0 and 100');
        }
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testGetActiveJobs() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Get active jobs
        List<AIBulkProcessingController.ActiveJob> jobs = 
            AIBulkProcessingController.getActiveJobs();
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // In test context, no active jobs will be found
        System.assertNotEquals(null, jobs, 'Should return jobs list');
        System.assertEquals(0, jobs.size(), 'Should return 0 active jobs in test context');
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testForceProcessCases() {
        // Get test cases
        List<Case> testCases = [SELECT Id FROM Case LIMIT 3];
        List<String> caseIds = new List<String>();
        for (Case c : testCases) {
            caseIds.add(c.Id);
        }
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Force process cases
        String jobId = AIBulkProcessingController.forceProcessCases(caseIds, 'TestProvider1');
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify method execution
        System.assertNotEquals(null, jobId, 'Should return job ID');
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testForceProcessCasesValidation() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        try {
            // Test with null case IDs
            AIBulkProcessingController.forceProcessCases(null, 'TestProvider1');
            System.assert(false, 'Should throw exception for null case IDs');
        } catch (AuraHandledException e) {
            System.assert(e.getMessage().contains('Failed to force process cases'), 
                'Should throw AuraHandledException');
        }
        
        try {
            // Test with empty provider
            AIBulkProcessingController.forceProcessCases(new List<String>(), '');
            System.assert(false, 'Should throw exception for empty provider');
        } catch (AuraHandledException e) {
            System.assert(e.getMessage().contains('Failed to force process cases'), 
                'Should throw AuraHandledException');
        }
        
        Test.stopTest();
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testGetAvailableProviders() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Get available providers
        List<String> providers = AIBulkProcessingController.getAvailableProviders();
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify providers data
        System.assertNotEquals(null, providers, 'Should return providers list');
        System.assertEquals(2, providers.size(), 'Should return 2 active providers');
        System.assert(providers.contains('TestProvider1'), 'Should include TestProvider1');
        System.assert(providers.contains('TestProvider2'), 'Should include TestProvider2');
        System.assert(!providers.contains('InactiveProvider'), 'Should not include inactive provider');
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testProcessingMetricWrapperClass() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Test ProcessingMetric wrapper class
        AIBulkProcessingController.ProcessingMetric metric = 
            new AIBulkProcessingController.ProcessingMetric();
        
        metric.batchId = 'TEST_BATCH';
        metric.totalRequests = 100;
        metric.successfulRequests = 85;
        metric.failedRequests = 15;
        metric.processingTimeMs = 30000;
        metric.averageTimePerRequest = 300;
        metric.createdDate = DateTime.now();
        metric.successRate = 85.0;
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify wrapper class properties
        System.assertEquals('TEST_BATCH', metric.batchId);
        System.assertEquals(100, metric.totalRequests);
        System.assertEquals(85, metric.successfulRequests);
        System.assertEquals(85.0, metric.successRate);
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testActiveJobWrapperClass() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Test ActiveJob wrapper class
        AIBulkProcessingController.ActiveJob job = 
            new AIBulkProcessingController.ActiveJob();
        
        job.jobId = 'TEST_JOB_ID';
        job.jobType = 'Queueable';
        job.status = 'Processing';
        job.itemsProcessed = 50;
        job.totalItems = 100;
        job.numberOfErrors = 0;
        job.createdByName = 'Test User';
        job.progressPercentage = 50.0;
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify wrapper class properties
        System.assertEquals('TEST_JOB_ID', job.jobId);
        System.assertEquals('Processing', job.status);
        System.assertEquals(50, job.itemsProcessed);
        System.assertEquals(50.0, job.progressPercentage);
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testErrorHandling() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Test error handling by forcing an exception scenario
        try {
            // This should handle database errors gracefully
            List<AIBulkProcessingController.ProcessingMetric> metrics = 
                AIBulkProcessingController.getDetailedMetrics();
            System.assertNotEquals(null, metrics, 'Should handle errors gracefully');
        } catch (AuraHandledException e) {
            // Expected if there are database issues
            System.assert(e.getMessage().contains('Failed to retrieve'), 
                'Should provide meaningful error message');
        }
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify error logs
        List<Error_Log__c> errorLogs = [
            SELECT Id, Class_Name__c, Error_Type__c
            FROM Error_Log__c
            WHERE Class_Name__c LIKE '%AIBulkProcessingController%'
        ];
        
        // Error logs may or may not be present
        System.assert(errorLogs.size() >= 0, 'Error logging should work');
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testLargeDataVolume() {
        // Create large number of test records to test performance
        List<AI_Bulk_Processing_Metrics__c> largeMetrics = new List<AI_Bulk_Processing_Metrics__c>();
        
        for (Integer i = 0; i < 100; i++) {
            largeMetrics.add(new AI_Bulk_Processing_Metrics__c(
                Batch_Id__c = 'LARGE_BATCH_' + i,
                Total_Requests__c = i + 1,
                Successful_Requests__c = i,
                Failed_Requests__c = 1,
                Processing_Time_Ms__c = (i + 1) * 1000,
                Average_Time_Per_Request__c = (i + 1) * 10
            ));
        }
        insert largeMetrics;
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Get detailed metrics with large dataset
        List<AIBulkProcessingController.ProcessingMetric> metrics = 
            AIBulkProcessingController.getDetailedMetrics();
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify performance with large dataset
        System.assertNotEquals(null, metrics, 'Should handle large datasets');
        System.assert(metrics.size() <= 50, 'Should respect LIMIT clause');
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testCacheableMethodsInBulk() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Test multiple calls to cacheable methods
        for (Integer i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
            AIBulkProcessingCoordinator.ProcessingStatus status = 
                AIBulkProcessingController.getProcessingStatus();
            System.assertNotEquals(null, status, 'Cacheable method should work in bulk');
            
            List<String> providers = AIBulkProcessingController.getAvailableProviders();
            System.assertNotEquals(null, providers, 'Cacheable method should work in bulk');
        }
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify all calls completed successfully
        System.assert(true, 'All cacheable method calls should complete successfully');
    }
}
```

## 📄 FILE: force-app/main/default/classes/AIBulkProcessingCoordinator.cls

```apex
/**
 * @description Service class that coordinates AI bulk processing operations
 * This class orchestrates the bulk processing of AI requests, managing batches,
 * retries, and provider allocation.
 * @author RouteLogic Team
 * @date 2025-01-20
 * @group AI Processing
 * 
 * PHASE 1 UPDATE: Completed getPendingRequests implementation
 */
public with sharing class AIBulkProcessingCoordinator {
    
    // Class constants for configuration
    private static final Integer DEFAULT_BATCH_SIZE = 100;
    private static final Integer MAX_RETRY_ATTEMPTS = 3;
    private static final Integer CIRCUIT_BREAKER_THRESHOLD = 5;
    private static final Integer CIRCUIT_BREAKER_TIMEOUT_MINUTES = 30;
    
    /**
     * @description Initiates bulk processing for pending AI requests
     * @param batchSize Optional batch size override
     * @return Job ID of the initiated process
     */
    @AuraEnabled
    public static String initiateBulkProcessing(Integer batchSize) {
        try {
            if (batchSize == null || batchSize <= 0) {
                batchSize = DEFAULT_BATCH_SIZE;
            }
            
            // Check circuit breaker status
            if (isCircuitBreakerOpen()) {
                throw new AIHandledException('Circuit breaker is open. Too many failures detected.');
            }
            
            // Get pending requests
            List<AI_Case_Request__e> pendingRequests = getPendingRequests(batchSize);
            
            if (pendingRequests.isEmpty()) {
                return 'No pending requests to process';
            }
            
            // Queue the bulk processing job
            AIBulkProcessingQueueable job = new AIBulkProcessingQueueable(pendingRequests);
            String jobId = System.enqueueJob(job);
            
            // Log the initiation
            MetricsLogger.logEvent('AI_BULK_PROCESSING_INITIATED', new Map<String, Object>{
                'jobId' => jobId,
                'batchSize' => pendingRequests.size(),
                'timestamp' => System.now()
            });
            
            return jobId;
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            ErrorLogService.logError(
                'AIBulkProcessingCoordinator.initiateBulkProcessing',
                e.getMessage(),
                e.getStackTraceString(),
                null
            );
            throw new AIHandledException('Failed to initiate bulk processing: ' + e.getMessage());
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description PHASE 1 IMPLEMENTATION - Gets pending AI requests for processing
     * Since platform events cannot be queried directly, this method queries
     * AI_Processing_Status__c records with 'Pending' status and converts them
     * to platform events for processing
     * @param batchSize Number of requests to retrieve
     * @return List of pending platform events
     */
    private static List<AI_Case_Request__e> getPendingRequests(Integer batchSize) {
        // Query pending processing status records ordered by request time
        List<AI_Processing_Status__c> pendingStatuses = [
            SELECT Id, Case__c, AI_Provider__c, Request_Time__c, Priority__c,
                   Request_Type__c, Retry_Count__c, Original_Request_Id__c
            FROM AI_Processing_Status__c
            WHERE Status__c = 'Pending'
            AND Is_Active__c = true
            ORDER BY Priority__c DESC, Request_Time__c ASC
            LIMIT :batchSize
            WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED
        ];
        
        if (pendingStatuses.isEmpty()) {
            return new List<AI_Case_Request__e>();
        }
        
        // Convert status records to platform events
        List<AI_Case_Request__e> pendingRequests = new List<AI_Case_Request__e>();
        Set<Id> statusIdsToUpdate = new Set<Id>();
        
        for (AI_Processing_Status__c status : pendingStatuses) {
            // Create platform event from status record
            AI_Case_Request__e request = new AI_Case_Request__e(
                CaseId__c = status.Case__c,
                AI_Provider__c = status.AI_Provider__c,
                Request_Type__c = status.Request_Type__c != null ? status.Request_Type__c : 'Bulk Process',
                Priority__c = status.Priority__c != null ? status.Priority__c : 'Normal',
                Status__c = 'Processing',
                Processing_Status_Id__c = status.Id,
                Original_Request_Id__c = status.Original_Request_Id__c
            );
            pendingRequests.add(request);
            statusIdsToUpdate.add(status.Id);
        }
        
        // Update status records to 'Processing' to prevent duplicate processing
        if (!statusIdsToUpdate.isEmpty()) {
            updateStatusRecords(statusIdsToUpdate, 'Processing');
        }
        
        // Log retrieval
        MetricsLogger.logEvent('PENDING_REQUESTS_RETRIEVED', new Map<String, Object>{
            'count' => pendingRequests.size(),
            'batchSize' => batchSize,
            'timestamp' => System.now()
        });
        
        return pendingRequests;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Updates AI Processing Status records to a new status
     * @param statusIds Set of record IDs to update
     * @param newStatus New status value
     */
    private static void updateStatusRecords(Set<Id> statusIds, String newStatus) {
        List<AI_Processing_Status__c> statusesToUpdate = new List<AI_Processing_Status__c>();
        
        for (Id statusId : statusIds) {
            statusesToUpdate.add(new AI_Processing_Status__c(
                Id = statusId,
                Status__c = newStatus,
                Last_Modified_Time__c = System.now(),
                Processing_Start_Time__c = (newStatus == 'Processing') ? System.now() : null
            ));
        }
        
        // Use security utils to strip inaccessible fields before update
        List<AI_Processing_Status__c> accessibleRecords = 
            SecurityUtils.stripInaccessibleRecords(AccessType.UPDATABLE, statusesToUpdate);
        
        if (!accessibleRecords.isEmpty()) {
            update accessibleRecords;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Processes the retry queue for failed AI requests
     * @return Number of retries processed
     */
    @AuraEnabled
    public static Integer processRetryQueue() {
        try {
            List<AI_Retry_Request__c> retryRequests = [
                SELECT Id, Case__c, AI_Provider__c, Retry_Count__c, Error_Message__c,
                       Last_Retry_Time__c, Original_Request_Id__c
                FROM AI_Retry_Request__c
                WHERE Status__c = 'Pending'
                AND Retry_Count__c < :MAX_RETRY_ATTEMPTS
                AND (Last_Retry_Time__c = null OR 
                     Last_Retry_Time__c < :DateTime.now().addMinutes(-5))
                ORDER BY Retry_Count__c ASC, CreatedDate ASC
                LIMIT 50
                WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED
            ];
            
            if (retryRequests.isEmpty()) {
                return 0;
            }
            
            // Convert retry requests to platform events
            List<AI_Case_Request__e> eventsToPublish = new List<AI_Case_Request__e>();
            List<AI_Retry_Request__c> requestsToUpdate = new List<AI_Retry_Request__c>();
            
            for (AI_Retry_Request__c retry : retryRequests) {
                AI_Case_Request__e event = new AI_Case_Request__e(
                    CaseId__c = retry.Case__c,
                    AI_Provider__c = retry.AI_Provider__c,
                    Request_Type__c = 'Retry',
                    Priority__c = 'High',
                    Retry_Count__c = retry.Retry_Count__c + 1,
                    Original_Request_Id__c = retry.Original_Request_Id__c
                );
                eventsToPublish.add(event);
                
                retry.Status__c = 'Processing';
                retry.Retry_Count__c += 1;
                retry.Last_Retry_Time__c = DateTime.now();
                requestsToUpdate.add(retry);
            }
            
            // Update retry records
            update SecurityUtils.stripInaccessibleRecords(
                AccessType.UPDATABLE, 
                requestsToUpdate
            );
            
            // Publish platform events
            List<Database.SaveResult> publishResults = EventBus.publish(eventsToPublish);
            
            // Log results
            Integer successCount = 0;
            for (Database.SaveResult result : publishResults) {
                if (result.isSuccess()) {
                    successCount++;
                }
            }
            
            MetricsLogger.logEvent('RETRY_QUEUE_PROCESSED', new Map<String, Object>{
                'totalRetries' => retryRequests.size(),
                'successfulPublish' => successCount,
                'timestamp' => System.now()
            });
            
            return successCount;
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            ErrorLogService.logError(
                'AIBulkProcessingCoordinator.processRetryQueue',
                e.getMessage(),
                e.getStackTraceString(),
                null
            );
            throw new AIHandledException('Failed to process retry queue: ' + e.getMessage());
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Checks if circuit breaker is open due to excessive failures
     * @return True if circuit breaker is open
     */
    private static Boolean isCircuitBreakerOpen() {
        // Query recent failures
        Integer recentFailures = [
            SELECT COUNT()
            FROM Error_Log__c
            WHERE Class_Name__c = 'AIBulkProcessingCoordinator'
            AND CreatedDate >= :DateTime.now().addMinutes(-CIRCUIT_BREAKER_TIMEOUT_MINUTES)
            WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED
        ];
        
        return recentFailures >= CIRCUIT_BREAKER_THRESHOLD;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Cancels all pending AI processing jobs
     * @return Number of jobs cancelled
     */
    @AuraEnabled
    public static Integer cancelAllPendingJobs() {
        try {
            // Update all pending status records to cancelled
            List<AI_Processing_Status__c> pendingStatuses = [
                SELECT Id
                FROM AI_Processing_Status__c
                WHERE Status__c IN ('Pending', 'Processing')
                WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED
            ];
            
            if (pendingStatuses.isEmpty()) {
                return 0;
            }
            
            for (AI_Processing_Status__c status : pendingStatuses) {
                status.Status__c = 'Cancelled';
                status.Completion_Time__c = System.now();
                status.Error_Message__c = 'Cancelled by user';
            }
            
            update SecurityUtils.stripInaccessibleRecords(
                AccessType.UPDATABLE,
                pendingStatuses
            );
            
            // Cancel any queued Apex jobs
            List<AsyncApexJob> queuedJobs = [
                SELECT Id
                FROM AsyncApexJob
                WHERE ApexClass.Name = 'AIBulkProcessingQueueable'
                AND Status IN ('Queued', 'Preparing')
            ];
            
            for (AsyncApexJob job : queuedJobs) {
                System.abortJob(job.Id);
            }
            
            MetricsLogger.logEvent('BULK_PROCESSING_CANCELLED', new Map<String, Object>{
                'cancelledCount' => pendingStatuses.size(),
                'timestamp' => System.now()
            });
            
            return pendingStatuses.size();
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            ErrorLogService.logError(
                'AIBulkProcessingCoordinator.cancelAllPendingJobs',
                e.getMessage(),
                e.getStackTraceString(),
                null
            );
            throw new AIHandledException('Failed to cancel pending jobs: ' + e.getMessage());
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Gets the current processing status metrics
     * @return ProcessingStatus object with current metrics
     */
    @AuraEnabled(cacheable=true)
    public static ProcessingStatus getProcessingStatus() {
        try {
            ProcessingStatus status = new ProcessingStatus();
            
            // Get counts by status
            List<AggregateResult> statusCounts = [
                SELECT Status__c, COUNT(Id) cnt
                FROM AI_Processing_Status__c
                WHERE CreatedDate = TODAY
                GROUP BY Status__c
                WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED
            ];
            
            for (AggregateResult ar : statusCounts) {
                String statusValue = (String)ar.get('Status__c');
                Integer count = (Integer)ar.get('cnt');
                
                if (statusValue == 'Pending') {
                    status.pendingCount = count;
                } else if (statusValue == 'Processing') {
                    status.processingCount = count;
                } else if (statusValue == 'Completed') {
                    status.completedCount = count;
                } else if (statusValue == 'Failed') {
                    status.failedCount = count;
                }
            }
            
            // Calculate totals
            status.totalCount = status.pendingCount + status.processingCount + 
                               status.completedCount + status.failedCount;
            
            // Get active jobs
            status.activeJobs = [
                SELECT COUNT()
                FROM AsyncApexJob
                WHERE ApexClass.Name = 'AIBulkProcessingQueueable'
                AND Status IN ('Queued', 'Processing', 'Preparing')
            ];
            
            return status;
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            ErrorLogService.logError(
                'AIBulkProcessingCoordinator.getProcessingStatus',
                e.getMessage(),
                e.getStackTraceString(),
                null
            );
            throw new AIHandledException('Failed to get processing status: ' + e.getMessage());
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Inner class to hold processing status information
     */
    public class ProcessingStatus {
        @AuraEnabled public Integer pendingCount { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Integer processingCount { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Integer completedCount { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Integer failedCount { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Integer totalCount { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Integer activeJobs { get; set; }
        
        public ProcessingStatus() {
            this.pendingCount = 0;
            this.processingCount = 0;
            this.completedCount = 0;
            this.failedCount = 0;
            this.totalCount = 0;
            this.activeJobs = 0;
        }
    }
}
```

```apex
/**
 * @description Test class for AIBulkProcessingCoordinator with Phase 1 updates
 * Includes comprehensive testing for the getPendingRequests implementation
 * @author RouteLogic Team
 * @date 2025-01-20
 */
@isTest
private class AIBulkProcessingCoordinatorTest {
    
    @TestSetup
    static void setup() {
        // Create test cases
        List<Case> testCases = new List<Case>();
        for (Integer i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
            testCases.add(new Case(
                Subject = 'Test Case ' + i,
                Priority = (i < 5) ? 'High' : 'Medium',
                Status = 'New'
            ));
        }
        insert testCases;
        
        // Create AI Processing Status records for testing getPendingRequests
        List<AI_Processing_Status__c> statusRecords = new List<AI_Processing_Status__c>();
        for (Integer i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
            statusRecords.add(new AI_Processing_Status__c(
                Case__c = testCases[i].Id,
                Status__c = (i < 5) ? 'Pending' : 'Completed',
                AI_Provider__c = 'Ada',
                Request_Type__c = 'Bulk Process',
                Priority__c = (i < 3) ? 'High' : 'Normal',
                Request_Time__c = DateTime.now().addMinutes(-i),
                Is_Active__c = true
            ));
        }
        insert statusRecords;
        
        // Create retry requests
        List<AI_Retry_Request__c> retryRequests = new List<AI_Retry_Request__c>();
        for (Integer i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
            retryRequests.add(new AI_Retry_Request__c(
                Case__c = testCases[i].Id,
                AI_Provider__c = 'Ada',
                Status__c = 'Pending',
                Retry_Count__c = i,
                Error_Message__c = 'Test error',
                Original_Request_Id__c = 'TEST-' + i
            ));
        }
        insert retryRequests;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test successful bulk processing initiation with pending requests
     */
    @isTest
    static void testInitiateBulkProcessingSuccess() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Mock the queueable job
        Test.setMock(HttpCalloutMock.class, new MockAIProviderResponse());
        
        String jobId = AIBulkProcessingCoordinator.initiateBulkProcessing(3);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify job was queued
        System.assertNotEquals(null, jobId, 'Job ID should not be null');
        System.assertNotEquals('No pending requests to process', jobId, 'Should have found pending requests');
        
        // Verify status records were updated to Processing
        List<AI_Processing_Status__c> processingRecords = [
            SELECT Id, Status__c, Processing_Start_Time__c
            FROM AI_Processing_Status__c
            WHERE Status__c = 'Processing'
        ];
        
        System.assertEquals(3, processingRecords.size(), 'Should have 3 records in processing status');
        
        for (AI_Processing_Status__c status : processingRecords) {
            System.assertNotEquals(null, status.Processing_Start_Time__c, 
                'Processing start time should be set');
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test getPendingRequests priority ordering
     */
    @isTest
    static void testGetPendingRequestsPriorityOrder() {
        // Create a custom test method to directly test the private method behavior
        Test.startTest();
        
        String jobId = AIBulkProcessingCoordinator.initiateBulkProcessing(5);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify high priority records were processed first
        List<AI_Processing_Status__c> processingRecords = [
            SELECT Id, Priority__c, Request_Time__c
            FROM AI_Processing_Status__c
            WHERE Status__c = 'Processing'
            ORDER BY Request_Time__c ASC
        ];
        
        // First records should be high priority
        System.assertEquals('High', processingRecords[0].Priority__c, 
            'First record should be high priority');
        System.assertEquals('High', processingRecords[1].Priority__c, 
            'Second record should be high priority');
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test initiateBulkProcessing with no pending requests
     */
    @isTest
    static void testInitiateBulkProcessingNoPendingRequests() {
        // Update all pending records to completed
        List<AI_Processing_Status__c> pendingRecords = [
            SELECT Id FROM AI_Processing_Status__c WHERE Status__c = 'Pending'
        ];
        for (AI_Processing_Status__c status : pendingRecords) {
            status.Status__c = 'Completed';
        }
        update pendingRecords;
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        String result = AIBulkProcessingCoordinator.initiateBulkProcessing(10);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        System.assertEquals('No pending requests to process', result, 
            'Should return no pending requests message');
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test batch size limiting
     */
    @isTest
    static void testBatchSizeLimiting() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Request only 2 records despite having 5 pending
        String jobId = AIBulkProcessingCoordinator.initiateBulkProcessing(2);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify only 2 records were processed
        Integer processingCount = [
            SELECT COUNT() FROM AI_Processing_Status__c WHERE Status__c = 'Processing'
        ];
        System.assertEquals(2, processingCount, 'Should process only 2 records as per batch size');
        
        // Verify 3 records remain pending
        Integer pendingCount = [
            SELECT COUNT() FROM AI_Processing_Status__c WHERE Status__c = 'Pending'
        ];
        System.assertEquals(3, pendingCount, 'Should have 3 records still pending');
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test security enforcement in getPendingRequests
     */
    @isTest
    static void testGetPendingRequestsSecurity() {
        // Create a user without access to AI_Processing_Status__c
        User testUser = createTestUser('Standard User');
        
        System.runAs(testUser) {
            Test.startTest();
            
            try {
                AIBulkProcessingCoordinator.initiateBulkProcessing(5);
                System.assert(false, 'Should have thrown exception due to security');
            } catch (Exception e) {
                System.assert(e.getMessage().contains('security') || 
                             e.getMessage().contains('access'), 
                             'Should be security related exception');
            }
            
            Test.stopTest();
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test retry queue processing
     */
    @isTest
    static void testProcessRetryQueue() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        Integer retryCount = AIBulkProcessingCoordinator.processRetryQueue();
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        System.assertEquals(3, retryCount, 'Should process 3 retry requests');
        
        // Verify retry records were updated
        List<AI_Retry_Request__c> updatedRetries = [
            SELECT Id, Status__c, Retry_Count__c, Last_Retry_Time__c
            FROM AI_Retry_Request__c
        ];
        
        for (AI_Retry_Request__c retry : updatedRetries) {
            System.assertEquals('Processing', retry.Status__c, 'Status should be Processing');
            System.assertNotEquals(null, retry.Last_Retry_Time__c, 'Last retry time should be set');
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test circuit breaker functionality
     */
    @isTest
    static void testCircuitBreaker() {
        // Create multiple error logs to trigger circuit breaker
        List<Error_Log__c> errors = new List<Error_Log__c>();
        for (Integer i = 0; i < 6; i++) {
            errors.add(new Error_Log__c(
                Class_Name__c = 'AIBulkProcessingCoordinator',
                Method_Name__c = 'Test',
                Error_Message__c = 'Test error',
                Stack_Trace__c = 'Test trace'
            ));
        }
        insert errors;
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        try {
            AIBulkProcessingCoordinator.initiateBulkProcessing(5);
            System.assert(false, 'Should have thrown circuit breaker exception');
        } catch (AIHandledException e) {
            System.assert(e.getMessage().contains('Circuit breaker'), 
                'Should be circuit breaker exception');
        }
        
        Test.stopTest();
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test cancel all pending jobs
     */
    @isTest
    static void testCancelAllPendingJobs() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        Integer cancelledCount = AIBulkProcessingCoordinator.cancelAllPendingJobs();
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        System.assertEquals(5, cancelledCount, 'Should cancel 5 pending records');
        
        // Verify all pending records are cancelled
        Integer remainingPending = [
            SELECT COUNT() FROM AI_Processing_Status__c 
            WHERE Status__c IN ('Pending', 'Processing')
        ];
        System.assertEquals(0, remainingPending, 'No records should remain pending');
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test processing status retrieval
     */
    @isTest
    static void testGetProcessingStatus() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        AIBulkProcessingCoordinator.ProcessingStatus status = 
            AIBulkProcessingCoordinator.getProcessingStatus();
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        System.assertEquals(5, status.pendingCount, 'Should have 5 pending');
        System.assertEquals(5, status.completedCount, 'Should have 5 completed');
        System.assertEquals(10, status.totalCount, 'Should have 10 total');
        System.assertEquals(0, status.failedCount, 'Should have 0 failed');
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test inactive records are excluded
     */
    @isTest
    static void testInactiveRecordsExcluded() {
        // Deactivate some pending records
        List<AI_Processing_Status__c> pendingRecords = [
            SELECT Id FROM AI_Processing_Status__c 
            WHERE Status__c = 'Pending' LIMIT 2
        ];
        for (AI_Processing_Status__c status : pendingRecords) {
            status.Is_Active__c = false;
        }
        update pendingRecords;
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        String jobId = AIBulkProcessingCoordinator.initiateBulkProcessing(10);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Should only process 3 active pending records
        Integer processingCount = [
            SELECT COUNT() FROM AI_Processing_Status__c WHERE Status__c = 'Processing'
        ];
        System.assertEquals(3, processingCount, 'Should process only active records');
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test original request ID preservation
     */
    @isTest
    static void testOriginalRequestIdPreservation() {
        // Add original request IDs to test data
        List<AI_Processing_Status__c> pendingRecords = [
            SELECT Id FROM AI_Processing_Status__c 
            WHERE Status__c = 'Pending' LIMIT 2
        ];
        for (Integer i = 0; i < pendingRecords.size(); i++) {
            pendingRecords[i].Original_Request_Id__c = 'ORIGINAL-' + i;
        }
        update pendingRecords;
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        // We'll verify through the processing chain that IDs are preserved
        String jobId = AIBulkProcessingCoordinator.initiateBulkProcessing(2);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        System.assertNotEquals('No pending requests to process', jobId, 
            'Should have processed requests with original IDs');
    }
    
    // Helper methods
    
    /**
     * @description Creates a test user with specified profile
     */
    private static User createTestUser(String profileName) {
        Profile p = [SELECT Id FROM Profile WHERE Name = :profileName LIMIT 1];
        
        User u = new User(
            Alias = 'testuser',
            Email = 'testuser@routelogic.com',
            EmailEncodingKey = 'UTF-8',
            LastName = 'Test',
            LanguageLocaleKey = 'en_US',
            LocaleSidKey = 'en_US',
            ProfileId = p.Id,
            TimeZoneSidKey = 'America/Los_Angeles',
            UserName = 'testuser' + DateTime.now().getTime() + '@routelogic.com'
        );
        
        insert u;
        return u;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Mock class for AI provider HTTP responses
     */
    private class MockAIProviderResponse implements HttpCalloutMock {
        public HTTPResponse respond(HTTPRequest req) {
            HttpResponse res = new HttpResponse();
            res.setHeader('Content-Type', 'application/json');
            res.setBody('{"success":true,"data":{"sentiment":"positive","intent":"inquiry"}}');
            res.setStatusCode(200);
            return res;
        }
    }
}
```

```apex
        Test.setMock(HttpCalloutMock.class, new IntegrationTestMockResponse());

    @IsTest

        // Test the complete retry workflow
        Test.setMock(HttpCalloutMock.class, new IntegrationTestMockResponse(false, 429)); // Rate limit error
        
        // Get test cases
        List<Case> testCases = [SELECT Id FROM Case LIMIT 10];
        
        Test.startTest();

        for (Case c : testCases) {
            events.add(new AI_Case_Request__e(

                Request_Type__c = 'Retry Flow Test',
                Priority__c = 'Medium',
                Status__c = 'Pending'
            ));
        }
        
        // Execute bulk processing (will fail and create retry requests)
        AIBulkProcessingQueueable queueable = new AIBulkProcessingQueueable(events);
        System.enqueueJob(queueable);
        
        // Process retry queue
        Integer retryCount = AIBulkProcessingCoordinator.processRetryQueue();
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify retry workflow
        List<AI_Retry_Request__c> retryRequests = [
            SELECT Id, Case__c, Provider__c, Status__c, Retry_Count__c
            FROM AI_Retry_Request__c
            WHERE Provider__c = 'Azure_Cognitive'
        ];
        
        System.assert(retryRequests.size() > 0, 'Should create retry requests for failed processing');
        
        // Verify metrics captured the failures
        List<AI_Bulk_Processing_Metrics__c> metrics = [
            SELECT Id, Failed_Requests__c, Rate_Limit_Exceeded__c
            FROM AI_Bulk_Processing_Metrics__c
        ];
        
        if (!metrics.isEmpty()) {
            System.assert(metrics[0].Failed_Requests__c > 0 || metrics[0].Rate_Limit_Exceeded__c > 0,
                'Should track failed or rate-limited requests');
        }
    }

        System.assertNotEquals(null, metrics, 'Should return metrics');
        System.assertEquals(1, metrics.size(), 'Should return 1 metric record');
        
        System.assertNotEquals(null, activeJobs, 'Should return active jobs list');
        
        System.assertNotEquals(null, jobId, 'Should return job ID for force processing');
    }

        AI_Case_Request_EventHandler.handleAfterInsert(batch2);

    @IsTest
    static void testSecurityAndFieldLevelSecurity() {
        // Test security enforcement throughout the system
        Test.setMock(HttpCalloutMock.class, new IntegrationTestMockResponse());
        
        // Get test cases
        List<Case> testCases = [SELECT Id FROM Case LIMIT 5];
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Test security utils
        List<AI_Processing_Status__c> newRecords = new List<AI_Processing_Status__c>();
        for (Case c : testCases) {
            newRecords.add(new AI_Processing_Status__c(
                Case__c = c.Id,
                AI_Provider__c = 'OpenAI',
                Status__c = 'Security Test',
                Success__c = false
            ));
        }
        
        // Test security stripping
        List<SObject> secureRecords = SecurityUtils.stripInaccessibleRecords(
            AccessType.CREATABLE,
            newRecords
        );
        
        insert secureRecords;
        
        // Test field-level security checks
        Set<String> fields = new Set<String>{'Case__c', 'AI_Provider__c', 'Status__c'};
        Boolean hasReadAccess = SecurityUtils.hasReadAccess(
            AI_Processing_Status__c.SObjectType,
            fields
        );
        
        Boolean hasCreateAccess = SecurityUtils.hasCreateAccess(
            AI_Processing_Status__c.SObjectType,
            fields
        );
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify security enforcement
        System.assertNotEquals(null, secureRecords, 'Should return secure records');
        System.assertEquals(5, secureRecords.size(), 'Should process all secure records');
        System.assertEquals(true, hasReadAccess, 'Should have read access in test context');
        System.assertEquals(true, hasCreateAccess, 'Should have create access in test context');
        
        // Verify records were created securely
        List<AI_Processing_Status__c> createdRecords = [
            SELECT Id, Status__c
            FROM AI_Processing_Status__c
            WHERE Status__c = 'Security Test'
        ];
        
        System.assertEquals(5, createdRecords.size(), 'Should create all secure records');
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testCleanupAndMaintenance() {
        // Test system cleanup and maintenance functions
        
        // Create old test data (note: CreatedDate cannot be set in tests)
        List<AI_Processing_Status__c> statusRecords = new List<AI_Processing_Status__c>();
        List<AI_Retry_Request__c> retryRequests = new List<AI_Retry_Request__c>();
        List<AI_Bulk_Processing_Metrics__c> metrics = new List<AI_Bulk_Processing_Metrics__c>();
        List<Error_Log__c> errorLogs = new List<Error_Log__c>();
        
        List<Case> testCases = [SELECT Id FROM Case LIMIT 10];
        
        // Create test records for cleanup
        for (Case c : testCases) {
            statusRecords.add(new AI_Processing_Status__c(
                Case__c = c.Id,
                AI_Provider__c = 'OpenAI',
                Status__c = 'Completed',
                Success__c = true
            ));
            
            retryRequests.add(new AI_Retry_Request__c(
                Case__c = c.Id,
                Provider__c = 'OpenAI',
                Request_Type__c = 'Cleanup Test',
                Status__c = 'Completed',
                Retry_Count__c = 3,
                Max_Retries__c = 3
            ));
            
            errorLogs.add(new Error_Log__c(
                Class_Name__c = 'CleanupTest',
                Error_Type__c = 'TestError',
                Error_Message__c = 'Test error for cleanup',
                User__c = UserInfo.getUserId(),
                Timestamp__c = DateTime.now()
            ));
        }
        
        for (Integer i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
            metrics.add(new AI_Bulk_Processing_Metrics__c(
                Batch_Id__c = 'CLEANUP_BATCH_' + i,
                Total_Requests__c = 10,
                Successful_Requests__c = 8,
                Failed_Requests__c = 2
            ));
        }
        
        insert statusRecords;
        insert retryRequests;
        insert metrics;
        insert errorLogs;
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Test cleanup functions
        Integer cleanedBulkRecords = AIBulkProcessingCoordinator.cleanupOldRecords(30);
        ErrorLogService.cleanupOldLogs(30);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // In test context, cleanup won't delete records due to date filters
        // This verifies the cleanup logic executes without errors
        System.assert(cleanedBulkRecords >= 0, 'Cleanup should return non-negative count');
        
        // Verify records still exist (they won't be deleted in test context)
        List<AI_Processing_Status__c> remainingStatus = [SELECT Id FROM AI_Processing_Status__c];
        List<Error_Log__c> remainingLogs = [SELECT Id FROM Error_Log__c];
        
        System.assert(remainingStatus.size() > 0, 'Records should remain in test context');
        System.assert(remainingLogs.size() > 0, 'Error logs should remain in test context');
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Mock HTTP response for integration testing
     */
    public class IntegrationTestMockResponse implements HttpCalloutMock {
        private Boolean success;
        private Integer statusCode;
        
        public IntegrationTestMockResponse() {
            this(true, 200);
        }
        
        public IntegrationTestMockResponse(Boolean success, Integer statusCode) {
            this.success = success;
            this.statusCode = statusCode;
        }
        
        public HttpResponse respond(HttpRequest req) {
            HttpResponse res = new HttpResponse();
            res.setStatusCode(this.statusCode);
            
            if (this.success && this.statusCode == 200) {
                // Create successful bulk response
                Map<String, Object> bulkResponse = new Map<String, Object>{
                    'batchId' => 'INTEGRATION_TEST_BATCH',
                    'success' => true,
                    'processedCount' => 50,
                    'responses' => new List<Object>()
                };
                
                // Create individual responses
                List<Object> responses = new List<Object>();
                for (Integer i = 0; i < 50; i++) {
                    responses.add(new Map<String, Object>{
                        'requestId' => 'INT_REQ_' + i,
                        'success' => true,
                        'sentiment' => 'Positive',
                        'intent' => 'Product Inquiry',
                        'suggestedPriority' => 'Medium',
                        'suggestedResponse' => 'Thank you for your inquiry. We will respond shortly.',
                        'isAsync' => false
                    });
                }
                
                bulkResponse.put('responses', responses);
                res.setBody(JSON.serialize(bulkResponse));
            } else {
                res.setStatus('Error');
                String errorMessage = 'Integration test error - Status: ' + this.statusCode;
                res.setBody('{"error": "' + errorMessage + '"}');
            }
            
            return res;
        }
    }
}
```

## 📄 FILE: force-app/main/default/classes/AIBulkProcessingIntegrationTest_Phase1.cls

```apex
/**
 * @description End-to-end integration test for Phase 1 bulk processing implementation
 * Tests the complete flow from Platform Event to AI response processing
 * @author RouteLogic Team  
 * @date 2025-01-20
 */
@isTest
private class AIBulkProcessingIntegrationTest_Phase1 {
    
    @TestSetup
    static void setup() {
        // Create test cases
        List<Case> testCases = new List<Case>();
        for (Integer i = 0; i < 20; i++) {
            testCases.add(new Case(
                Subject = 'Integration Test Case ' + i,
                Description = 'Test case for end-to-end processing validation',
                Priority = Math.mod(i, 3) == 0 ? 'High' : 'Normal',
                Status = 'New',
                Origin = 'Email'
            ));
        }
        insert testCases;
        
        // Configure AI provider settings
        AI_Provider_Settings__mdt providerSettings = new AI_Provider_Settings__mdt(
            DeveloperName = 'Ada_Test',
            Label = 'Ada Test Provider',
            Provider_Name__c = 'Ada',
            Is_Active__c = true,
            API_Endpoint__c = 'https://api.ada.support/v1/analyze',
            Max_Batch_Size__c = 10,
            Timeout_ms__c = 30000
        );
        
        // Since we can't insert metadata in tests, we'll use custom settings or mocking
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test complete flow from Platform Event through processing
     */
    @isTest
    static void testCompleteProcessingFlow() {
        List<Case> testCases = [SELECT Id FROM Case];
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Step 1: Publish Platform Events
        List<AI_Case_Request__e> events = new List<AI_Case_Request__e>();
        for (Case c : testCases) {
            events.add(new AI_Case_Request__e(
                CaseId__c = c.Id,
                AI_Provider__c = 'Ada',
                Request_Type__c = 'Bulk Process',
                Priority__c = 'Normal',
                Status__c = 'Pending'
            ));
        }
        
        List<Database.SaveResult> publishResults = EventBus.publish(events);
        
        // Verify events published successfully
        for (Database.SaveResult sr : publishResults) {
            System.assert(sr.isSuccess(), 'Platform event should publish successfully');
        }
        
        // Platform Event trigger should create AI_Processing_Status__c records
        Test.getEventBus().deliver();
        
        // Step 2: Verify AI_Processing_Status__c records created
        List<AI_Processing_Status__c> statusRecords = [
            SELECT Id, Case__c, Status__c, AI_Provider__c
            FROM AI_Processing_Status__c
            WHERE Status__c = 'Pending'
        ];
        
        System.assertEquals(testCases.size(), statusRecords.size(), 
            'Should create status record for each platform event');
        
        // Step 3: Mock HTTP callout for AI provider
        Test.setMock(HttpCalloutMock.class, new MockBulkAIResponse());
        
        // Step 4: Initiate bulk processing
        String jobId = AIBulkProcessingCoordinator.initiateBulkProcessing(10);
        
        System.assertNotEquals('No pending requests to process', jobId, 
            'Should find and process pending requests');
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Step 5: Verify processing results
        List<AI_Processing_Status__c> processedRecords = [
            SELECT Id, Status__c, Processing_Start_Time__c, 
                   Completion_Time__c, Response_Data__c
            FROM AI_Processing_Status__c
            WHERE Id IN :statusRecords
        ];
        
        Integer processingCount = 0;
        Integer completedCount = 0;
        
        for (AI_Processing_Status__c status : processedRecords) {
            if (status.Status__c == 'Processing') {
                processingCount++;
                System.assertNotEquals(null, status.Processing_Start_Time__c,
                    'Processing start time should be set');
            } else if (status.Status__c == 'Completed') {
                completedCount++;
                System.assertNotEquals(null, status.Completion_Time__c,
                    'Completion time should be set for completed records');
            }
        }
        
        // Due to batch size of 10, we should have 10 in processing
        System.assertEquals(10, processingCount, 'Should have 10 records in processing');
        
        // Verify Cases were updated with AI insights
        List<Case> updatedCases = [
            SELECT Id, AI_Sentiment__c, AI_Intent__c, AI_Processing_Status__c
            FROM Case
            WHERE Id IN :testCases
            AND AI_Processing_Status__c != null
        ];
        
        System.assert(!updatedCases.isEmpty(), 'Cases should be updated with AI insights');
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test processing with mixed priorities
     */
    @isTest
    static void testPriorityBasedProcessing() {
        // Create cases with different priorities
        List<Case> highPriorityCases = new List<Case>();
        List<Case> normalPriorityCases = new List<Case>();
        
        for (Integer i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
            highPriorityCases.add(new Case(
                Subject = 'High Priority Case ' + i,
                Priority = 'High',
                Status = 'New'
            ));
            normalPriorityCases.add(new Case(
                Subject = 'Normal Priority Case ' + i,
                Priority = 'Medium',
                Status = 'New'
            ));
        }
        
        insert highPriorityCases;
        insert normalPriorityCases;
        
        // Create AI_Processing_Status__c records directly (simulating Platform Event handler)
        List<AI_Processing_Status__c> statusRecords = new List<AI_Processing_Status__c>();
        
        for (Case c : highPriorityCases) {
            statusRecords.add(new AI_Processing_Status__c(
                Case__c = c.Id,
                Status__c = 'Pending',
                Priority__c = 'High',
                AI_Provider__c = 'Ada',
                Request_Time__c = DateTime.now(),
                Is_Active__c = true
            ));
        }
        
        for (Case c : normalPriorityCases) {
            statusRecords.add(new AI_Processing_Status__c(
                Case__c = c.Id,
                Status__c = 'Pending',
                Priority__c = 'Normal',
                AI_Provider__c = 'Ada',
                Request_Time__c = DateTime.now(),
                Is_Active__c = true
            ));
        }
        
        insert statusRecords;
        
        Test.startTest();
        Test.setMock(HttpCalloutMock.class, new MockBulkAIResponse());
        
        // Process only 5 records
        String jobId = AIBulkProcessingCoordinator.initiateBulkProcessing(5);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify high priority records were processed first
        List<AI_Processing_Status__c> processingRecords = [
            SELECT Id, Priority__c, Case__r.Priority
            FROM AI_Processing_Status__c
            WHERE Status__c = 'Processing'
        ];
        
        System.assertEquals(5, processingRecords.size(), 'Should process 5 records');
        
        for (AI_Processing_Status__c status : processingRecords) {
            System.assertEquals('High', status.Priority__c, 
                'All processed records should be high priority');
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test retry mechanism integration
     */
    @isTest
    static void testRetryMechanismIntegration() {
        Case testCase = new Case(
            Subject = 'Retry Test Case',
            Status = 'New'
        );
        insert testCase;
        
        // Create a failed processing status
        AI_Processing_Status__c failedStatus = new AI_Processing_Status__c(
            Case__c = testCase.Id,
            Status__c = 'Failed',
            AI_Provider__c = 'Ada',
            Error_Message__c = 'API timeout',
            Is_Active__c = true
        );
        insert failedStatus;
        
        // Create retry request
        AI_Retry_Request__c retryRequest = new AI_Retry_Request__c(
            Case__c = testCase.Id,
            AI_Provider__c = 'Ada',
            Status__c = 'Pending',
            Retry_Count__c = 0,
            Original_Request_Id__c = failedStatus.Id,
            Error_Message__c = 'API timeout'
        );
        insert retryRequest;
        
        Test.startTest();
        Test.setMock(HttpCalloutMock.class, new MockBulkAIResponse());
        
        // Process retry queue
        Integer retryCount = AIBulkProcessingCoordinator.processRetryQueue();
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        System.assertEquals(1, retryCount, 'Should process 1 retry request');
        
        // Verify retry was processed
        AI_Retry_Request__c updatedRetry = [
            SELECT Id, Status__c, Retry_Count__c, Last_Retry_Time__c
            FROM AI_Retry_Request__c
            WHERE Id = :retryRequest.Id
        ];
        
        System.assertEquals('Processing', updatedRetry.Status__c, 'Retry should be processing');
        System.assertEquals(1, updatedRetry.Retry_Count__c, 'Retry count should increment');
        System.assertNotEquals(null, updatedRetry.Last_Retry_Time__c, 'Last retry time should be set');
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test error handling and circuit breaker
     */
    @isTest
    static void testErrorHandlingFlow() {
        // Create test case
        Case testCase = new Case(Subject = 'Error Test Case', Status = 'New');
        insert testCase;
        
        // Create pending status
        AI_Processing_Status__c pendingStatus = new AI_Processing_Status__c(
            Case__c = testCase.Id,
            Status__c = 'Pending',
            AI_Provider__c = 'Ada',
            Is_Active__c = true
        );
        insert pendingStatus;
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Mock failing API response
        Test.setMock(HttpCalloutMock.class, new MockFailingAIResponse());
        
        try {
            String jobId = AIBulkProcessingCoordinator.initiateBulkProcessing(1);
            // The actual error would occur in the queueable execution
        } catch (Exception e) {
            // Expected in some scenarios
        }
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // In a real scenario, we'd verify error logs were created
        // and the circuit breaker logic was triggered after multiple failures
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test concurrent processing handling
     */
    @isTest
    static void testConcurrentProcessing() {
        List<Case> testCases = new List<Case>();
        for (Integer i = 0; i < 30; i++) {
            testCases.add(new Case(
                Subject = 'Concurrent Test ' + i,
                Status = 'New'
            ));
        }
        insert testCases;
        
        // Create pending status records
        List<AI_Processing_Status__c> statusRecords = new List<AI_Processing_Status__c>();
        for (Case c : testCases) {
            statusRecords.add(new AI_Processing_Status__c(
                Case__c = c.Id,
                Status__c = 'Pending',
                AI_Provider__c = 'Ada',
                Is_Active__c = true
            ));
        }
        insert statusRecords;
        
        Test.startTest();
        Test.setMock(HttpCalloutMock.class, new MockBulkAIResponse());
        
        // Simulate multiple concurrent processing requests
        String jobId1 = AIBulkProcessingCoordinator.initiateBulkProcessing(10);
        String jobId2 = AIBulkProcessingCoordinator.initiateBulkProcessing(10);
        String jobId3 = AIBulkProcessingCoordinator.initiateBulkProcessing(10);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify no duplicate processing
        List<AI_Processing_Status__c> allStatuses = [
            SELECT Id, Status__c
            FROM AI_Processing_Status__c
            WHERE Id IN :statusRecords
        ];
        
        Map<String, Integer> statusCounts = new Map<String, Integer>{
            'Pending' => 0,
            'Processing' => 0
        };
        
        for (AI_Processing_Status__c status : allStatuses) {
            Integer count = statusCounts.get(status.Status__c);
            statusCounts.put(status.Status__c, count != null ? count + 1 : 1);
        }
        
        // Should have processed exactly 30 records (no duplicates)
        System.assertEquals(30, statusCounts.get('Processing'), 
            'All records should be in processing without duplicates');
    }
    
    // Mock response classes
    
    /**
     * @description Mock successful bulk AI response
     */
    private class MockBulkAIResponse implements HttpCalloutMock {
        public HTTPResponse respond(HTTPRequest req) {
            HttpResponse res = new HttpResponse();
            res.setHeader('Content-Type', 'application/json');
            
            // Parse request to return appropriate bulk response
            Map<String, Object> responseData = new Map<String, Object>{
                'success' => true,
                'results' => new List<Map<String, Object>>{
                    new Map<String, Object>{
                        'caseId' => 'CASE-001',
                        'sentiment' => 'positive',
                        'intent' => 'inquiry',
                        'confidence' => 0.95,
                        'suggestedResponse' => 'Thank you for your inquiry.'
                    }
                }
            };
            
            res.setBody(JSON.serialize(responseData));
            res.setStatusCode(200);
            return res;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Mock failing AI response
     */
    private class MockFailingAIResponse implements HttpCalloutMock {
        public HTTPResponse respond(HTTPRequest req) {
            HttpResponse res = new HttpResponse();
            res.setHeader('Content-Type', 'application/json');
            res.setBody('{"error":"Service temporarily unavailable"}');
            res.setStatusCode(503);
            return res;
        }
    }
}
```
