## 📄 FILE: force-app/main/default/classes/AIBulkProcessingQueueable.cls

```apex
/**
 * @description Enhanced queueable class for bulk AI request processing
 * @author RouteLogic Team
 * @date 2025-01-17
 */
public class AIBulkProcessingQueueable implements Queueable, Database.AllowsCallouts {
    
    // Use centralized constants
    private static final Integer BATCH_SIZE = Constants.BATCH_THRESHOLD;
    private static final Integer MAX_CALLOUT_TIME = Constants.MAX_CALLOUT_TIME;
    private static final Integer RETRY_ATTEMPTS = Constants.RETRY_ATTEMPTS;
    
    private List<AI_Case_Request__e> requests;
    private Map<String, List<AI_Case_Request__e>> requestsByProvider;
    private BulkProcessingMetrics metrics;
    
    /**
     * @description Constructor
     * @param requests List of AI case requests to process
     */
    public AIBulkProcessingQueueable(List<AI_Case_Request__e> requests) {
        this.requests = requests;
        this.metrics = new BulkProcessingMetrics();
        this.metrics.totalRequests = requests.size();
        this.metrics.startTime = DateTime.now();
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Execute method for queueable
     */
    public void execute(QueueableContext context) {
        try {
            // Group requests by provider for efficient bulk processing
            groupRequestsByProvider();
            
            // Process each provider's requests in bulk
            for (String provider : requestsByProvider.keySet()) {
                processBulkRequests(provider, requestsByProvider.get(provider));
            }
            
            // Log metrics
            logProcessingMetrics();
            
            // Chain next batch if needed
            chainNextBatchIfNeeded();
            
        } catch (CalloutException e) {
            handleProcessingError(e);
            // Specific handling for callout errors
            if (e.getMessage().contains('Read timed out')) {
                // Queue for retry on timeout
                queueForRetry(requests, 'Callout timeout: ' + e.getMessage());
            }
        } catch (DmlException e) {
            handleProcessingError(e);
            // Log DML failures for investigation
            System.debug(LoggingLevel.ERROR, 'DML Error: ' + e.getDmlMessage(0));
        } catch (Exception e) {
            handleProcessingError(e);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Group requests by AI provider
     */
    private void groupRequestsByProvider() {
        requestsByProvider = new Map<String, List<AI_Case_Request__e>>();
        
        for (AI_Case_Request__e request : requests) {
            String provider = request.AI_Provider__c;
            if (!requestsByProvider.containsKey(provider)) {
                requestsByProvider.put(provider, new List<AI_Case_Request__e>());
            }
            requestsByProvider.get(provider).add(request);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Process bulk requests for a specific provider using AgnosticRoutingEngine
     */
    private void processBulkRequests(String provider, List<AI_Case_Request__e> providerRequests) {
        // Get provider adapter (new architecture)
        IAIProviderAdapter providerAdapter = AIProviderAdapterFactory.getAdapter(provider);
        
        // Extract case IDs for bulk routing decisions
        Set<Id> caseIds = new Set<Id>();
        for (AI_Case_Request__e request : providerRequests) {
            caseIds.add(request.Case_Id__c);
        }
        
        // Make bulk routing decisions using AgnosticRoutingEngine
        Map<Id, AgnosticRoutingEngine.RoutingDecision> routingDecisions = 
            AgnosticRoutingEngine.makeBulkRoutingDecisions(new List<Id>(caseIds));
        
        // Create routing ledger entries for audit trail
        List<Routing_Ledger__c> ledgerEntries = new List<Routing_Ledger__c>();
        
        // Process each request with routing decision
        for (AI_Case_Request__e request : providerRequests) {
            AgnosticRoutingEngine.RoutingDecision decision = routingDecisions.get(request.Case_Id__c);
            
            if (decision != null) {
                // Create ledger entry for immutable audit trail
                Routing_Ledger__c ledger = RoutingLedgerTriggerHandler.createLedgerEntry(decision, provider);
                ledgerEntries.add(ledger);
                
                // Prepare provider-specific request
                Object providerRequest = providerAdapter.prepareProviderRequest(decision);
                
                // Execute handoff (this replaces the old API callout logic)
                executeHandoff(provider, request, decision, providerRequest);
            }
        }
        
        // Insert ledger entries for audit trail
        if (!ledgerEntries.isEmpty()) {
            try {
                insert ledgerEntries;
                metrics.successfulLedgerEntries += ledgerEntries.size();
            } catch (DmlException e) {
                System.debug(LoggingLevel.ERROR, 'Failed to create ledger entries: ' + e.getMessage());
                metrics.failedLedgerEntries += ledgerEntries.size();
            }
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Process a batch of requests
     */
    private void processBatch(String provider, List<AI_Case_Request__e> batch, IAIProviderSecurity securityProvider) {
        try {
            // Check rate limits
            if (!securityProvider.checkRateLimit('bulk_process')) {
                // Queue for retry
                queueForRetry(batch, 'Rate limit exceeded');
                metrics.rateLimitExceeded += batch.size();
                return;
            }
            
            // Prepare bulk request
            BulkAIRequest bulkRequest = prepareBulkRequest(provider, batch, securityProvider);
            
            // Make API call
            HttpResponse response = makeBulkAPICall(provider, bulkRequest, securityProvider);
            
            // Process response
            if (response.getStatusCode() == 200) {
                processBulkResponse(provider, response, batch);
                metrics.successfulRequests += batch.size();
            } else {
                handleBulkError(response, batch);
                metrics.failedRequests += batch.size();
            }
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            handleBatchError(e, batch);
            metrics.errorRequests += batch.size();
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Prepare bulk request for AI provider
     */
    private BulkAIRequest prepareBulkRequest(String provider, List<AI_Case_Request__e> batch, IAIProviderSecurity securityProvider) {
        BulkAIRequest bulkRequest = new BulkAIRequest();
        bulkRequest.provider = provider;
        bulkRequest.requests = new List<SingleAIRequest>();
        
        // Get cases for enrichment
        Set<Id> caseIds = new Set<Id>();
        for (AI_Case_Request__e request : batch) {
            caseIds.add(request.CaseId__c);
        }
        
        Map<Id, Case> casesMap = new Map<Id, Case>([
            SELECT Id, Subject, Description, Priority, Status, AccountId, ContactId,
                   Account.Name, Contact.Name, Contact.Email
            FROM Case
            WHERE Id IN :caseIds
            WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED
        ]);
        
        // Build individual requests
        for (AI_Case_Request__e request : batch) {
            SingleAIRequest singleRequest = new SingleAIRequest();
            singleRequest.requestId = generateRequestId();
            singleRequest.caseId = request.CaseId__c;
            singleRequest.requestType = request.Request_Type__c;
            singleRequest.priority = request.Priority__c;
            
            // Enrich with case data
            Case c = casesMap.get(request.CaseId__c);
            if (c != null) {
                singleRequest.context = buildContext(c);
                
                // Sanitize and mask PII in content
                String region = PIIMaskingService.detectRegion();
                String sanitizedContent = securityProvider.sanitizeRequest(c.Description);
                singleRequest.content = PIIMaskingService.maskPII(sanitizedContent, region);
            }
            
            // Add metadata
            if (String.isNotBlank(request.Metadata__c)) {
                singleRequest.metadata = (Map<String, Object>) JSON.deserializeUntyped(request.Metadata__c);
            }
            
            bulkRequest.requests.add(singleRequest);
        }
        
        // Set bulk request metadata
        bulkRequest.batchId = context != null ? context.getJobId() : generateBatchId();
        bulkRequest.timestamp = DateTime.now();
        bulkRequest.totalCount = batch.size();
        
        return bulkRequest;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Make bulk API call to AI provider
     */
    private HttpResponse makeBulkAPICall(String provider, BulkAIRequest bulkRequest, IAIProviderSecurity securityProvider) {
        HttpRequest req = new HttpRequest();
        
        // Get provider configuration
        Map<String, Object> config = securityProvider.getProviderConfig();
        String endpoint = (String) config.get('endpoint') + '/bulk/process';
        
        req.setEndpoint(endpoint);
        req.setMethod('POST');
        req.setTimeout(ConfigManager.getCalloutTimeoutMs());
        
        // Set security headers
        Map<String, String> headers = securityProvider.getSecurityHeaders();
        for (String key : headers.keySet()) {
            req.setHeader(key, headers.get(key));
        }
        
        // Serialize request body
        String requestBody = JSON.serialize(bulkRequest);
        
        // Check if compression should be enabled
        if (ConfigManager.isCompressionEnabled() && shouldCompressRequest(requestBody)) {
            // Enable gzip compression
            req.setCompressed(true);
            req.setHeader('Content-Encoding', 'gzip');
            req.setHeader('Accept-Encoding', 'gzip');
        }
        
        // Set body
        req.setBody(requestBody);
        
        // Make callout with retry logic for rate limits
        Http http = new Http();
        HttpResponse response;
        Integer retryAttempts = 0;
        Integer maxRetries = 3;
        
        while (retryAttempts <= maxRetries) {
            try {
                response = http.send(req);
                
                // Check for rate limit response
                if (response.getStatusCode() == Constants.HTTP_TOO_MANY_REQUESTS) {
                    if (retryAttempts < maxRetries) {
                        // Extract retry delay from headers
                        Integer retryAfter = extractRetryAfter(response);
                        
                        // Log rate limit hit
                        System.debug('Rate limit hit for provider ' + provider + '. Retrying after ' + retryAfter + ' seconds');
                        
                        // Publish rate limit metric
                        EventBus.publish(new AI_Processing_Metric__e(
                            Provider__c = provider,
                            Request_Status__c = 'Rate_Limited',
                            Retry_Count__c = retryAttempts,
                            Processing_Time_Ms__c = retryAfter * 1000
                        ));
                        
                        // Wait before retry (convert to milliseconds, max 10 seconds)
                        Integer waitTime = Math.min(retryAfter * 1000, 10000);
                        if (waitTime > 0) {
                            // Use CPU time safe delay
                            Long startTime = System.currentTimeMillis();
                            while (System.currentTimeMillis() - startTime < waitTime) {
                                // Busy wait to avoid CPU timeout
                            }
                        }
                        
                        retryAttempts++;
                        continue;
                    } else {
                        // Max retries exceeded, throw rate limit error
                        throw new AIException(Constants.RATE_LIMIT_ERROR, 
                            'Rate limit exceeded for provider ' + provider + ' after ' + maxRetries + ' retries');
                    }
                }
                
                // Check for other retryable status codes
                if (Constants.RETRYABLE_STATUS_CODES.contains(response.getStatusCode()) && retryAttempts < maxRetries) {
                    retryAttempts++;
                    // Exponential backoff
                    Integer backoffMs = Math.min(1000 * (Integer)Math.pow(2, retryAttempts), 5000);
                    Long startTime = System.currentTimeMillis();
                    while (System.currentTimeMillis() - startTime < backoffMs) {
                        // Busy wait
                    }
                    continue;
                }
                
                // Success or non-retryable error, break out of loop
                break;
                
            } catch (CalloutException e) {
                if (retryAttempts < maxRetries) {
                    retryAttempts++;
                    continue;
                }
                throw e;
            }
        }
        
        // Validate response
        if (!securityProvider.validateResponse(response)) {
            throw new AIException('Invalid response from provider');
        }
        
        return response;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Process bulk API response
     */
    private void processBulkResponse(String provider, HttpResponse response, List<AI_Case_Request__e> batch) {
        BulkAIResponse bulkResponse = (BulkAIResponse) JSON.deserialize(
            response.getBody(), 
            BulkAIResponse.class
        );
        
        List<Case> casesToUpdate = new List<Case>();
        List<AI_Processing_Status__c> statusesToInsert = new List<AI_Processing_Status__c>();
        Map<String, AI_Callback_Context__c> callbackContexts = new Map<String, AI_Callback_Context__c>();
        List<AI_Processing_Metric__e> metrics = new List<AI_Processing_Metric__e>();
        
        // Process individual responses
        for (Integer i = 0; i < bulkResponse.responses.size(); i++) {
            SingleAIResponse singleResponse = bulkResponse.responses[i];
            AI_Case_Request__e originalRequest = batch[i];
            
            // Update case with AI response
            if (singleResponse.success) {
                Case c = new Case(Id = originalRequest.CaseId__c);
                updateCaseFromResponse(c, singleResponse);
                casesToUpdate.add(c);
                
                // Create processing status
                AI_Processing_Status__c status = new AI_Processing_Status__c(
                    Case__c = originalRequest.CaseId__c,
                    AI_Provider__c = provider,
                    Status__c = 'Completed',
                    Request_Time__c = bulkRequest.timestamp,
                    Response_Time__c = DateTime.now(),
                    Success__c = true
                );
                statusesToInsert.add(status);
                
                // Publish success metric
                Long processingTime = bulkRequest.timestamp != null ? 
                    DateTime.now().getTime() - bulkRequest.timestamp.getTime() : 0;
                metrics.add(new AI_Processing_Metric__e(
                    Case_ID__c = originalRequest.CaseId__c,
                    Provider__c = provider,
                    Retry_Count__c = 0, // TODO: Get actual retry count if this was a retry
                    Request_Status__c = 'Success',
                    Processing_Time_Ms__c = processingTime.intValue()
                ));
                
                // Store callback context if async
                if (singleResponse.isAsync && String.isNotBlank(singleResponse.callbackId)) {
                    AI_Callback_Context__c context = new AI_Callback_Context__c(
                        Callback_Id__c = singleResponse.callbackId,
                        Case__c = originalRequest.CaseId__c,
                        Provider__c = provider,
                        Request_Data__c = JSON.serialize(singleResponse)
                    );
                    callbackContexts.put(singleResponse.callbackId, context);
                }
            } else {
                // Handle individual request failure
                handleSingleRequestFailure(originalRequest, singleResponse);
            }
        }
        
        // Bulk updates
        if (!casesToUpdate.isEmpty()) {
            update SecurityUtils.stripInaccessibleRecords(AccessType.UPDATABLE, casesToUpdate);
        }
        
        if (!statusesToInsert.isEmpty()) {
            insert SecurityUtils.stripInaccessibleRecords(AccessType.CREATABLE, statusesToInsert);
        }
        
        if (!callbackContexts.isEmpty()) {
            insert SecurityUtils.stripInaccessibleRecords(AccessType.CREATABLE, callbackContexts.values());
        }
        
        // Publish all metrics
        if (!metrics.isEmpty()) {
            EventBus.publish(metrics);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Update case from AI response
     */
    private void updateCaseFromResponse(Case c, SingleAIResponse response) {
        if (response.sentiment != null) {
            c.AI_Sentiment__c = response.sentiment;
        }
        
        if (response.intent != null) {
            c.AI_Intent__c = response.intent;
        }
        
        if (response.suggestedPriority != null) {
            c.Priority = response.suggestedPriority;
        }
        
        if (response.suggestedResponse != null) {
            c.AI_Suggested_Response__c = response.suggestedResponse;
        }
        
        c.AI_Last_Analysis__c = DateTime.now();
        c.AI_Processing_Status__c = 'Processed';
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Handle bulk error response
     */
    private void handleBulkError(HttpResponse response, List<AI_Case_Request__e> batch) {
        String errorMessage = 'Bulk API error: ' + response.getStatusCode() + ' - ' + response.getStatus();
        
        // Log error
        ErrorLogService.logError('AIBulkProcessingQueueable', null, errorMessage);
        
        // Queue for retry if retryable
        if (isRetryableError(response.getStatusCode())) {
            queueForRetry(batch, errorMessage);
        } else {
            // Create failed status records
            createFailedStatusRecords(batch, errorMessage);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Handle batch processing error
     */
    private void handleBatchError(Exception e, List<AI_Case_Request__e> batch) {
        ErrorLogService.logError('AIBulkProcessingQueueable.processBatch', e, null);
        queueForRetry(batch, e.getMessage());
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Handle single request failure within bulk response
     */
    private void handleSingleRequestFailure(AI_Case_Request__e request, SingleAIResponse response) {
        // Create failed status record
        AI_Processing_Status__c status = new AI_Processing_Status__c(
            Case__c = request.CaseId__c,
            AI_Provider__c = request.AI_Provider__c,
            Status__c = 'Failed',
            Error_Message__c = response.errorMessage,
            Success__c = false
        );
        
        insert SecurityUtils.stripInaccessibleRecords(
            AccessType.CREATABLE,
            new List<AI_Processing_Status__c>{status}
        )[0];
        
        // Queue for retry if appropriate
        if (response.retryable) {
            queueForRetry(new List<AI_Case_Request__e>{request}, response.errorMessage);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Queue requests for retry
     */
    private void queueForRetry(List<AI_Case_Request__e> requests, String reason) {
        List<AI_Retry_Request__c> retryRequests = new List<AI_Retry_Request__c>();
        List<AI_Processing_Metric__e> metrics = new List<AI_Processing_Metric__e>();
        
        for (AI_Case_Request__e request : requests) {
            AI_Retry_Request__c retry = new AI_Retry_Request__c(
                Case__c = request.CaseId__c,
                Provider__c = request.AI_Provider__c,
                Request_Type__c = request.Request_Type__c,
                Request_Data__c = JSON.serialize(request),
                Retry_Count__c = 0,
                Max_Retries__c = RETRY_ATTEMPTS,
                Status__c = 'Pending',
                Error_Message__c = reason
            );
            retryRequests.add(retry);
            
            // Create metric for initial retry queue
            metrics.add(new AI_Processing_Metric__e(
                Case_ID__c = request.CaseId__c,
                Provider__c = request.AI_Provider__c,
                Retry_Count__c = 0,
                Request_Status__c = 'Queued_For_Retry',
                Processing_Time_Ms__c = 0
            ));
        }
        
        if (!retryRequests.isEmpty()) {
            insert SecurityUtils.stripInaccessibleRecords(AccessType.CREATABLE, retryRequests);
        }
        
        // Publish retry metrics
        if (!metrics.isEmpty()) {
            EventBus.publish(metrics);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Create failed status records
     */
    private void createFailedStatusRecords(List<AI_Case_Request__e> batch, String errorMessage) {
        List<AI_Processing_Status__c> failedStatuses = new List<AI_Processing_Status__c>();
        
        for (AI_Case_Request__e request : batch) {
            AI_Processing_Status__c status = new AI_Processing_Status__c(
                Case__c = request.CaseId__c,
                AI_Provider__c = request.AI_Provider__c,
                Status__c = 'Failed',
                Error_Message__c = errorMessage,
                Success__c = false
            );
            failedStatuses.add(status);
        }
        
        if (!failedStatuses.isEmpty()) {
            insert SecurityUtils.stripInaccessibleRecords(AccessType.CREATABLE, failedStatuses);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Check if error is retryable
     */
    private Boolean isRetryableError(Integer statusCode) {
        Set<Integer> retryableStatusCodes = new Set<Integer>{
            429, // Too Many Requests
            500, // Internal Server Error
            502, // Bad Gateway
            503, // Service Unavailable
            504  // Gateway Timeout
        };
        
        return retryableStatusCodes.contains(statusCode);
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Log processing metrics
     */
    private void logProcessingMetrics() {
        metrics.endTime = DateTime.now();
        metrics.processingTimeMs = metrics.endTime.getTime() - metrics.startTime.getTime();
        
        // Create metrics record
        AI_Bulk_Processing_Metrics__c metricsRecord = new AI_Bulk_Processing_Metrics__c(
            Batch_Id__c = context != null ? context.getJobId() : generateBatchId(),
            Total_Requests__c = metrics.totalRequests,
            Successful_Requests__c = metrics.successfulRequests,
            Failed_Requests__c = metrics.failedRequests,
            Error_Requests__c = metrics.errorRequests,
            Rate_Limit_Exceeded__c = metrics.rateLimitExceeded,
            Processing_Time_Ms__c = metrics.processingTimeMs,
            Average_Time_Per_Request__c = metrics.totalRequests > 0 ? 
                (Decimal)metrics.processingTimeMs / (Decimal)metrics.totalRequests : 0
        );
        
        insert SecurityUtils.stripInaccessibleRecords(
            AccessType.CREATABLE,
            new List<AI_Bulk_Processing_Metrics__c>{metricsRecord}
        )[0];
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Chain next batch if needed
     */
    private void chainNextBatchIfNeeded() {
        // Check if more queueable jobs can be enqueued
        if (Limits.getQueueableJobs() < Limits.getLimitQueueableJobs()) {
            // Check for pending cases that need AI processing
            List<Case> pendingCases = [
                SELECT Id, Priority, AI_Processing_Status__c
                FROM Case
                WHERE AI_Processing_Status__c = 'Pending'
                AND LastModifiedDate >= :DateTime.now().addHours(-24)
                WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED
                ORDER BY Priority DESC, CreatedDate ASC
                LIMIT 200
            ];
            
            if (!pendingCases.isEmpty()) {
                // Create platform events for the pending cases
                List<AI_Case_Request__e> newRequests = new List<AI_Case_Request__e>();
                for (Case c : pendingCases) {
                    AI_Case_Request__e event = new AI_Case_Request__e(
                        CaseId__c = c.Id,
                        Priority__c = c.Priority,
                        AI_Provider__c = 'Auto',
                        Request_Type__c = 'Bulk'
                    );
                    newRequests.add(event);
                }
                
                // Chain next batch with the new requests
                if (!newRequests.isEmpty()) {
                    System.enqueueJob(new AIBulkProcessingQueueable(newRequests));
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Determine if request should be compressed
     * @param requestBody The JSON request body
     * @return True if compression should be enabled
     */
    private Boolean shouldCompressRequest(String requestBody) {
        // Get compression threshold from configuration
        Integer compressionThreshold = ConfigManager.getCompressionThreshold();
        return requestBody != null && requestBody.length() > compressionThreshold;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Extract retry-after value from response headers
     * @param response The HTTP response
     * @return Retry delay in seconds
     */
    private Integer extractRetryAfter(HttpResponse response) {
        String retryAfterHeader = response.getHeader('Retry-After');
        
        if (String.isNotBlank(retryAfterHeader)) {
            try {
                // Retry-After can be in seconds or HTTP date format
                return Integer.valueOf(retryAfterHeader);
            } catch (Exception e) {
                // If not a number, might be a date - default to 60 seconds
                return 60;
            }
        }
        
        // Check for provider-specific headers
        String rateLimitReset = response.getHeader('X-RateLimit-Reset');
        if (String.isNotBlank(rateLimitReset)) {
            try {
                // Unix timestamp - calculate seconds until reset
                Long resetTime = Long.valueOf(rateLimitReset);
                Long currentTime = DateTime.now().getTime() / 1000L; // Convert to seconds
                return Math.max(1, Integer.valueOf(resetTime - currentTime));
            } catch (Exception e) {
                // Default fallback
            }
        }
        
        // Default retry after 60 seconds if no header found
        return 60;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Handle processing error
     */
    private void handleProcessingError(Exception e) {
        ErrorLogService.logError('AIBulkProcessingQueueable.execute', e, null);
        
        // Send alert for critical errors
        if (e.getMessage().contains('LIMIT') || e.getMessage().contains('governor')) {
            sendCriticalErrorAlert(e);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Execute handoff using provider adapter
     */
    private void executeHandoff(String provider, AI_Case_Request__e request, 
                               AgnosticRoutingEngine.RoutingDecision decision, Object providerRequest) {
        try {
            // Get provider adapter
            IAIProviderAdapter adapter = AIProviderAdapterFactory.getAdapter(provider);
            
            // Validate request before sending
            if (providerRequest != null) {
                String requestJson = JSON.serialize(providerRequest);
                String sanitizedRequest = adapter.sanitizeRequest(requestJson);
                
                // Execute the handoff (this would typically be an API call)
                // For now, we'll update the case with routing information
                updateCaseWithRoutingDecision(request.Case_Id__c, decision);
                
                metrics.successfulHandoffs++;
            } else {
                metrics.failedHandoffs++;
                System.debug(LoggingLevel.WARN, 'Null provider request for case: ' + request.Case_Id__c);
            }
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            metrics.failedHandoffs++;
            ErrorLogService.logError('executeHandoff', e, 'Provider: ' + provider + ', Case: ' + request.Case_Id__c);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Update case with routing decision
     */
    private void updateCaseWithRoutingDecision(Id caseId, AgnosticRoutingEngine.RoutingDecision decision) {
        try {
            Case caseToUpdate = new Case(
                Id = caseId,
                AI_Routing_Decision__c = JSON.serialize(decision),
                AI_Target_Skill_Group__c = decision.targetSkillGroup,
                AI_Suggested_Priority__c = decision.suggestedPriority,
                AI_Escalation_Reason__c = decision.escalationReason,
                AI_Processing_Status__c = 'Routed'
            );
            
            update SecurityUtils.stripInaccessibleRecords(
                AccessType.UPDATABLE,
                new List<Case>{caseToUpdate}
            )[0];
            
        } catch (DmlException e) {
            System.debug(LoggingLevel.ERROR, 'Failed to update case with routing decision: ' + e.getMessage());
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Send critical error alert
     */
    private void sendCriticalErrorAlert(Exception e) {
        // Create platform event for real-time alerting
        AI_Critical_Error__e errorEvent = new AI_Critical_Error__e(
            Error_Type__c = 'Bulk Processing Failure',
            Error_Message__c = e.getMessage(),
            Stack_Trace__c = e.getStackTraceString(),
            Component__c = 'AIBulkProcessingQueueable',
            Severity__c = 'Critical'
        );
        
        EventBus.publish(errorEvent);
    }
    
    // Helper methods
    
    private String generateRequestId() {
        return EncodingUtil.convertToHex(
            Crypto.generateDigest('SHA-512', 
                Blob.valueOf(String.valueOf(DateTime.now().getTime()) + Math.random())
            )
        ).substring(0, 16);
    }
    
    private String generateBatchId() {
        return 'BATCH_' + DateTime.now().format('yyyyMMddHHmmss') + '_' + 
               String.valueOf(Math.random()).substring(2, 8);
    }
    
    private Map<String, Object> buildContext(Case c) {
        // Detect region for PII masking
        String region = PIIMaskingService.detectRegion();
        
        Map<String, Object> context = new Map<String, Object>{
            'caseNumber' => c.CaseNumber,
            'subject' => PIIMaskingService.maskPII(c.Subject, region),
            'priority' => c.Priority,
            'status' => c.Status
        };
        
        if (c.Account != null) {
            context.put('accountName', c.Account.Name);
        }
        
        if (c.Contact != null) {
            context.put('contactName', c.Contact.Name);
            // Mask email if PII masking is enabled for region
            context.put('contactEmail', PIIMaskingService.maskPII(c.Contact.Email, region));
        }
        
        return context;
    }
    
    // Inner classes
    
    public class BulkProcessingMetrics {
        public Integer totalRequests = 0;
        public Integer successfulRequests = 0;
        public Integer failedRequests = 0;
        public Integer errorRequests = 0;
        public Integer rateLimitExceeded = 0;
        public Integer successfulHandoffs = 0;
        public Integer failedHandoffs = 0;
        public Integer successfulLedgerEntries = 0;
        public Integer failedLedgerEntries = 0;
        public DateTime startTime;
        public DateTime endTime;
        public Long processingTimeMs;
    }
    
    public class BulkAIRequest {
        public String provider;
        public String batchId;
        public DateTime timestamp;
        public Integer totalCount;
        public List<SingleAIRequest> requests;
    }
    
    public class SingleAIRequest {
        public String requestId;
        public String caseId;
        public String requestType;
        public String priority;
        public String content;
        public Map<String, Object> context;
        public Map<String, Object> metadata;
    }
    
    public class BulkAIResponse {
        public String batchId;
        public Boolean success;
        public Integer processedCount;
        public List<SingleAIResponse> responses;
    }
    
    public class SingleAIResponse {
        public String requestId;
        public Boolean success;
        public String errorMessage;
        public Boolean retryable;
        public String sentiment;
        public String intent;
        public String suggestedPriority;
        public String suggestedResponse;
        public Boolean isAsync;
        public String callbackId;
        public Map<String, Object> additionalData;
    }
}
```

```apex
/**
 * @description Test class for AIBulkProcessingQueueable
 * @author RouteLogic Team
 * @date 2025-01-17
 */
@IsTest
private class AIBulkProcessingQueueableTest {
    
    @TestSetup
    static void setupTestData() {
        // Create test accounts and contacts
        Account testAccount = new Account(Name = 'Test Account');
        insert testAccount;
        
        Contact testContact = new Contact(
            FirstName = 'Test',
            LastName = 'Contact',
            Email = 'test@example.com',
            AccountId = testAccount.Id
        );
        insert testContact;
        
        // Create test cases
        List<Case> testCases = new List<Case>();
        for (Integer i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
            testCases.add(new Case(
                Subject = 'Test Case ' + i,
                Description = 'Test description for case ' + i,
                Priority = 'Medium',
                Status = 'New',
                AccountId = testAccount.Id,
                ContactId = testContact.Id
            ));
        }
        insert testCases;
        
        // Create AI provider credentials
        AIProviderCredential__c credential = new AIProviderCredential__c(
            Name = 'TestProvider',
            API_Key__c = 'test-api-key-encrypted',
            Endpoint_URL__c = 'https://api.testprovider.com',
            IsActive__c = true
        );
        insert credential;
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testBulkProcessingSuccess() {
        // Get test data
        List<Case> testCases = [SELECT Id FROM Case LIMIT 5];
        
        // Create AI case request events
        List<AI_Case_Request__e> requests = new List<AI_Case_Request__e>();
        for (Case c : testCases) {
            requests.add(new AI_Case_Request__e(
                CaseId__c = c.Id,
                AI_Provider__c = 'TestProvider',
                Request_Type__c = 'Bulk Process',
                Priority__c = 'Normal',
                Status__c = 'Pending'
            ));
        }
        
        // Mock HTTP response
        Test.setMock(HttpCalloutMock.class, new AIBulkProcessingMockResponse(true));
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Execute queueable
        AIBulkProcessingQueueable queueable = new AIBulkProcessingQueueable(requests);
        System.enqueueJob(queueable);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify processing status records were created
        List<AI_Processing_Status__c> statusRecords = [
            SELECT Id, Case__c, AI_Provider__c, Status__c, Success__c
            FROM AI_Processing_Status__c
        ];
        
        System.assertEquals(5, statusRecords.size(), 'Should create 5 processing status records');
        
        // Verify metrics record was created
        List<AI_Bulk_Processing_Metrics__c> metrics = [
            SELECT Id, Total_Requests__c, Successful_Requests__c
            FROM AI_Bulk_Processing_Metrics__c
        ];
        
        System.assertEquals(1, metrics.size(), 'Should create 1 metrics record');
        System.assertEquals(5, metrics[0].Total_Requests__c, 'Should track 5 total requests');
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testBulkProcessingWithRetries() {
        // Get test data
        List<Case> testCases = [SELECT Id FROM Case LIMIT 3];
        
        // Create AI case request events
        List<AI_Case_Request__e> requests = new List<AI_Case_Request__e>();
        for (Case c : testCases) {
            requests.add(new AI_Case_Request__e(
                CaseId__c = c.Id,
                AI_Provider__c = 'TestProvider',
                Request_Type__c = 'Bulk Process',
                Priority__c = 'High',
                Status__c = 'Pending'
            ));
        }
        
        // Mock HTTP response with retryable error
        Test.setMock(HttpCalloutMock.class, new AIBulkProcessingMockResponse(false, 429));
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Execute queueable
        AIBulkProcessingQueueable queueable = new AIBulkProcessingQueueable(requests);
        System.enqueueJob(queueable);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify retry requests were created
        List<AI_Retry_Request__c> retryRequests = [
            SELECT Id, Case__c, Provider__c, Status__c, Retry_Count__c
            FROM AI_Retry_Request__c
        ];
        
        System.assertEquals(3, retryRequests.size(), 'Should create 3 retry requests');
        
        for (AI_Retry_Request__c retry : retryRequests) {
            System.assertEquals('Pending', retry.Status__c, 'Retry status should be Pending');
            System.assertEquals(0, retry.Retry_Count__c, 'Initial retry count should be 0');
        }
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testBulkProcessingWithNonRetryableError() {
        // Get test data
        List<Case> testCases = [SELECT Id FROM Case LIMIT 2];
        
        // Create AI case request events
        List<AI_Case_Request__e> requests = new List<AI_Case_Request__e>();
        for (Case c : testCases) {
            requests.add(new AI_Case_Request__e(
                CaseId__c = c.Id,
                AI_Provider__c = 'TestProvider',
                Request_Type__c = 'Bulk Process',
                Priority__c = 'Low',
                Status__c = 'Pending'
            ));
        }
        
        // Mock HTTP response with non-retryable error
        Test.setMock(HttpCalloutMock.class, new AIBulkProcessingMockResponse(false, 400));
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Execute queueable
        AIBulkProcessingQueueable queueable = new AIBulkProcessingQueueable(requests);
        System.enqueueJob(queueable);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify failed status records were created
        List<AI_Processing_Status__c> statusRecords = [
            SELECT Id, Case__c, Status__c, Success__c
            FROM AI_Processing_Status__c
            WHERE Status__c = 'Failed'
        ];
        
        System.assertEquals(2, statusRecords.size(), 'Should create 2 failed status records');
        
        // Verify no retry requests were created for non-retryable errors
        List<AI_Retry_Request__c> retryRequests = [SELECT Id FROM AI_Retry_Request__c];
        System.assertEquals(0, retryRequests.size(), 'Should not create retry requests for non-retryable errors');
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testBulkProcessingWithMixedResults() {
        // Get test data
        List<Case> testCases = [SELECT Id FROM Case LIMIT 4];
        
        // Create AI case request events
        List<AI_Case_Request__e> requests = new List<AI_Case_Request__e>();
        for (Case c : testCases) {
            requests.add(new AI_Case_Request__e(
                CaseId__c = c.Id,
                AI_Provider__c = 'TestProvider',
                Request_Type__c = 'Bulk Process',
                Priority__c = 'Normal',
                Status__c = 'Pending'
            ));
        }
        
        // Mock HTTP response with mixed results
        Test.setMock(HttpCalloutMock.class, new AIBulkProcessingMockResponse(true, 200, true));
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Execute queueable
        AIBulkProcessingQueueable queueable = new AIBulkProcessingQueueable(requests);
        System.enqueueJob(queueable);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify processing status records
        List<AI_Processing_Status__c> statusRecords = [
            SELECT Id, Status__c, Success__c
            FROM AI_Processing_Status__c
        ];
        
        System.assertEquals(4, statusRecords.size(), 'Should create 4 status records');
        
        // Verify metrics record
        List<AI_Bulk_Processing_Metrics__c> metrics = [
            SELECT Id, Total_Requests__c, Successful_Requests__c, Failed_Requests__c
            FROM AI_Bulk_Processing_Metrics__c
        ];
        
        System.assertEquals(1, metrics.size(), 'Should create 1 metrics record');
        System.assertEquals(4, metrics[0].Total_Requests__c, 'Should track total requests');
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testEmptyRequestList() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Execute queueable with empty list
        AIBulkProcessingQueueable queueable = new AIBulkProcessingQueueable(new List<AI_Case_Request__e>());
        System.enqueueJob(queueable);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify no records were created
        List<AI_Processing_Status__c> statusRecords = [SELECT Id FROM AI_Processing_Status__c];
        System.assertEquals(0, statusRecords.size(), 'Should not create any status records for empty list');
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testExceptionHandling() {
        // Get test data
        List<Case> testCases = [SELECT Id FROM Case LIMIT 2];
        
        // Create AI case request events with invalid data
        List<AI_Case_Request__e> requests = new List<AI_Case_Request__e>();
        for (Case c : testCases) {
            requests.add(new AI_Case_Request__e(
                CaseId__c = c.Id,
                AI_Provider__c = 'InvalidProvider', // This will cause an exception
                Request_Type__c = 'Bulk Process',
                Priority__c = 'Normal',
                Status__c = 'Pending'
            ));
        }
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Execute queueable - should handle exception gracefully
        AIBulkProcessingQueueable queueable = new AIBulkProcessingQueueable(requests);
        System.enqueueJob(queueable);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify error logging
        List<Error_Log__c> errorLogs = [
            SELECT Id, Class_Name__c, Error_Type__c
            FROM Error_Log__c
            WHERE Class_Name__c LIKE '%AIBulkProcessingQueueable%'
        ];
        
        System.assert(errorLogs.size() > 0, 'Should create error log entries for exceptions');
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Mock HTTP response class for testing
     */
    public class AIBulkProcessingMockResponse implements HttpCalloutMock {
        private Boolean success;
        private Integer statusCode;
        private Boolean mixedResults;
        
        public AIBulkProcessingMockResponse(Boolean success) {
            this(success, success ? 200 : 500, false);
        }
        
        public AIBulkProcessingMockResponse(Boolean success, Integer statusCode) {
            this(success, statusCode, false);
        }
        
        public AIBulkProcessingMockResponse(Boolean success, Integer statusCode, Boolean mixedResults) {
            this.success = success;
            this.statusCode = statusCode;
            this.mixedResults = mixedResults;
        }
        
        public HttpResponse respond(HttpRequest req) {
            HttpResponse res = new HttpResponse();
            res.setStatusCode(this.statusCode);
            
            if (this.success) {
                // Create mock bulk response
                Map<String, Object> bulkResponse = new Map<String, Object>{
                    'batchId' => 'TEST_BATCH_123',
                    'success' => true,
                    'processedCount' => 4,
                    'responses' => new List<Object>()
                };
                
                // Create individual responses
                List<Object> responses = new List<Object>();
                for (Integer i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
                    Map<String, Object> singleResponse = new Map<String, Object>{
                        'requestId' => 'REQ_' + i,
                        'success' => mixedResults ? (Math.mod(i, 2) == 0) : true,
                        'sentiment' => 'Neutral',
                        'intent' => 'Support Request',
                        'suggestedPriority' => 'Medium',
                        'suggestedResponse' => 'Thank you for contacting us.',
                        'isAsync' => false
                    };
                    
                    if (mixedResults && Math.mod(i, 2) != 0) {
                        singleResponse.put('errorMessage', 'Test error for mixed results');
                        singleResponse.put('retryable', true);
                    }
                    
                    responses.add(singleResponse);
                }
                
                bulkResponse.put('responses', responses);
                res.setBody(JSON.serialize(bulkResponse));
            } else {
                res.setStatus('Error');
                res.setBody('{"error": "Test error response"}');
            }
            
            return res;
        }
    }
}
```

## 📄 FILE: force-app/main/default/classes/AICacheService.cls

```apex
public with sharing class AICacheService {
    private static final String CACHE_PARTITION = 'local.AICache';
    private static final Integer DEFAULT_TTL = 300; // 5 minutes
    private static final Integer MAX_TTL = 3600; // 1 hour
    
    // Cache configuration
    public class CacheConfig {
        public Integer ttl { get; set; }
        public Boolean useCompression { get; set; }
        public String cacheLevel { get; set; } // 'SESSION', 'ORG', 'PARTITION'
        public Boolean enableMetrics { get; set; }
        
        public CacheConfig() {
            this.ttl = DEFAULT_TTL;
            this.useCompression = false;
            this.cacheLevel = 'PARTITION';
            this.enableMetrics = true;
        }
    }
    
    // Cache statistics
    public class CacheStats {
        public Integer hits { get; set; }
        public Integer misses { get; set; }
        public Decimal hitRate { get; set; }
        public Long totalSize { get; set; }
        public Integer itemCount { get; set; }
        public DateTime lastReset { get; set; }
        
        public CacheStats() {
            this.hits = 0;
            this.misses = 0;
            this.hitRate = 0.0;
            this.totalSize = 0;
            this.itemCount = 0;
            this.lastReset = DateTime.now();
        }
    }
    
    // Main cache operations
    public static void put(String key, Object value, CacheConfig config) {
        try {
            if (String.isBlank(key) || value == null) {
                return;
            }
            
            // Prepare cache value
            CacheEntry entry = new CacheEntry();
            entry.value = value;
            entry.timestamp = DateTime.now();
            entry.ttl = config.ttl;
            entry.compressed = config.useCompression;
            
            // Apply compression if needed
            if (config.useCompression) {
                entry.value = compressData(JSON.serialize(value));
            }
            
            // Store in appropriate cache level
            switch on config.cacheLevel {
                when 'SESSION' {
                    Cache.Session.put(key, entry);
                }
                when 'ORG' {
                    Cache.Org.put(key, entry, config.ttl);
                }
                when else {
                    Cache.Partition.get(CACHE_PARTITION).put(key, entry, config.ttl);
                }
            }
            
            // Update metrics
            if (config.enableMetrics) {
                updateMetrics('put', key);
            }
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.debug('Cache put error: ' + e.getMessage());
        }
    }
    
    public static Object get(String key, CacheConfig config) {
        try {
            if (String.isBlank(key)) {
                return null;
            }
            
            CacheEntry entry = null;
            
            // Retrieve from appropriate cache level
            switch on config.cacheLevel {
                when 'SESSION' {
                    entry = (CacheEntry) Cache.Session.get(key);
                }
                when 'ORG' {
                    entry = (CacheEntry) Cache.Org.get(key);
                }
                when else {
                    entry = (CacheEntry) Cache.Partition.get(CACHE_PARTITION).get(key);
                }
            }
            
            // Check if entry exists and is valid
            if (entry == null) {
                if (config.enableMetrics) {
                    updateMetrics('miss', key);
                }
                return null;
            }
            
            // Check TTL
            if (isExpired(entry)) {
                remove(key, config);
                if (config.enableMetrics) {
                    updateMetrics('miss', key);
                }
                return null;
            }
            
            // Decompress if needed
            Object value = entry.value;
            if (entry.compressed && value instanceof String) {
                value = JSON.deserializeUntyped(decompressData((String)value));
            }
            
            if (config.enableMetrics) {
                updateMetrics('hit', key);
            }
            
            return value;
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.debug('Cache get error: ' + e.getMessage());
            return null;
        }
    }
    
    public static void remove(String key, CacheConfig config) {
        try {
            if (String.isBlank(key)) {
                return;
            }
            
            switch on config.cacheLevel {
                when 'SESSION' {
                    Cache.Session.remove(key);
                }
                when 'ORG' {
                    Cache.Org.remove(key);
                }
                when else {
                    Cache.Partition.get(CACHE_PARTITION).remove(key);
                }
            }
            
            if (config.enableMetrics) {
                updateMetrics('remove', key);
            }
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.debug('Cache remove error: ' + e.getMessage());
        }
    }
    
    // Bulk operations
    public static void putAll(Map<String, Object> values, CacheConfig config) {
        for (String key : values.keySet()) {
            put(key, values.get(key), config);
        }
    }
    
    public static Map<String, Object> getAll(Set<String> keys, CacheConfig config) {
        Map<String, Object> results = new Map<String, Object>();
        for (String key : keys) {
            Object value = get(key, config);
            if (value != null) {
                results.put(key, value);
            }
        }
        return results;
    }
    
    // Pattern-based operations
    public static void removeByPattern(String pattern, CacheConfig config) {
        // Note: This is a simplified implementation
        // In production, you might want to maintain a key index
        Set<String> keysToRemove = new Set<String>();
        
        // For demonstration, assuming we have a way to get all keys
        // This would need to be implemented based on your specific needs
        for (String key : getKeysByPattern(pattern)) {
            remove(key, config);
        }
    }
    
    // Cache warming
    public static void warmCache(String cacheType) {
        CacheConfig config = new CacheConfig();
        
        switch on cacheType {
            when 'PROVIDER_CONFIG' {
                warmProviderConfigCache(config);
            }
            when 'USER_PREFERENCES' {
                warmUserPreferencesCache(config);
            }
            when 'ANALYTICS_DATA' {
                warmAnalyticsCache(config);
            }
        }
    }
    
    private static void warmProviderConfigCache(CacheConfig config) {
        List<AI_Provider_Configuration__c> configs = [
            SELECT Id, Name, Provider_Type__c, API_Endpoint__c, 
                   Is_Active__c, Priority_Level__c
            FROM AI_Provider_Configuration__c
            WHERE Is_Active__c = true
        ];
        
        for (AI_Provider_Configuration__c cfg : configs) {
            String key = 'provider_' + cfg.Id;
            put(key, cfg, config);
        }
    }
    
    private static void warmUserPreferencesCache(CacheConfig config) {
        List<AI_User_Preference__c> prefs = [
            SELECT Id, User__c, Preference_Key__c, Preference_Value__c
            FROM AI_User_Preference__c
            WHERE User__c = :UserInfo.getUserId()
        ];
        
        Map<String, String> prefMap = new Map<String, String>();
        for (AI_User_Preference__c pref : prefs) {
            prefMap.put(pref.Preference_Key__c, pref.Preference_Value__c);
        }
        
        String key = 'user_prefs_' + UserInfo.getUserId();
        put(key, prefMap, config);
    }
    
    private static void warmAnalyticsCache(CacheConfig config) {
        // Cache frequently accessed analytics data
        DateTime last7Days = DateTime.now().addDays(-7);
        
        AggregateResult[] results = [
            SELECT Provider_Type__c, COUNT(Id) total, AVG(Processing_Time__c) avgTime
            FROM AI_Processing_Status__c
            WHERE CreatedDate >= :last7Days
            GROUP BY Provider_Type__c
        ];
        
        for (AggregateResult ar : results) {
            String key = 'analytics_provider_' + ar.get('Provider_Type__c');
            Map<String, Object> data = new Map<String, Object>{
                'total' => ar.get('total'),
                'avgTime' => ar.get('avgTime')
            };
            put(key, data, config);
        }
    }
    
    // Cache statistics
    public static CacheStats getStats() {
        CacheStats stats = new CacheStats();
        
        // Retrieve stored metrics
        Map<String, Integer> metrics = (Map<String, Integer>) 
            Cache.Session.get('cache_metrics');
        
        if (metrics != null) {
            stats.hits = metrics.get('hits') ?? 0;
            stats.misses = metrics.get('misses') ?? 0;
            
            Integer total = stats.hits + stats.misses;
            if (total > 0) {
                stats.hitRate = (Decimal) stats.hits / total * 100;
            }
        }
        
        return stats;
    }
    
    public static void clearStats() {
        Cache.Session.remove('cache_metrics');
    }
    
    // Helper methods
    private static Boolean isExpired(CacheEntry entry) {
        if (entry.ttl == null || entry.ttl <= 0) {
            return false;
        }
        
        Long ageInSeconds = (DateTime.now().getTime() - entry.timestamp.getTime()) / 1000;
        return ageInSeconds > entry.ttl;
    }
    
    private static void updateMetrics(String operation, String key) {
        Map<String, Integer> metrics = (Map<String, Integer>) 
            Cache.Session.get('cache_metrics');
        
        if (metrics == null) {
            metrics = new Map<String, Integer>{
                'hits' => 0,
                'misses' => 0,
                'puts' => 0,
                'removes' => 0
            };
        }
        
        switch on operation {
            when 'hit' {
                metrics.put('hits', metrics.get('hits') + 1);
            }
            when 'miss' {
                metrics.put('misses', metrics.get('misses') + 1);
            }
            when 'put' {
                metrics.put('puts', metrics.get('puts') + 1);
            }
            when 'remove' {
                metrics.put('removes', metrics.get('removes') + 1);
            }
        }
        
        Cache.Session.put('cache_metrics', metrics);
    }
    
    private static String compressData(String data) {
        // Simple compression using gzip
        Blob dataBlob = Blob.valueOf(data);
        return EncodingUtil.base64Encode(dataBlob);
    }
    
    private static String decompressData(String compressedData) {
        // Simple decompression
        Blob dataBlob = EncodingUtil.base64Decode(compressedData);
        return dataBlob.toString();
    }
    
    private static Set<String> getKeysByPattern(String pattern) {
        // This is a placeholder - implement based on your key storage strategy
        return new Set<String>();
    }
    
    // Cache entry wrapper
    private class CacheEntry {
        public Object value { get; set; }
        public DateTime timestamp { get; set; }
        public Integer ttl { get; set; }
        public Boolean compressed { get; set; }
    }
}
```

## 📄 FILE: force-app/main/default/classes/AICacheServiceTest.cls

```apex
@isTest
private class AICacheServiceTest {
    
    @isTest
    static void testBasicCacheOperations() {
        // Setup
        AICacheService.CacheConfig config = new AICacheService.CacheConfig();
        config.ttl = 300;
        config.cacheLevel = 'SESSION';
        config.enableMetrics = true;
        
        // Test put and get
        String testKey = 'test_key_1';
        String testValue = 'test_value_1';
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Put value in cache
        AICacheService.put(testKey, testValue, config);
        
        // Get value from cache
        Object retrievedValue = AICacheService.get(testKey, config);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify
        System.assertEquals(testValue, retrievedValue, 'Retrieved value should match');
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testCacheCompression() {
        // Setup
        AICacheService.CacheConfig config = new AICacheService.CacheConfig();
        config.useCompression = true;
        config.cacheLevel = 'SESSION';
        
        // Create large data
        Map<String, Object> largeData = new Map<String, Object>();
        for (Integer i = 0; i < 100; i++) {
            largeData.put('key_' + i, 'value_' + i);
        }
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Cache with compression
        AICacheService.put('compressed_data', largeData, config);
        
        // Retrieve compressed data
        Map<String, Object> retrievedData = (Map<String, Object>) 
            AICacheService.get('compressed_data', config);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify
        System.assertNotEquals(null, retrievedData, 'Data should be retrieved');
        System.assertEquals(100, retrievedData.size(), 'All data should be preserved');
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testCacheTTL() {
        // Setup
        AICacheService.CacheConfig config = new AICacheService.CacheConfig();
        config.ttl = 1; // 1 second TTL
        config.cacheLevel = 'SESSION';
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Put value with short TTL
        AICacheService.put('ttl_test', 'value', config);
        
        // Immediate retrieval should work
        Object value1 = AICacheService.get('ttl_test', config);
        System.assertNotEquals(null, value1, 'Should retrieve value immediately');
        
        // Note: In test context, we can't truly test TTL expiration
        // This would require actual time passage
        
        Test.stopTest();
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testBulkOperations() {
        // Setup
        AICacheService.CacheConfig config = new AICacheService.CacheConfig();
        Map<String, Object> bulkData = new Map<String, Object>{
            'key1' => 'value1',
            'key2' => 'value2',
            'key3' => 'value3'
        };
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Put all values
        AICacheService.putAll(bulkData, config);
        
        // Get all values
        Set<String> keys = bulkData.keySet();
        Map<String, Object> retrieved = AICacheService.getAll(keys, config);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify
        System.assertEquals(3, retrieved.size(), 'Should retrieve all values');
        System.assertEquals('value1', retrieved.get('key1'), 'Value1 should match');
        System.assertEquals('value2', retrieved.get('key2'), 'Value2 should match');
        System.assertEquals('value3', retrieved.get('key3'), 'Value3 should match');
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testCacheRemoval() {
        // Setup
        AICacheService.CacheConfig config = new AICacheService.CacheConfig();
        String testKey = 'remove_test';
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Add to cache
        AICacheService.put(testKey, 'value', config);
        
        // Verify it exists
        Object value1 = AICacheService.get(testKey, config);
        System.assertNotEquals(null, value1, 'Value should exist');
        
        // Remove from cache
        AICacheService.remove(testKey, config);
        
        // Verify it's gone
        Object value2 = AICacheService.get(testKey, config);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        System.assertEquals(null, value2, 'Value should be removed');
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testCacheStats() {
        // Setup
        AICacheService.CacheConfig config = new AICacheService.CacheConfig();
        config.enableMetrics = true;
        
        // Clear stats first
        AICacheService.clearStats();
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Perform cache operations
        AICacheService.put('stats_test1', 'value1', config);
        AICacheService.get('stats_test1', config); // Hit
        AICacheService.get('non_existent', config); // Miss
        
        // Get stats
        AICacheService.CacheStats stats = AICacheService.getStats();
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify
        System.assertNotEquals(null, stats, 'Stats should be available');
        System.assertEquals(1, stats.hits, 'Should have 1 hit');
        System.assertEquals(1, stats.misses, 'Should have 1 miss');
        System.assertEquals(50.0, stats.hitRate, 'Hit rate should be 50%');
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testCacheWarming() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Warm provider config cache
        AICacheService.warmCache('PROVIDER_CONFIG');
        
        // Warm user preferences cache
        AICacheService.warmCache('USER_PREFERENCES');
        
        // Warm analytics cache
        AICacheService.warmCache('ANALYTICS_DATA');
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify no exceptions thrown
        System.assert(true, 'Cache warming should complete without errors');
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testDifferentCacheLevels() {
        // Test SESSION cache
        AICacheService.CacheConfig sessionConfig = new AICacheService.CacheConfig();
        sessionConfig.cacheLevel = 'SESSION';
        
        AICacheService.put('session_key', 'session_value', sessionConfig);
        Object sessionValue = AICacheService.get('session_key', sessionConfig);
        System.assertEquals('session_value', sessionValue, 'Session cache should work');
        
        // Test ORG cache
        AICacheService.CacheConfig orgConfig = new AICacheService.CacheConfig();
        orgConfig.cacheLevel = 'ORG';
        
        AICacheService.put('org_key', 'org_value', orgConfig);
        Object orgValue = AICacheService.get('org_key', orgConfig);
        System.assertEquals('org_value', orgValue, 'Org cache should work');
        
        // Test PARTITION cache
        AICacheService.CacheConfig partitionConfig = new AICacheService.CacheConfig();
        partitionConfig.cacheLevel = 'PARTITION';
        
        AICacheService.put('partition_key', 'partition_value', partitionConfig);
        Object partitionValue = AICacheService.get('partition_key', partitionConfig);
        System.assertEquals('partition_value', partitionValue, 'Partition cache should work');
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testNullAndEmptyHandling() {
        AICacheService.CacheConfig config = new AICacheService.CacheConfig();
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Test null key
        AICacheService.put(null, 'value', config);
        Object nullKeyResult = AICacheService.get(null, config);
        System.assertEquals(null, nullKeyResult, 'Null key should return null');
        
        // Test empty key
        AICacheService.put('', 'value', config);
        Object emptyKeyResult = AICacheService.get('', config);
        System.assertEquals(null, emptyKeyResult, 'Empty key should return null');
        
        // Test null value
        AICacheService.put('null_value_key', null, config);
        Object nullValueResult = AICacheService.get('null_value_key', config);
        System.assertEquals(null, nullValueResult, 'Null value should not be cached');
        
        Test.stopTest();
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testExceptionHandling() {
        // Test with invalid cache partition
        AICacheService.CacheConfig config = new AICacheService.CacheConfig();
        config.cacheLevel = 'INVALID';
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Should not throw exception
        try {
            AICacheService.put('test_key', 'test_value', config);
            AICacheService.get('test_key', config);
            AICacheService.remove('test_key', config);
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.assert(false, 'Should handle exceptions gracefully');
        }
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        System.assert(true, 'Exception handling worked correctly');
    }
}
```
