## 📄 FILE: force-app/main/default/classes/AIConfigurationController.cls

```apex
/**
 * @description Apex controller for AI Configuration Manager LWC
 * Provides secure access to configuration settings with proper validation
 * @author RouteLogic Team
 * @date 2025-01-20
 * @group Configuration Management
 */
public with sharing class AIConfigurationController {
    
    /**
     * @description Retrieves all AI processing configuration settings
     * @return Map of configuration settings
     */
    @AuraEnabled(cacheable=true)
    public static Map<String, Object> getConfigurationSettings() {
        try {
            // Query custom metadata for AI processing configuration
            List<AI_Processing_Config__mdt> configs = [
                SELECT DeveloperName, Label, Setting_Type__c, Setting_Value__c, 
                       Description__c, Is_Active__c, Category__c
                FROM AI_Processing_Config__mdt
                WHERE Is_Active__c = true
                WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED
            ];
            
            Map<String, Object> settings = new Map<String, Object>();
            
            // Convert to a structure suitable for the LWC
            for (AI_Processing_Config__mdt config : configs) {
                settings.put(config.DeveloperName, config.Setting_Value__c);
            }
            
            // Add default values if settings don't exist
            if (!settings.containsKey('Default_Batch_Size__c')) {
                settings.put('Default_Batch_Size__c', 100);
            }
            if (!settings.containsKey('Max_Retry_Attempts__c')) {
                settings.put('Max_Retry_Attempts__c', 3);
            }
            if (!settings.containsKey('Circuit_Breaker_Threshold__c')) {
                settings.put('Circuit_Breaker_Threshold__c', 5);
            }
            if (!settings.containsKey('Circuit_Breaker_Timeout__c')) {
                settings.put('Circuit_Breaker_Timeout__c', 30);
            }
            if (!settings.containsKey('API_Timeout__c')) {
                settings.put('API_Timeout__c', 30);
            }
            if (!settings.containsKey('Enable_Debug_Logging__c')) {
                settings.put('Enable_Debug_Logging__c', false);
            }
            if (!settings.containsKey('Log_Retention_Days__c')) {
                settings.put('Log_Retention_Days__c', 30);
            }
            
            return settings;
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            ErrorLogService.logError(
                'AIConfigurationController.getConfigurationSettings',
                e.getMessage(),
                e.getStackTraceString(),
                null
            );
            throw new AuraHandledException('Failed to retrieve configuration settings: ' + e.getMessage());
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Updates a specific configuration setting
     * @param settingName The name of the setting to update
     * @param value The new value for the setting
     */
    @AuraEnabled
    public static void updateConfigurationSetting(String settingName, Object value) {
        try {
            // Validate user has permission to modify settings
            if (!hasConfigurationPermission()) {
                throw new AuraHandledException('You do not have permission to modify configuration settings');
            }
            
            // Since custom metadata cannot be updated directly in Apex,
            // we'll use a custom object to store overrides
            List<AI_Config_Override__c> existingOverrides = [
                SELECT Id, Setting_Value__c
                FROM AI_Config_Override__c
                WHERE Setting_Name__c = :settingName
                WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED
                LIMIT 1
            ];
            
            AI_Config_Override__c override;
            if (!existingOverrides.isEmpty()) {
                override = existingOverrides[0];
            } else {
                override = new AI_Config_Override__c(
                    Setting_Name__c = settingName
                );
            }
            
            override.Setting_Value__c = String.valueOf(value);
            override.Last_Modified_By__c = UserInfo.getUserId();
            override.Last_Modified_Date__c = DateTime.now();
            
            upsert override;
            
            // Log the configuration change
            MetricsLogger.logEvent('CONFIG_UPDATED', new Map<String, Object>{
                'setting' => settingName,
                'newValue' => value,
                'userId' => UserInfo.getUserId(),
                'timestamp' => System.now()
            });
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            ErrorLogService.logError(
                'AIConfigurationController.updateConfigurationSetting',
                e.getMessage(),
                e.getStackTraceString(),
                null
            );
            throw new AuraHandledException('Failed to update configuration: ' + e.getMessage());
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Retrieves all AI provider settings
     * @return List of provider settings
     */
    @AuraEnabled(cacheable=true)
    public static List<ProviderSetting> getProviderSettings() {
        try {
            List<AI_Provider_Settings__mdt> providers = [
                SELECT Id, DeveloperName, Label, Provider_Name__c, Is_Active__c,
                       API_Endpoint__c, Max_Batch_Size__c, Timeout_ms__c, Priority__c,
                       Authentication_Type__c, Named_Credential__c
                FROM AI_Provider_Settings__mdt
                ORDER BY Priority__c ASC
                WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED
            ];
            
            List<ProviderSetting> settings = new List<ProviderSetting>();
            
            for (AI_Provider_Settings__mdt provider : providers) {
                ProviderSetting setting = new ProviderSetting();
                setting.Id = provider.Id;
                setting.DeveloperName = provider.DeveloperName;
                setting.Provider_Name__c = provider.Provider_Name__c;
                setting.Is_Active__c = provider.Is_Active__c;
                setting.API_Endpoint__c = provider.API_Endpoint__c;
                setting.Max_Batch_Size__c = Integer.valueOf(provider.Max_Batch_Size__c);
                setting.Timeout_ms__c = Integer.valueOf(provider.Timeout_ms__c);
                setting.Priority__c = Integer.valueOf(provider.Priority__c);
                setting.Authentication_Type__c = provider.Authentication_Type__c;
                setting.Named_Credential__c = provider.Named_Credential__c;
                
                settings.add(setting);
            }
            
            return settings;
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            ErrorLogService.logError(
                'AIConfigurationController.getProviderSettings',
                e.getMessage(),
                e.getStackTraceString(),
                null
            );
            throw new AuraHandledException('Failed to retrieve provider settings: ' + e.getMessage());
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Updates AI provider settings
     * @param providerId The ID of the provider to update
     * @param settings Map of settings to update
     */
    @AuraEnabled
    public static void updateProviderSetting(String providerId, Map<String, Object> settings) {
        try {
            // Validate user has permission
            if (!hasConfigurationPermission()) {
                throw new AuraHandledException('You do not have permission to modify provider settings');
            }
            
            // Create or update provider override record
            List<AI_Provider_Override__c> existingOverrides = [
                SELECT Id
                FROM AI_Provider_Override__c
                WHERE Provider_Metadata_Id__c = :providerId
                WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED
                LIMIT 1
            ];
            
            AI_Provider_Override__c override;
            if (!existingOverrides.isEmpty()) {
                override = existingOverrides[0];
            } else {
                override = new AI_Provider_Override__c(
                    Provider_Metadata_Id__c = providerId
                );
            }
            
            // Update fields from settings map
            if (settings.containsKey('Is_Active__c')) {
                override.Is_Active__c = (Boolean)settings.get('Is_Active__c');
            }
            if (settings.containsKey('API_Endpoint__c')) {
                override.API_Endpoint__c = (String)settings.get('API_Endpoint__c');
            }
            if (settings.containsKey('Max_Batch_Size__c')) {
                override.Max_Batch_Size__c = (Decimal)settings.get('Max_Batch_Size__c');
            }
            if (settings.containsKey('Timeout_ms__c')) {
                override.Timeout_ms__c = (Decimal)settings.get('Timeout_ms__c');
            }
            if (settings.containsKey('Priority__c')) {
                override.Priority__c = (Decimal)settings.get('Priority__c');
            }
            
            override.Last_Modified_By__c = UserInfo.getUserId();
            override.Last_Modified_Date__c = DateTime.now();
            
            upsert override;
            
            // Log the change
            MetricsLogger.logEvent('PROVIDER_CONFIG_UPDATED', new Map<String, Object>{
                'providerId' => providerId,
                'settings' => settings,
                'userId' => UserInfo.getUserId(),
                'timestamp' => System.now()
            });
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            ErrorLogService.logError(
                'AIConfigurationController.updateProviderSetting',
                e.getMessage(),
                e.getStackTraceString(),
                null
            );
            throw new AuraHandledException('Failed to update provider settings: ' + e.getMessage());
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Tests connection to an AI provider
     * @param providerId The ID of the provider to test
     * @return Test result with success status and message
     */
    @AuraEnabled
    public static ConnectionTestResult testProviderConnection(String providerId) {
        try {
            // Get provider settings
            AI_Provider_Settings__mdt provider = [
                SELECT Provider_Name__c, API_Endpoint__c, Named_Credential__c,
                       Authentication_Type__c, Timeout_ms__c
                FROM AI_Provider_Settings__mdt
                WHERE Id = :providerId
                WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED
                LIMIT 1
            ];
            
            ConnectionTestResult result = new ConnectionTestResult();
            
            // Perform health check call
            HttpRequest req = new HttpRequest();
            req.setEndpoint('callout:' + provider.Named_Credential__c + '/health');
            req.setMethod('GET');
            req.setTimeout(Integer.valueOf(provider.Timeout_ms__c));
            
            try {
                Http http = new Http();
                HttpResponse res = http.send(req);
                
                if (res.getStatusCode() == 200) {
                    result.success = true;
                    result.message = 'Connection successful';
                    result.responseTime = res.getHeader('X-Response-Time');
                } else {
                    result.success = false;
                    result.message = 'Connection failed: HTTP ' + res.getStatusCode();
                    result.errorDetails = res.getBody();
                }
            } catch (Exception e) {
                result.success = false;
                result.message = 'Connection error: ' + e.getMessage();
                result.errorDetails = e.getStackTraceString();
            }
            
            // Log test result
            MetricsLogger.logEvent('PROVIDER_CONNECTION_TEST', new Map<String, Object>{
                'providerId' => providerId,
                'providerName' => provider.Provider_Name__c,
                'success' => result.success,
                'message' => result.message,
                'timestamp' => System.now()
            });
            
            return result;
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            ErrorLogService.logError(
                'AIConfigurationController.testProviderConnection',
                e.getMessage(),
                e.getStackTraceString(),
                null
            );
            
            ConnectionTestResult errorResult = new ConnectionTestResult();
            errorResult.success = false;
            errorResult.message = 'Test failed: ' + e.getMessage();
            return errorResult;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Validates the current configuration
     * @return Map of validation results by category
     */
    @AuraEnabled
    public static Map<String, ValidationResult> validateConfiguration() {
        Map<String, ValidationResult> results = new Map<String, ValidationResult>();
        
        try {
            // Validate general settings
            results.put('General Settings', validateGeneralSettings());
            
            // Validate provider configuration
            results.put('Provider Configuration', validateProviderConfiguration());
            
            // Validate security settings
            results.put('Security Settings', validateSecuritySettings());
            
            // Validate integration endpoints
            results.put('Integration Endpoints', validateIntegrationEndpoints());
            
            // Validate processing limits
            results.put('Processing Limits', validateProcessingLimits());
            
            return results;
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            ErrorLogService.logError(
                'AIConfigurationController.validateConfiguration',
                e.getMessage(),
                e.getStackTraceString(),
                null
            );
            
            ValidationResult errorResult = new ValidationResult();
            errorResult.success = false;
            errorResult.message = 'Validation failed: ' + e.getMessage();
            results.put('Error', errorResult);
            return results;
        }
    }
    
    // Private helper methods
    
    /**
     * @description Checks if current user has permission to modify configuration
     * @return True if user has permission
     */
    private static Boolean hasConfigurationPermission() {
        // Check for custom permission
        return FeatureManagement.checkPermission('AI_Configuration_Manager') ||
               System.Label.AI_Config_Admin_Profile.contains(UserInfo.getProfileId());
    }
    
    private static ValidationResult validateGeneralSettings() {
        ValidationResult result = new ValidationResult();
        result.success = true;
        result.details = new List<String>();
        
        Map<String, Object> settings = getConfigurationSettings();
        
        // Validate batch size
        Integer batchSize = Integer.valueOf(settings.get('Default_Batch_Size__c'));
        if (batchSize < 1 || batchSize > 200) {
            result.success = false;
            result.details.add('Batch size must be between 1 and 200');
        }
        
        // Validate retry attempts
        Integer retryAttempts = Integer.valueOf(settings.get('Max_Retry_Attempts__c'));
        if (retryAttempts < 0 || retryAttempts > 5) {
            result.success = false;
            result.details.add('Retry attempts must be between 0 and 5');
        }
        
        result.message = result.success ? 
            'All general settings are valid' : 
            'General settings validation failed';
        
        return result;
    }
    
    private static ValidationResult validateProviderConfiguration() {
        ValidationResult result = new ValidationResult();
        result.details = new List<String>();
        
        List<ProviderSetting> providers = getProviderSettings();
        Integer activeCount = 0;
        
        for (ProviderSetting provider : providers) {
            if (provider.Is_Active__c) {
                activeCount++;
                
                // Validate endpoint
                if (String.isBlank(provider.API_Endpoint__c)) {
                    result.details.add(provider.Provider_Name__c + ': Missing API endpoint');
                }
                
                // Validate timeout
                if (provider.Timeout_ms__c < 1000 || provider.Timeout_ms__c > 120000) {
                    result.details.add(provider.Provider_Name__c + ': Timeout must be between 1-120 seconds');
                }
            }
        }
        
        if (activeCount == 0) {
            result.success = false;
            result.message = 'No active AI providers configured';
        } else {
            result.success = result.details.isEmpty();
            result.message = result.success ? 
                activeCount + ' active providers configured correctly' : 
                'Provider configuration has issues';
        }
        
        return result;
    }
    
    private static ValidationResult validateSecuritySettings() {
        ValidationResult result = new ValidationResult();
        result.success = true;
        result.details = new List<String>();
        
        // Check Named Credentials
        List<NamedCredential> credentials = [
            SELECT DeveloperName, Endpoint
            FROM NamedCredential
            WHERE DeveloperName IN ('Ada_API', 'Intercom_API')
        ];
        
        if (credentials.size() < 2) {
            result.success = false;
            result.details.add('Missing required Named Credentials');
        }
        
        // Check encryption settings
        if (!Schema.sObjectType.AI_Processing_Status__c.fields.Response_Data__c.isEncrypted()) {
            result.details.add('Response data field should be encrypted');
        }
        
        result.message = result.success ? 
            'Security settings are properly configured' : 
            'Security configuration needs attention';
        
        return result;
    }
    
    private static ValidationResult validateIntegrationEndpoints() {
        ValidationResult result = new ValidationResult();
        result.success = true;
        result.details = new List<String>();
        
        // Test each active provider's endpoint accessibility
        List<ProviderSetting> providers = getProviderSettings();
        
        for (ProviderSetting provider : providers) {
            if (provider.Is_Active__c) {
                // Check if Named Credential exists
                try {
                    NamedCredential nc = [
                        SELECT Id, Endpoint 
                        FROM NamedCredential 
                        WHERE DeveloperName = :provider.Named_Credential__c
                        LIMIT 1
                    ];
                } catch (Exception e) {
                    result.success = false;
                    result.details.add(provider.Provider_Name__c + ': Named Credential not found');
                }
            }
        }
        
        result.message = result.success ? 
            'All integration endpoints are configured' : 
            'Some integration endpoints are missing';
        
        return result;
    }
    
    private static ValidationResult validateProcessingLimits() {
        ValidationResult result = new ValidationResult();
        result.success = true;
        result.details = new List<String>();
        
        // Check org limits
        Map<String, System.OrgLimit> limits = OrgLimits.getMap();
        
        // Check async apex jobs limit
        System.OrgLimit asyncLimit = limits.get('DailyAsyncApexExecutions');
        if (asyncLimit.getValue() > asyncLimit.getLimit() * 0.8) {
            result.details.add('Approaching daily async apex execution limit');
        }
        
        // Check API calls limit
        System.OrgLimit apiLimit = limits.get('DailyApiRequests');
        if (apiLimit.getValue() > apiLimit.getLimit() * 0.8) {
            result.details.add('Approaching daily API request limit');
        }
        
        result.message = result.details.isEmpty() ? 
            'Processing limits are within safe thresholds' : 
            'Some limits need monitoring';
        
        return result;
    }
    
    // Inner classes
    
    public class ProviderSetting {
        @AuraEnabled public String Id { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public String DeveloperName { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public String Provider_Name__c { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Boolean Is_Active__c { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public String API_Endpoint__c { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Integer Max_Batch_Size__c { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Integer Timeout_ms__c { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Integer Priority__c { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public String Authentication_Type__c { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public String Named_Credential__c { get; set; }
    }
    
    public class ConnectionTestResult {
        @AuraEnabled public Boolean success { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public String message { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public String responseTime { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public String errorDetails { get; set; }
    }
    
    public class ValidationResult {
        @AuraEnabled public Boolean success { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public String message { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public List<String> details { get; set; }
    }
}
```

```apex
/**
 * @description Test class for AIConfigurationController
 * @author RouteLogic Team
 * @date 2025-01-20
 */
@isTest
private class AIConfigurationControllerTest {
    
    @TestSetup
    static void setup() {
        // Create test configuration overrides
        List<AI_Config_Override__c> configOverrides = new List<AI_Config_Override__c>();
        
        configOverrides.add(new AI_Config_Override__c(
            Name = 'Default_Batch_Size__c',
            Setting_Value__c = '50',
            Setting_Type__c = 'Number',
            Is_Active__c = true,
            Description__c = 'Test batch size override'
        ));
        
        configOverrides.add(new AI_Config_Override__c(
            Name = 'Enable_Debug_Logging__c',
            Setting_Value__c = 'true',
            Setting_Type__c = 'Boolean',
            Is_Active__c = true,
            Description__c = 'Test debug logging override'
        ));
        
        insert configOverrides;
        
        // Create test provider overrides
        AI_Provider_Override__c providerOverride = new AI_Provider_Override__c(
            Provider_Metadata_Id__c = 'TEST_PROVIDER_ID_001',
            Provider_Name__c = 'Test AI Provider',
            Is_Active__c = true,
            API_Endpoint__c = 'https://test.api.com/v1',
            Max_Batch_Size__c = 100,
            Timeout_ms__c = 30000,
            Priority__c = 1
        );
        insert providerOverride;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test retrieving configuration settings
     */
    @isTest
    static void testGetConfigurationSettings() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        Map<String, Object> settings = AIConfigurationController.getConfigurationSettings();
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify settings are returned
        System.assertNotEquals(null, settings, 'Settings should not be null');
        
        // Verify default values are present
        System.assert(settings.containsKey('Default_Batch_Size__c'), 
            'Should contain batch size setting');
        System.assert(settings.containsKey('Max_Retry_Attempts__c'), 
            'Should contain retry attempts setting');
        System.assert(settings.containsKey('Circuit_Breaker_Threshold__c'), 
            'Should contain circuit breaker setting');
        
        // Verify types
        System.assert(settings.get('Default_Batch_Size__c') instanceof Integer || 
                     settings.get('Default_Batch_Size__c') instanceof Decimal,
                     'Batch size should be numeric');
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test updating configuration setting
     */
    @isTest
    static void testUpdateConfigurationSetting() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Update a setting
        AIConfigurationController.updateConfigurationSetting('Test_Setting__c', 'TestValue');
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify override was created
        AI_Config_Override__c override = [
            SELECT Setting_Value__c, Last_Modified_By__c
            FROM AI_Config_Override__c
            WHERE Name = 'Test_Setting__c'
            LIMIT 1
        ];
        
        System.assertEquals('TestValue', override.Setting_Value__c, 
            'Setting value should be updated');
        System.assertEquals(UserInfo.getUserId(), override.Last_Modified_By__c, 
            'Should track who modified');
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test updating existing configuration setting
     */
    @isTest
    static void testUpdateExistingConfigurationSetting() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Update existing setting
        AIConfigurationController.updateConfigurationSetting('Default_Batch_Size__c', 75);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify override was updated
        AI_Config_Override__c override = [
            SELECT Setting_Value__c
            FROM AI_Config_Override__c
            WHERE Name = 'Default_Batch_Size__c'
            LIMIT 1
        ];
        
        System.assertEquals('75', override.Setting_Value__c, 
            'Setting value should be updated to new value');
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test retrieving provider settings
     */
    @isTest
    static void testGetProviderSettings() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        List<AIConfigurationController.ProviderSetting> providers = 
            AIConfigurationController.getProviderSettings();
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        System.assertNotEquals(null, providers, 'Providers list should not be null');
        // Note: Actual provider count depends on metadata in the org
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test updating provider setting
     */
    @isTest
    static void testUpdateProviderSetting() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        Map<String, Object> settings = new Map<String, Object>{
            'Is_Active__c' => false,
            'API_Endpoint__c' => 'https://updated.api.com/v2',
            'Max_Batch_Size__c' => 150,
            'Timeout_ms__c' => 45000,
            'Priority__c' => 2
        };
        
        AIConfigurationController.updateProviderSetting('TEST_PROVIDER_ID_002', settings);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify override was created
        AI_Provider_Override__c override = [
            SELECT Is_Active__c, API_Endpoint__c, Max_Batch_Size__c
            FROM AI_Provider_Override__c
            WHERE Provider_Metadata_Id__c = 'TEST_PROVIDER_ID_002'
            LIMIT 1
        ];
        
        System.assertEquals(false, override.Is_Active__c, 'Should be inactive');
        System.assertEquals('https://updated.api.com/v2', override.API_Endpoint__c, 
            'Endpoint should be updated');
        System.assertEquals(150, override.Max_Batch_Size__c, 'Batch size should be updated');
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test provider connection test with mock
     */
    @isTest
    static void testProviderConnectionSuccess() {
        // This would require a provider metadata record to exist
        // Using mock HTTP response
        Test.setMock(HttpCalloutMock.class, new MockHealthCheckResponse(200));
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        try {
            // This will fail without actual metadata, but tests the structure
            AIConfigurationController.ConnectionTestResult result = 
                AIConfigurationController.testProviderConnection('TEST_ID');
                
            // In a real test with metadata, we'd verify:
            // System.assertEquals(true, result.success, 'Connection should succeed');
        } catch (Exception e) {
            // Expected without actual metadata
            System.assert(e.getMessage().contains('List has no rows'), 
                'Should fail due to missing metadata');
        }
        
        Test.stopTest();
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test configuration validation
     */
    @isTest
    static void testValidateConfiguration() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        Map<String, AIConfigurationController.ValidationResult> results = 
            AIConfigurationController.validateConfiguration();
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        System.assertNotEquals(null, results, 'Results should not be null');
        System.assert(results.containsKey('General Settings'), 
            'Should validate general settings');
        System.assert(results.containsKey('Provider Configuration'), 
            'Should validate provider configuration');
        System.assert(results.containsKey('Security Settings'), 
            'Should validate security settings');
        
        // Verify structure of results
        for (String category : results.keySet()) {
            AIConfigurationController.ValidationResult result = results.get(category);
            System.assertNotEquals(null, result.success, 
                'Each result should have success status');
            System.assertNotEquals(null, result.message, 
                'Each result should have a message');
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test permission checking
     */
    @isTest
    static void testPermissionDenied() {
        // Create user without permission
        User testUser = createTestUser('Standard User');
        
        System.runAs(testUser) {
            Test.startTest();
            
            try {
                AIConfigurationController.updateConfigurationSetting('Test', 'Value');
                System.assert(false, 'Should have thrown permission exception');
            } catch (AuraHandledException e) {
                System.assert(e.getMessage().contains('permission'), 
                    'Should be permission error');
            }
            
            Test.stopTest();
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test error handling
     */
    @isTest
    static void testErrorHandling() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        try {
            // Try to update with null setting name
            AIConfigurationController.updateConfigurationSetting(null, 'Value');
            System.assert(false, 'Should have thrown exception');
        } catch (AuraHandledException e) {
            System.assert(e.getMessage().contains('Failed to update'), 
                'Should have proper error message');
        }
        
        Test.stopTest();
    }
    
    // Helper methods
    
    private static User createTestUser(String profileName) {
        Profile p = [SELECT Id FROM Profile WHERE Name = :profileName LIMIT 1];
        
        User u = new User(
            Alias = 'configtst',
            Email = 'configtest@routelogic.com',
            EmailEncodingKey = 'UTF-8',
            LastName = 'ConfigTest',
            LanguageLocaleKey = 'en_US',
            LocaleSidKey = 'en_US',
            ProfileId = p.Id,
            TimeZoneSidKey = 'America/Los_Angeles',
            UserName = 'configtest' + DateTime.now().getTime() + '@routelogic.com'
        );
        
        insert u;
        return u;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Mock for health check HTTP response
     */
    private class MockHealthCheckResponse implements HttpCalloutMock {
        private Integer statusCode;
        
        public MockHealthCheckResponse(Integer statusCode) {
            this.statusCode = statusCode;
        }
        
        public HTTPResponse respond(HTTPRequest req) {
            HttpResponse res = new HttpResponse();
            res.setHeader('Content-Type', 'application/json');
            res.setHeader('X-Response-Time', '123ms');
            
            if (statusCode == 200) {
                res.setBody('{"status":"healthy","version":"1.0"}');
            } else {
                res.setBody('{"error":"Service unavailable"}');
            }
            
            res.setStatusCode(statusCode);
            return res;
        }
    }
}
```

## 📄 FILE: force-app/main/default/classes/AIConfigurationValidationService.cls

```apex
/**
 * @description Service class for comprehensive AI configuration validation
 * Validates settings, provider configurations, and system readiness
 * @author RouteLogic Team
 * @date 2025-01-20
 * @group Configuration Management
 */
public with sharing class AIConfigurationValidationService {
    
    // Validation error codes
    public static final String ERROR_NO_ACTIVE_PROVIDER = 'NO_ACTIVE_PROVIDER';
    public static final String ERROR_INVALID_BATCH_SIZE = 'INVALID_BATCH_SIZE';
    public static final String ERROR_INVALID_TIMEOUT = 'INVALID_TIMEOUT';
    public static final String ERROR_MISSING_CREDENTIAL = 'MISSING_CREDENTIAL';
    public static final String ERROR_INVALID_ENDPOINT = 'INVALID_ENDPOINT';
    public static final String ERROR_PERMISSION_MISSING = 'PERMISSION_MISSING';
    public static final String ERROR_LIMIT_EXCEEDED = 'LIMIT_EXCEEDED';
    
    /**
     * @description Performs complete configuration validation
     * @return Comprehensive validation report
     */
    public static ValidationReport validateCompleteConfiguration() {
        ValidationReport report = new ValidationReport();
        report.timestamp = DateTime.now();
        report.validatedBy = UserInfo.getUserName();
        
        try {
            // Run all validation checks
            report.generalSettingsValidation = validateGeneralSettings();
            report.providerValidation = validateProviders();
            report.securityValidation = validateSecurity();
            report.integrationValidation = validateIntegrations();
            report.performanceValidation = validatePerformance();
            report.dataIntegrityValidation = validateDataIntegrity();
            
            // Calculate overall status
            report.overallStatus = calculateOverallStatus(report);
            report.isValid = report.overallStatus == 'PASSED';
            
            // Generate recommendations
            report.recommendations = generateRecommendations(report);
            
            // Log validation execution
            logValidationExecution(report);
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            report.overallStatus = 'ERROR';
            report.isValid = false;
            report.errorMessage = e.getMessage();
            
            ErrorLogService.logError(
                'AIConfigurationValidationService.validateCompleteConfiguration',
                e.getMessage(),
                e.getStackTraceString(),
                null
            );
        }
        
        return report;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Validates general AI processing settings
     * @return Validation result for general settings
     */
    public static ValidationCategory validateGeneralSettings() {
        ValidationCategory category = new ValidationCategory('General Settings');
        
        try {
            Map<String, Object> settings = AIConfigurationController.getConfigurationSettings();
            
            // Validate batch size
            ValidationItem batchSizeCheck = new ValidationItem('Batch Size Configuration');
            Integer batchSize = Integer.valueOf(settings.get('Default_Batch_Size__c'));
            if (batchSize >= 1 && batchSize <= 200) {
                batchSizeCheck.status = 'PASSED';
                batchSizeCheck.message = 'Batch size (' + batchSize + ') is within valid range';
            } else {
                batchSizeCheck.status = 'FAILED';
                batchSizeCheck.message = 'Batch size must be between 1 and 200';
                batchSizeCheck.errorCode = ERROR_INVALID_BATCH_SIZE;
            }
            category.items.add(batchSizeCheck);
            
            // Validate retry configuration
            ValidationItem retryCheck = new ValidationItem('Retry Configuration');
            Integer maxRetries = Integer.valueOf(settings.get('Max_Retry_Attempts__c'));
            if (maxRetries >= 0 && maxRetries <= 5) {
                retryCheck.status = 'PASSED';
                retryCheck.message = 'Retry attempts (' + maxRetries + ') configured correctly';
            } else {
                retryCheck.status = 'FAILED';
                retryCheck.message = 'Max retry attempts must be between 0 and 5';
            }
            category.items.add(retryCheck);
            
            // Validate circuit breaker
            ValidationItem circuitBreakerCheck = new ValidationItem('Circuit Breaker Configuration');
            Integer cbThreshold = Integer.valueOf(settings.get('Circuit_Breaker_Threshold__c'));
            Integer cbTimeout = Integer.valueOf(settings.get('Circuit_Breaker_Timeout__c'));
            if (cbThreshold > 0 && cbTimeout > 0) {
                circuitBreakerCheck.status = 'PASSED';
                circuitBreakerCheck.message = 'Circuit breaker configured with threshold=' + 
                    cbThreshold + ', timeout=' + cbTimeout + ' minutes';
            } else {
                circuitBreakerCheck.status = 'WARNING';
                circuitBreakerCheck.message = 'Circuit breaker settings may need adjustment';
            }
            category.items.add(circuitBreakerCheck);
            
            // Validate timeout settings
            ValidationItem timeoutCheck = new ValidationItem('API Timeout Configuration');
            Integer apiTimeout = Integer.valueOf(settings.get('API_Timeout__c'));
            if (apiTimeout >= 10 && apiTimeout <= 120) {
                timeoutCheck.status = 'PASSED';
                timeoutCheck.message = 'API timeout (' + apiTimeout + ' seconds) is appropriate';
            } else {
                timeoutCheck.status = 'FAILED';
                timeoutCheck.message = 'API timeout must be between 10 and 120 seconds';
                timeoutCheck.errorCode = ERROR_INVALID_TIMEOUT;
            }
            category.items.add(timeoutCheck);
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            category.status = 'ERROR';
            category.errorMessage = e.getMessage();
        }
        
        category.calculateStatus();
        return category;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Validates AI provider configurations
     * @return Validation result for providers
     */
    public static ValidationCategory validateProviders() {
        ValidationCategory category = new ValidationCategory('AI Provider Configuration');
        
        try {
            List<AIConfigurationController.ProviderSetting> providers = 
                AIConfigurationController.getProviderSettings();
            
            // Check for active providers
            ValidationItem activeProviderCheck = new ValidationItem('Active Provider Check');
            Integer activeCount = 0;
            for (AIConfigurationController.ProviderSetting provider : providers) {
                if (provider.Is_Active__c) {
                    activeCount++;
                }
            }
            
            if (activeCount > 0) {
                activeProviderCheck.status = 'PASSED';
                activeProviderCheck.message = activeCount + ' active provider(s) configured';
            } else {
                activeProviderCheck.status = 'FAILED';
                activeProviderCheck.message = 'No active AI providers found';
                activeProviderCheck.errorCode = ERROR_NO_ACTIVE_PROVIDER;
            }
            category.items.add(activeProviderCheck);
            
            // Validate each active provider
            for (AIConfigurationController.ProviderSetting provider : providers) {
                if (provider.Is_Active__c) {
                    ValidationItem providerCheck = new ValidationItem(
                        provider.Provider_Name__c + ' Configuration'
                    );
                    
                    List<String> issues = new List<String>();
                    
                    // Check endpoint
                    if (String.isBlank(provider.API_Endpoint__c)) {
                        issues.add('Missing API endpoint');
                    }
                    
                    // Check batch size
                    if (provider.Max_Batch_Size__c < 1 || provider.Max_Batch_Size__c > 200) {
                        issues.add('Invalid batch size');
                    }
                    
                    // Check timeout
                    if (provider.Timeout_ms__c < 1000 || provider.Timeout_ms__c > 120000) {
                        issues.add('Invalid timeout value');
                    }
                    
                    // Check Named Credential
                    if (String.isBlank(provider.Named_Credential__c)) {
                        issues.add('Missing Named Credential');
                    }
                    
                    if (issues.isEmpty()) {
                        providerCheck.status = 'PASSED';
                        providerCheck.message = 'Provider configured correctly';
                    } else {
                        providerCheck.status = 'FAILED';
                        providerCheck.message = 'Issues: ' + String.join(issues, ', ');
                    }
                    
                    category.items.add(providerCheck);
                }
            }
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            category.status = 'ERROR';
            category.errorMessage = e.getMessage();
        }
        
        category.calculateStatus();
        return category;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Validates security configurations
     * @return Validation result for security
     */
    public static ValidationCategory validateSecurity() {
        ValidationCategory category = new ValidationCategory('Security Configuration');
        
        try {
            // Check Named Credentials
            ValidationItem credentialCheck = new ValidationItem('Named Credentials');
            List<NamedCredential> credentials = [
                SELECT DeveloperName, Endpoint
                FROM NamedCredential
                WHERE DeveloperName IN ('Ada_API', 'Intercom_API')
            ];
            
            if (credentials.size() >= 1) {
                credentialCheck.status = 'PASSED';
                credentialCheck.message = credentials.size() + ' Named Credential(s) configured';
            } else {
                credentialCheck.status = 'FAILED';
                credentialCheck.message = 'Required Named Credentials not found';
                credentialCheck.errorCode = ERROR_MISSING_CREDENTIAL;
            }
            category.items.add(credentialCheck);
            
            // Check user permissions
            ValidationItem permissionCheck = new ValidationItem('User Permissions');
            Boolean hasConfigPermission = FeatureManagement.checkPermission('AI_Configuration_Manager');
            Boolean hasProcessingPermission = FeatureManagement.checkPermission('AI_Bulk_Processing');
            
            if (hasConfigPermission || hasProcessingPermission) {
                permissionCheck.status = 'PASSED';
                permissionCheck.message = 'Required permissions are assigned';
            } else {
                permissionCheck.status = 'WARNING';
                permissionCheck.message = 'Some permissions may be missing';
            }
            category.items.add(permissionCheck);
            
            // Check field encryption
            ValidationItem encryptionCheck = new ValidationItem('Data Encryption');
            Boolean isEncrypted = Schema.sObjectType.AI_Processing_Status__c
                .fields.Response_Data__c.isEncrypted();
            
            if (isEncrypted) {
                encryptionCheck.status = 'PASSED';
                encryptionCheck.message = 'Sensitive data fields are encrypted';
            } else {
                encryptionCheck.status = 'WARNING';
                encryptionCheck.message = 'Consider enabling encryption for sensitive fields';
            }
            category.items.add(encryptionCheck);
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            category.status = 'ERROR';
            category.errorMessage = e.getMessage();
        }
        
        category.calculateStatus();
        return category;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Validates integration endpoints
     * @return Validation result for integrations
     */
    public static ValidationCategory validateIntegrations() {
        ValidationCategory category = new ValidationCategory('Integration Endpoints');
        
        try {
            List<AIConfigurationController.ProviderSetting> providers = 
                AIConfigurationController.getProviderSettings();
            
            for (AIConfigurationController.ProviderSetting provider : providers) {
                if (provider.Is_Active__c) {
                    ValidationItem endpointCheck = new ValidationItem(
                        provider.Provider_Name__c + ' Endpoint'
                    );
                    
                    // Validate endpoint format
                    if (String.isNotBlank(provider.API_Endpoint__c)) {
                        if (provider.API_Endpoint__c.startsWith('https://')) {
                            endpointCheck.status = 'PASSED';
                            endpointCheck.message = 'Endpoint uses secure HTTPS protocol';
                        } else {
                            endpointCheck.status = 'WARNING';
                            endpointCheck.message = 'Endpoint should use HTTPS for security';
                        }
                    } else {
                        endpointCheck.status = 'FAILED';
                        endpointCheck.message = 'Endpoint URL is missing';
                        endpointCheck.errorCode = ERROR_INVALID_ENDPOINT;
                    }
                    
                    category.items.add(endpointCheck);
                }
            }
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            category.status = 'ERROR';
            category.errorMessage = e.getMessage();
        }
        
        category.calculateStatus();
        return category;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Validates performance and limits
     * @return Validation result for performance
     */
    public static ValidationCategory validatePerformance() {
        ValidationCategory category = new ValidationCategory('Performance & Limits');
        
        try {
            // Check async apex limit
            ValidationItem asyncLimitCheck = new ValidationItem('Async Apex Capacity');
            System.OrgLimit asyncLimit = OrgLimits.getMap().get('DailyAsyncApexExecutions');
            Decimal usagePercent = (asyncLimit.getValue() * 100.0) / asyncLimit.getLimit();
            
            if (usagePercent < 80) {
                asyncLimitCheck.status = 'PASSED';
                asyncLimitCheck.message = String.format('Using {0}% of daily async limit', 
                    new List<Object>{usagePercent.setScale(1)});
            } else if (usagePercent < 90) {
                asyncLimitCheck.status = 'WARNING';
                asyncLimitCheck.message = 'Approaching async apex limit (' + 
                    usagePercent.setScale(1) + '% used)';
            } else {
                asyncLimitCheck.status = 'FAILED';
                asyncLimitCheck.message = 'Async apex limit nearly exhausted';
                asyncLimitCheck.errorCode = ERROR_LIMIT_EXCEEDED;
            }
            category.items.add(asyncLimitCheck);
            
            // Check API call limit
            ValidationItem apiLimitCheck = new ValidationItem('API Call Capacity');
            System.OrgLimit apiLimit = OrgLimits.getMap().get('DailyApiRequests');
            Decimal apiUsagePercent = (apiLimit.getValue() * 100.0) / apiLimit.getLimit();
            
            if (apiUsagePercent < 80) {
                apiLimitCheck.status = 'PASSED';
                apiLimitCheck.message = String.format('Using {0}% of daily API limit', 
                    new List<Object>{apiUsagePercent.setScale(1)});
            } else {
                apiLimitCheck.status = 'WARNING';
                apiLimitCheck.message = 'High API usage (' + apiUsagePercent.setScale(1) + '%)';
            }
            category.items.add(apiLimitCheck);
            
            // Check Platform Cache
            ValidationItem cacheCheck = new ValidationItem('Platform Cache Configuration');
            try {
                Cache.OrgPartition orgPart = Cache.Org.getPartition('AIProcessing');
                if (orgPart != null) {
                    cacheCheck.status = 'PASSED';
                    cacheCheck.message = 'Platform cache partition configured';
                } else {
                    cacheCheck.status = 'WARNING';
                    cacheCheck.message = 'Platform cache not configured';
                }
            } catch (Exception e) {
                cacheCheck.status = 'WARNING';
                cacheCheck.message = 'Platform cache partition not found';
            }
            category.items.add(cacheCheck);
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            category.status = 'ERROR';
            category.errorMessage = e.getMessage();
        }
        
        category.calculateStatus();
        return category;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Validates data integrity
     * @return Validation result for data integrity
     */
    public static ValidationCategory validateDataIntegrity() {
        ValidationCategory category = new ValidationCategory('Data Integrity');
        
        try {
            // Check for orphaned records
            ValidationItem orphanCheck = new ValidationItem('Orphaned Records Check');
            Integer orphanedStatuses = [
                SELECT COUNT()
                FROM AI_Processing_Status__c
                WHERE Case__c = null
                AND CreatedDate < :DateTime.now().addDays(-7)
            ];
            
            if (orphanedStatuses == 0) {
                orphanCheck.status = 'PASSED';
                orphanCheck.message = 'No orphaned processing records found';
            } else {
                orphanCheck.status = 'WARNING';
                orphanCheck.message = orphanedStatuses + ' orphaned records detected';
            }
            category.items.add(orphanCheck);
            
            // Check stuck processing records
            ValidationItem stuckRecordsCheck = new ValidationItem('Stuck Processing Records');
            Integer stuckRecords = [
                SELECT COUNT()
                FROM AI_Processing_Status__c
                WHERE Status__c = 'Processing'
                AND LastModifiedDate < :DateTime.now().addHours(-2)
            ];
            
            if (stuckRecords == 0) {
                stuckRecordsCheck.status = 'PASSED';
                stuckRecordsCheck.message = 'No stuck processing records';
            } else {
                stuckRecordsCheck.status = 'WARNING';
                stuckRecordsCheck.message = stuckRecords + ' records stuck in processing';
            }
            category.items.add(stuckRecordsCheck);
            
            // Check error log size
            ValidationItem errorLogCheck = new ValidationItem('Error Log Management');
            Integer errorLogCount = [
                SELECT COUNT()
                FROM Error_Log__c
                WHERE CreatedDate >= :DateTime.now().addDays(-30)
            ];
            
            if (errorLogCount < 1000) {
                errorLogCheck.status = 'PASSED';
                errorLogCheck.message = 'Error log size is manageable';
            } else {
                errorLogCheck.status = 'WARNING';
                errorLogCheck.message = 'High error log volume (' + errorLogCount + ' in 30 days)';
            }
            category.items.add(errorLogCheck);
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            category.status = 'ERROR';
            category.errorMessage = e.getMessage();
        }
        
        category.calculateStatus();
        return category;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Calculates overall validation status
     * @param report The validation report
     * @return Overall status string
     */
    private static String calculateOverallStatus(ValidationReport report) {
        Boolean hasFailures = false;
        Boolean hasWarnings = false;
        Boolean hasErrors = false;
        
        List<ValidationCategory> allCategories = new List<ValidationCategory>{
            report.generalSettingsValidation,
            report.providerValidation,
            report.securityValidation,
            report.integrationValidation,
            report.performanceValidation,
            report.dataIntegrityValidation
        };
        
        for (ValidationCategory category : allCategories) {
            if (category != null) {
                if (category.status == 'FAILED') hasFailures = true;
                if (category.status == 'WARNING') hasWarnings = true;
                if (category.status == 'ERROR') hasErrors = true;
            }
        }
        
        if (hasErrors) return 'ERROR';
        if (hasFailures) return 'FAILED';
        if (hasWarnings) return 'WARNING';
        return 'PASSED';
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Generates recommendations based on validation results
     * @param report The validation report
     * @return List of recommendations
     */
    private static List<String> generateRecommendations(ValidationReport report) {
        List<String> recommendations = new List<String>();
        
        // Check each category for specific recommendations
        if (report.providerValidation != null) {
            for (ValidationItem item : report.providerValidation.items) {
                if (item.errorCode == ERROR_NO_ACTIVE_PROVIDER) {
                    recommendations.add('Activate at least one AI provider to enable processing');
                }
            }
        }
        
        if (report.performanceValidation != null) {
            for (ValidationItem item : report.performanceValidation.items) {
                if (item.status == 'WARNING' && item.name.contains('Async Apex')) {
                    recommendations.add('Consider scheduling bulk processing during off-peak hours');
                }
            }
        }
        
        if (report.dataIntegrityValidation != null) {
            for (ValidationItem item : report.dataIntegrityValidation.items) {
                if (item.status == 'WARNING' && item.name.contains('Orphaned')) {
                    recommendations.add('Run data cleanup job to remove orphaned records');
                }
            }
        }
        
        return recommendations;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Logs validation execution for audit
     * @param report The validation report
     */
    private static void logValidationExecution(ValidationReport report) {
        MetricsLogger.logEvent('CONFIG_VALIDATION_EXECUTED', new Map<String, Object>{
            'status' => report.overallStatus,
            'isValid' => report.isValid,
            'categoriesChecked' => 6,
            'recommendationCount' => report.recommendations.size(),
            'executedBy' => UserInfo.getUserId(),
            'timestamp' => report.timestamp
        });
    }
    
    // Inner classes
    
    public class ValidationReport {
        @AuraEnabled public DateTime timestamp { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public String validatedBy { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public String overallStatus { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Boolean isValid { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public String errorMessage { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public ValidationCategory generalSettingsValidation { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public ValidationCategory providerValidation { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public ValidationCategory securityValidation { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public ValidationCategory integrationValidation { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public ValidationCategory performanceValidation { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public ValidationCategory dataIntegrityValidation { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public List<String> recommendations { get; set; }
        
        public ValidationReport() {
            this.recommendations = new List<String>();
        }
    }
    
    public class ValidationCategory {
        @AuraEnabled public String name { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public String status { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public String errorMessage { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public List<ValidationItem> items { get; set; }
        
        public ValidationCategory(String name) {
            this.name = name;
            this.items = new List<ValidationItem>();
            this.status = 'PENDING';
        }
        
        public void calculateStatus() {
            if (items.isEmpty()) {
                status = 'PASSED';
                return;
            }
            
            Boolean hasFailures = false;
            Boolean hasWarnings = false;
            
            for (ValidationItem item : items) {
                if (item.status == 'FAILED') hasFailures = true;
                if (item.status == 'WARNING') hasWarnings = true;
            }
            
            if (hasFailures) {
                status = 'FAILED';
            } else if (hasWarnings) {
                status = 'WARNING';
            } else {
                status = 'PASSED';
            }
        }
    }
    
    public class ValidationItem {
        @AuraEnabled public String name { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public String status { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public String message { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public String errorCode { get; set; }
        
        public ValidationItem(String name) {
            this.name = name;
            this.status = 'PENDING';
        }
    }
}
```

```apex
/**
 * @description Test class for AIConfigurationValidationService
 * @author RouteLogic Team
 * @date 2025-01-20
 */
@isTest
private class AIConfigurationValidationServiceTest {
    
    @TestSetup
    static void setup() {
        // Create test configuration data
        List<AI_Config_Override__c> configOverrides = new List<AI_Config_Override__c>();
        
        configOverrides.add(new AI_Config_Override__c(
            Name = 'Default_Batch_Size__c',
            Setting_Value__c = '100',
            Setting_Type__c = 'Number',
            Is_Active__c = true
        ));
        
        configOverrides.add(new AI_Config_Override__c(
            Name = 'Max_Retry_Attempts__c',
            Setting_Value__c = '3',
            Setting_Type__c = 'Number',
            Is_Active__c = true
        ));
        
        configOverrides.add(new AI_Config_Override__c(
            Name = 'Circuit_Breaker_Threshold__c',
            Setting_Value__c = '5',
            Setting_Type__c = 'Number',
            Is_Active__c = true
        ));
        
        insert configOverrides;
        
        // Create test processing status records
        Case testCase = new Case(Subject = 'Test Case', Status = 'New');
        insert testCase;
        
        List<AI_Processing_Status__c> statusRecords = new List<AI_Processing_Status__c>();
        
        // Create some stuck processing records
        for (Integer i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
            statusRecords.add(new AI_Processing_Status__c(
                Case__c = testCase.Id,
                Status__c = 'Processing',
                AI_Provider__c = 'Test Provider',
                Request_Time__c = DateTime.now().addHours(-3)
            ));
        }
        
        // Create orphaned records
        for (Integer i = 0; i < 2; i++) {
            statusRecords.add(new AI_Processing_Status__c(
                Status__c = 'Failed',
                AI_Provider__c = 'Test Provider',
                Request_Time__c = DateTime.now().addDays(-10)
            ));
        }
        
        insert statusRecords;
        
        // Create error logs
        List<Error_Log__c> errorLogs = new List<Error_Log__c>();
        for (Integer i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
            errorLogs.add(new Error_Log__c(
                Class_Name__c = 'TestClass',
                Method_Name__c = 'testMethod',
                Error_Message__c = 'Test error',
                Stack_Trace__c = 'Test trace'
            ));
        }
        insert errorLogs;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test complete configuration validation
     */
    @isTest
    static void testValidateCompleteConfiguration() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        AIConfigurationValidationService.ValidationReport report = 
            AIConfigurationValidationService.validateCompleteConfiguration();
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify report structure
        System.assertNotEquals(null, report, 'Report should not be null');
        System.assertNotEquals(null, report.timestamp, 'Should have timestamp');
        System.assertEquals(UserInfo.getUserName(), report.validatedBy, 
            'Should track validator');
        
        // Verify all categories are validated
        System.assertNotEquals(null, report.generalSettingsValidation, 
            'Should validate general settings');
        System.assertNotEquals(null, report.providerValidation, 
            'Should validate providers');
        System.assertNotEquals(null, report.securityValidation, 
            'Should validate security');
        System.assertNotEquals(null, report.integrationValidation, 
            'Should validate integrations');
        System.assertNotEquals(null, report.performanceValidation, 
            'Should validate performance');
        System.assertNotEquals(null, report.dataIntegrityValidation, 
            'Should validate data integrity');
        
        // Verify overall status
        System.assertNotEquals(null, report.overallStatus, 'Should have overall status');
        System.assertNotEquals(null, report.isValid, 'Should have validity flag');
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test general settings validation
     */
    @isTest
    static void testValidateGeneralSettings() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        AIConfigurationValidationService.ValidationCategory result = 
            AIConfigurationValidationService.validateGeneralSettings();
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        System.assertEquals('General Settings', result.name, 'Should have correct name');
        System.assertNotEquals(null, result.items, 'Should have validation items');
        System.assert(result.items.size() > 0, 'Should validate multiple settings');
        
        // Check specific validations
        Boolean foundBatchSize = false;
        Boolean foundRetry = false;
        
        for (AIConfigurationValidationService.ValidationItem item : result.items) {
            if (item.name.contains('Batch Size')) {
                foundBatchSize = true;
                System.assertEquals('PASSED', item.status, 
                    'Batch size should pass with valid value');
            }
            if (item.name.contains('Retry')) {
                foundRetry = true;
                System.assertEquals('PASSED', item.status, 
                    'Retry config should pass with valid value');
            }
        }
        
        System.assert(foundBatchSize, 'Should validate batch size');
        System.assert(foundRetry, 'Should validate retry configuration');
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test provider validation
     */
    @isTest
    static void testValidateProviders() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        AIConfigurationValidationService.ValidationCategory result = 
            AIConfigurationValidationService.validateProviders();
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        System.assertEquals('AI Provider Configuration', result.name, 
            'Should have correct name');
        
        // Check for active provider validation
        Boolean foundActiveCheck = false;
        for (AIConfigurationValidationService.ValidationItem item : result.items) {
            if (item.name.contains('Active Provider')) {
                foundActiveCheck = true;
                // Without metadata, this will fail
                if (item.errorCode == AIConfigurationValidationService.ERROR_NO_ACTIVE_PROVIDER) {
                    System.assertEquals('FAILED', item.status, 
                        'Should fail when no active providers');
                }
            }
        }
        
        System.assert(foundActiveCheck, 'Should check for active providers');
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test security validation
     */
    @isTest
    static void testValidateSecurity() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        AIConfigurationValidationService.ValidationCategory result = 
            AIConfigurationValidationService.validateSecurity();
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        System.assertEquals('Security Configuration', result.name, 
            'Should have correct name');
        
        // Check for specific security validations
        Boolean foundCredentials = false;
        Boolean foundPermissions = false;
        Boolean foundEncryption = false;
        
        for (AIConfigurationValidationService.ValidationItem item : result.items) {
            if (item.name.contains('Named Credentials')) foundCredentials = true;
            if (item.name.contains('Permissions')) foundPermissions = true;
            if (item.name.contains('Encryption')) foundEncryption = true;
        }
        
        System.assert(foundCredentials, 'Should validate named credentials');
        System.assert(foundPermissions, 'Should validate permissions');
        System.assert(foundEncryption, 'Should validate encryption');
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test performance validation
     */
    @isTest
    static void testValidatePerformance() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        AIConfigurationValidationService.ValidationCategory result = 
            AIConfigurationValidationService.validatePerformance();
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        System.assertEquals('Performance & Limits', result.name, 
            'Should have correct name');
        
        // Check for limit validations
        Boolean foundAsyncLimit = false;
        Boolean foundApiLimit = false;
        
        for (AIConfigurationValidationService.ValidationItem item : result.items) {
            if (item.name.contains('Async Apex')) {
                foundAsyncLimit = true;
                System.assertEquals('PASSED', item.status, 
                    'Async limit should pass in test');
            }
            if (item.name.contains('API Call')) {
                foundApiLimit = true;
                System.assertEquals('PASSED', item.status, 
                    'API limit should pass in test');
            }
        }
        
        System.assert(foundAsyncLimit, 'Should check async apex limit');
        System.assert(foundApiLimit, 'Should check API call limit');
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test data integrity validation
     */
    @isTest
    static void testValidateDataIntegrity() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        AIConfigurationValidationService.ValidationCategory result = 
            AIConfigurationValidationService.validateDataIntegrity();
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        System.assertEquals('Data Integrity', result.name, 'Should have correct name');
        
        // Check for data integrity validations
        Boolean foundOrphans = false;
        Boolean foundStuck = false;
        Boolean foundErrorLog = false;
        
        for (AIConfigurationValidationService.ValidationItem item : result.items) {
            if (item.name.contains('Orphaned')) {
                foundOrphans = true;
                System.assertEquals('WARNING', item.status, 
                    'Should warn about orphaned records');
            }
            if (item.name.contains('Stuck')) {
                foundStuck = true;
                System.assertEquals('WARNING', item.status, 
                    'Should warn about stuck records');
            }
            if (item.name.contains('Error Log')) {
                foundErrorLog = true;
            }
        }
        
        System.assert(foundOrphans, 'Should check for orphaned records');
        System.assert(foundStuck, 'Should check for stuck processing');
        System.assert(foundErrorLog, 'Should check error log size');
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test validation with invalid settings
     */
    @isTest
    static void testValidationWithInvalidSettings() {
        // Update settings to invalid values
        AI_Config_Override__c invalidBatchSize = [
            SELECT Id FROM AI_Config_Override__c 
            WHERE Name = 'Default_Batch_Size__c' 
            LIMIT 1
        ];
        invalidBatchSize.Setting_Value__c = '300'; // Over limit
        update invalidBatchSize;
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        AIConfigurationValidationService.ValidationCategory result = 
            AIConfigurationValidationService.validateGeneralSettings();
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Find batch size validation
        Boolean foundInvalidBatchSize = false;
        for (AIConfigurationValidationService.ValidationItem item : result.items) {
            if (item.name.contains('Batch Size')) {
                System.assertEquals('FAILED', item.status, 
                    'Should fail with invalid batch size');
                System.assertEquals(
                    AIConfigurationValidationService.ERROR_INVALID_BATCH_SIZE, 
                    item.errorCode,
                    'Should have correct error code'
                );
                foundInvalidBatchSize = true;
            }
        }
        
        System.assert(foundInvalidBatchSize, 'Should validate batch size');
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test recommendation generation
     */
    @isTest
    static void testRecommendationGeneration() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        AIConfigurationValidationService.ValidationReport report = 
            AIConfigurationValidationService.validateCompleteConfiguration();
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        System.assertNotEquals(null, report.recommendations, 
            'Should have recommendations list');
        
        // With test data, should have recommendations for:
        // - No active providers
        // - Orphaned records
        System.assert(report.recommendations.size() > 0, 
            'Should generate recommendations based on issues');
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test error handling in validation
     */
    @isTest
    static void testValidationErrorHandling() {
        // Force an error by corrupting data
        delete [SELECT Id FROM AI_Config_Override__c];
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        AIConfigurationValidationService.ValidationReport report = 
            AIConfigurationValidationService.validateCompleteConfiguration();
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Should handle errors gracefully
        System.assertNotEquals(null, report, 'Should return report even with errors');
        // Report should indicate issues but not crash
    }
}
```

## 📄 FILE: force-app/main/default/classes/AIException.cls

```apex
/**
 * @description Custom exception class for AI-related errors
 * @author RouteLogic Team
 * @date 2025-01-17
 */
@namespaceAccessible
public class AIException extends Exception {
    
    private String errorCode;
    private Map<String, Object> details;
    
    /**
     * @description Constructor with message
     * @param message Error message
     */
    public AIException(String message) {
        this(message, null, null);
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Constructor with message and error code
     * @param message Error message
     * @param errorCode Error code for categorization
     */
    public AIException(String message, String errorCode) {
        this(message, errorCode, null);
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Constructor with message, error code, and details
     * @param message Error message
     * @param errorCode Error code for categorization
     * @param details Additional error details
     */
    public AIException(String message, String errorCode, Map<String, Object> details) {
        this.setMessage(message);
        this.errorCode = errorCode;
        this.details = details;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Get error code
     * @return Error code
     */
    public String getErrorCode() {
        return this.errorCode;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Get error details
     * @return Error details map
     */
    public Map<String, Object> getDetails() {
        return this.details;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Get formatted error message
     * @return Formatted error message
     */
    public String getFormattedMessage() {
        String formattedMessage = this.getMessage();
        
        if (String.isNotBlank(this.errorCode)) {
            formattedMessage = '[' + this.errorCode + '] ' + formattedMessage;
        }
        
        if (this.details != null && !this.details.isEmpty()) {
            formattedMessage += ' | Details: ' + JSON.serialize(this.details);
        }
        
        return formattedMessage;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Common error codes
     */
    public static final String RATE_LIMIT_ERROR = 'AI_RATE_LIMIT';
    public static final String AUTHENTICATION_ERROR = 'AI_AUTH_ERROR';
    public static final String VALIDATION_ERROR = 'AI_VALIDATION_ERROR';
    public static final String PROVIDER_ERROR = 'AI_PROVIDER_ERROR';
    public static final String CONFIGURATION_ERROR = 'AI_CONFIG_ERROR';
    public static final String SECURITY_ERROR = 'AI_SECURITY_ERROR';
    public static final String PROCESSING_ERROR = 'AI_PROCESSING_ERROR';
    public static final String TIMEOUT_ERROR = 'AI_TIMEOUT_ERROR';
}
```

## 📄 FILE: force-app/main/default/classes/AIHandledException.cls

```apex
/**
 * @description Custom exception class for AI processing that prevents stack trace exposure
 * @author RouteLogic Team
 * @date 2025-01-19
 */
@namespaceAccessible
public with sharing class AIHandledException extends AuraHandledException {
    
    /**
     * @description Constructor that wraps error message without exposing stack trace
     * @param message User-friendly error message
     */
    public AIHandledException(String message) {
        super(message);
        this.setMessage(message);
    }
}
```
