## 📄 FILE: force-app/main/default/classes/AIHealthCheckScheduler.cls

```apex
/**
 * @description Schedulable class to perform regular health checks on AI providers
 * @author RouteLogic Enhanced
 * @version 3.1.2
 */
public with sharing class AIHealthCheckScheduler implements Schedulable {
    
    /**
     * @description Execute method called by the scheduler
     * @param context The schedulable context
     */
    public void execute(SchedulableContext context) {
        try {
            // Check if we should run based on configuration
            if (!shouldRunHealthCheck()) {
                System.debug('Health check skipped based on configuration');
                return;
            }
            
            // Execute health check in future method to allow callouts
            performHealthCheckAsync();
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.debug(LoggingLevel.ERROR, 'Error in health check scheduler: ' + e.getMessage());
            
            // Log the error for monitoring
            logSchedulerError(e);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Check if health check should run based on configuration
     * @return Boolean indicating if health check should proceed
     */
    private Boolean shouldRunHealthCheck() {
        try {
            // Check custom metadata for health check configuration
            List<AI_Processing_Config__mdt> configs = [
                SELECT Enable_Health_Checks__c, Health_Check_Business_Hours__c
                FROM AI_Processing_Config__mdt
                WHERE DeveloperName = 'Default'
                LIMIT 1
            ];
            
            if (configs.isEmpty() || !configs[0].Enable_Health_Checks__c) {
                return false;
            }
            
            // Check if we're within business hours if configured
            if (String.isNotBlank(configs[0].Health_Check_Business_Hours__c)) {
                BusinessHours bh = [
                    SELECT Id 
                    FROM BusinessHours 
                    WHERE Name = :configs[0].Health_Check_Business_Hours__c
                    LIMIT 1
                ];
                
                if (bh != null && !BusinessHours.isWithin(bh.Id, DateTime.now())) {
                    return false;
                }
            }
            
            return true;
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.debug(LoggingLevel.ERROR, 'Error checking configuration: ' + e.getMessage());
            return true; // Default to running if config check fails
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Perform health check asynchronously to allow callouts
     */
    @future(callout=true)
    private static void performHealthCheckAsync() {
        try {
            // Perform health checks on all providers
            Map<String, AIProviderHealthCheckService.HealthCheckResult> results = 
                AIProviderHealthCheckService.checkAllProviders();
            
            // Store results for tracking and history
            AIProviderHealthCheckService.storeHealthCheckResults(results);
            
            // Check for issues and create alerts if needed
            checkForHealthIssues(results);
            
            // Update metrics
            updateHealthMetrics(results);
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.debug(LoggingLevel.ERROR, 'Error performing health check: ' + e.getMessage());
            
            // Create alert for health check failure
            createHealthCheckFailureAlert(e);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Check health results for issues and create alerts
     * @param results Map of provider health check results
     */
    private static void checkForHealthIssues(Map<String, AIProviderHealthCheckService.HealthCheckResult> results) {
        List<AI_System_Alert__c> alerts = new List<AI_System_Alert__c>();
        
        for (String providerName : results.keySet()) {
            AIProviderHealthCheckService.HealthCheckResult result = results.get(providerName);
            
            // Create alert for unhealthy providers
            if (result.status == AIProviderHealthCheckService.STATUS_UNHEALTHY) {
                AI_System_Alert__c alert = new AI_System_Alert__c(
                    Alert_Type__c = 'Provider Health',
                    Severity__c = 'Critical',
                    Provider_Name__c = providerName,
                    Message__c = 'Provider ' + providerName + ' is unhealthy: ' + result.message,
                    Status__c = 'New',
                    Alert_Time__c = DateTime.now()
                );
                alerts.add(alert);
            }
            // Create warning for degraded providers
            else if (result.status == AIProviderHealthCheckService.STATUS_DEGRADED) {
                AI_System_Alert__c alert = new AI_System_Alert__c(
                    Alert_Type__c = 'Provider Health',
                    Severity__c = 'Warning',
                    Provider_Name__c = providerName,
                    Message__c = 'Provider ' + providerName + ' is degraded: ' + result.message,
                    Status__c = 'New',
                    Alert_Time__c = DateTime.now()
                );
                alerts.add(alert);
            }
            
            // Check for slow response times
            if (result.responseTimeMs > 5000 && result.status == AIProviderHealthCheckService.STATUS_HEALTHY) {
                AI_System_Alert__c alert = new AI_System_Alert__c(
                    Alert_Type__c = 'Performance',
                    Severity__c = 'Warning',
                    Provider_Name__c = providerName,
                    Message__c = 'Provider ' + providerName + ' is responding slowly: ' + result.responseTimeMs + 'ms',
                    Status__c = 'New',
                    Alert_Time__c = DateTime.now()
                );
                alerts.add(alert);
            }
        }
        
        // Insert alerts
        if (!alerts.isEmpty()) {
            try {
                insert SecurityUtils.stripInaccessibleRecords(
                    alerts, 
                    SecurityUtils.OperationType.CREATE_RECORD
                );
                
                // Send notifications for critical alerts
                notifyCriticalAlerts(alerts);
                
            } catch (Exception e) {
                System.debug(LoggingLevel.ERROR, 'Failed to create alerts: ' + e.getMessage());
            }
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Update health metrics based on check results
     * @param results Map of provider health check results
     */
    private static void updateHealthMetrics(Map<String, AIProviderHealthCheckService.HealthCheckResult> results) {
        try {
            // Calculate overall health metrics
            Integer totalProviders = results.size();
            Integer healthyProviders = 0;
            Decimal totalResponseTime = 0;
            
            for (AIProviderHealthCheckService.HealthCheckResult result : results.values()) {
                if (result.status == AIProviderHealthCheckService.STATUS_HEALTHY) {
                    healthyProviders++;
                }
                totalResponseTime += result.responseTimeMs;
            }
            
            // Create system health metric record
            AI_System_Metric__c metric = new AI_System_Metric__c(
                Metric_Type__c = 'System Health',
                Metric_Name__c = 'Overall Health Check',
                Metric_Value__c = (totalProviders > 0) ? 
                    (Decimal.valueOf(healthyProviders) / Decimal.valueOf(totalProviders)) * 100 : 0,
                Additional_Data__c = JSON.serialize(new Map<String, Object>{
                    'totalProviders' => totalProviders,
                    'healthyProviders' => healthyProviders,
                    'averageResponseTime' => (totalProviders > 0) ? 
                        totalResponseTime / totalProviders : 0
                }),
                Recorded_At__c = DateTime.now()
            );
            
            insert SecurityUtils.stripInaccessibleRecords(
                new List<AI_System_Metric__c>{ metric }, 
                SecurityUtils.OperationType.CREATE_RECORD
            );
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.debug(LoggingLevel.ERROR, 'Failed to update metrics: ' + e.getMessage());
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Send notifications for critical alerts
     * @param alerts List of alerts to notify about
     */
    private static void notifyCriticalAlerts(List<AI_System_Alert__c> alerts) {
        // Get users to notify
        Set<Id> userIds = new Set<Id>();
        
        try {
            // Find users with AI Configuration Manager permission
            List<PermissionSetAssignment> assignments = [
                SELECT AssigneeId
                FROM PermissionSetAssignment
                WHERE PermissionSet.Name = 'AI_Configuration_Manager'
                AND Assignee.IsActive = true
            ];
            
            for (PermissionSetAssignment psa : assignments) {
                userIds.add(psa.AssigneeId);
            }
            
            // Create custom notifications for critical alerts
            List<Messaging.CustomNotification> notifications = new List<Messaging.CustomNotification>();
            
            for (AI_System_Alert__c alert : alerts) {
                if (alert.Severity__c == 'Critical' && !userIds.isEmpty()) {
                    Messaging.CustomNotification notification = new Messaging.CustomNotification();
                    notification.setTitle('Critical AI System Alert');
                    notification.setBody(alert.Message__c);
                    notification.setTargetId(alert.Id);
                    
                    // Get custom notification type
                    CustomNotificationType notificationType = [
                        SELECT Id 
                        FROM CustomNotificationType 
                        WHERE DeveloperName = 'AI_System_Alert'
                        LIMIT 1
                    ];
                    
                    notification.setNotificationTypeId(notificationType.Id);
                    notification.setSenderId(UserInfo.getUserId());
                    
                    notifications.add(notification);
                }
            }
            
            // Send notifications
            if (!notifications.isEmpty() && !userIds.isEmpty()) {
                for (Messaging.CustomNotification notification : notifications) {
                    notification.send(userIds);
                }
            }
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.debug(LoggingLevel.ERROR, 'Failed to send notifications: ' + e.getMessage());
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Create alert for health check failure
     * @param e The exception that caused the failure
     */
    private static void createHealthCheckFailureAlert(Exception e) {
        try {
            AI_System_Alert__c alert = new AI_System_Alert__c(
                Alert_Type__c = 'System Error',
                Severity__c = 'Critical',
                Message__c = 'Health check process failed: ' + e.getMessage(),
                Status__c = 'New',
                Alert_Time__c = DateTime.now(),
                Stack_Trace__c = e.getStackTraceString()
            );
            
            insert SecurityUtils.stripInaccessibleRecords(
                new List<AI_System_Alert__c>{ alert }, 
                SecurityUtils.OperationType.CREATE_RECORD
            );
            
        } catch (Exception ex) {
            System.debug(LoggingLevel.ERROR, 'Failed to create failure alert: ' + ex.getMessage());
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Log scheduler errors
     * @param e The exception to log
     */
    private void logSchedulerError(Exception e) {
        try {
            AI_System_Alert__c alert = new AI_System_Alert__c(
                Alert_Type__c = 'Scheduler Error',
                Severity__c = 'Error',
                Message__c = 'Health check scheduler error: ' + e.getMessage(),
                Status__c = 'New',
                Alert_Time__c = DateTime.now(),
                Stack_Trace__c = e.getStackTraceString()
            );
            
            insert SecurityUtils.stripInaccessibleRecords(
                new List<AI_System_Alert__c>{ alert }, 
                SecurityUtils.OperationType.CREATE_RECORD
            );
            
        } catch (Exception ex) {
            System.debug(LoggingLevel.ERROR, 'Failed to log scheduler error: ' + ex.getMessage());
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Schedule the health check job
     * @param cronExpression CRON expression for scheduling
     * @return The scheduled job ID
     */
    public static String scheduleHealthCheck(String cronExpression) {
        AIHealthCheckScheduler scheduler = new AIHealthCheckScheduler();
        return System.schedule('AI Provider Health Check', cronExpression, scheduler);
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Get default CRON expression for health checks (every 15 minutes)
     * @return CRON expression string
     */
    public static String getDefaultCronExpression() {
        return '0 0,15,30,45 * * * ?'; // Every 15 minutes
    }
}
```

```apex
/**
 * @description Test class for AIHealthCheckScheduler
 * @author RouteLogic Enhanced
 * @version 3.1.2
 */
@isTest
private class AIHealthCheckSchedulerTest {
    
    @testSetup
    static void setup() {
        // Create test configuration
        // Note: In production, this would be custom metadata which can't be created in tests
        // So we'll test with default behavior
        
        // Create test permission set
        PermissionSet ps;
        List<PermissionSet> existingPS = [
            SELECT Id FROM PermissionSet 
            WHERE Name = 'AI_Configuration_Manager' 
            LIMIT 1
        ];
        
        if (existingPS.isEmpty()) {
            ps = new PermissionSet(
                Name = 'AI_Configuration_Manager',
                Label = 'AI Configuration Manager'
            );
            insert ps;
        } else {
            ps = existingPS[0];
        }
        
        // Create and assign to current user
        try {
            insert new PermissionSetAssignment(
                AssigneeId = UserInfo.getUserId(),
                PermissionSetId = ps.Id
            );
        } catch (DmlException e) {
            // Assignment might already exist
        }
        
        // Create custom notification type
        // Note: This can't be created in test, will be mocked
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testSchedulerExecution() {
        // Mock HTTP callouts
        Test.setMock(HttpCalloutMock.class, new MultiProviderHealthCheckMock());
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Create and execute scheduler
        AIHealthCheckScheduler scheduler = new AIHealthCheckScheduler();
        scheduler.execute(null);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify health checks were created
        List<AI_Provider_Health_Check__c> healthChecks = [
            SELECT Provider_Name__c, Status__c, Response_Time_Ms__c
            FROM AI_Provider_Health_Check__c
            WHERE CreatedDate = TODAY
        ];
        
        System.assert(!healthChecks.isEmpty(), 'Health checks should be created');
        
        // Verify metrics were created
        List<AI_System_Metric__c> metrics = [
            SELECT Metric_Type__c, Metric_Name__c, Metric_Value__c
            FROM AI_System_Metric__c
            WHERE Metric_Type__c = 'System Health'
            AND CreatedDate = TODAY
        ];
        
        System.assert(!metrics.isEmpty(), 'System health metrics should be created');
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testSchedulerWithUnhealthyProviders() {
        // Mock unhealthy providers
        Test.setMock(HttpCalloutMock.class, new UnhealthyProviderMock());
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        AIHealthCheckScheduler scheduler = new AIHealthCheckScheduler();
        scheduler.execute(null);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify alerts were created
        List<AI_System_Alert__c> alerts = [
            SELECT Alert_Type__c, Severity__c, Provider_Name__c, Message__c
            FROM AI_System_Alert__c
            WHERE Alert_Type__c = 'Provider Health'
            AND CreatedDate = TODAY
        ];
        
        System.assert(!alerts.isEmpty(), 'Alerts should be created for unhealthy providers');
        
        Boolean hasCriticalAlert = false;
        for (AI_System_Alert__c alert : alerts) {
            if (alert.Severity__c == 'Critical') {
                hasCriticalAlert = true;
                break;
            }
        }
        
        System.assert(hasCriticalAlert, 'Should have at least one critical alert');
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testSchedulerWithSlowProviders() {
        // Mock slow provider responses
        Test.setMock(HttpCalloutMock.class, new SlowProviderMock());
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        AIHealthCheckScheduler scheduler = new AIHealthCheckScheduler();
        scheduler.execute(null);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify performance alerts
        List<AI_System_Alert__c> alerts = [
            SELECT Alert_Type__c, Severity__c, Message__c
            FROM AI_System_Alert__c
            WHERE Alert_Type__c = 'Performance'
            AND CreatedDate = TODAY
        ];
        
        System.assert(!alerts.isEmpty(), 'Performance alerts should be created for slow providers');
        
        for (AI_System_Alert__c alert : alerts) {
            System.assert(alert.Message__c.contains('slowly'), 'Alert should mention slow response');
        }
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testSchedulerError() {
        // Mock callout failure
        Test.setMock(HttpCalloutMock.class, new FailedCalloutMock());
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        AIHealthCheckScheduler scheduler = new AIHealthCheckScheduler();
        scheduler.execute(null);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify error alert was created
        List<AI_System_Alert__c> alerts = [
            SELECT Alert_Type__c, Severity__c, Message__c
            FROM AI_System_Alert__c
            WHERE Alert_Type__c = 'System Error'
            AND CreatedDate = TODAY
        ];
        
        System.assert(!alerts.isEmpty(), 'System error alert should be created');
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testScheduleHealthCheck() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        String jobId = AIHealthCheckScheduler.scheduleHealthCheck('0 0 * * * ?');
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify job was scheduled
        CronTrigger ct = [
            SELECT Id, CronExpression, State
            FROM CronTrigger
            WHERE Id = :jobId
        ];
        
        System.assertEquals('0 0 * * * ?', ct.CronExpression, 'Cron expression should match');
        System.assertNotEquals('DELETED', ct.State, 'Job should not be deleted');
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testGetDefaultCronExpression() {
        String cron = AIHealthCheckScheduler.getDefaultCronExpression();
        
        System.assertEquals('0 0,15,30,45 * * * ?', cron, 'Should return every 15 minutes cron');
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testConfigurationCheck() {
        // Test with no configuration (should default to running)
        Test.startTest();
        
        AIHealthCheckScheduler scheduler = new AIHealthCheckScheduler();
        scheduler.execute(null);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Should still execute with default behavior
        System.assert(true, 'Scheduler should execute without error');
    }
    
    /**
     * Mock for multiple healthy providers
     */
    public class MultiProviderHealthCheckMock implements HttpCalloutMock {
        public HTTPResponse respond(HTTPRequest req) {
            HTTPResponse res = new HTTPResponse();
            res.setStatusCode(200);
            res.setBody('{"status":"healthy","uptime":99.9}');
            res.setStatus('OK');
            return res;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Mock for unhealthy providers
     */
    public class UnhealthyProviderMock implements HttpCalloutMock {
        private Integer callCount = 0;
        
        public HTTPResponse respond(HTTPRequest req) {
            callCount++;
            
            HTTPResponse res = new HTTPResponse();
            
            // Make first provider unhealthy, second degraded
            if (callCount == 1) {
                res.setStatusCode(500);
                res.setBody('Internal Server Error');
                res.setStatus('Internal Server Error');
            } else {
                res.setStatusCode(400);
                res.setBody('Bad Request');
                res.setStatus('Bad Request');
            }
            
            return res;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Mock for slow provider responses
     */
    public class SlowProviderMock implements HttpCalloutMock {
        public HTTPResponse respond(HTTPRequest req) {
            // Note: In real scenario, we'd simulate actual delay
            // For testing, the service will check response time
            HTTPResponse res = new HTTPResponse();
            res.setStatusCode(200);
            res.setBody('{"status":"healthy","responseTime":6000}');
            res.setStatus('OK');
            return res;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Mock for failed callouts
     */
    public class FailedCalloutMock implements HttpCalloutMock {
        public HTTPResponse respond(HTTPRequest req) {
            throw new CalloutException('Connection timeout');
        }
    }
}
```

## 📄 FILE: force-app/main/default/classes/AIMobilePerformanceService.cls

```apex
public with sharing class AIMobilePerformanceService {
    // Mobile optimization settings
    public class MobileConfig {
        public Boolean enableDataCompression { get; set; }
        public Integer maxPayloadSize { get; set; }
        public Boolean enableOfflineMode { get; set; }
        public Integer syncBatchSize { get; set; }
        public Boolean enableLazyLoading { get; set; }
        public Integer imageQuality { get; set; }
        
        public MobileConfig() {
            this.enableDataCompression = true;
            this.maxPayloadSize = 100000; // 100KB
            this.enableOfflineMode = true;
            this.syncBatchSize = 50;
            this.enableLazyLoading = true;
            this.imageQuality = 70; // 70% quality
        }
    }
    
    // Mobile response wrapper
    public class MobileResponse {
        public Boolean success { get; set; }
        public Object data { get; set; }
        public Integer dataSize { get; set; }
        public Boolean isCompressed { get; set; }
        public String nextPageToken { get; set; }
        public Map<String, Object> metadata { get; set; }
        
        public MobileResponse() {
            this.success = true;
            this.metadata = new Map<String, Object>();
        }
    }
    
    // Optimized data fetch for mobile
    public static MobileResponse getMobileData(
        String dataType,
        Map<String, Object> params,
        MobileConfig config
    ) {
        MobileResponse response = new MobileResponse();
        
        try {
            Object data = null;
            
            switch on dataType {
                when 'routes' {
                    data = getMobileRoutes(params, config);
                }
                when 'status' {
                    data = getMobileStatus(params, config);
                }
                when 'analytics' {
                    data = getMobileAnalytics(params, config);
                }
                when 'config' {
                    data = getMobileConfig(params, config);
                }
            }
            
            // Optimize response
            response = optimizeResponse(data, config);
            
            return response;
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            response.success = false;
            response.data = new Map<String, String>{
                'error' => e.getMessage()
            };
            return response;
        }
    }
    
    // Mobile-optimized route data
    private static List<Map<String, Object>> getMobileRoutes(
        Map<String, Object> params,
        MobileConfig config
    ) {
        Integer pageSize = config.enableLazyLoading ? 20 : 50;
        Integer offset = params.containsKey('offset') ? 
            (Integer)params.get('offset') : 0;
        
        // Query only essential fields
        List<Route__c> routes = [
            SELECT Id, Name, Status__c, Priority__c, 
                   Start_Location__c, End_Location__c,
                   Estimated_Duration__c
            FROM Route__c
            WHERE OwnerId = :UserInfo.getUserId()
            ORDER BY Priority__c DESC, CreatedDate DESC
            LIMIT :pageSize
            OFFSET :offset
        ];
        
        // Convert to lightweight format
        List<Map<String, Object>> mobileRoutes = new List<Map<String, Object>>();
        
        for (Route__c route : routes) {
            Map<String, Object> mobileRoute = new Map<String, Object>{
                'id' => route.Id,
                'name' => route.Name,
                'status' => route.Status__c,
                'priority' => route.Priority__c,
                'duration' => route.Estimated_Duration__c
            };
            
            // Include location only if needed
            if (params.containsKey('includeLocation')) {
                mobileRoute.put('start', route.Start_Location__c);
                mobileRoute.put('end', route.End_Location__c);
            }
            
            mobileRoutes.add(mobileRoute);
        }
        
        return mobileRoutes;
    }
    
    // Mobile-optimized status data
    private static List<Map<String, Object>> getMobileStatus(
        Map<String, Object> params,
        MobileConfig config
    ) {
        DateTime sinceDate = params.containsKey('since') ?
            (DateTime)params.get('since') : DateTime.now().addDays(-1);
        
        // Aggregate status data
        List<AggregateResult> statusCounts = [
            SELECT Status__c status, COUNT(Id) cnt
            FROM AI_Processing_Status__c
            WHERE CreatedDate >= :sinceDate
            GROUP BY Status__c
        ];
        
        List<Map<String, Object>> statusData = new List<Map<String, Object>>();
        
        for (AggregateResult ar : statusCounts) {
            statusData.add(new Map<String, Object>{
                'status' => ar.get('status'),
                'count' => ar.get('cnt')
            });
        }
        
        return statusData;
    }
    
    // Mobile-optimized analytics
    private static Map<String, Object> getMobileAnalytics(
        Map<String, Object> params,
        MobileConfig config
    ) {
        DateTime startDate = params.containsKey('startDate') ?
            (DateTime)params.get('startDate') : DateTime.now().addDays(-7);
        
        // Get key metrics only
        AggregateResult[] metrics = [
            SELECT Provider_Type__c provider,
                   COUNT(Id) total,
                   AVG(Processing_Time__c) avgTime
            FROM AI_Processing_Status__c
            WHERE CreatedDate >= :startDate
            AND Status__c = 'Completed'
            GROUP BY Provider_Type__c
            LIMIT 5
        ];
        
        Map<String, Object> analytics = new Map<String, Object>{
            'period' => startDate.format('MMM d') + ' - Today',
            'providers' => new List<Map<String, Object>>()
        };
        
        for (AggregateResult ar : metrics) {
            ((List<Map<String, Object>>)analytics.get('providers')).add(
                new Map<String, Object>{
                    'name' => ar.get('provider'),
                    'count' => ar.get('total'),
                    'avgTime' => Math.round((Decimal)ar.get('avgTime'))
                }
            );
        }
        
        return analytics;
    }
    
    // Mobile configuration data
    private static Map<String, Object> getMobileConfig(
        Map<String, Object> params,
        MobileConfig config
    ) {
        // Return minimal configuration
        return new Map<String, Object>{
            'syncInterval' => 300, // 5 minutes
            'offlineEnabled' => config.enableOfflineMode,
            'compressionEnabled' => config.enableDataCompression,
            'maxCacheSize' => 50000000, // 50MB
            'apiVersion' => '1.0'
        };
    }
    
    // Response optimization
    private static MobileResponse optimizeResponse(
        Object data,
        MobileConfig config
    ) {
        MobileResponse response = new MobileResponse();
        response.data = data;
        
        // Calculate data size
        String jsonData = JSON.serialize(data);
        response.dataSize = jsonData.length();
        
        // Compress if needed
        if (config.enableDataCompression && 
            response.dataSize > config.maxPayloadSize) {
            response.data = compressData(jsonData);
            response.isCompressed = true;
            response.dataSize = ((String)response.data).length();
        }
        
        // Add metadata
        response.metadata.put('timestamp', DateTime.now().getTime());
        response.metadata.put('compressed', response.isCompressed);
        response.metadata.put('originalSize', jsonData.length());
        
        return response;
    }
    
    // Offline sync support
    public static List<Map<String, Object>> getSyncData(
        DateTime lastSyncTime,
        MobileConfig config
    ) {
        List<Map<String, Object>> syncData = new List<Map<String, Object>>();
        
        // Get modified records since last sync
        List<SObject> modifiedRecords = new List<SObject>();
        
        // Routes
        modifiedRecords.addAll([
            SELECT Id, Name, Status__c, LastModifiedDate
            FROM Route__c
            WHERE LastModifiedDate > :lastSyncTime
            AND OwnerId = :UserInfo.getUserId()
            LIMIT :config.syncBatchSize
        ]);
        
        // Processing status
        modifiedRecords.addAll([
            SELECT Id, Status__c, LastModifiedDate
            FROM AI_Processing_Status__c
            WHERE LastModifiedDate > :lastSyncTime
            AND CreatedById = :UserInfo.getUserId()
            LIMIT :config.syncBatchSize
        ]);
        
        // Convert to sync format
        for (SObject record : modifiedRecords) {
            syncData.add(new Map<String, Object>{
                'id' => record.Id,
                'type' => record.getSObjectType().getDescribe().getName(),
                'modified' => record.get('LastModifiedDate'),
                'data' => getMinimalRecordData(record)
            });
        }
        
        return syncData;
    }
    
    // Conflict resolution for offline changes
    public static Map<String, Object> resolveConflicts(
        List<Map<String, Object>> clientChanges,
        String strategy
    ) {
        Map<String, Object> result = new Map<String, Object>{
            'resolved' => new List<Map<String, Object>>(),
            'conflicts' => new List<Map<String, Object>>()
        };
        
        for (Map<String, Object> change : clientChanges) {
            String recordId = (String)change.get('id');
            DateTime clientModified = (DateTime)change.get('modified');
            
            // Get server version
            SObject serverRecord = getRecord(recordId);
            DateTime serverModified = (DateTime)serverRecord.get('LastModifiedDate');
            
            if (serverModified > clientModified) {
                // Conflict detected
                Map<String, Object> conflict = new Map<String, Object>{
                    'id' => recordId,
                    'clientVersion' => change,
                    'serverVersion' => serverRecord
                };
                
                switch on strategy {
                    when 'SERVER_WINS' {
                        ((List<Map<String, Object>>)result.get('resolved')).add(
                            new Map<String, Object>{
                                'id' => recordId,
                                'resolution' => 'server',
                                'data' => serverRecord
                            }
                        );
                    }
                    when 'CLIENT_WINS' {
                        applyClientChange(change);
                        ((List<Map<String, Object>>)result.get('resolved')).add(
                            new Map<String, Object>{
                                'id' => recordId,
                                'resolution' => 'client',
                                'data' => change
                            }
                        );
                    }
                    when else {
                        ((List<Map<String, Object>>)result.get('conflicts')).add(conflict);
                    }
                }
            } else {
                // No conflict
                applyClientChange(change);
                ((List<Map<String, Object>>)result.get('resolved')).add(
                    new Map<String, Object>{
                        'id' => recordId,
                        'resolution' => 'none',
                        'data' => change
                    }
                );
            }
        }
        
        return result;
    }
    
    // Image optimization
    public static String optimizeImageForMobile(
        String base64Image,
        MobileConfig config
    ) {
        // In a real implementation, this would:
        // 1. Decode the base64 image
        // 2. Resize to appropriate dimensions
        // 3. Compress with specified quality
        // 4. Return optimized base64
        
        // For now, return a placeholder
        return 'OPTIMIZED_' + base64Image.substring(0, 20) + '...';
    }
    
    // Network status aware fetching
    public static MobileResponse getDataForNetworkType(
        String networkType,
        String dataType,
        Map<String, Object> params
    ) {
        MobileConfig config = new MobileConfig();
        
        switch on networkType {
            when '2G', 'SLOW' {
                // Ultra-light mode
                config.enableDataCompression = true;
                config.maxPayloadSize = 10000; // 10KB
                config.enableLazyLoading = true;
                config.syncBatchSize = 10;
                config.imageQuality = 30;
            }
            when '3G', 'MODERATE' {
                // Light mode
                config.enableDataCompression = true;
                config.maxPayloadSize = 50000; // 50KB
                config.enableLazyLoading = true;
                config.syncBatchSize = 25;
                config.imageQuality = 50;
            }
            when '4G', 'WIFI', 'FAST' {
                // Normal mode
                config.enableDataCompression = false;
                config.maxPayloadSize = 500000; // 500KB
                config.enableLazyLoading = false;
                config.syncBatchSize = 100;
                config.imageQuality = 80;
            }
        }
        
        return getMobileData(dataType, params, config);
    }
    
    // Helper methods
    private static String compressData(String data) {
        // Simple compression using base64 encoding
        // In production, use proper compression algorithm
        Blob dataBlob = Blob.valueOf(data);
        return EncodingUtil.base64Encode(dataBlob);
    }
    
    private static Map<String, Object> getMinimalRecordData(SObject record) {
        Map<String, Object> minimalData = new Map<String, Object>();
        
        // Include only essential fields
        Set<String> essentialFields = new Set<String>{
            'Id', 'Name', 'Status__c', 'LastModifiedDate'
        };
        
        for (String field : essentialFields) {
            try {
                minimalData.put(field, record.get(field));
            } catch (Exception e) {
                // Field doesn't exist on this object
            }
        }
        
        return minimalData;
    }
    
    private static SObject getRecord(String recordId) {
        // Generic record retrieval
        Id recId = Id.valueOf(recordId);
        String objectType = recId.getSObjectType().getDescribe().getName();
        
        String query = 'SELECT Id, LastModifiedDate FROM ' + 
                      String.escapeSingleQuotes(objectType) + 
                      ' WHERE Id = :recId';
        
        return Database.query(query);
    }
    
    private static void applyClientChange(Map<String, Object> change) {
        // Apply client changes to server
        // Implementation depends on specific requirements
        System.debug('Applying client change: ' + change);
    }
}
```

```apex
@isTest
private class AIMobilePerformanceServiceTest {
    
    @testSetup
    static void setupTestData() {
        // Create test routes
        List<Route__c> routes = new List<Route__c>();
        for (Integer i = 0; i < 30; i++) {
            routes.add(new Route__c(
                Name = 'Mobile Route ' + i,
                Status__c = Math.mod(i, 3) == 0 ? 'Active' : 'Pending',
                Priority__c = Math.mod(i, 5) + 1,
                Start_Location__c = 'Start ' + i,
                End_Location__c = 'End ' + i,
                Estimated_Duration__c = Math.random() * 100
            ));
        }
        insert routes;
        
        // Create test processing status
        List<AI_Processing_Status__c> statuses = new List<AI_Processing_Status__c>();
        DateTime baseTime = DateTime.now().addDays(-7);
        for (Integer i = 0; i < 50; i++) {
            statuses.add(new AI_Processing_Status__c(
                Status__c = Math.mod(i, 3) == 0 ? 'Completed' : 'Processing',
                Provider_Type__c = Math.mod(i, 2) == 0 ? 'OpenAI' : 'Claude',
                Processing_Time__c = Math.random() * 500,
                CreatedDate = baseTime.addHours(i)
            ));
        }
        insert statuses;
        
        // Create user preferences
        AI_User_Preference__c pref = new AI_User_Preference__c(
            User__c = UserInfo.getUserId(),
            Preference_Key__c = 'theme',
            Preference_Value__c = 'light'
        );
        insert pref;
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testGetMobileRoutes() {
        AIMobilePerformanceService.MobileConfig config = 
            new AIMobilePerformanceService.MobileConfig();
        
        Map<String, Object> params = new Map<String, Object>{
            'offset' => 0,
            'includeLocation' => true
        };
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        AIMobilePerformanceService.MobileResponse response = 
            AIMobilePerformanceService.getMobileData('routes', params, config);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify
        System.assertEquals(true, response.success, 'Response should be successful');
        System.assertNotEquals(null, response.data, 'Should return data');
        
        List<Map<String, Object>> routes = (List<Map<String, Object>>) response.data;
        System.assert(routes.size() > 0, 'Should return routes');
        System.assert(routes.size() <= 20, 'Should respect lazy loading limit');
        
        // Verify route structure
        Map<String, Object> firstRoute = routes[0];
        System.assert(firstRoute.containsKey('id'), 'Should have id');
        System.assert(firstRoute.containsKey('name'), 'Should have name');
        System.assert(firstRoute.containsKey('start'), 'Should include location when requested');
    }
    
    @isTest

        };

        Test.stopTest();

    @isTest

        // Create large data set

        // Verify compression

        System.assertEquals(true, response.isCompressed, 'Data should be compressed');
        System.assert(response.dataSize < response.metadata.get('originalSize'), 
            'Compressed size should be smaller');

    @isTest
    static void testOfflineSync() {
        AIMobilePerformanceService.MobileConfig config = 
            new AIMobilePerformanceService.MobileConfig();
        config.syncBatchSize = 10;
        
        DateTime lastSync = DateTime.now().addHours(-1);
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        List<Map<String, Object>> syncData = 
            AIMobilePerformanceService.getSyncData(lastSync, config);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify
        System.assertNotEquals(null, syncData, 'Should return sync data');
        System.assert(syncData.size() <= config.syncBatchSize * 2, 
            'Should respect batch size limit');
        
        // Verify sync data structure
        if (!syncData.isEmpty()) {
            Map<String, Object> firstItem = syncData[0];
            System.assert(firstItem.containsKey('id'), 'Should have id');
            System.assert(firstItem.containsKey('type'), 'Should have type');
            System.assert(firstItem.containsKey('modified'), 'Should have modified date');
            System.assert(firstItem.containsKey('data'), 'Should have data');
        }
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testConflictResolution() {
        // Create test conflict data
        Route__c testRoute = [SELECT Id, LastModifiedDate FROM Route__c LIMIT 1];
        
        List<Map<String, Object>> clientChanges = new List<Map<String, Object>>{
            new Map<String, Object>{
                'id' => testRoute.Id,
                'modified' => testRoute.LastModifiedDate.addHours(-1),
                'data' => new Map<String, Object>{'Status__c' => 'ClientUpdate'}
            }
        };
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Test SERVER_WINS strategy
        Map<String, Object> result1 = 
            AIMobilePerformanceService.resolveConflicts(clientChanges, 'SERVER_WINS');
        
        // Test CLIENT_WINS strategy
        Map<String, Object> result2 = 
            AIMobilePerformanceService.resolveConflicts(clientChanges, 'CLIENT_WINS');
        
        // Test MANUAL strategy
        Map<String, Object> result3 = 
            AIMobilePerformanceService.resolveConflicts(clientChanges, 'MANUAL');
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify
        List<Map<String, Object>> resolved1 = 
            (List<Map<String, Object>>) result1.get('resolved');
        System.assertEquals(1, resolved1.size(), 'Should resolve with server wins');
        
        List<Map<String, Object>> resolved2 = 
            (List<Map<String, Object>>) result2.get('resolved');
        System.assertEquals(1, resolved2.size(), 'Should resolve with client wins');
        
        List<Map<String, Object>> conflicts3 = 
            (List<Map<String, Object>>) result3.get('conflicts');
        System.assertEquals(1, conflicts3.size(), 'Should have conflict for manual resolution');
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testNetworkAwareFetching() {
        Map<String, Object> params = new Map<String, Object>();
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Test 2G/Slow network
        AIMobilePerformanceService.MobileResponse response2G = 
            AIMobilePerformanceService.getDataForNetworkType('2G', 'routes', params);
        
        // Test 4G/Fast network
        AIMobilePerformanceService.MobileResponse response4G = 
            AIMobilePerformanceService.getDataForNetworkType('4G', 'routes', params);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify
        System.assertEquals(true, response2G.success, '2G response should succeed');
        System.assertEquals(true, response2G.isCompressed, '2G should use compression');
        
        System.assertEquals(true, response4G.success, '4G response should succeed');
        System.assertEquals(false, response4G.isCompressed, '4G should not compress');
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testImageOptimization() {
        AIMobilePerformanceService.MobileConfig config = 
            new AIMobilePerformanceService.MobileConfig();
        config.imageQuality = 50;
        
        String testImage = 'base64encodedimagedata1234567890';
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        String optimized = 
            AIMobilePerformanceService.optimizeImageForMobile(testImage, config);
        
        Test.stopTest();

        System.assert(optimized.startsWith('OPTIMIZED_'), 'Should be marked as optimized');
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testErrorHandling() {
        AIMobilePerformanceService.MobileConfig config = 
            new AIMobilePerformanceService.MobileConfig();
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Test with invalid data type
        AIMobilePerformanceService.MobileResponse response = 
            AIMobilePerformanceService.getMobileData(

        Test.stopTest();

        Map<String, String> errorData = (Map<String, String>) response.data;
        System.assert(errorData.containsKey('error'), 'Should contain error message');
    }
```

## 📄 FILE: force-app/main/default/classes/AIProviderAdapterFactory.cls

```apex
/**
 * @description Factory class for creating AI provider adapters
 * @author RouteLogic Team
 * @date 2025-01-21
 * @version 2.0
 * 
 * This factory implements the adapter pattern to provide clean separation
 * between the core routing engine and provider-specific implementations.
 */
public with sharing class AIProviderAdapterFactory {
    
    private static final Map<String, Type> ADAPTER_REGISTRY = new Map<String, Type>{
        'Ada' => AdaAdapter.class,
        'Intercom' => IntercomAdapter.class
    };
    
    /**
     * @description Get adapter instance for specified provider
     * @param providerName The AI provider name
     * @return IAIProviderAdapter implementation
     */
    public static IAIProviderAdapter getAdapter(String providerName) {
        if (String.isBlank(providerName)) {
            throw new IllegalArgumentException('Provider name cannot be null or empty');
        }
        
        Type adapterType = ADAPTER_REGISTRY.get(providerName);
        if (adapterType == null) {
            throw new UnsupportedProviderException('No adapter found for provider: ' + providerName);
        }
        
        try {
            return (IAIProviderAdapter) adapterType.newInstance();
        } catch (Exception e) {
            throw new AdapterInstantiationException('Failed to create adapter for ' + providerName + ': ' + e.getMessage());
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Register a new adapter for a provider
     * @param providerName The provider name
     * @param adapterType The adapter class type
     */
    public static void registerAdapter(String providerName, Type adapterType) {
        if (String.isBlank(providerName)) {
            throw new IllegalArgumentException('Provider name cannot be null or empty');
        }
        
        if (adapterType == null) {
            throw new IllegalArgumentException('Adapter type cannot be null');
        }
        
        ADAPTER_REGISTRY.put(providerName, adapterType);
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Get list of supported providers
     * @return Set of supported provider names
     */
    public static Set<String> getSupportedProviders() {
        return ADAPTER_REGISTRY.keySet();
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Check if provider is supported
     * @param providerName The provider name to check
     * @return True if provider is supported
     */
    public static Boolean isProviderSupported(String providerName) {
        return ADAPTER_REGISTRY.containsKey(providerName);
    }
    
    // Custom exceptions
    
    public class UnsupportedProviderException extends Exception {}
    public class AdapterInstantiationException extends Exception {}
}
```

## 📄 FILE: force-app/main/default/classes/AIProviderHealthCheckService.cls

```apex
/**
 * @description Service class for performing health checks on AI providers
 * @author RouteLogic Enhanced
 * @version 3.1.2
 */
public with sharing class AIProviderHealthCheckService {
    
    public static final String STATUS_HEALTHY = 'Healthy';
    public static final String STATUS_DEGRADED = 'Degraded';
    public static final String STATUS_UNHEALTHY = 'Unhealthy';
    public static final String STATUS_UNKNOWN = 'Unknown';
    
    /**
     * @description Performs health check for all active AI providers
     * @return Map of provider names to their health check results
     */
    public static Map<String, HealthCheckResult> checkAllProviders() {
        Map<String, HealthCheckResult> results = new Map<String, HealthCheckResult>();
        
        try {
            // Get all active AI providers from configuration
            List<AI_Provider_Configuration__mdt> providers = [
                SELECT DeveloperName, Provider_Name__c, Endpoint_URL__c, API_Key__c,
                       Health_Check_Endpoint__c, Timeout_Ms__c, Is_Active__c
                FROM AI_Provider_Configuration__mdt
                WHERE Is_Active__c = true
                WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED
            ];
            
            for (AI_Provider_Configuration__mdt provider : providers) {
                HealthCheckResult result = checkProvider(provider);
                results.put(provider.Provider_Name__c, result);
            }
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.debug(LoggingLevel.ERROR, 'Error checking providers: ' + e.getMessage());
            throw new AIProviderHealthCheckException('Failed to check provider health: ' + e.getMessage());
        }
        
        return results;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Performs health check for a specific provider
     * @param providerName The name of the provider to check
     * @return Health check result for the provider
     */
    public static HealthCheckResult checkProviderByName(String providerName) {
        try {
            AI_Provider_Configuration__mdt provider = [
                SELECT DeveloperName, Provider_Name__c, Endpoint_URL__c, API_Key__c,
                       Health_Check_Endpoint__c, Timeout_Ms__c, Is_Active__c
                FROM AI_Provider_Configuration__mdt
                WHERE Provider_Name__c = :providerName
                AND Is_Active__c = true
                WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED
                LIMIT 1
            ];
            
            return checkProvider(provider);
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.debug(LoggingLevel.ERROR, 'Error checking provider ' + providerName + ': ' + e.getMessage());
            return new HealthCheckResult(providerName, STATUS_UNKNOWN, 'Provider not found or inactive', 0);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Internal method to check a specific provider
     * @param provider The provider configuration metadata
     * @return Health check result
     */
    private static HealthCheckResult checkProvider(AI_Provider_Configuration__mdt provider) {
        HealthCheckResult result = new HealthCheckResult(provider.Provider_Name__c);
        Long startTime = System.currentTimeMillis();
        
        try {
            // Build health check endpoint
            String healthEndpoint = String.isNotBlank(provider.Health_Check_Endpoint__c) 
                ? provider.Health_Check_Endpoint__c 
                : provider.Endpoint_URL__c + '/health';
            
            // Perform HTTP callout
            HttpRequest req = new HttpRequest();
            req.setEndpoint(healthEndpoint);
            req.setMethod('GET');
            req.setTimeout(provider.Timeout_Ms__c != null ? provider.Timeout_Ms__c.intValue() : 30000);
            
            // Add authentication if required
            if (String.isNotBlank(provider.API_Key__c)) {
                req.setHeader('Authorization', 'Bearer ' + provider.API_Key__c);
            }
            req.setHeader('Content-Type', 'application/json');
            
            Http http = new Http();
            HttpResponse res = http.send(req);
            
            Long responseTime = System.currentTimeMillis() - startTime;
            result.responseTimeMs = responseTime;
            
            // Evaluate response
            if (res.getStatusCode() == 200) {
                result.status = STATUS_HEALTHY;
                result.message = 'Provider is responding normally';
                
                // Parse additional health info if available
                if (String.isNotBlank(res.getBody())) {
                    try {
                        Map<String, Object> healthData = (Map<String, Object>) JSON.deserializeUntyped(res.getBody());
                        result.additionalInfo = healthData;
                    } catch (Exception e) {
                        // Not critical if parsing fails
                        System.debug('Could not parse health response: ' + e.getMessage());
                    }
                }
            } else if (res.getStatusCode() >= 500) {
                result.status = STATUS_UNHEALTHY;
                result.message = 'Provider returned error: ' + res.getStatusCode() + ' ' + res.getStatus();
            } else if (res.getStatusCode() >= 400) {
                result.status = STATUS_DEGRADED;
                result.message = 'Provider returned client error: ' + res.getStatusCode() + ' ' + res.getStatus();
            } else {
                result.status = STATUS_DEGRADED;
                result.message = 'Unexpected response code: ' + res.getStatusCode();
            }
            
            // Check response time thresholds
            if (responseTime > 5000 && result.status == STATUS_HEALTHY) {
                result.status = STATUS_DEGRADED;
                result.message = 'Provider is responding slowly (' + responseTime + 'ms)';
            }
            
        } catch (CalloutException e) {
            result.status = STATUS_UNHEALTHY;
            result.message = 'Failed to connect: ' + e.getMessage();
            result.responseTimeMs = System.currentTimeMillis() - startTime;
        } catch (Exception e) {
            result.status = STATUS_UNKNOWN;
            result.message = 'Unexpected error: ' + e.getMessage();
            result.responseTimeMs = System.currentTimeMillis() - startTime;
        }
        
        result.lastChecked = DateTime.now();
        return result;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Stores health check results in custom object for tracking
     * @param results Map of provider health check results
     */
    public static void storeHealthCheckResults(Map<String, HealthCheckResult> results) {
        List<AI_Provider_Health_Check__c> records = new List<AI_Provider_Health_Check__c>();
        
        for (String providerName : results.keySet()) {
            HealthCheckResult result = results.get(providerName);
            
            AI_Provider_Health_Check__c record = new AI_Provider_Health_Check__c(
                Provider_Name__c = providerName,
                Status__c = result.status,
                Message__c = result.message,
                Response_Time_Ms__c = result.responseTimeMs,
                Check_Time__c = result.lastChecked,
                Additional_Info__c = result.additionalInfo != null ? JSON.serialize(result.additionalInfo) : null
            );
            
            records.add(record);
        }
        
        if (!records.isEmpty()) {
            try {
                insert SecurityUtils.stripInaccessibleRecords(
                    records, 
                    SecurityUtils.OperationType.CREATE_RECORD
                );
            } catch (Exception e) {
                System.debug(LoggingLevel.ERROR, 'Failed to store health check results: ' + e.getMessage());
                throw new AIProviderHealthCheckException('Failed to store health check results: ' + e.getMessage());
            }
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Get recent health check history for a provider
     * @param providerName The provider name
     * @param recordLimit Number of records to return
     * @return List of recent health checks
     */
    public static List<AI_Provider_Health_Check__c> getHealthHistory(String providerName, Integer recordLimit) {
        try {
            return [
                SELECT Id, Provider_Name__c, Status__c, Message__c, Response_Time_Ms__c,
                       Check_Time__c, Additional_Info__c, CreatedDate
                FROM AI_Provider_Health_Check__c
                WHERE Provider_Name__c = :providerName
                WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED
                ORDER BY Check_Time__c DESC
                LIMIT :recordLimit
            ];
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.debug(LoggingLevel.ERROR, 'Error retrieving health history: ' + e.getMessage());
            return new List<AI_Provider_Health_Check__c>();
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Calculate provider uptime percentage over a period
     * @param providerName The provider name
     * @param hours Number of hours to calculate over
     * @return Uptime percentage (0-100)
     */
    public static Decimal calculateUptime(String providerName, Integer hours) {
        DateTime startTime = DateTime.now().addHours(-hours);
        
        try {
            List<AI_Provider_Health_Check__c> checks = [
                SELECT Status__c
                FROM AI_Provider_Health_Check__c
                WHERE Provider_Name__c = :providerName
                AND Check_Time__c >= :startTime
                WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED
            ];
            
            if (checks.isEmpty()) {
                return 100.0; // No data, assume healthy
            }
            
            Integer healthyCount = 0;
            for (AI_Provider_Health_Check__c check : checks) {
                if (check.Status__c == STATUS_HEALTHY) {
                    healthyCount++;
                }
            }
            
            return (Decimal.valueOf(healthyCount) / Decimal.valueOf(checks.size())) * 100.0;
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.debug(LoggingLevel.ERROR, 'Error calculating uptime: ' + e.getMessage());
            return 0.0;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Inner class for health check results
     */
    public class HealthCheckResult {
        @AuraEnabled public String providerName { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public String status { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public String message { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Long responseTimeMs { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public DateTime lastChecked { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Map<String, Object> additionalInfo { get; set; }
        
        public HealthCheckResult(String providerName) {
            this.providerName = providerName;
            this.status = STATUS_UNKNOWN;
            this.message = 'Not checked';
            this.responseTimeMs = 0;
            this.lastChecked = DateTime.now();
        }
        
        public HealthCheckResult(String providerName, String status, String message, Long responseTime) {
            this.providerName = providerName;
            this.status = status;
            this.message = message;
            this.responseTimeMs = responseTime;
            this.lastChecked = DateTime.now();
        }
    }
    
    public class AIProviderHealthCheckException extends Exception {}
}
```

```apex
@isTest
private class AIProviderHealthCheckServiceTest {
    
    @testSetup
    static void setup() {
        // Create test health check records
        List<AI_Provider_Health_Check__c> healthChecks = new List<AI_Provider_Health_Check__c>();
        
        DateTime baseTime = DateTime.now();
        
        // Create health history for OpenAI
        for (Integer i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
            healthChecks.add(new AI_Provider_Health_Check__c(
                Provider_Name__c = 'OpenAI',
                Status__c = i < 8 ? 'Healthy' : 'Degraded',
                Message__c = 'Test health check',
                Response_Time_Ms__c = 100 + (i * 10),
                Check_Time__c = baseTime.addHours(-i)
            ));
        }
        
        // Create health history for Anthropic
        for (Integer i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
            healthChecks.add(new AI_Provider_Health_Check__c(

                Status__c = 'Healthy',
                Message__c = 'Test health check',

        List<AI_Provider_Health_Check__c> history = 
            AIProviderHealthCheckService.getHealthHistory('OpenAI', 5);
        Test.stopTest();
        
        System.assertEquals(5, history.size(), 'Should return requested number of records');
        System.assertEquals('OpenAI', history[0].Provider_Name__c, 'Provider name should match');
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testCalculateUptime() {
        Test.startTest();
        Decimal uptime = AIProviderHealthCheckService.calculateUptime('OpenAI', 24);
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Based on test data: 8 healthy out of 10 total = 80%
        System.assertEquals(80.0, uptime, 'Uptime should be 80%');

    @isTest
    static void testCalculateUptime_NoData() {
        Test.startTest();
        Decimal uptime = AIProviderHealthCheckService.calculateUptime('UnknownProvider', 24);
        Test.stopTest();
        
        System.assertEquals(100.0, uptime, 'Uptime should be 100% when no data');
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testHealthCheckWithAdditionalInfo() {
        // Mock response with JSON body
        String jsonBody = '{"status":"ok","version":"1.0","uptime":99.9}';
        Test.setMock(HttpCalloutMock.class, new HealthCheckHttpMock(200, jsonBody));
        
        Test.startTest();
        AIProviderHealthCheckService.HealthCheckResult result = 
            AIProviderHealthCheckService.checkProviderByName('OpenAI');
        Test.stopTest();
        
        System.assertEquals('Healthy', result.status, 'Status should be healthy');
        System.assertNotEquals(null, result.additionalInfo, 'Additional info should be parsed');
        System.assertEquals('ok', result.additionalInfo.get('status'), 'Status in additional info should match');
    }
    
    /**
     * Mock HTTP callout class for health check tests
     */
    public class HealthCheckHttpMock implements HttpCalloutMock {
        private Integer statusCode;
        private String body;
        private Integer responseTime;
        
        public HealthCheckHttpMock(Integer statusCode, String body) {
            this(statusCode, body, 100);
        }
        
        public HealthCheckHttpMock(Integer statusCode, String body, Integer responseTime) {
            this.statusCode = statusCode;
            this.body = body;
            this.responseTime = responseTime;
        }
        
        public HTTPResponse respond(HTTPRequest req) {
            // Simulate connection failure
            if (statusCode == 0) {
                throw new CalloutException('Failed to connect to provider');
            }
            
            // Simulate slow response
            if (responseTime > 5000) {
                // In real scenario, this would be actual delay
                // For testing, we'll handle this in the service
            }
            
            HTTPResponse res = new HTTPResponse();
            res.setStatusCode(statusCode);
            res.setBody(body);
            res.setStatus(getStatusMessage(statusCode));
            
            return res;
        }
        
        private String getStatusMessage(Integer code) {
            Map<Integer, String> statusMessages = new Map<Integer, String>{
                200 => 'OK',
                400 => 'Bad Request',
                401 => 'Unauthorized',
                403 => 'Forbidden',
                404 => 'Not Found',
                500 => 'Internal Server Error',
                503 => 'Service Unavailable'
            };
            
            return statusMessages.containsKey(code) ? statusMessages.get(code) : 'Unknown';
        }
    }
}
```

## 📄 FILE: force-app/main/default/classes/AIQueryOptimizationService.cls

```apex
public with sharing class AIQueryOptimizationService {
    private static final Integer DEFAULT_BATCH_SIZE = 200;
    private static final Integer MAX_QUERY_ROWS = 50000;
    
    // Query performance metrics
    public class QueryMetrics {
        public Long executionTime { get; set; }
        public Integer rowsProcessed { get; set; }
        public Integer queryCount { get; set; }
        public Boolean isOptimized { get; set; }
        public List<String> optimizationSuggestions { get; set; }
        
        public QueryMetrics() {
            this.executionTime = 0;
            this.rowsProcessed = 0;
            this.queryCount = 0;
            this.isOptimized = false;
            this.optimizationSuggestions = new List<String>();
        }
    }
    
    // Query optimizer configuration
    public class OptimizerConfig {
        public Boolean enableIndexHints { get; set; }
        public Boolean useSelectiveFilters { get; set; }
        public Boolean enableQueryBatching { get; set; }
        public Integer batchSize { get; set; }
        public Boolean enableParallelProcessing { get; set; }
        
        public OptimizerConfig() {
            this.enableIndexHints = true;
            this.useSelectiveFilters = true;
            this.enableQueryBatching = true;
            this.batchSize = DEFAULT_BATCH_SIZE;
            this.enableParallelProcessing = false;
        }
    }
    
    // Optimized query methods
    public static List<AI_Processing_Status__c> getProcessingStatusOptimized(
        DateTime startDate, 
        DateTime endDate,
        Set<String> providerTypes,
        OptimizerConfig config
    ) {
        Long startTime = DateTime.now().getTime();
        QueryMetrics metrics = new QueryMetrics();
        
        try {
            // Build optimized query
            String query = buildOptimizedQuery(
                'AI_Processing_Status__c',
                new List<String>{
                    'Id', 'Name', 'Status__c', 'Provider_Type__c',
                    'Processing_Time__c', 'Error_Message__c', 'CreatedDate'
                },
                new List<String>{
                    'CreatedDate >= :startDate',
                    'CreatedDate <= :endDate',
                    'Provider_Type__c IN :providerTypes'
                },
                'CreatedDate DESC',
                config
            );
            
            // Execute with proper limits
            List<AI_Processing_Status__c> results = Database.query(query);
            
            // Update metrics
            metrics.executionTime = DateTime.now().getTime() - startTime;
            metrics.rowsProcessed = results.size();
            metrics.queryCount = 1;
            metrics.isOptimized = true;
            
            // Cache results if appropriate
            if (config.enableQueryBatching && results.size() < 1000) {
                cacheQueryResults('processing_status_' + String.valueOf(startDate), results);
            }
            
            return results;
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.debug('Query optimization error: ' + e.getMessage());
            throw e;
        } finally {
            logQueryMetrics(metrics);
        }
    }
    
    // Bulk query operations
    public static Map<Id, AI_Provider_Configuration__c> getProviderConfigsBulk(
        Set<Id> configIds
    ) {
        if (configIds.isEmpty()) {
            return new Map<Id, AI_Provider_Configuration__c>();
        }
        
        // Check cache first
        Map<Id, AI_Provider_Configuration__c> cachedResults = 
            getCachedProviderConfigs(configIds);
        
        // Find missing IDs
        Set<Id> missingIds = new Set<Id>();
        for (Id configId : configIds) {
            if (!cachedResults.containsKey(configId)) {
                missingIds.add(configId);
            }
        }
        
        // Query only missing records
        if (!missingIds.isEmpty()) {
            List<AI_Provider_Configuration__c> configs = [
                SELECT Id, Name, Provider_Type__c, API_Endpoint__c,
                       API_Key__c, Is_Active__c, Priority_Level__c,
                       Rate_Limit__c, Timeout_Seconds__c
                FROM AI_Provider_Configuration__c
                WHERE Id IN :missingIds
                AND Is_Active__c = true
            ];
            
            // Add to cache and results
            for (AI_Provider_Configuration__c config : configs) {
                cachedResults.put(config.Id, config);
                cacheProviderConfig(config);
            }
        }
        
        return cachedResults;
    }
    
    // Aggregation queries
    public static List<AggregateResult> getOptimizedAnalytics(
        String groupByField,
        DateTime startDate,
        DateTime endDate,
        OptimizerConfig config
    ) {
        // Use indexed fields for filtering
        String query = 'SELECT ' + String.escapeSingleQuotes(groupByField) + ', ' +
                      'COUNT(Id) recordCount, ' +
                      'AVG(Processing_Time__c) avgTime, ' +
                      'MAX(Processing_Time__c) maxTime, ' +
                      'MIN(Processing_Time__c) minTime ' +
                      'FROM AI_Processing_Status__c ' +
                      'WHERE CreatedDate >= :startDate ' +
                      'AND CreatedDate <= :endDate ' +
                      'AND Provider_Type__c != null ';
        
        // Add selective filters
        if (config.useSelectiveFilters) {
            query += 'AND Status__c IN (\'Completed\', \'Failed\') ';
        }
        
        query += 'GROUP BY ' + String.escapeSingleQuotes(groupByField) + ' ' +
                'ORDER BY COUNT(Id) DESC ' +
                'LIMIT 100';
        
        return Database.query(query);
    }
    
    // Lazy loading implementation
    public static List<SObject> lazyLoadRecords(
        String objectName,
        Integer offset,
        Integer limitSize,
        String orderBy
    ) {
        String query = 'SELECT Id, Name FROM ' + 
                      String.escapeSingleQuotes(objectName) + ' ' +
                      'ORDER BY ' + String.escapeSingleQuotes(orderBy) + ' ' +
                      'LIMIT :limitSize OFFSET :offset';
        
        return Database.query(query);
    }
    
    // Query builder with optimization
    private static String buildOptimizedQuery(
        String objectName,
        List<String> fields,
        List<String> whereConditions,
        String orderBy,
        OptimizerConfig config
    ) {
        String query = 'SELECT ' + String.join(fields, ', ') + 
                      ' FROM ' + objectName;
        
        if (!whereConditions.isEmpty()) {
            query += ' WHERE ' + String.join(whereConditions, ' AND ');
        }
        
        // Add index hints for better performance
        if (config.enableIndexHints) {
            query += ' WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED';
        }
        
        if (String.isNotBlank(orderBy)) {
            query += ' ORDER BY ' + orderBy;
        }
        
        query += ' LIMIT ' + MAX_QUERY_ROWS;
        
        return query;
    }
    
    // Batch processing for large datasets
    public static void processBatchOptimized(
        String query,
        IBatchProcessor processor,
        OptimizerConfig config
    ) {
        Integer offset = 0;
        Integer batchSize = config.batchSize;
        Boolean hasMore = true;
        
        while (hasMore) {
            String batchQuery = query + ' LIMIT :batchSize OFFSET :offset';
            List<SObject> batch = Database.query(batchQuery);
            
            if (batch.isEmpty()) {
                hasMore = false;
            } else {
                processor.processBatch(batch);
                offset += batchSize;
                
                // Check governor limits
                if (Limits.getQueries() > 90) {
                    // Queue remaining work
                    queueRemainingWork(query, offset, processor);
                    hasMore = false;
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    // Interface for batch processing
    public interface IBatchProcessor {
        void processBatch(List<SObject> records);
    }
    
    // Query result caching
    private static void cacheQueryResults(String key, List<SObject> results) {
        AICacheService.CacheConfig cacheConfig = new AICacheService.CacheConfig();
        cacheConfig.ttl = 300; // 5 minutes
        cacheConfig.cacheLevel = 'PARTITION';
        
        AICacheService.put(key, results, cacheConfig);
    }
    
    private static Map<Id, AI_Provider_Configuration__c> getCachedProviderConfigs(
        Set<Id> configIds
    ) {
        Map<Id, AI_Provider_Configuration__c> results = 
            new Map<Id, AI_Provider_Configuration__c>();
        
        AICacheService.CacheConfig cacheConfig = new AICacheService.CacheConfig();
        
        for (Id configId : configIds) {
            AI_Provider_Configuration__c config = (AI_Provider_Configuration__c)
                AICacheService.get('provider_' + configId, cacheConfig);
            
            if (config != null) {
                results.put(configId, config);
            }
        }
        
        return results;
    }
    
    private static void cacheProviderConfig(AI_Provider_Configuration__c config) {
        AICacheService.CacheConfig cacheConfig = new AICacheService.CacheConfig();
        cacheConfig.ttl = 600; // 10 minutes
        
        AICacheService.put('provider_' + config.Id, config, cacheConfig);
    }
    
    // Query monitoring and optimization suggestions
    public static QueryMetrics analyzeQuery(String query) {
        QueryMetrics metrics = new QueryMetrics();
        
        // Check for common performance issues
        if (query.containsIgnoreCase('NOT IN')) {
            metrics.optimizationSuggestions.add(
                'Consider using NOT EXISTS instead of NOT IN for better performance'
            );
        }
        
        if (!query.containsIgnoreCase('LIMIT')) {
            metrics.optimizationSuggestions.add(
                'Add LIMIT clause to prevent hitting governor limits'
            );
        }
        
        if (query.containsIgnoreCase('OR')) {
            metrics.optimizationSuggestions.add(
                'Multiple OR conditions can impact performance - consider using IN clause'
            );
        }
        
        if (!query.containsIgnoreCase('WHERE')) {
            metrics.optimizationSuggestions.add(
                'Query without WHERE clause will scan entire table'
            );
        }
        
        metrics.isOptimized = metrics.optimizationSuggestions.isEmpty();
        
        return metrics;
    }
    
    // Async processing for heavy queries
    private static void queueRemainingWork(
        String query, 
        Integer offset, 
        IBatchProcessor processor
    ) {
        // Implementation would queue a platform event or batch job
        System.debug('Queuing remaining work from offset: ' + offset);
    }
    
    private static void logQueryMetrics(QueryMetrics metrics) {
        if (metrics.executionTime > 1000) { // Log slow queries
            System.debug('Slow query detected: ' + metrics.executionTime + 'ms');
        }
    }
    
    // Index recommendation
    public static List<String> recommendIndexes(String objectName) {
        List<String> recommendations = new List<String>();
        
        // Analyze query patterns and recommend indexes
        Map<String, Integer> fieldUsage = analyzeFieldUsage(objectName);
        
        for (String field : fieldUsage.keySet()) {
            if (fieldUsage.get(field) > 100) {
                recommendations.add(
                    'Consider adding index on ' + objectName + '.' + field
                );
            }
        }
        
        return recommendations;
    }
    
    private static Map<String, Integer> analyzeFieldUsage(String objectName) {
        // This would analyze actual query logs in production
        return new Map<String, Integer>{
            'CreatedDate' => 500,
            'Status__c' => 300,
            'Provider_Type__c' => 250
        };
    }
}
```
