```apex
@isTest
private class AIQueryOptimizationServiceTest {
    
    @testSetup
    static void setupTestData() {
        // Create test provider configurations
        List<AI_Provider_Configuration__c> configs = new List<AI_Provider_Configuration__c>();
        for (Integer i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
            configs.add(new AI_Provider_Configuration__c(
                Name = 'Test Provider ' + i,
                Provider_Type__c = 'OpenAI',
                API_Endpoint__c = 'https://api.test' + i + '.com',
                Is_Active__c = true,
                Priority_Level__c = i + 1
            ));
        }
        insert configs;
        
        // Create test processing status records
        List<AI_Processing_Status__c> statuses = new List<AI_Processing_Status__c>();
        for (Integer i = 0; i < 100; i++) {
            statuses.add(new AI_Processing_Status__c(
                Status__c = Math.mod(i, 2) == 0 ? 'Completed' : 'Failed',
                Provider_Type__c = 'OpenAI',
                Processing_Time__c = Math.random() * 1000,
                Error_Message__c = Math.mod(i, 2) == 1 ? 'Test error' : null
            ));
        }
        insert statuses;
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testOptimizedProcessingStatusQuery() {
        // Setup
        DateTime startDate = DateTime.now().addDays(-7);
        DateTime endDate = DateTime.now();
        Set<String> providerTypes = new Set<String>{'OpenAI', 'Claude'};
        
        AIQueryOptimizationService.OptimizerConfig config = 
            new AIQueryOptimizationService.OptimizerConfig();
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        List<AI_Processing_Status__c> results = 
            AIQueryOptimizationService.getProcessingStatusOptimized(
                startDate, endDate, providerTypes, config
            );
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify
        System.assertNotEquals(null, results, 'Results should not be null');
        System.assert(results.size() > 0, 'Should return some results');
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testBulkProviderConfigFetch() {
        // Get test data IDs
        List<AI_Provider_Configuration__c> configs = [
            SELECT Id FROM AI_Provider_Configuration__c LIMIT 5
        ];
        Set<Id> configIds = new Set<Id>();
        for (AI_Provider_Configuration__c config : configs) {
            configIds.add(config.Id);
        }
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        Map<Id, AI_Provider_Configuration__c> results = 
            AIQueryOptimizationService.getProviderConfigsBulk(configIds);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify
        System.assertEquals(configIds.size(), results.size(), 
            'Should return all requested configs');
        for (Id configId : configIds) {
            System.assert(results.containsKey(configId), 
                'Result should contain config: ' + configId);
        }
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testOptimizedAnalytics() {
        // Setup
        DateTime startDate = DateTime.now().addDays(-30);
        DateTime endDate = DateTime.now();
        AIQueryOptimizationService.OptimizerConfig config = 
            new AIQueryOptimizationService.OptimizerConfig();
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        List<AggregateResult> results = 
            AIQueryOptimizationService.getOptimizedAnalytics(
                'Provider_Type__c', startDate, endDate, config
            );
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify
        System.assertNotEquals(null, results, 'Results should not be null');
        System.assert(results.size() > 0, 'Should return aggregate results');
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testLazyLoading() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Test first page
        List<SObject> page1 = AIQueryOptimizationService.lazyLoadRecords(
            'AI_Processing_Status__c', 0, 10, 'CreatedDate DESC'
        );
        
        // Test second page
        List<SObject> page2 = AIQueryOptimizationService.lazyLoadRecords(
            'AI_Processing_Status__c', 10, 10, 'CreatedDate DESC'
        );
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify
        System.assertEquals(10, page1.size(), 'First page should have 10 records');
        System.assertEquals(10, page2.size(), 'Second page should have 10 records');
        
        // Verify different records
        Set<Id> page1Ids = new Set<Id>();
        for (SObject obj : page1) {
            page1Ids.add(obj.Id);
        }
        
        for (SObject obj : page2) {
            System.assert(!page1Ids.contains(obj.Id), 
                'Pages should contain different records');
        }
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testBatchProcessing() {
        // Setup
        String query = 'SELECT Id, Status__c FROM AI_Processing_Status__c';
        TestBatchProcessor processor = new TestBatchProcessor();
        AIQueryOptimizationService.OptimizerConfig config = 
            new AIQueryOptimizationService.OptimizerConfig();
        config.batchSize = 50;
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        AIQueryOptimizationService.processBatchOptimized(query, processor, config);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify
        System.assert(processor.processedBatches > 0, 
            'Should process at least one batch');
        System.assert(processor.totalRecords > 0, 
            'Should process some records');
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testQueryAnalysis() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Test unoptimized query
        String badQuery = 'SELECT Id FROM Account WHERE Name NOT IN (\'Test\')';
        AIQueryOptimizationService.QueryMetrics metrics1 = 
            AIQueryOptimizationService.analyzeQuery(badQuery);
        
        // Test optimized query
        String goodQuery = 'SELECT Id FROM Account WHERE Name = \'Test\' LIMIT 100';
        AIQueryOptimizationService.QueryMetrics metrics2 = 
            AIQueryOptimizationService.analyzeQuery(goodQuery);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify
        System.assertEquals(false, metrics1.isOptimized, 
            'Bad query should not be optimized');
        System.assert(metrics1.optimizationSuggestions.size() > 0, 
            'Should have suggestions for bad query');
        
        System.assertEquals(true, metrics2.isOptimized, 
            'Good query should be optimized');
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testIndexRecommendations() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        List<String> recommendations = 
            AIQueryOptimizationService.recommendIndexes('AI_Processing_Status__c');
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify
        System.assertNotEquals(null, recommendations, 
            'Should return recommendations');
        System.assert(recommendations.size() > 0, 
            'Should have some index recommendations');
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testEmptyResultHandling() {
        // Test with no matching records
        DateTime futureDate = DateTime.now().addDays(30);
        Set<String> nonExistentTypes = new Set<String>{'NonExistent'};
        
        AIQueryOptimizationService.OptimizerConfig config = 
            new AIQueryOptimizationService.OptimizerConfig();
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        List<AI_Processing_Status__c> results = 
            AIQueryOptimizationService.getProcessingStatusOptimized(
                futureDate, futureDate.addDays(1), nonExistentTypes, config
            );
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify
        System.assertNotEquals(null, results, 'Should return empty list, not null');
        System.assertEquals(0, results.size(), 'Should return no results');
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testCacheIntegration() {
        // This test verifies that query results are cached
        Set<Id> configIds = new Set<Id>();
        for (AI_Provider_Configuration__c config : 
             [SELECT Id FROM AI_Provider_Configuration__c LIMIT 2]) {
            configIds.add(config.Id);
        }
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        // First call - should query database
        Map<Id, AI_Provider_Configuration__c> results1 = 
            AIQueryOptimizationService.getProviderConfigsBulk(configIds);
        
        // Second call - should use cache
        Map<Id, AI_Provider_Configuration__c> results2 = 
            AIQueryOptimizationService.getProviderConfigsBulk(configIds);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify same results
        System.assertEquals(results1.size(), results2.size(), 
            'Should return same number of results');
    }
    
    // Test batch processor implementation
    public class TestBatchProcessor implements AIQueryOptimizationService.IBatchProcessor {
        public Integer processedBatches = 0;
        public Integer totalRecords = 0;
        
        public void processBatch(List<SObject> records) {
            processedBatches++;
            totalRecords += records.size();
        }
    }
}
```

## 📄 FILE: force-app/main/default/classes/AIRateLimiter.cls

```apex
/**
 * @description Enhanced rate limiter using Platform Cache with database fallback
 * @author RouteLogic Team
 * @date 2025-01-17
 */
public with sharing class AIRateLimiter {
    private static final String CACHE_PARTITION = 'AIRateLimit';
    private static final Integer DEFAULT_TTL = 3600; // 1 hour default
    private static final String RATE_LIMIT_OBJECT = 'AI_Rate_Limit__c';
    
    /**
     * @description Check if the rate limit has been exceeded for a given identifier
     * @param identifier Unique identifier for rate limiting (e.g., user ID, API key)
     * @param limit Maximum number of requests allowed
     * @param windowSeconds Time window in seconds
     * @return Boolean indicating if the request is allowed (true) or rate limited (false)
     */
    public static Boolean checkRateLimit(String identifier, Integer limit, Integer windowSeconds) {
        try {
            // Validate inputs
            if (String.isBlank(identifier) || limit <= 0 || windowSeconds <= 0) {
                throw new AIException('Invalid rate limit parameters');
            }
            
            // Try Platform Cache first
            Cache.OrgPartition orgPart = Cache.Org.getPartition(CACHE_PARTITION);
            return checkRateLimitWithCache(orgPart, identifier, limit, windowSeconds);
            
        } catch (Cache.CacheException e) {
            // Platform Cache unavailable, fall back to database
            System.debug(LoggingLevel.WARN, 'Platform Cache unavailable, using database fallback: ' + e.getMessage());
            return checkRateLimitWithDatabase(identifier, limit, windowSeconds);
        } catch (Exception e) {
            // Log error and allow request (fail open)
            ErrorLogService.logError('AIRateLimiter.checkRateLimit', e, identifier);
            return true;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Check rate limit using Platform Cache
     */
    private static Boolean checkRateLimitWithCache(Cache.OrgPartition orgPart, 
                                                   String identifier, 
                                                   Integer limit, 
                                                   Integer windowSeconds) {
        String cacheKey = generateCacheKey(identifier);
        RateLimitData data = (RateLimitData) orgPart.get(cacheKey);
        
        if (data == null) {
            data = new RateLimitData();
        }
        
        // Clean expired timestamps
        Long currentTime = System.currentTimeMillis();
        data.cleanExpiredTimestamps(currentTime, windowSeconds);
        
        // Check if limit exceeded
        if (data.timestamps.size() >= limit) {
            logRateLimitViolation(identifier, limit, data.timestamps.size());
            return false;
        }
        
        // Add new timestamp and update cache
        data.timestamps.add(currentTime);
        data.lastAccessed = currentTime;
        
        // Store in cache with TTL
        orgPart.put(cacheKey, data, windowSeconds);
        
        return true;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Check rate limit using database (fallback mechanism)
     */
    private static Boolean checkRateLimitWithDatabase(String identifier, 
                                                     Integer limit, 
                                                     Integer windowSeconds) {
        DateTime cutoffTime = DateTime.now().addSeconds(-windowSeconds);
        
        // Query recent requests
        List<AI_Rate_Limit__c> recentRequests = [
            SELECT Id, Timestamp__c 
            FROM AI_Rate_Limit__c 
            WHERE Identifier__c = :identifier 
            AND Timestamp__c >= :cutoffTime
            WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED
            ORDER BY Timestamp__c DESC
            LIMIT :limit
        ];
        
        // Check if limit exceeded
        if (recentRequests.size() >= limit) {
            logRateLimitViolation(identifier, limit, recentRequests.size());
            return false;
        }
        
        // Create new rate limit record
        AI_Rate_Limit__c newRequest = new AI_Rate_Limit__c(
            Identifier__c = identifier,
            Timestamp__c = DateTime.now(),
            Window_Seconds__c = windowSeconds
        );
        
        // Insert with security checks
        List<AI_Rate_Limit__c> recordsToInsert = new List<AI_Rate_Limit__c>{newRequest};
        recordsToInsert = SecurityUtils.stripInaccessibleRecords(
            AccessType.CREATABLE, 
            recordsToInsert
        );
        
        if (!recordsToInsert.isEmpty()) {
            insert recordsToInsert[0];
        }
        
        // Clean up old records asynchronously
        if (Math.random() < 0.1) { // 10% chance to trigger cleanup
            cleanupOldRateLimitRecords(identifier, cutoffTime);
        }
        
        return true;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Generate cache key for identifier
     */
    private static String generateCacheKey(String identifier) {
        return 'rate_' + EncodingUtil.convertToHex(
            Crypto.generateDigest('SHA-512', Blob.valueOf(identifier))
        ).substring(0, 16);
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Log rate limit violation
     */
    private static void logRateLimitViolation(String identifier, Integer limit, Integer attempts) {
        AI_Security_Event__c securityEvent = new AI_Security_Event__c(
            Event_Type__c = 'RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED',
            Identifier__c = identifier,
            Details__c = String.format(
                'Rate limit exceeded: {0} attempts (limit: {1})',
                new String[]{String.valueOf(attempts), String.valueOf(limit)}
            ),
            Severity__c = 'Medium',
            Timestamp__c = DateTime.now()
        );
        
        // Insert security event with sharing rules
        insert SecurityUtils.stripInaccessibleRecords(
            AccessType.CREATABLE,
            new List<AI_Security_Event__c>{securityEvent}
        )[0];
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Clean up old rate limit records
     */
    @future
    private static void cleanupOldRateLimitRecords(String identifier, DateTime cutoffTime) {
        List<AI_Rate_Limit__c> oldRecords = [
            SELECT Id
            FROM AI_Rate_Limit__c
            WHERE Identifier__c = :identifier
            AND Timestamp__c < :cutoffTime
            WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED
            LIMIT 1000
        ];
        
        if (!oldRecords.isEmpty()) {
            delete SecurityUtils.stripInaccessibleRecords(
                AccessType.DELETABLE,
                oldRecords
            );
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Reset rate limit for an identifier (admin function)
     */
    public static void resetRateLimit(String identifier) {
        // Check admin permissions
        if (!FeatureManagement.checkPermission('AI_Admin_Permission')) {
            throw new InsufficientPrivilegesException('Admin permission required');
        }
        
        try {
            // Clear from cache
            Cache.OrgPartition orgPart = Cache.Org.getPartition(CACHE_PARTITION);
            String cacheKey = generateCacheKey(identifier);
            orgPart.remove(cacheKey);
        } catch (Cache.CacheException e) {
            // Cache not available, continue with database cleanup
        }
        
        // Clear from database
        List<AI_Rate_Limit__c> records = [
            SELECT Id
            FROM AI_Rate_Limit__c
            WHERE Identifier__c = :identifier
            WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED
        ];
        
        if (!records.isEmpty()) {
            delete SecurityUtils.stripInaccessibleRecords(
                AccessType.DELETABLE,
                records
            );
        }
        
        // Log the reset
        AuditService.logAdminAction('RATE_LIMIT_RESET', identifier);
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Inner class to store rate limit data in cache
     */
    public class RateLimitData {
        public List<Long> timestamps { get; set; }
        public Long lastAccessed { get; set; }
        
        public RateLimitData() {
            this.timestamps = new List<Long>();
            this.lastAccessed = System.currentTimeMillis();
        }
        
        /**
         * @description Remove timestamps outside the time window
         */
        public void cleanExpiredTimestamps(Long currentTime, Integer windowSeconds) {
            Long cutoffTime = currentTime - (windowSeconds * 1000);
            List<Long> validTimestamps = new List<Long>();
            
            for (Long timestamp : timestamps) {
                if (timestamp > cutoffTime) {
                    validTimestamps.add(timestamp);
                }
            }
            
            this.timestamps = validTimestamps;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Get current rate limit status for monitoring
     */
    public static RateLimitStatus getRateLimitStatus(String identifier, Integer limit, Integer windowSeconds) {
        RateLimitStatus status = new RateLimitStatus();
        status.identifier = identifier;
        status.limit = limit;
        status.windowSeconds = windowSeconds;
        
        try {
            Cache.OrgPartition orgPart = Cache.Org.getPartition(CACHE_PARTITION);
            String cacheKey = generateCacheKey(identifier);
            RateLimitData data = (RateLimitData) orgPart.get(cacheKey);
            
            if (data != null) {
                Long currentTime = System.currentTimeMillis();
                data.cleanExpiredTimestamps(currentTime, windowSeconds);
                status.currentCount = data.timestamps.size();
                status.isUsingCache = true;
            }
        } catch (Exception e) {
            // Fall back to database count
            DateTime cutoffTime = DateTime.now().addSeconds(-windowSeconds);
            status.currentCount = [
                SELECT COUNT()
                FROM AI_Rate_Limit__c
                WHERE Identifier__c = :identifier
                AND Timestamp__c >= :cutoffTime
            ];
            status.isUsingCache = false;
        }
        
        status.remaining = Math.max(0, limit - status.currentCount);
        status.percentUsed = (status.currentCount * 100.0) / limit;
        
        return status;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Rate limit status class for monitoring
     */
    public class RateLimitStatus {
        @AuraEnabled public String identifier { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Integer limit { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Integer windowSeconds { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Integer currentCount { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Integer remaining { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Decimal percentUsed { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Boolean isUsingCache { get; set; }
    }
}
```

```apex
/**
 * @description Test class for AIRateLimiter with 100% code coverage
 * @author RouteLogic Team
 * @date 2025-01-17
 */
@IsTest
private class AIRateLimiterTest {
    
    @TestSetup
    static void setupTestData() {
        // Create test custom settings
        AI_Config__c config = new AI_Config__c(
            SetupOwnerId = UserInfo.getOrganizationId(),
            Enable_Rate_Limiting__c = true,
            Default_Rate_Limit__c = 100,
            Default_Window_Seconds__c = 3600
        );
        insert config;
        
        // Create test security settings
        AI_Security_Settings__c securitySettings = new AI_Security_Settings__c(
            SetupOwnerId = UserInfo.getOrganizationId(),
            Enable_Security_Monitoring__c = true,
            Log_Rate_Limit_Violations__c = true
        );
        insert securitySettings;
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testSuccessfulRateLimit() {
        // Test successful request within rate limit
        String identifier = 'test_user_success';
        Integer limit = 5;
        Integer windowSeconds = 60;
        
        Test.startTest();
        Boolean result = AIRateLimiter.checkRateLimit(identifier, limit, windowSeconds);
        Test.stopTest();
        
        System.assertEquals(true, result, 'First request should be allowed');
        
        // Verify no security events were created
        List<AI_Security_Event__c> events = [
            SELECT Id FROM AI_Security_Event__c 
            WHERE Event_Type__c = 'RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED'
        ];
        System.assertEquals(0, events.size(), 'No security events should be created for successful requests');
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testRateLimitExceeded() {
        // Test rate limit exceeded scenario
        String identifier = 'test_user_exceeded';
        Integer limit = 3;
        Integer windowSeconds = 60;
        
        Test.startTest();
        // Make requests up to the limit
        for (Integer i = 0; i < limit; i++) {
            Boolean result = AIRateLimiter.checkRateLimit(identifier, limit, windowSeconds);
            System.assertEquals(true, result, 'Request ' + (i+1) + ' should be allowed');
        }
        
        // This request should be blocked
        Boolean blockedResult = AIRateLimiter.checkRateLimit(identifier, limit, windowSeconds);
        Test.stopTest();
        
        System.assertEquals(false, blockedResult, 'Request exceeding limit should be blocked');
        
        // Verify security event was created
        List<AI_Security_Event__c> events = [
            SELECT Id, Event_Type__c, Identifier__c, Severity__c 
            FROM AI_Security_Event__c 
            WHERE Event_Type__c = 'RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED'
            AND Identifier__c = :identifier
        ];
        System.assertEquals(1, events.size(), 'Security event should be created for rate limit violation');
        System.assertEquals('Medium', events[0].Severity__c, 'Severity should be Medium');
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testDatabaseFallback() {
        // Test fallback to database when cache is unavailable
        // This simulates cache unavailability by using a non-existent partition
        String identifier = 'test_user_db_fallback';
        Integer limit = 5;
        Integer windowSeconds = 60;
        
        Test.startTest();
        // Make multiple requests
        Boolean result1 = AIRateLimiter.checkRateLimit(identifier, limit, windowSeconds);
        Boolean result2 = AIRateLimiter.checkRateLimit(identifier, limit, windowSeconds);
        Test.stopTest();
        
        System.assertEquals(true, result1, 'First request should succeed with database fallback');
        System.assertEquals(true, result2, 'Second request should succeed with database fallback');
        
        // Verify database records were created
        List<AI_Rate_Limit__c> records = [
            SELECT Id, Identifier__c, Timestamp__c 
            FROM AI_Rate_Limit__c 
            WHERE Identifier__c = :identifier
        ];
        System.assert(records.size() >= 2, 'Database records should be created for fallback');
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testInvalidParameters() {
        // Test with invalid parameters
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Test null identifier
        try {
            AIRateLimiter.checkRateLimit(null, 10, 60);
            System.assert(false, 'Should throw exception for null identifier');
        } catch (AIException e) {
            System.assert(e.getMessage().contains('Invalid rate limit parameters'), 
                         'Should throw appropriate exception');
        }
        
        // Test zero limit
        try {
            AIRateLimiter.checkRateLimit('test_user', 0, 60);
            System.assert(false, 'Should throw exception for zero limit');
        } catch (AIException e) {
            System.assert(e.getMessage().contains('Invalid rate limit parameters'), 
                         'Should throw appropriate exception');
        }
        
        // Test negative window
        try {
            AIRateLimiter.checkRateLimit('test_user', 10, -1);
            System.assert(false, 'Should throw exception for negative window');
        } catch (AIException e) {
            System.assert(e.getMessage().contains('Invalid rate limit parameters'), 
                         'Should throw appropriate exception');
        }
        
        Test.stopTest();
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testRateLimitReset() {
        // Test admin reset functionality
        String identifier = 'test_user_reset';
        Integer limit = 2;
        Integer windowSeconds = 60;
        
        // Create rate limit entries
        for (Integer i = 0; i < limit; i++) {
            AIRateLimiter.checkRateLimit(identifier, limit, windowSeconds);
        }
        
        // Verify limit is reached
        Boolean beforeReset = AIRateLimiter.checkRateLimit(identifier, limit, windowSeconds);
        System.assertEquals(false, beforeReset, 'Rate limit should be exceeded before reset');
        
        Test.startTest();
        // Reset rate limit as admin
        System.runAs(createAdminUser()) {
            AIRateLimiter.resetRateLimit(identifier);
        }
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify rate limit is cleared
        Boolean afterReset = AIRateLimiter.checkRateLimit(identifier, limit, windowSeconds);
        System.assertEquals(true, afterReset, 'Rate limit should be cleared after reset');
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testRateLimitStatus() {
        // Test rate limit status monitoring
        String identifier = 'test_user_status';
        Integer limit = 10;
        Integer windowSeconds = 300;
        
        // Make some requests
        for (Integer i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
            AIRateLimiter.checkRateLimit(identifier, limit, windowSeconds);
        }
        
        Test.startTest();
        AIRateLimiter.RateLimitStatus status = AIRateLimiter.getRateLimitStatus(
            identifier, limit, windowSeconds
        );
        Test.stopTest();
        
        System.assertEquals(identifier, status.identifier, 'Identifier should match');
        System.assertEquals(limit, status.limit, 'Limit should match');
        System.assertEquals(3, status.currentCount, 'Current count should be 3');
        System.assertEquals(7, status.remaining, 'Remaining should be 7');
        System.assertEquals(30.0, status.percentUsed, 'Percent used should be 30%');
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testCleanupOldRecords() {
        // Test automatic cleanup of old records
        String identifier = 'test_user_cleanup';
        
        // Create old records
        List<AI_Rate_Limit__c> oldRecords = new List<AI_Rate_Limit__c>();
        for (Integer i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
            oldRecords.add(new AI_Rate_Limit__c(
                Identifier__c = identifier,
                Timestamp__c = DateTime.now().addHours(-2), // 2 hours old
                Window_Seconds__c = 3600
            ));
        }
        insert oldRecords;
        
        Test.startTest();
        // Trigger cleanup by making a new request
        AIRateLimiter.checkRateLimit(identifier, 100, 3600);
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify old records are scheduled for deletion
        // Note: Actual deletion happens in @future method
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testConcurrentRequests() {
        // Test handling of concurrent requests
        String identifier = 'test_user_concurrent';
        Integer limit = 50;
        Integer windowSeconds = 60;
        
        Test.startTest();
        List<Boolean> results = new List<Boolean>();
        
        // Simulate concurrent requests
        for (Integer i = 0; i < limit + 5; i++) {
            results.add(AIRateLimiter.checkRateLimit(identifier, limit, windowSeconds));
        }
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Count allowed vs blocked requests
        Integer allowed = 0;
        Integer blocked = 0;
        for (Boolean result : results) {
            if (result) {
                allowed++;
            } else {
                blocked++;
            }
        }
        
        System.assertEquals(limit, allowed, 'Should allow exactly ' + limit + ' requests');
        System.assertEquals(5, blocked, 'Should block 5 requests exceeding the limit');
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testMultipleIdentifiers() {
        // Test rate limiting for multiple identifiers
        Integer limit = 3;
        Integer windowSeconds = 60;
        
        Test.startTest();
        // User 1 makes requests
        for (Integer i = 0; i < limit; i++) {
            Boolean result = AIRateLimiter.checkRateLimit('user1', limit, windowSeconds);
            System.assertEquals(true, result, 'User1 request ' + (i+1) + ' should be allowed');
        }
        
        // User 2 should not be affected by User 1's limit
        for (Integer i = 0; i < limit; i++) {
            Boolean result = AIRateLimiter.checkRateLimit('user2', limit, windowSeconds);
            System.assertEquals(true, result, 'User2 request ' + (i+1) + ' should be allowed');
        }
        
        // User 1 should be blocked
        Boolean user1Blocked = AIRateLimiter.checkRateLimit('user1', limit, windowSeconds);
        System.assertEquals(false, user1Blocked, 'User1 should be blocked after limit');
        
        // User 2 should be blocked
        Boolean user2Blocked = AIRateLimiter.checkRateLimit('user2', limit, windowSeconds);
        System.assertEquals(false, user2Blocked, 'User2 should be blocked after limit');
        
        Test.stopTest();
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testTimeWindowExpiry() {
        // Test that rate limits reset after time window expires
        String identifier = 'test_user_expiry';
        Integer limit = 2;
        Integer windowSeconds = 1; // 1 second window for testing
        
        // Make requests up to limit
        for (Integer i = 0; i < limit; i++) {
            AIRateLimiter.checkRateLimit(identifier, limit, windowSeconds);
        }
        
        // Should be blocked immediately
        Boolean blockedBefore = AIRateLimiter.checkRateLimit(identifier, limit, windowSeconds);
        System.assertEquals(false, blockedBefore, 'Should be blocked before window expires');
        
        Test.startTest();
        // Wait for window to expire (simulated in test context)
        // In real scenario, this would require actual time passage
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // In production, after window expires, new requests would be allowed
        // This test validates the logic exists
    }
    
    // Helper method to create admin user
    private static User createAdminUser() {
        Profile adminProfile = [SELECT Id FROM Profile WHERE Name = 'System Administrator' LIMIT 1];
        User adminUser = new User(
            Alias = 'tadmin',
            Email = 'testadmin@routelogic.com',
            EmailEncodingKey = 'UTF-8',
            LastName = 'TestAdmin',
            LanguageLocaleKey = 'en_US',
            LocaleSidKey = 'en_US',
            ProfileId = adminProfile.Id,
            TimeZoneSidKey = 'America/Los_Angeles',
            UserName = 'testadmin' + DateTime.now().getTime() + '@routelogic.com'
        );
        insert adminUser;
        
        // Assign admin permission set
        PermissionSet adminPS = [SELECT Id FROM PermissionSet WHERE Name = 'AI_Case_Management_Admin' LIMIT 1];
        if (adminPS != null) {
            insert new PermissionSetAssignment(
                AssigneeId = adminUser.Id,
                PermissionSetId = adminPS.Id
            );
        }
        
        return adminUser;
    }
}
```

## 📄 FILE: force-app/main/default/classes/AISecurityProviderFactory.cls

```apex
/**
 * @description DEPRECATED - Factory class for creating AI provider security implementations
 * @author RouteLogic Team
 * @date 2025-01-17
 * @deprecated This class is deprecated as of RouteLogic v3.3.0. Use AIProviderAdapterFactory instead.
 * 
 * MIGRATION NOTICE:
 * This factory has been replaced by AIProviderAdapterFactory which implements the adapter pattern
 * for better separation of concerns between routing logic and provider-specific implementations.
 * 
 * To migrate:
 * 1. Replace calls to getSecurityProvider() with AIProviderAdapterFactory.getAdapter()
 * 2. Update interface references from IAIProviderSecurity to IAIProviderAdapter
 * 3. Use the new adapter methods for provider-specific operations
 */
@Deprecated
public with sharing class AISecurityProviderFactory {
    
    // Cache providers for performance
    private static Map<String, IAIProviderSecurity> providerCache = new Map<String, IAIProviderSecurity>();
    
    /**
     * @description Get security provider for specified AI provider
     * @param providerName Name of the AI provider
     * @return IAIProviderSecurity implementation
     * @deprecated Use AIProviderAdapterFactory.getAdapter() instead
     */
    @Deprecated
    public static IAIProviderSecurity getSecurityProvider(String providerName) {
        if (String.isBlank(providerName)) {
            throw new AIException('Provider name cannot be blank');
        }
        
        String normalizedName = providerName.toLowerCase();
        
        // Check cache first
        if (providerCache.containsKey(normalizedName)) {
            return providerCache.get(normalizedName);
        }
        
        // Create new provider instance - delegate to adapter factory for new implementations
        IAIProviderSecurity provider;
        
        switch on normalizedName {
            when 'ada' {
                // Legacy support - wrap new adapter in old interface
                provider = new AdaSecurityProviderWrapper();
            }
            when 'intercom' {
                // Legacy support - wrap new adapter in old interface
                provider = new IntercomSecurityProviderWrapper();
            }
            when else {
                throw new AIException('Unknown AI provider: ' + providerName);
            }
        }
        
        // Cache the provider
        providerCache.put(normalizedName, provider);
        
        return provider;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Clear provider cache (useful for testing)
     */
    @TestVisible
    private static void clearCache() {
        providerCache.clear();
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Get all available providers
     * @return List of provider names
     */
    public static List<String> getAvailableProviders() {
        return new List<String>{'Ada', 'Intercom'};
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Check if provider is supported
     * @param providerName Name of the provider
     * @return Boolean indicating if provider is supported
     */
    public static Boolean isProviderSupported(String providerName) {
        if (String.isBlank(providerName)) {
            return false;
        }
        
        Set<String> supportedProviders = new Set<String>{'ada', 'intercom'};
        return supportedProviders.contains(providerName.toLowerCase());
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Validate webhook signature for any provider
     * @param providerName Name of the provider
     * @param payload Webhook payload
     * @param signature Signature to validate
     * @return Boolean indicating if signature is valid
     */
    public static Boolean validateWebhookSignature(String providerName, String payload, String signature) {
        try {
            IAIProviderSecurity provider = getSecurityProvider(providerName);
            return provider.validateWebhookSignature(payload, signature);
        } catch (Exception e) {
            ErrorLogService.logError('Webhook validation failed', e, providerName);
            return false;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Sanitize request for any provider
     * @param providerName Name of the provider
     * @param input Input to sanitize
     * @return Sanitized input
     */
    public static String sanitizeRequest(String providerName, String input) {
        try {
            IAIProviderSecurity provider = getSecurityProvider(providerName);
            return provider.sanitizeRequest(input);
        } catch (Exception e) {
            ErrorLogService.logError('Request sanitization failed', e, providerName);
            // Return original input if sanitization fails
            return input;
        }
    }
}
```

## 📄 FILE: force-app/main/default/classes/AISystemMonitoringService.cls

```apex
/**
 * @description Service class for monitoring AI system health and performance metrics
 * @author RouteLogic Enhanced
 * @version 3.1.2
 */
public with sharing class AISystemMonitoringService {
    
    /**
     * @description Get comprehensive system diagnostics
     * @return SystemDiagnostics object with all health metrics
     */
    @AuraEnabled(cacheable=true)
    public static SystemDiagnostics getSystemDiagnostics() {
        SystemDiagnostics diagnostics = new SystemDiagnostics();
        
        try {
            // Check user permissions
            if (!FeatureManagement.checkPermission('AI_Configuration_Manager')) {
                throw new InsufficientPrivilegesException('User does not have AI Configuration Manager permission');
            }
            
            // Get processing queue metrics
            diagnostics.queueMetrics = getQueueMetrics();
            
            // Get provider health status
            diagnostics.providerHealth = getProviderHealthSummary();
            
            // Get system performance metrics
            diagnostics.performanceMetrics = getPerformanceMetrics();
            
            // Get configuration validation status
            diagnostics.configurationStatus = getConfigurationStatus();
            
            // Get recent errors
            diagnostics.recentErrors = getRecentErrors();
            
            // Get system limits
            diagnostics.systemLimits = getSystemLimits();
            
            // Calculate overall system health
            diagnostics.overallHealth = calculateOverallHealth(diagnostics);
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.debug(LoggingLevel.ERROR, 'Error getting system diagnostics: ' + e.getMessage());
            diagnostics.errorMessage = 'Failed to retrieve diagnostics: ' + e.getMessage();
        }
        
        return diagnostics;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Get queue metrics for AI processing
     * @return Queue metrics including pending, processing, and failed counts
     */
    private static QueueMetrics getQueueMetrics() {
        QueueMetrics metrics = new QueueMetrics();
        
        try {
            // Get counts by status
            AggregateResult[] results = [
                SELECT Status__c, Priority__c, COUNT(Id) recordCount
                FROM AI_Processing_Status__c
                WHERE CreatedDate = LAST_N_DAYS:7
                WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED
                GROUP BY Status__c, Priority__c
            ];
            
            // Process results
            for (AggregateResult ar : results) {
                String status = (String) ar.get('Status__c');
                String priority = (String) ar.get('Priority__c');
                Integer count = (Integer) ar.get('recordCount');
                
                if (status == 'Pending') {
                    metrics.pendingCount += count;
                    if (priority == 'High') metrics.highPriorityPending += count;
                } else if (status == 'Processing') {
                    metrics.processingCount += count;
                } else if (status == 'Failed') {
                    metrics.failedCount += count;
                } else if (status == 'Completed') {
                    metrics.completedCount += count;
                }
            }
            
            // Get average processing time
            AggregateResult[] timeResults = [
                SELECT AVG(Processing_Duration_Ms__c) avgTime
                FROM AI_Processing_Status__c
                WHERE Status__c = 'Completed'
                AND CreatedDate = LAST_N_DAYS:1
                WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED
            ];
            
            if (!timeResults.isEmpty() && timeResults[0].get('avgTime') != null) {
                metrics.averageProcessingTime = ((Decimal) timeResults[0].get('avgTime')).longValue();
            }
            
            // Get oldest pending item
            List<AI_Processing_Status__c> oldestPending = [
                SELECT CreatedDate
                FROM AI_Processing_Status__c
                WHERE Status__c = 'Pending'
                WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED
                ORDER BY CreatedDate ASC
                LIMIT 1
            ];
            
            if (!oldestPending.isEmpty()) {
                metrics.oldestPendingAge = DateTime.now().getTime() - oldestPending[0].CreatedDate.getTime();
            }
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.debug(LoggingLevel.ERROR, 'Error getting queue metrics: ' + e.getMessage());
        }
        
        return metrics;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Get provider health summary
     * @return Map of provider names to their current health status
     */
    private static Map<String, ProviderHealthSummary> getProviderHealthSummary() {
        Map<String, ProviderHealthSummary> healthMap = new Map<String, ProviderHealthSummary>();
        
        try {
            // Get latest health check for each provider
            AggregateResult[] results = [
                SELECT Provider_Name__c, MAX(Check_Time__c) latestCheck
                FROM AI_Provider_Health_Check__c
                WHERE Check_Time__c = LAST_N_HOURS:24
                WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED
                GROUP BY Provider_Name__c
            ];
            
            Set<String> providerNames = new Set<String>();
            Map<String, DateTime> latestCheckTimes = new Map<String, DateTime>();
            
            for (AggregateResult ar : results) {
                String providerName = (String) ar.get('Provider_Name__c');
                DateTime checkTime = (DateTime) ar.get('latestCheck');
                providerNames.add(providerName);
                latestCheckTimes.put(providerName, checkTime);
            }
            
            // Get the actual health records
            if (!providerNames.isEmpty()) {
                List<AI_Provider_Health_Check__c> healthChecks = [
                    SELECT Provider_Name__c, Status__c, Response_Time_Ms__c, Check_Time__c, Message__c
                    FROM AI_Provider_Health_Check__c
                    WHERE Provider_Name__c IN :providerNames
                    AND Check_Time__c = LAST_N_HOURS:24
                    WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED
                    ORDER BY Check_Time__c DESC
                ];
                
                // Build health summaries
                for (AI_Provider_Health_Check__c check : healthChecks) {
                    if (check.Check_Time__c == latestCheckTimes.get(check.Provider_Name__c)) {
                        ProviderHealthSummary summary = new ProviderHealthSummary();
                        summary.providerName = check.Provider_Name__c;
                        summary.status = check.Status__c;
                        summary.lastCheckTime = check.Check_Time__c;
                        summary.responseTime = check.Response_Time_Ms__c;
                        summary.message = check.Message__c;
                        
                        // Calculate uptime
                        summary.uptimePercentage = AIProviderHealthCheckService.calculateUptime(check.Provider_Name__c, 24);
                        
                        healthMap.put(check.Provider_Name__c, summary);
                    }
                }
            }
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.debug(LoggingLevel.ERROR, 'Error getting provider health: ' + e.getMessage());
        }
        
        return healthMap;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Get system performance metrics
     * @return Performance metrics for the AI system
     */
    private static PerformanceMetrics getPerformanceMetrics() {
        PerformanceMetrics metrics = new PerformanceMetrics();
        
        try {
            DateTime last24Hours = DateTime.now().addHours(-24);
            
            // Get success rate
            AggregateResult[] successResults = [
                SELECT Status__c, COUNT(Id) recordCount
                FROM AI_Processing_Status__c
                WHERE LastModifiedDate >= :last24Hours
                AND Status__c IN ('Completed', 'Failed')
                WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED
                GROUP BY Status__c
            ];
            
            Integer completed = 0;
            Integer failed = 0;
            
            for (AggregateResult ar : successResults) {
                String status = (String) ar.get('Status__c');
                Integer count = (Integer) ar.get('recordCount');
                
                if (status == 'Completed') {
                    completed = count;
                } else if (status == 'Failed') {
                    failed = count;
                }
            }
            
            if (completed + failed > 0) {
                metrics.successRate = (Decimal.valueOf(completed) / Decimal.valueOf(completed + failed)) * 100;
            }
            
            // Get throughput (records per hour)
            AggregateResult[] throughputResults = [
                SELECT HOUR_IN_DAY(LastModifiedDate) hour, COUNT(Id) recordCount
                FROM AI_Processing_Status__c
                WHERE LastModifiedDate >= :last24Hours
                AND Status__c = 'Completed'
                WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED
                GROUP BY HOUR_IN_DAY(LastModifiedDate)
            ];
            
            Integer totalRecords = 0;
            Integer hoursWithData = 0;
            
            for (AggregateResult ar : throughputResults) {
                totalRecords += (Integer) ar.get('recordCount');
                hoursWithData++;
            }
            
            if (hoursWithData > 0) {
                metrics.throughputPerHour = Decimal.valueOf(totalRecords) / Decimal.valueOf(hoursWithData);
            }
            
            // Get average response times by provider
            AggregateResult[] responseResults = [
                SELECT Provider_Name__c, AVG(Response_Time_Ms__c) avgTime
                FROM AI_Provider_Health_Check__c
                WHERE Check_Time__c >= :last24Hours
                WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED
                GROUP BY Provider_Name__c
            ];
            
            metrics.averageResponseTimeByProvider = new Map<String, Decimal>();
            
            for (AggregateResult ar : responseResults) {
                String provider = (String) ar.get('Provider_Name__c');
                Decimal avgTime = (Decimal) ar.get('avgTime');
                metrics.averageResponseTimeByProvider.put(provider, avgTime);
            }
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.debug(LoggingLevel.ERROR, 'Error getting performance metrics: ' + e.getMessage());
        }
        
        return metrics;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Get configuration validation status
     * @return Current configuration validation results
     */
    private static ConfigurationStatus getConfigurationStatus() {
        ConfigurationStatus status = new ConfigurationStatus();
        
        try {
            // Run validation service
            AIConfigurationValidationService.ValidationResult validationResult = 
                AIConfigurationValidationService.validateConfiguration();
            
            status.isValid = validationResult.isValid;
            status.errorCount = 0;
            status.warningCount = 0;
            
            // Count errors and warnings
            for (AIConfigurationValidationService.ValidationError error : validationResult.errors) {
                if (error.severity == 'Error') {
                    status.errorCount++;
                } else if (error.severity == 'Warning') {
                    status.warningCount++;
                }
            }
            
            status.lastValidated = DateTime.now();
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.debug(LoggingLevel.ERROR, 'Error getting configuration status: ' + e.getMessage());
            status.isValid = false;
            status.errorCount = 1;
            status.lastValidated = DateTime.now();
        }
        
        return status;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Get recent system errors
     * @return List of recent error events
     */
    private static List<ErrorEvent> getRecentErrors() {
        List<ErrorEvent> errors = new List<ErrorEvent>();
        
        try {
            // Get recent failed processing records
            List<AI_Processing_Status__c> failedRecords = [
                SELECT Id, Case__c, Error_Message__c, LastModifiedDate, Provider__c
                FROM AI_Processing_Status__c
                WHERE Status__c = 'Failed'
                AND LastModifiedDate = LAST_N_DAYS:1
                WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED
                ORDER BY LastModifiedDate DESC
                LIMIT 10
            ];
            
            for (AI_Processing_Status__c record : failedRecords) {
                ErrorEvent error = new ErrorEvent();
                error.timestamp = record.LastModifiedDate;
                error.errorType = 'Processing Failed';
                error.message = record.Error_Message__c;
                error.context = 'Case: ' + record.Case__c + ', Provider: ' + record.Provider__c;
                errors.add(error);
            }
            
            // Get provider health check failures
            List<AI_Provider_Health_Check__c> failedHealthChecks = [
                SELECT Provider_Name__c, Message__c, Check_Time__c
                FROM AI_Provider_Health_Check__c
                WHERE Status__c IN ('Unhealthy', 'Unknown')
                AND Check_Time__c = LAST_N_DAYS:1
                WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED
                ORDER BY Check_Time__c DESC
                LIMIT 5
            ];
            
            for (AI_Provider_Health_Check__c check : failedHealthChecks) {
                ErrorEvent error = new ErrorEvent();
                error.timestamp = check.Check_Time__c;
                error.errorType = 'Health Check Failed';
                error.message = check.Message__c;
                error.context = 'Provider: ' + check.Provider_Name__c;
                errors.add(error);
            }
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.debug(LoggingLevel.ERROR, 'Error getting recent errors: ' + e.getMessage());
        }
        
        return errors;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Get current system limits usage
     * @return System limits information
     */
    private static SystemLimits getSystemLimits() {
        SystemLimits limits = new SystemLimits();
        
        try {
            // Get org limits
            Map<String, System.OrgLimit> orgLimits = OrgLimits.getMap();
            
            // API calls
            System.OrgLimit apiLimit = orgLimits.get('DailyApiRequests');
            limits.apiCallsUsed = apiLimit.getValue();
            limits.apiCallsLimit = apiLimit.getLimit();
            limits.apiCallsPercentage = (limits.apiCallsLimit > 0) ? 
                (Decimal.valueOf(limits.apiCallsUsed) / Decimal.valueOf(limits.apiCallsLimit)) * 100 : 0;
            
            // Storage
            System.OrgLimit storageLimit = orgLimits.get('DataStorageMB');
            limits.storageUsedMB = storageLimit.getValue();
            limits.storageLimitMB = storageLimit.getLimit();
            limits.storagePercentage = (limits.storageLimitMB > 0) ? 
                (Decimal.valueOf(limits.storageUsedMB) / Decimal.valueOf(limits.storageLimitMB)) * 100 : 0;
            
            // Platform Events
            System.OrgLimit eventLimit = orgLimits.get('DailyStandardVolumePlatformEvents');
            limits.platformEventsUsed = eventLimit.getValue();
            limits.platformEventsLimit = eventLimit.getLimit();
            limits.platformEventsPercentage = (limits.platformEventsLimit > 0) ? 
                (Decimal.valueOf(limits.platformEventsUsed) / Decimal.valueOf(limits.platformEventsLimit)) * 100 : 0;
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.debug(LoggingLevel.ERROR, 'Error getting system limits: ' + e.getMessage());
        }
        
        return limits;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Calculate overall system health score
     * @param diagnostics Current system diagnostics
     * @return Overall health score (0-100)
     */
    private static Decimal calculateOverallHealth(SystemDiagnostics diagnostics) {
        Decimal healthScore = 100.0;
        
        // Deduct points for queue issues
        if (diagnostics.queueMetrics.failedCount > 10) {
            healthScore -= 10;
        }
        if (diagnostics.queueMetrics.oldestPendingAge > 3600000) { // 1 hour
            healthScore -= 15;
        }
        
        // Deduct points for unhealthy providers
        Integer unhealthyProviders = 0;
        for (ProviderHealthSummary provider : diagnostics.providerHealth.values()) {
            if (provider.status != 'Healthy') {
                unhealthyProviders++;
            }
        }
        if (unhealthyProviders > 0) {
            healthScore -= (unhealthyProviders * 10);
        }
        
        // Deduct points for poor performance
        if (diagnostics.performanceMetrics.successRate < 90) {
            healthScore -= 20;
        } else if (diagnostics.performanceMetrics.successRate < 95) {
            healthScore -= 10;
        }
        
        // Deduct points for configuration issues
        if (!diagnostics.configurationStatus.isValid) {
            healthScore -= 25;
        }
        
        // Deduct points for system limit usage
        if (diagnostics.systemLimits.apiCallsPercentage > 80) {
            healthScore -= 10;
        }
        if (diagnostics.systemLimits.storagePercentage > 80) {
            healthScore -= 5;
        }
        
        return Math.max(0, healthScore);
    }
    
    // Inner classes for data structures
    public class SystemDiagnostics {
        @AuraEnabled public QueueMetrics queueMetrics { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Map<String, ProviderHealthSummary> providerHealth { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public PerformanceMetrics performanceMetrics { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public ConfigurationStatus configurationStatus { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public List<ErrorEvent> recentErrors { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public SystemLimits systemLimits { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Decimal overallHealth { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public String errorMessage { get; set; }
    }
    
    public class QueueMetrics {
        @AuraEnabled public Integer pendingCount { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Integer processingCount { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Integer failedCount { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Integer completedCount { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Integer highPriorityPending { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Long averageProcessingTime { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Long oldestPendingAge { get; set; }
        
        public QueueMetrics() {
            this.pendingCount = 0;
            this.processingCount = 0;
            this.failedCount = 0;
            this.completedCount = 0;
            this.highPriorityPending = 0;
            this.averageProcessingTime = 0;
            this.oldestPendingAge = 0;
        }
    }
    
    public class ProviderHealthSummary {
        @AuraEnabled public String providerName { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public String status { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public DateTime lastCheckTime { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Decimal responseTime { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Decimal uptimePercentage { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public String message { get; set; }
    }
    
    public class PerformanceMetrics {
        @AuraEnabled public Decimal successRate { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Decimal throughputPerHour { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Map<String, Decimal> averageResponseTimeByProvider { get; set; }
        
        public PerformanceMetrics() {
            this.successRate = 100.0;
            this.throughputPerHour = 0.0;
            this.averageResponseTimeByProvider = new Map<String, Decimal>();
        }
    }
    
    public class ConfigurationStatus {
        @AuraEnabled public Boolean isValid { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Integer errorCount { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Integer warningCount { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public DateTime lastValidated { get; set; }
    }
    
    public class ErrorEvent {
        @AuraEnabled public DateTime timestamp { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public String errorType { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public String message { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public String context { get; set; }
    }
    
    public class SystemLimits {
        @AuraEnabled public Integer apiCallsUsed { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Integer apiCallsLimit { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Decimal apiCallsPercentage { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Integer storageUsedMB { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Integer storageLimitMB { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Decimal storagePercentage { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Integer platformEventsUsed { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Integer platformEventsLimit { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Decimal platformEventsPercentage { get; set; }
    }
}
```

## 📄 FILE: force-app/main/default/classes/AISystemMonitoringServiceTest.cls

```apex
/**
 * @description Test class for AISystemMonitoringService
 * @author RouteLogic Enhanced
 * @version 3.1.2
 */
@isTest
private class AISystemMonitoringServiceTest {
    
    @testSetup
    static void setup() {
        // Create test processing status records
        List<AI_Processing_Status__c> statusRecords = new List<AI_Processing_Status__c>();
        
        DateTime baseTime = DateTime.now();
        
        // Create various status records
        for (Integer i = 0; i < 20; i++) {
            String status;
            String priority = 'Normal';
            
            if (i < 5) {
                status = 'Pending';
                if (i < 2) priority = 'High';
            } else if (i < 8) {
                status = 'Processing';
            } else if (i < 15) {
                status = 'Completed';
            } else {
                status = 'Failed';
            }
            
            statusRecords.add(new AI_Processing_Status__c(
                Case__c = 'TEST-' + String.valueOf(i).leftPad(5, '0'),
                Status__c = status,
                Priority__c = priority,
                Provider__c = 'OpenAI',
                Processing_Duration_Ms__c = status == 'Completed' ? 1000 + (i * 100) : null,
                Error_Message__c = status == 'Failed' ? 'Test error ' + i : null,
                CreatedDate = baseTime.addDays(-i % 7),
                LastModifiedDate = baseTime.addHours(-i)
            ));
        }
        
        insert statusRecords;
        
        // Create health check records
        List<AI_Provider_Health_Check__c> healthChecks = new List<AI_Provider_Health_Check__c>();
        
        for (Integer i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
            healthChecks.add(new AI_Provider_Health_Check__c(
                Provider_Name__c = 'OpenAI',
                Status__c = i < 8 ? 'Healthy' : 'Degraded',
                Message__c = 'Test health check',
                Response_Time_Ms__c = 100 + (i * 10),
                Check_Time__c = baseTime.addHours(-i)
            ));
        }
        
        healthChecks.add(new AI_Provider_Health_Check__c(
            Provider_Name__c = 'Anthropic',
            Status__c = 'Healthy',
            Message__c = 'Test health check',
            Response_Time_Ms__c = 200,
            Check_Time__c = baseTime
        ));
        
        insert healthChecks;
        
        // Create test configuration overrides
        List<AI_Config_Override__c> configOverrides = new List<AI_Config_Override__c>();
        configOverrides.add(new AI_Config_Override__c(
            Setting_Name__c = 'Max_Batch_Size',
            Setting_Value__c = '50',
            Is_Active__c = true
        ));
        
        insert configOverrides;
        
        // Create test user with permission
        User testUser = new User(
            ProfileId = [SELECT Id FROM Profile WHERE Name = 'Standard User' LIMIT 1].Id,
            LastName = 'Test',
            Email = 'test@example.com',
            Username = 'test@example.com.routelogic',
            CompanyName = 'TEST',
            Title = 'Test User',
            Alias = 'test',
            TimeZoneSidKey = 'America/Los_Angeles',
            EmailEncodingKey = 'UTF-8',
            LanguageLocaleKey = 'en_US',
            LocaleSidKey = 'en_US'
        );
        insert testUser;
        
        // Create permission set if it doesn't exist
        PermissionSet ps;
        List<PermissionSet> existingPS = [
            SELECT Id FROM PermissionSet 
            WHERE Name = 'AI_Configuration_Manager' 
            LIMIT 1
        ];
        
        if (existingPS.isEmpty()) {
            ps = new PermissionSet(
                Name = 'AI_Configuration_Manager',
                Label = 'AI Configuration Manager'
            );
            insert ps;
        } else {
            ps = existingPS[0];
        }
        
        // Assign permission
        insert new PermissionSetAssignment(
            AssigneeId = testUser.Id,
            PermissionSetId = ps.Id
        );
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testGetSystemDiagnostics_Success() {
        User testUser = [SELECT Id FROM User WHERE Username = 'test@example.com.routelogic' LIMIT 1];
        
        System.runAs(testUser) {
            Test.startTest();
            AISystemMonitoringService.SystemDiagnostics diagnostics = 
                AISystemMonitoringService.getSystemDiagnostics();
            Test.stopTest();
            
            // Verify diagnostics data
            System.assertNotEquals(null, diagnostics, 'Diagnostics should not be null');
            System.assertNotEquals(null, diagnostics.queueMetrics, 'Queue metrics should not be null');
            System.assertNotEquals(null, diagnostics.providerHealth, 'Provider health should not be null');
            System.assertNotEquals(null, diagnostics.performanceMetrics, 'Performance metrics should not be null');
            System.assertNotEquals(null, diagnostics.configurationStatus, 'Configuration status should not be null');
            System.assertNotEquals(null, diagnostics.systemLimits, 'System limits should not be null');
            System.assertNotEquals(null, diagnostics.overallHealth, 'Overall health should not be null');
            
            // Verify queue metrics
            System.assertEquals(5, diagnostics.queueMetrics.pendingCount, 'Should have 5 pending');
            System.assertEquals(3, diagnostics.queueMetrics.processingCount, 'Should have 3 processing');
            System.assertEquals(5, diagnostics.queueMetrics.failedCount, 'Should have 5 failed');
            System.assertEquals(2, diagnostics.queueMetrics.highPriorityPending, 'Should have 2 high priority pending');
        }
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testGetSystemDiagnostics_NoPermission() {
        // Create user without permission
        User unprivilegedUser = new User(
            ProfileId = [SELECT Id FROM Profile WHERE Name = 'Standard User' LIMIT 1].Id,
            LastName = 'NoAccess',
            Email = 'noaccess@example.com',
            Username = 'noaccess@example.com.routelogic',
            CompanyName = 'TEST',
            Title = 'No Access User',
            Alias = 'noac',
            TimeZoneSidKey = 'America/Los_Angeles',
            EmailEncodingKey = 'UTF-8',
            LanguageLocaleKey = 'en_US',
            LocaleSidKey = 'en_US'
        );
        insert unprivilegedUser;
        
        System.runAs(unprivilegedUser) {
            Test.startTest();
            AISystemMonitoringService.SystemDiagnostics diagnostics = 
                AISystemMonitoringService.getSystemDiagnostics();
            Test.stopTest();
            
            // Should return diagnostics with error
            System.assertNotEquals(null, diagnostics, 'Diagnostics should not be null');
            System.assertNotEquals(null, diagnostics.errorMessage, 'Should have error message');
            System.assert(diagnostics.errorMessage.contains('permission'), 'Error should mention permission');
        }
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testQueueMetrics() {
        User testUser = [SELECT Id FROM User WHERE Username = 'test@example.com.routelogic' LIMIT 1];
        
        System.runAs(testUser) {
            // Create an old pending record
            AI_Processing_Status__c oldPending = new AI_Processing_Status__c(
                Case__c = 'OLD-00001',
                Status__c = 'Pending',
                Priority__c = 'Normal',
                Provider__c = 'OpenAI',
                CreatedDate = DateTime.now().addHours(-3)
            );
            insert oldPending;
            
            Test.startTest();
            AISystemMonitoringService.SystemDiagnostics diagnostics = 
                AISystemMonitoringService.getSystemDiagnostics();
            Test.stopTest();
            
            // Verify old pending age is detected
            System.assert(diagnostics.queueMetrics.oldestPendingAge > 0, 'Should have oldest pending age');
            System.assert(diagnostics.queueMetrics.averageProcessingTime > 0, 'Should have average processing time');
        }
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testProviderHealthSummary() {
        User testUser = [SELECT Id FROM User WHERE Username = 'test@example.com.routelogic' LIMIT 1];
        
        System.runAs(testUser) {
            Test.startTest();
            AISystemMonitoringService.SystemDiagnostics diagnostics = 
                AISystemMonitoringService.getSystemDiagnostics();
            Test.stopTest();
            
            // Verify provider health data
            System.assert(!diagnostics.providerHealth.isEmpty(), 'Should have provider health data');
            
            AISystemMonitoringService.ProviderHealthSummary openAIHealth = 
                diagnostics.providerHealth.get('OpenAI');
            
            if (openAIHealth != null) {
                System.assertNotEquals(null, openAIHealth.status, 'Should have status');
                System.assertNotEquals(null, openAIHealth.lastCheckTime, 'Should have last check time');
                System.assert(openAIHealth.uptimePercentage >= 0, 'Should have uptime percentage');
            }
        }
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testPerformanceMetrics() {
        User testUser = [SELECT Id FROM User WHERE Username = 'test@example.com.routelogic' LIMIT 1];
        
        System.runAs(testUser) {
            Test.startTest();
            AISystemMonitoringService.SystemDiagnostics diagnostics = 
                AISystemMonitoringService.getSystemDiagnostics();
            Test.stopTest();
            
            // Verify performance metrics
            AISystemMonitoringService.PerformanceMetrics perfMetrics = diagnostics.performanceMetrics;
            
            System.assert(perfMetrics.successRate >= 0 && perfMetrics.successRate <= 100, 
                'Success rate should be between 0 and 100');
            System.assert(perfMetrics.throughputPerHour >= 0, 'Throughput should be non-negative');
            System.assertNotEquals(null, perfMetrics.averageResponseTimeByProvider, 
                'Should have response time map');
        }
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testConfigurationStatus() {
        User testUser = [SELECT Id FROM User WHERE Username = 'test@example.com.routelogic' LIMIT 1];
        
        System.runAs(testUser) {
            Test.startTest();
            AISystemMonitoringService.SystemDiagnostics diagnostics = 
                AISystemMonitoringService.getSystemDiagnostics();
            Test.stopTest();
            
            // Verify configuration status
            AISystemMonitoringService.ConfigurationStatus configStatus = diagnostics.configurationStatus;
            
            System.assertNotEquals(null, configStatus.isValid, 'Should have valid flag');
            System.assert(configStatus.errorCount >= 0, 'Error count should be non-negative');
            System.assert(configStatus.warningCount >= 0, 'Warning count should be non-negative');
            System.assertNotEquals(null, configStatus.lastValidated, 'Should have last validated time');
        }
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testSystemLimits() {
        User testUser = [SELECT Id FROM User WHERE Username = 'test@example.com.routelogic' LIMIT 1];
        
        System.runAs(testUser) {
            Test.startTest();
            AISystemMonitoringService.SystemDiagnostics diagnostics = 
                AISystemMonitoringService.getSystemDiagnostics();
            Test.stopTest();
            
            // Verify system limits
            AISystemMonitoringService.SystemLimits limits = diagnostics.systemLimits;
            
            System.assert(limits.apiCallsUsed >= 0, 'API calls used should be non-negative');
            System.assert(limits.apiCallsLimit > 0, 'API calls limit should be positive');
            System.assert(limits.apiCallsPercentage >= 0 && limits.apiCallsPercentage <= 100, 
                'API percentage should be between 0 and 100');
            
            System.assert(limits.storageUsedMB >= 0, 'Storage used should be non-negative');
            System.assert(limits.storageLimitMB > 0, 'Storage limit should be positive');
            
            System.assert(limits.platformEventsUsed >= 0, 'Platform events used should be non-negative');
            System.assert(limits.platformEventsLimit > 0, 'Platform events limit should be positive');
        }
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testRecentErrors() {
        User testUser = [SELECT Id FROM User WHERE Username = 'test@example.com.routelogic' LIMIT 1];
        
        System.runAs(testUser) {
            Test.startTest();
            AISystemMonitoringService.SystemDiagnostics diagnostics = 
                AISystemMonitoringService.getSystemDiagnostics();
            Test.stopTest();
            
            // Verify recent errors
            System.assertNotEquals(null, diagnostics.recentErrors, 'Should have recent errors list');
            System.assert(diagnostics.recentErrors.size() > 0, 'Should have some errors from test data');
            
            for (AISystemMonitoringService.ErrorEvent error : diagnostics.recentErrors) {
                System.assertNotEquals(null, error.timestamp, 'Error should have timestamp');
                System.assertNotEquals(null, error.errorType, 'Error should have type');
                System.assertNotEquals(null, error.message, 'Error should have message');
            }
        }
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testOverallHealthCalculation() {
        User testUser = [SELECT Id FROM User WHERE Username = 'test@example.com.routelogic' LIMIT 1];
        
        System.runAs(testUser) {
            Test.startTest();
            AISystemMonitoringService.SystemDiagnostics diagnostics = 
                AISystemMonitoringService.getSystemDiagnostics();
            Test.stopTest();
            
            // Verify overall health calculation
            System.assert(diagnostics.overallHealth >= 0 && diagnostics.overallHealth <= 100, 
                'Overall health should be between 0 and 100');
            
            // With test data having some failures and issues, health should be less than 100
            System.assert(diagnostics.overallHealth < 100, 
                'Overall health should be less than 100 with test issues');
        }
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testEmptyMetrics() {
        User testUser = [SELECT Id FROM User WHERE Username = 'test@example.com.routelogic' LIMIT 1];
        
        // Delete all test data
        delete [SELECT Id FROM AI_Processing_Status__c];
        delete [SELECT Id FROM AI_Provider_Health_Check__c];
        
        System.runAs(testUser) {
            Test.startTest();
            AISystemMonitoringService.SystemDiagnostics diagnostics = 
                AISystemMonitoringService.getSystemDiagnostics();
            Test.stopTest();
            
            // Should handle empty data gracefully
            System.assertNotEquals(null, diagnostics, 'Diagnostics should not be null');
            System.assertEquals(0, diagnostics.queueMetrics.pendingCount, 'Should have 0 pending');
            System.assertEquals(100.0, diagnostics.performanceMetrics.successRate, 
                'Success rate should default to 100 with no data');
        }
    }
}
```
