## 📄 FILE: force-app/main/default/classes/AgnosticRoutingEngine.cls

```apex
/**
 * @description Agnostic Routing Engine - Core IP for AI chatbot-to-human handoff orchestration
 * @author RouteLogic Team
 * @date 2025-01-21
 * @version 4.0.0
 * 
 * This class contains the core routing intelligence that is completely decoupled from
 * any specific AI provider implementation. It focuses exclusively on making intelligent
 * handoff decisions based on case context enrichment.
 * 
 * v4.0.0 Security Enhancements:
 * - Enhanced Field-Level Security validation
 * - Comprehensive input sanitization
 * - Improved error handling with security context
 * - Multi-object support preparation
 */
public with sharing class AgnosticRoutingEngine {
    
    // Core routing constants
    private static final String HIGH_PRIORITY = 'High';
    private static final String MEDIUM_PRIORITY = 'Medium';
    private static final String LOW_PRIORITY = 'Low';
    
    // Escalation thresholds
    private static final Integer URGENT_RESPONSE_THRESHOLD_HOURS = 2;
    private static final Integer STANDARD_RESPONSE_THRESHOLD_HOURS = 24;
    private static final Integer LOW_RESPONSE_THRESHOLD_HOURS = 72;
    
    /**
     * @description Make routing decision based on enriched case context
     * @param caseId The case ID to route
     * @return RoutingDecision containing routing intelligence
     */
    public static RoutingDecision makeRoutingDecision(Id caseId) {
        if (caseId == null) {
            throw new IllegalArgumentException('Case ID cannot be null');
        }
        
        // Enrich case context
        EnrichedCaseContext context = enrichCaseContext(caseId);
        
        // Apply routing intelligence
        return applyRoutingLogic(context);
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Make bulk routing decisions for multiple cases
     * @param caseIds Set of case IDs to route
     * @return Map of case ID to routing decision
     */
    public static Map<Id, RoutingDecision> makeBulkRoutingDecisions(Set<Id> caseIds) {
        if (caseIds == null || caseIds.isEmpty()) {
            return new Map<Id, RoutingDecision>();
        }
        
        Map<Id, RoutingDecision> decisions = new Map<Id, RoutingDecision>();
        
        // Bulk enrich case contexts
        Map<Id, EnrichedCaseContext> contexts = bulkEnrichCaseContexts(caseIds);
        
        // Apply routing logic to each context
        for (Id caseId : contexts.keySet()) {
            decisions.put(caseId, applyRoutingLogic(contexts.get(caseId)));
        }
        
        return decisions;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Enrich case context with all relevant data for routing decisions
     * @param caseId The case ID to enrich
     * @return EnrichedCaseContext with all routing-relevant data
     */
    private static EnrichedCaseContext enrichCaseContext(Id caseId) {
        // Validate input
        if (caseId == null) {
            throw new IllegalArgumentException('Case ID cannot be null');
        }
        
        // Validate field-level security for Case object
        Set<String> caseFields = new Set<String>{
            'Id', 'CaseNumber', 'Subject', 'Description', 'Priority', 'Status', 'Origin',
            'Type', 'Reason', 'CreatedDate', 'LastModifiedDate', 'ClosedDate',
            'AccountId', 'ContactId', 'OwnerId', 'ParentId',
            'AI_Sentiment__c', 'AI_Intent__c', 'AI_Processing_Status__c',
            'AI_Last_Analysis__c', 'AI_Suggested_Response__c'
        };
        
        try {
            RouteLogicSecurityUtils.validateFieldAccess('Case', caseFields, RouteLogicSecurityUtils.AccessType.READABLE);
        } catch (RouteLogicSecurityUtils.SecurityException e) {
            throw new SecurityException('Insufficient permissions to access Case fields: ' + e.getMessage());
        }
        
        List<Case> cases = [
            SELECT Id, CaseNumber, Subject, Description, Priority, Status, Origin,
                   Type, Reason, CreatedDate, LastModifiedDate, ClosedDate,
                   AccountId, ContactId, OwnerId, ParentId,
                   Account.Name, Account.Type, Account.Industry, Account.AnnualRevenue,
                   Contact.Name, Contact.Email, Contact.Phone,
                   Owner.Name, Owner.Type,
                   AI_Sentiment__c, AI_Intent__c, AI_Processing_Status__c,
                   AI_Last_Analysis__c, AI_Suggested_Response__c,
                   (SELECT Id, CommentBody, CreatedDate, CreatedBy.Name 
                    FROM CaseComments 
                    ORDER BY CreatedDate DESC 
                    LIMIT 10)
            FROM Case
            WHERE Id = :caseId
            WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED
            LIMIT 1
        ];
        
        if (cases.isEmpty()) {
            throw new NotFoundException('Case not found or not accessible: ' + caseId);
        }
        
        Case c = cases[0];
        EnrichedCaseContext context = new EnrichedCaseContext();
        
        // Basic case data with input sanitization for user-provided fields
        context.caseId = c.Id;
        context.caseNumber = c.CaseNumber;
        context.subject = RouteLogicSecurityUtils.sanitizeInput(c.Subject);
        context.description = RouteLogicSecurityUtils.sanitizeInput(c.Description);
        context.priority = c.Priority;
        context.status = c.Status;
        context.origin = c.Origin;
        context.type = c.Type;
        context.reason = c.Reason;
        context.createdDate = c.CreatedDate;
        context.lastModifiedDate = c.LastModifiedDate;
        context.closedDate = c.ClosedDate;
        
        // Account context with sanitization
        if (c.Account != null) {
            context.accountName = RouteLogicSecurityUtils.sanitizeInput(c.Account.Name);
            context.accountType = c.Account.Type;
            context.accountIndustry = c.Account.Industry;
            context.accountRevenue = c.Account.AnnualRevenue;
        }
        
        // Contact context with sanitization
        if (c.Contact != null) {
            context.contactName = RouteLogicSecurityUtils.sanitizeInput(c.Contact.Name);
            context.contactEmail = RouteLogicSecurityUtils.sanitizeInput(c.Contact.Email);
            context.contactPhone = RouteLogicSecurityUtils.sanitizeInput(c.Contact.Phone);
        }
        
        // Owner context
        if (c.Owner != null) {
            context.ownerName = c.Owner.Name;
            context.ownerType = c.Owner.Type;
        }
        
        // AI analysis context
        context.aiSentiment = c.AI_Sentiment__c;
        context.aiIntent = c.AI_Intent__c;
        context.aiProcessingStatus = c.AI_Processing_Status__c;
        context.aiLastAnalysis = c.AI_Last_Analysis__c;
        context.aiSuggestedResponse = c.AI_Suggested_Response__c;
        
        // Case history context
        context.commentCount = c.CaseComments.size();
        context.recentComments = new List<String>();
        for (CaseComment comment : c.CaseComments) {
            context.recentComments.add(comment.CommentBody);
        }
        
        // Calculate derived metrics
        context.ageInHours = calculateAgeInHours(c.CreatedDate);
        context.timeSinceLastUpdate = calculateTimeSinceLastUpdate(c.LastModifiedDate);
        context.isEscalated = c.ParentId != null;
        context.hasAIAnalysis = c.AI_Last_Analysis__c != null;
        
        return context;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Bulk enrich case contexts for efficient processing
     * @param caseIds Set of case IDs to enrich
     * @return Map of case ID to enriched context
     */
    private static Map<Id, EnrichedCaseContext> bulkEnrichCaseContexts(Set<Id> caseIds) {
        Map<Id, EnrichedCaseContext> contexts = new Map<Id, EnrichedCaseContext>();
        
        List<Case> cases = [
            SELECT Id, CaseNumber, Subject, Description, Priority, Status, Origin,
                   Type, Reason, CreatedDate, LastModifiedDate, ClosedDate,
                   AccountId, ContactId, OwnerId, ParentId,
                   Account.Name, Account.Type, Account.Industry, Account.AnnualRevenue,
                   Contact.Name, Contact.Email, Contact.Phone,
                   Owner.Name, Owner.Type,
                   AI_Sentiment__c, AI_Intent__c, AI_Processing_Status__c,
                   AI_Last_Analysis__c, AI_Suggested_Response__c
            FROM Case
            WHERE Id IN :caseIds
            WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED
        ];
        
        // Get case comments in bulk
        Map<Id, List<CaseComment>> commentsMap = new Map<Id, List<CaseComment>>();
        for (CaseComment comment : [
            SELECT Id, ParentId, CommentBody, CreatedDate, CreatedBy.Name
            FROM CaseComment
            WHERE ParentId IN :caseIds
            WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED
            ORDER BY CreatedDate DESC
        ]) {
            if (!commentsMap.containsKey(comment.ParentId)) {
                commentsMap.put(comment.ParentId, new List<CaseComment>());
            }
            if (commentsMap.get(comment.ParentId).size() < 10) {
                commentsMap.get(comment.ParentId).add(comment);
            }
        }
        
        // Build contexts
        for (Case c : cases) {
            EnrichedCaseContext context = new EnrichedCaseContext();
            
            // Basic case data
            context.caseId = c.Id;
            context.caseNumber = c.CaseNumber;
            context.subject = c.Subject;
            context.description = c.Description;
            context.priority = c.Priority;
            context.status = c.Status;
            context.origin = c.Origin;
            context.type = c.Type;
            context.reason = c.Reason;
            context.createdDate = c.CreatedDate;
            context.lastModifiedDate = c.LastModifiedDate;
            context.closedDate = c.ClosedDate;
            
            // Account context
            if (c.Account != null) {
                context.accountName = c.Account.Name;
                context.accountType = c.Account.Type;
                context.accountIndustry = c.Account.Industry;
                context.accountRevenue = c.Account.AnnualRevenue;
            }
            
            // Contact context
            if (c.Contact != null) {
                context.contactName = c.Contact.Name;
                context.contactEmail = c.Contact.Email;
                context.contactPhone = c.Contact.Phone;
            }
            
            // Owner context
            if (c.Owner != null) {
                context.ownerName = c.Owner.Name;
                context.ownerType = c.Owner.Type;
            }
            
            // AI analysis context
            context.aiSentiment = c.AI_Sentiment__c;
            context.aiIntent = c.AI_Intent__c;
            context.aiProcessingStatus = c.AI_Processing_Status__c;
            context.aiLastAnalysis = c.AI_Last_Analysis__c;
            context.aiSuggestedResponse = c.AI_Suggested_Response__c;
            
            // Case history context
            List<CaseComment> caseComments = commentsMap.get(c.Id);
            if (caseComments != null) {
                context.commentCount = caseComments.size();
                context.recentComments = new List<String>();
                for (CaseComment comment : caseComments) {
                    context.recentComments.add(comment.CommentBody);
                }
            } else {
                context.commentCount = 0;
                context.recentComments = new List<String>();
            }
            
            // Calculate derived metrics
            context.ageInHours = calculateAgeInHours(c.CreatedDate);
            context.timeSinceLastUpdate = calculateTimeSinceLastUpdate(c.LastModifiedDate);
            context.isEscalated = c.ParentId != null;
            context.hasAIAnalysis = c.AI_Last_Analysis__c != null;
            
            contexts.put(c.Id, context);
        }
        
        return contexts;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Apply core routing logic to enriched case context
     * @param context The enriched case context
     * @return RoutingDecision with routing intelligence
     */
    private static RoutingDecision applyRoutingLogic(EnrichedCaseContext context) {
        RoutingDecision decision = new RoutingDecision();
        decision.caseId = context.caseId;
        decision.routingTimestamp = DateTime.now();
        
        // Determine target skill group based on case attributes
        decision.targetSkillGroup = determineTargetSkillGroup(context);
        
        // Calculate suggested priority based on multiple factors
        decision.suggestedPriority = calculateSuggestedPriority(context);
        
        // Determine escalation reason if escalation is needed
        decision.escalationReason = determineEscalationReason(context);
        
        // Generate summary for agent handoff
        decision.summaryForAgent = generateAgentSummary(context);
        
        // Calculate routing confidence score
        decision.confidenceScore = calculateConfidenceScore(context);
        
        // Determine if immediate handoff is required
        decision.requiresImmediateHandoff = requiresImmediateHandoff(context);
        
        return decision;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Determine target skill group based on case context
     * @param context The enriched case context
     * @return Target skill group name
     */
    private static String determineTargetSkillGroup(EnrichedCaseContext context) {
        // Technical issues
        if (isTechnicalIssue(context)) {
            if (context.priority == HIGH_PRIORITY) {
                return 'Technical Support - Tier 2';
            }
            return 'Technical Support - Tier 1';
        }
        
        // Billing and financial issues
        if (isBillingIssue(context)) {
            if (context.accountRevenue != null && context.accountRevenue > 1000000) {
                return 'Enterprise Billing Support';
            }
            return 'Billing Support';
        }
        
        // Sales and account management
        if (isSalesIssue(context)) {
            if (context.accountType == 'Customer - Direct') {
                return 'Account Management';
            }
            return 'Sales Support';
        }
        
        // Escalated or complex cases
        if (context.isEscalated || context.commentCount > 5) {
            return 'Escalation Team';
        }
        
        // High-value accounts
        if (context.accountRevenue != null && context.accountRevenue > 5000000) {
            return 'VIP Support';
        }
        
        // Default to general support
        return 'General Support';
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Calculate suggested priority based on multiple factors
     * @param context The enriched case context
     * @return Suggested priority level
     */
    private static String calculateSuggestedPriority(EnrichedCaseContext context) {
        Integer priorityScore = 0;
        
        // Current priority weight
        if (context.priority == HIGH_PRIORITY) {
            priorityScore += 30;
        } else if (context.priority == MEDIUM_PRIORITY) {
            priorityScore += 15;
        }
        
        // Age factor
        if (context.ageInHours > URGENT_RESPONSE_THRESHOLD_HOURS) {
            priorityScore += 20;
        } else if (context.ageInHours > STANDARD_RESPONSE_THRESHOLD_HOURS) {
            priorityScore += 10;
        }
        
        // Account value factor
        if (context.accountRevenue != null) {
            if (context.accountRevenue > 5000000) {
                priorityScore += 25;
            } else if (context.accountRevenue > 1000000) {
                priorityScore += 15;
            }
        }
        
        // Sentiment factor
        if (context.aiSentiment == 'Negative' || context.aiSentiment == 'Very Negative') {
            priorityScore += 15;
        }
        
        // Escalation factor
        if (context.isEscalated) {
            priorityScore += 20;
        }
        
        // Comment activity factor
        if (context.commentCount > 3) {
            priorityScore += 10;
        }
        
        // Determine priority based on score
        if (priorityScore >= 50) {
            return HIGH_PRIORITY;
        } else if (priorityScore >= 25) {
            return MEDIUM_PRIORITY;
        }
        
        return LOW_PRIORITY;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Determine escalation reason if escalation is needed
     * @param context The enriched case context
     * @return Escalation reason or null if no escalation needed
     */
    private static String determineEscalationReason(EnrichedCaseContext context) {
        List<String> reasons = new List<String>();
        
        // Age-based escalation
        if (context.ageInHours > URGENT_RESPONSE_THRESHOLD_HOURS && context.priority == HIGH_PRIORITY) {
            reasons.add('High priority case exceeding response threshold');
        } else if (context.ageInHours > STANDARD_RESPONSE_THRESHOLD_HOURS && context.priority == MEDIUM_PRIORITY) {
            reasons.add('Medium priority case exceeding response threshold');
        } else if (context.ageInHours > LOW_RESPONSE_THRESHOLD_HOURS) {
            reasons.add('Case exceeding maximum response threshold');
        }
        
        // Sentiment-based escalation
        if (context.aiSentiment == 'Very Negative') {
            reasons.add('Very negative customer sentiment detected');
        }
        
        // Account value escalation
        if (context.accountRevenue != null && context.accountRevenue > 5000000) {
            reasons.add('High-value account requires priority attention');
        }
        
        // Activity-based escalation
        if (context.commentCount > 5) {
            reasons.add('High activity case requiring specialized attention');
        }
        
        // Technical complexity escalation
        if (isTechnicalIssue(context) && context.commentCount > 2) {
            reasons.add('Complex technical issue requiring advanced support');
        }
        
        return reasons.isEmpty() ? null : String.join(reasons, '; ');
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Generate summary for agent handoff
     * @param context The enriched case context
     * @return Summary text for agent
     */
    private static String generateAgentSummary(EnrichedCaseContext context) {
        List<String> summaryParts = new List<String>();
        
        // Case basics
        summaryParts.add('Case: ' + context.caseNumber + ' - ' + context.subject);
        
        // Customer context
        if (context.accountName != null) {
            summaryParts.add('Account: ' + context.accountName);
            if (context.accountRevenue != null) {
                summaryParts.add('Annual Revenue: $' + String.valueOf(context.accountRevenue));
            }
        }
        
        // AI insights
        if (context.aiSentiment != null) {
            summaryParts.add('Sentiment: ' + context.aiSentiment);
        }
        if (context.aiIntent != null) {
            summaryParts.add('Intent: ' + context.aiIntent);
        }
        
        // Case metrics
        summaryParts.add('Age: ' + context.ageInHours + ' hours');
        summaryParts.add('Comments: ' + context.commentCount);
        
        // Recent activity
        if (!context.recentComments.isEmpty()) {
            summaryParts.add('Latest Comment: ' + 
                (context.recentComments[0].length() > 100 ? 
                 context.recentComments[0].substring(0, 100) + '...' : 
                 context.recentComments[0]));
        }
        
        return String.join(summaryParts, ' | ');
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Calculate routing confidence score
     * @param context The enriched case context
     * @return Confidence score (0-100)
     */
    private static Integer calculateConfidenceScore(EnrichedCaseContext context) {
        Integer confidence = 50; // Base confidence
        
        // AI analysis boosts confidence
        if (context.hasAIAnalysis) {
            confidence += 20;
        }
        
        // Clear intent boosts confidence
        if (context.aiIntent != null && context.aiIntent != 'Unknown') {
            confidence += 15;
        }
        
        // Account data boosts confidence
        if (context.accountName != null) {
            confidence += 10;
        }
        
        // Case history boosts confidence
        if (context.commentCount > 0) {
            confidence += 5;
        }
        
        // Ensure confidence is within bounds
        return Math.min(100, Math.max(0, confidence));
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Determine if immediate handoff is required
     * @param context The enriched case context
     * @return True if immediate handoff is required
     */
    private static Boolean requiresImmediateHandoff(EnrichedCaseContext context) {
        // High priority cases older than threshold
        if (context.priority == HIGH_PRIORITY && context.ageInHours > URGENT_RESPONSE_THRESHOLD_HOURS) {
            return true;
        }
        
        // Very negative sentiment
        if (context.aiSentiment == 'Very Negative') {
            return true;
        }
        
        // High-value accounts with any issue
        if (context.accountRevenue != null && context.accountRevenue > 10000000) {
            return true;
        }
        
        // Already escalated cases
        if (context.isEscalated) {
            return true;
        }
        
        return false;
    }
    
    // Helper methods for case classification
    
    private static Boolean isTechnicalIssue(EnrichedCaseContext context) {
        String subject = context.subject != null ? context.subject.toLowerCase() : '';
        String description = context.description != null ? context.description.toLowerCase() : '';
        String type = context.type != null ? context.type.toLowerCase() : '';
        
        Set<String> technicalKeywords = new Set<String>{
            'error', 'bug', 'crash', 'performance', 'slow', 'timeout', 'integration',
            'api', 'sync', 'connection', 'login', 'authentication', 'technical'
        };
        
        for (String keyword : technicalKeywords) {
            if (subject.contains(keyword) || description.contains(keyword) || type.contains(keyword)) {
                return true;
            }
        }
        
        return context.type == 'Technical Issue' || context.reason == 'Performance';
    }
    
    private static Boolean isBillingIssue(EnrichedCaseContext context) {
        String subject = context.subject != null ? context.subject.toLowerCase() : '';
        String description = context.description != null ? context.description.toLowerCase() : '';
        String type = context.type != null ? context.type.toLowerCase() : '';
        
        Set<String> billingKeywords = new Set<String>{
            'billing', 'invoice', 'payment', 'charge', 'refund', 'credit',
            'subscription', 'renewal', 'pricing', 'cost'
        };
        
        for (String keyword : billingKeywords) {
            if (subject.contains(keyword) || description.contains(keyword) || type.contains(keyword)) {
                return true;
            }
        }
        
        return context.type == 'Billing' || context.reason == 'Billing Problem';
    }
    
    private static Boolean isSalesIssue(EnrichedCaseContext context) {
        String subject = context.subject != null ? context.subject.toLowerCase() : '';
        String description = context.description != null ? context.description.toLowerCase() : '';
        String type = context.type != null ? context.type.toLowerCase() : '';
        
        Set<String> salesKeywords = new Set<String>{
            'sales', 'quote', 'proposal', 'contract', 'upgrade', 'downgrade',
            'feature request', 'demo', 'trial', 'purchase'
        };
        
        for (String keyword : salesKeywords) {
            if (subject.contains(keyword) || description.contains(keyword) || type.contains(keyword)) {
                return true;
            }
        }
        
        return context.type == 'Feature Request' || context.reason == 'New product information';
    }
    
    // Utility methods
    
    private static Integer calculateAgeInHours(DateTime createdDate) {
        if (createdDate == null) {
            return 0;
        }
        
        Long diffInMs = DateTime.now().getTime() - createdDate.getTime();
        return Integer.valueOf(diffInMs / (1000 * 60 * 60));
    }
    
    private static Integer calculateTimeSinceLastUpdate(DateTime lastModifiedDate) {
        if (lastModifiedDate == null) {
            return 0;
        }
        
        Long diffInMs = DateTime.now().getTime() - lastModifiedDate.getTime();
        return Integer.valueOf(diffInMs / (1000 * 60 * 60));
    }
    
    // Inner classes
    
    /**
     * @description Enriched case context containing all data needed for routing decisions
     */
    public class EnrichedCaseContext {
        public Id caseId;
        public String caseNumber;
        public String subject;
        public String description;
        public String priority;
        public String status;
        public String origin;
        public String type;
        public String reason;
        public DateTime createdDate;
        public DateTime lastModifiedDate;
        public DateTime closedDate;
        
        // Account context
        public String accountName;
        public String accountType;
        public String accountIndustry;
        public Decimal accountRevenue;
        
        // Contact context
        public String contactName;
        public String contactEmail;
        public String contactPhone;
        
        // Owner context
        public String ownerName;
        public String ownerType;
        
        // AI analysis context
        public String aiSentiment;
        public String aiIntent;
        public String aiProcessingStatus;
        public DateTime aiLastAnalysis;
        public String aiSuggestedResponse;
        
        // Case history context
        public Integer commentCount;
        public List<String> recentComments;
        
        // Derived metrics
        public Integer ageInHours;
        public Integer timeSinceLastUpdate;
        public Boolean isEscalated;
        public Boolean hasAIAnalysis;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Routing decision containing all routing intelligence
     */
    public class RoutingDecision {
        public Id caseId;
        public String targetSkillGroup;
        public String suggestedPriority;
        public String escalationReason;
        public String summaryForAgent;
        public Integer confidenceScore;
        public Boolean requiresImmediateHandoff;
        public DateTime routingTimestamp;
    }
    
    // Custom exceptions
    public class NotFoundException extends Exception {}
    public class SecurityException extends Exception {}
}
```

## 📄 FILE: force-app/main/default/classes/AuditService.cls

```apex
/**
 * @description Comprehensive audit logging service for security and compliance events
 * @author RouteLogic Team
 * @date 2025-01-18
 */
public with sharing class AuditService {
    
    // Audit event types
    public static final String EVENT_KEY_ROTATION = 'KEY_ROTATION';
    public static final String EVENT_EMERGENCY_KEY_ROTATION = 'EMERGENCY_KEY_ROTATION';
    public static final String EVENT_KEY_CLEANUP = 'KEY_CLEANUP';
    public static final String EVENT_ACCESS_VIOLATION = 'ACCESS_VIOLATION';
    public static final String EVENT_DATA_EXPORT = 'DATA_EXPORT';
    public static final String EVENT_PERMISSION_CHANGE = 'PERMISSION_CHANGE';
    public static final String EVENT_FAILED_LOGIN = 'FAILED_LOGIN';
    public static final String EVENT_API_ACCESS = 'API_ACCESS';
    
    /**
     * @description Log a security event with immutable audit trail
     * @param eventType Type of security event
     * @param description Event description
     * @param status Event status (Success, Failed, Warning)
     */
    public static void logSecurityEvent(String eventType, String description, String status) {
        logAuditEvent(eventType, description, status, 'SECURITY', null);
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Log a compliance event
     * @param eventType Type of compliance event
     * @param description Event description
     * @param status Event status
     * @param metadata Additional metadata as JSON
     */
    public static void logComplianceEvent(String eventType, String description, String status, String metadata) {
        logAuditEvent(eventType, description, status, 'COMPLIANCE', metadata);
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Log an operational event
     * @param eventType Type of operational event
     * @param description Event description
     * @param status Event status
     */
    public static void logOperationalEvent(String eventType, String description, String status) {
        logAuditEvent(eventType, description, status, 'OPERATIONAL', null);
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Core audit logging method
     */
    private static void logAuditEvent(String eventType, String description, String status, String category, String metadata) {
        try {
            // Create audit event
            AI_Audit_Event__c auditEvent = new AI_Audit_Event__c(
                Event_Type__c = eventType,
                Category__c = category,
                Description__c = truncateString(description, 255),
                Status__c = status,
                User_Id__c = UserInfo.getUserId(),
                User_Name__c = UserInfo.getUserName(),
                Profile_Name__c = getProfileName(),
                Session_Id__c = UserInfo.getSessionId(),
                Source_IP__c = getAnonymizedIP(Auth.SessionManagement.getCurrentSession().get('SourceIp')),
                Timestamp__c = DateTime.now(),
                Organization_Id__c = UserInfo.getOrganizationId()
            );
            
            // Add metadata if provided
            if (String.isNotBlank(metadata)) {
                auditEvent.Metadata__c = truncateString(metadata, 32768);
            }
            
            // Add security hash for immutability
            auditEvent.Security_Hash__c = generateSecurityHash(auditEvent);
            
            // Apply FLS before insert
            List<AI_Audit_Event__c> eventsToInsert = new List<AI_Audit_Event__c>{auditEvent};
            eventsToInsert = SecurityUtils.stripInaccessibleRecords(
                AccessType.CREATABLE,
                eventsToInsert
            );
            
            // Insert with system mode to ensure logging always works
            Database.SaveResult result = Database.insert(eventsToInsert[0], false);
            
            if (!result.isSuccess()) {
                // Log to platform events if database insert fails
                publishAuditEvent(eventType, description, status, category);
            }
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            // Final fallback to platform events
            publishAuditEvent(eventType, description, status, category);
            System.debug(LoggingLevel.ERROR, 'Audit logging failed: ' + e.getMessage());
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Generate security hash for audit immutability
     */
    private static String generateSecurityHash(AI_Audit_Event__c auditEvent) {
        String dataToHash = auditEvent.Event_Type__c + '|' +
                           auditEvent.Description__c + '|' +
                           auditEvent.User_Id__c + '|' +
                           auditEvent.Timestamp__c.getTime() + '|' +
                           auditEvent.Organization_Id__c;
        
        Blob hash = Crypto.generateDigest('SHA-512', Blob.valueOf(dataToHash));
        return EncodingUtil.base64Encode(hash);
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Publish audit event as platform event for guaranteed delivery
     */
    private static void publishAuditEvent(String eventType, String description, String status, String category) {
        AI_Audit_Platform_Event__e platformEvent = new AI_Audit_Platform_Event__e(
            Event_Type__c = eventType,
            Category__c = category,
            Description__c = truncateString(description, 255),
            Status__c = status,
            User_Id__c = UserInfo.getUserId(),
            Timestamp__c = DateTime.now()
        );
        
        EventBus.publish(platformEvent);
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Get current user's profile name
     */
    private static String getProfileName() {
        try {
            return [SELECT Name FROM Profile WHERE Id = :UserInfo.getProfileId() LIMIT 1].Name;
        } catch (Exception e) {
            return 'Unknown';
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Verify audit trail integrity
     * @param auditEventId The audit event to verify
     * @return Boolean indicating if the audit record is valid
     */
    public static Boolean verifyAuditIntegrity(Id auditEventId) {
        try {
            AI_Audit_Event__c auditEvent = [
                SELECT Event_Type__c, Description__c, User_Id__c, Timestamp__c, 
                       Organization_Id__c, Security_Hash__c
                FROM AI_Audit_Event__c
                WHERE Id = :auditEventId
                LIMIT 1
            ];
            
            // Regenerate hash
            String dataToHash = auditEvent.Event_Type__c + '|' +
                               auditEvent.Description__c + '|' +
                               auditEvent.User_Id__c + '|' +
                               auditEvent.Timestamp__c.getTime() + '|' +
                               auditEvent.Organization_Id__c;
            
            Blob hash = Crypto.generateDigest('SHA-512', Blob.valueOf(dataToHash));
            String expectedHash = EncodingUtil.base64Encode(hash);
            
            return auditEvent.Security_Hash__c == expectedHash;
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            return false;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Export audit logs for compliance reporting
     * @param startDate Start date for export
     * @param endDate End date for export
     * @param category Category filter (optional)
     * @return JSON string of audit events
     */
    public static String exportAuditLogs(DateTime startDate, DateTime endDate, String category) {
        // Check permissions
        if (!FeatureManagement.checkPermission('AI_Audit_Export')) {
            throw new InsufficientPrivilegesException('Audit export permission required');
        }
        
        // Log the export event itself
        logComplianceEvent(
            EVENT_DATA_EXPORT,
            'Audit log export requested for period: ' + startDate.format() + ' to ' + endDate.format(),
            'Initiated',
            JSON.serialize(new Map<String, Object>{
                'startDate' => startDate,
                'endDate' => endDate,
                'category' => category,
                'exportedBy' => UserInfo.getUserId()
            })
        );
        
        // Build query
        String query = 'SELECT Event_Type__c, Category__c, Description__c, Status__c, ' +
                      'User_Id__c, User_Name__c, Profile_Name__c, Timestamp__c, ' +
                      'Security_Hash__c, Metadata__c ' +
                      'FROM AI_Audit_Event__c ' +
                      'WHERE Timestamp__c >= :startDate AND Timestamp__c <= :endDate';
        
        if (String.isNotBlank(category)) {
            query += ' AND Category__c = :category';
        }
        
        query += ' ORDER BY Timestamp__c DESC LIMIT 10000';
        
        List<AI_Audit_Event__c> auditEvents = Database.query(query);
        
        // Verify integrity of each record
        List<Map<String, Object>> exportData = new List<Map<String, Object>>();
        for (AI_Audit_Event__c event : auditEvents) {
            Map<String, Object> eventData = new Map<String, Object>{
                'eventType' => event.Event_Type__c,
                'category' => event.Category__c,
                'description' => event.Description__c,
                'status' => event.Status__c,
                'userId' => event.User_Id__c,
                'userName' => event.User_Name__c,
                'profileName' => event.Profile_Name__c,
                'timestamp' => event.Timestamp__c,
                'integrityValid' => verifyAuditIntegrity(event.Id)
            };
            
            if (String.isNotBlank(event.Metadata__c)) {
                eventData.put('metadata', event.Metadata__c);
            }
            
            exportData.add(eventData);
        }
        
        return JSON.serialize(exportData);
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Truncate string to specified length
     */
    private static String truncateString(String value, Integer maxLength) {
        if (String.isBlank(value)) {
            return null;
        }
        
        if (value.length() <= maxLength) {
            return value;
        }
        
        return value.substring(0, maxLength - 3) + '...';
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Anonymize IP address if configured
     * @param ipAddress The original IP address
     * @return Anonymized IP address or original if anonymization disabled
     */
    private static String getAnonymizedIP(String ipAddress) {
        if (String.isBlank(ipAddress)) {
            return null;
        }
        
        // Check if anonymization is enabled
        if (!ConfigManager.isIPAnonymizationEnabled()) {
            return ipAddress;
        }
        
        // Anonymize IPv4 addresses (e.g., 192.168.1.100 -> 192.168.1.0)
        if (ipAddress.contains('.')) {
            List<String> octets = ipAddress.split('\\.');
            if (octets.size() == 4) {
                octets[3] = '0';
                return String.join(octets, '.');
            }
        }
        // Anonymize IPv6 addresses (zero out last 4 segments)
        else if (ipAddress.contains(':')) {
            List<String> segments = ipAddress.split(':');
            if (segments.size() >= 4) {
                Integer segmentsToAnonymize = Math.min(4, segments.size());
                for (Integer i = segments.size() - segmentsToAnonymize; i < segments.size(); i++) {
                    segments[i] = '0';
                }
                return String.join(segments, ':');
            }
        }
        
        // If format is unrecognized, return masked IP
        return 'ANONYMIZED';
    }
}
```

```apex
/**
 * @description Test class for AuditService with comprehensive coverage
 * @author RouteLogic Team
 * @date 2025-01-18
 */
@isTest
private class AuditServiceTest {
    
    @testSetup
    static void setup() {
        // Create test custom settings
        AI_Security_Config__mdt testConfig = new AI_Security_Config__mdt();
        // Note: In real implementation, use Custom Metadata deployment
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testLogSecurityEvent() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Test successful security event logging
        AuditService.logSecurityEvent(
            AuditService.EVENT_KEY_ROTATION,
            'Test key rotation event',
            'Success'
        );
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify audit event was created
        List<AI_Audit_Event__c> auditEvents = [
            SELECT Event_Type__c, Category__c, Description__c, Status__c, Security_Hash__c
            FROM AI_Audit_Event__c
            WHERE Event_Type__c = :AuditService.EVENT_KEY_ROTATION
        ];
        
        System.assertEquals(1, auditEvents.size(), 'Should create one audit event');
        System.assertEquals('SECURITY', auditEvents[0].Category__c, 'Should be security category');
        System.assertEquals('Success', auditEvents[0].Status__c, 'Should have success status');
        System.assertNotEquals(null, auditEvents[0].Security_Hash__c, 'Should have security hash');
    }

        });

        AuditService.logComplianceEvent(
            'TEST_COMPLIANCE',
            'Test compliance event',
            'Success',
            metadata
        );
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        List<AI_Audit_Event__c> auditEvents = [
            SELECT Event_Type__c, Category__c, Metadata__c
            FROM AI_Audit_Event__c
            WHERE Event_Type__c = 'TEST_COMPLIANCE'
        ];

        System.assertNotEquals(null, auditEvents[0].Metadata__c, 'Should have metadata');
    }
    
    @isTest

            'System health check completed',
            'Success'
        );
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        List<AI_Audit_Event__c> auditEvents = [
            SELECT Event_Type__c, Category__c

            WHERE Event_Type__c = 'SYSTEM_HEALTH_CHECK'
        ];

    }
    
    @isTest

        ];
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Test integrity verification
        Boolean isValid = AuditService.verifyAuditIntegrity(auditEvent.Id);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        System.assertEquals(true, isValid, 'Audit integrity should be valid');
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testVerifyAuditIntegrityTampered() {
        // Create an audit event
        AuditService.logSecurityEvent(
            AuditService.EVENT_ACCESS_VIOLATION,
            'Test access violation',
            'Failed'
        );
        
        AI_Audit_Event__c auditEvent = [
            SELECT Id, Security_Hash__c FROM AI_Audit_Event__c LIMIT 1
        ];
        
        // Tamper with the hash
        auditEvent.Security_Hash__c = 'TAMPERED_HASH';
        update auditEvent;
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        Boolean isValid = AuditService.verifyAuditIntegrity(auditEvent.Id);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        System.assertEquals(false, isValid, 'Tampered audit should be invalid');
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testExportAuditLogs() {

                'Success'

                'SECURITY'

    @isTest

                System.assert(true, 'Expected exception thrown');
            }
            
            Test.stopTest();
        }
    }
    
    @isTest

        // Force database error by making field too long
        String longDescription = 'A'.repeat(300); // Exceeds 255 char limit
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        // This should fall back to platform event
        AuditService.logSecurityEvent(
            'TEST_FALLBACK',

            'Failed'
        );
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify no database record created

            WHERE Event_Type__c = 'TEST_FALLBACK'
        ];

        // Platform event verification would require event subscriber
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testLongStringTruncation() {
        String longString = 'A'.repeat(300);
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        AuditService.logSecurityEvent(
            'TEST_TRUNCATION',
            longString,
            'Success'
        );
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        AI_Audit_Event__c auditEvent = [
            SELECT Description__c
            FROM AI_Audit_Event__c
            WHERE Event_Type__c = 'TEST_TRUNCATION'
            LIMIT 1
        ];
        
        System.assertEquals(255, auditEvent.Description__c.length(), 'Should truncate to 255 chars');
        System.assert(auditEvent.Description__c.endsWith('...'), 'Should end with ellipsis');
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testBulkAuditLogging() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Log multiple events
        for (Integer i = 0; i < 200; i++) {
            AuditService.logOperationalEvent(
                'BULK_TEST_' + i,
                'Bulk test event ' + i,
                'Success'
            );
        }
        
        Test.stopTest();

            SELECT COUNT()
            FROM AI_Audit_Event__c
            WHERE Event_Type__c LIKE 'BULK_TEST_%'
        ];
        
        System.assertEquals(200, eventCount, 'Should create all 200 audit events');
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testIPAnonymization() {
        // Note: This test validates the IP anonymization logic
        // In actual execution, we cannot directly test private methods
        // So we'll test the full audit logging with IP anonymization enabled
        
        Test.startTest();

            AuditService.EVENT_API_ACCESS,

        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify audit event was created

            FROM AI_Audit_Event__c
            WHERE Event_Type__c = :AuditService.EVENT_API_ACCESS
        ];
        
        System.assertEquals(1, auditEvents.size(), 'Should create one audit event');
        // The actual IP value depends on the current session and config
        // In unit tests, Auth.SessionManagement.getCurrentSession() may return null
        // So we just verify the field exists
        System.assertNotEquals(null, auditEvents[0], 'Audit event should exist');
    }
}
```

## 📄 FILE: force-app/main/default/classes/BulkProcessingOptimizer.cls

```apex
/**
 * @description Performance optimizer for high-volume bulk processing (10,000+ cases/hour)
 * @author RouteLogic Team
 * @date 2025-01-18
 */
public with sharing class BulkProcessingOptimizer {
    
    // Optimized configuration for 10K+ cases/hour
    // Using centralized constants to avoid naming collisions
    
    /**
     * @description Optimize bulk processing for high volume
     * @param caseIds List of case IDs to process
     * @return Job IDs of enqueued jobs
     */
    public static List<Id> optimizeBulkProcessing(List<Id> caseIds) {
        List<Id> jobIds = new List<Id>();
        
        try {
            // Validate volume
            if (caseIds.size() > 10000) {
                // Use platform events for extreme volumes
                return processThroughPlatformEvents(caseIds);
            }
            
            // Check current job queue capacity
            Integer currentJobs = getCurrentQueuedJobs();
            Integer availableSlots = MAX_CONCURRENT_JOBS - currentJobs;
            
            if (availableSlots <= 0) {
                // Queue to staging for later processing
                queueToStagingTable(caseIds);
                return jobIds;
            }
            
            // Partition cases by priority and provider
            Map<String, List<Id>> partitionedCases = partitionCasesByOptimalCriteria(caseIds);
            
            // Process each partition
            Integer jobsQueued = 0;
            for (String partitionKey : partitionedCases.keySet()) {
                if (jobsQueued >= availableSlots) {
                    // Queue remaining to staging
                    queueToStagingTable(partitionedCases.get(partitionKey));
                    continue;
                }
                
                List<Id> partitionCaseIds = partitionedCases.get(partitionKey);
                
                // Create optimized chunks
                List<List<Id>> chunks = createOptimalChunks(partitionCaseIds, Constants.OPTIMAL_BATCH_SIZE);
                
                for (List<Id> chunk : chunks) {
                    if (jobsQueued < availableSlots) {
                        Id jobId = enqueueBulkProcessingJob(chunk, partitionKey);
                        if (jobId != null) {
                            jobIds.add(jobId);
                            jobsQueued++;
                        }
                    } else {
                        queueToStagingTable(chunk);
                    }
                }
            }
            
            // Log optimization metrics
            logOptimizationMetrics(caseIds.size(), jobIds.size());
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            ErrorLogService.logError('BulkProcessingOptimizer.optimizeBulkProcessing', e, 
                'Failed to optimize processing for ' + caseIds.size() + ' cases');
            throw new OptimizationException('Bulk processing optimization failed: ' + e.getMessage());
        }
        
        return jobIds;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Process extreme volumes through platform events
     */
    private static List<Id> processThroughPlatformEvents(List<Id> caseIds) {
        List<Id> eventIds = new List<Id>();
        List<AI_Case_Request__e> events = new List<AI_Case_Request__e>();
        
        // Query all cases at once to avoid SOQL-in-loop
        Map<Id, Case> allCases = new Map<Id, Case>([
            SELECT Id, Priority, AI_Processing_Status__c, AI_Last_Analysis__c
            FROM Case
            WHERE Id IN :caseIds
            WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED
            LIMIT 10000  // Safety limit
        ]);
        
        // Pre-serialize metadata once for efficiency
        String eventMetadata = JSON.serialize(new Map<String, Object>{
            'bulkOptimized' => true,
            'timestamp' => DateTime.now()
        });
        
        // Process cases and create events
        for (Case c : allCases.values()) {
            AI_Case_Request__e event = new AI_Case_Request__e(
                CaseId__c = c.Id,
                Priority__c = c.Priority,
                AI_Provider__c = 'Auto',
                Request_Type__c = 'Bulk',
                Status__c = 'Pending',
                Metadata__c = eventMetadata
            );
            events.add(event);
            
            // Publish in batches to avoid platform event limits
            if (events.size() >= Constants.PLATFORM_EVENT_BATCH_SIZE) {
                List<Database.SaveResult> results = EventBus.publish(events);
                eventIds.addAll(processPublishResults(results, events));
                events.clear();
            }
        }
        
        // Publish remaining events
        if (!events.isEmpty()) {
            List<Database.SaveResult> results = EventBus.publish(events);
            eventIds.addAll(processPublishResults(results, events));
        }
        
        return eventIds;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Process publish results and return event IDs
     */
    private static List<Id> processPublishResults(List<Database.SaveResult> results, List<AI_Case_Request__e> events) {
        List<Id> eventIds = new List<Id>();
        for (Integer i = 0; i < results.size(); i++) {
            if (results[i].isSuccess()) {
                eventIds.add(results[i].getId());
            } else {
                // Log publish failures
                System.debug('Failed to publish event for case: ' + events[i].CaseId__c);
                for (Database.Error err : results[i].getErrors()) {
                    System.debug('Error: ' + err.getMessage());
                }
            }
        }
        return eventIds;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Partition cases by optimal criteria for parallel processing
     */
    private static Map<String, List<Id>> partitionCasesByOptimalCriteria(List<Id> caseIds) {
        Map<String, List<Id>> partitions = new Map<String, List<Id>>();
        
        // Query cases with minimal fields to reduce heap usage
        List<Case> cases = [
            SELECT Id, Priority, AI_Processing_Status__c, OwnerId
            FROM Case
            WHERE Id IN :caseIds
            WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED
        ];
        
        for (Case c : cases) {
            // Create partition key based on priority and processing status
            String partitionKey = c.Priority + '_' + 
                (String.isNotBlank(c.AI_Processing_Status__c) ? c.AI_Processing_Status__c : 'New');
            
            if (!partitions.containsKey(partitionKey)) {
                partitions.put(partitionKey, new List<Id>());
            }
            partitions.get(partitionKey).add(c.Id);
        }
        
        return partitions;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Create optimal chunks for processing
     */
    private static List<List<Id>> createOptimalChunks(List<Id> caseIds, Integer chunkSize) {
        List<List<Id>> chunks = new List<List<Id>>();
        List<Id> currentChunk = new List<Id>();
        
        for (Id caseId : caseIds) {
            currentChunk.add(caseId);
            
            if (currentChunk.size() >= chunkSize) {
                chunks.add(currentChunk);
                currentChunk = new List<Id>();
            }
        }
        
        if (!currentChunk.isEmpty()) {
            chunks.add(currentChunk);
        }
        
        return chunks;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Enqueue optimized bulk processing job
     */
    private static Id enqueueBulkProcessingJob(List<Id> caseIds, String partitionKey) {
        try {
            // Create platform events for the cases
            List<AI_Case_Request__e> requests = new List<AI_Case_Request__e>();
            
            for (Id caseId : caseIds) {
                requests.add(new AI_Case_Request__e(
                    CaseId__c = caseId,
                    Priority__c = getPriorityFromPartitionKey(partitionKey),
                    AI_Provider__c = 'Auto',
                    Request_Type__c = 'Bulk',
                    Status__c = 'Pending'
                ));
            }
            
            // Enqueue the processing job
            AIBulkProcessingQueueable job = new AIBulkProcessingQueueable(requests);
            return System.enqueueJob(job);
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            ErrorLogService.logError('BulkProcessingOptimizer.enqueueBulkProcessingJob', e, 
                'Failed to enqueue job for partition: ' + partitionKey);
            return null;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Queue cases to staging table for later processing
     */
    private static void queueToStagingTable(List<Id> caseIds) {
        List<AI_Processing_Queue__c> stagingRecords = new List<AI_Processing_Queue__c>();
        
        for (Id caseId : caseIds) {
            stagingRecords.add(new AI_Processing_Queue__c(
                Case__c = caseId,
                Status__c = 'Pending',
                Priority__c = 'Normal',
                Queued_Date__c = DateTime.now()
            ));
        }
        
        if (!stagingRecords.isEmpty()) {
            insert SecurityUtils.stripInaccessibleRecords(AccessType.CREATABLE, stagingRecords);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Get current number of queued jobs
     */
    private static Integer getCurrentQueuedJobs() {
        return [
            SELECT COUNT()
            FROM AsyncApexJob
            WHERE Status IN ('Holding', 'Queued', 'Processing')
            AND JobType = 'Queueable'
        ];
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Get priority from partition key
     */
    private static String getPriorityFromPartitionKey(String partitionKey) {
        if (partitionKey.startsWith('High')) return 'High';
        if (partitionKey.startsWith('Medium')) return 'Medium';
        return 'Low';
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Log optimization metrics
     */
    private static void logOptimizationMetrics(Integer totalCases, Integer jobsQueued) {
        AI_Optimization_Metrics__c metrics = new AI_Optimization_Metrics__c(
            Total_Cases__c = totalCases,
            Jobs_Queued__c = jobsQueued,
            Optimization_Type__c = 'Bulk Processing',
            Timestamp__c = DateTime.now(),
            Average_Cases_Per_Job__c = jobsQueued > 0 ? (Decimal)totalCases / (Decimal)jobsQueued : 0
        );
        
        insert SecurityUtils.stripInaccessibleRecords(
            AccessType.CREATABLE, 
            new List<AI_Optimization_Metrics__c>{metrics}
        );
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Initialize platform cache for high-volume processing
     */
    public static void initializeHighVolumeCache() {
        Cache.OrgPartition orgPart = Cache.Org.getPartition('routelogic.AIProcessing');
        
        if (orgPart == null) {
            throw new OptimizationException('Platform cache partition not configured');
        }
        
        // Pre-populate cache with frequently accessed data
        Map<String, Object> cacheConfig = new Map<String, Object>{
            'maxBatchSize' => Constants.OPTIMAL_BATCH_SIZE,
            'maxConcurrentJobs' => Constants.MAX_CONCURRENT_JOBS,
            'priorityWeights' => new Map<String, Integer>{
                'High' => 100,
                'Medium' => 50,
                'Low' => 10
            }
        };
        
        orgPart.put('BulkProcessingConfig', cacheConfig);
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Monitor and auto-scale processing based on load
     */
    @future
    public static void autoScaleProcessing() {
        // Pre-calculate datetime to avoid inline calculation in SOQL
        DateTime oneHourAgo = DateTime.now().addHours(-1);
        
        // Get current processing metrics
        List<AI_Bulk_Processing_Metrics__c> recentMetrics = [
            SELECT Processing_Time_Ms__c, Total_Requests__c, Average_Time_Per_Request__c
            FROM AI_Bulk_Processing_Metrics__c
            WHERE CreatedDate >= :oneHourAgo
            ORDER BY CreatedDate DESC
            LIMIT 10
        ];
        
        if (recentMetrics.isEmpty()) {
            return;
        }
        
        // Calculate average processing time
        Decimal avgProcessingTime = 0;
        for (AI_Bulk_Processing_Metrics__c metric : recentMetrics) {
            avgProcessingTime += metric.Average_Time_Per_Request__c;
        }
        avgProcessingTime = avgProcessingTime / (Decimal)recentMetrics.size();
        
        // Determine if scaling is needed
        if (avgProcessingTime > 1000) { // More than 1 second per request
            // Reduce batch size for faster processing
            adjustBatchSize(Integer.valueOf(Constants.OPTIMAL_BATCH_SIZE / 2.0));
        } else if (avgProcessingTime < 200) { // Less than 200ms per request
            // Increase batch size for efficiency
            adjustBatchSize(Constants.OPTIMAL_BATCH_SIZE * 1.5);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Adjust batch size dynamically
     */
    private static void adjustBatchSize(Decimal newSize) {
        Cache.OrgPartition orgPart = Cache.Org.getPartition('routelogic.AIProcessing');
        if (orgPart != null) {
            Map<String, Object> config = (Map<String, Object>) orgPart.get('BulkProcessingConfig');
            if (config != null) {
                config.put('maxBatchSize', Integer.valueOf(newSize));
                orgPart.put('BulkProcessingConfig', config);
            }
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Custom exception for optimization errors
     */
    public class OptimizationException extends Exception {}
}
```

## 📄 FILE: force-app/main/default/classes/BulkProcessingOptimizerTest.cls

```apex
/**
 * @description Test class for BulkProcessingOptimizer
 * @author RouteLogic Team
 * @date 2025-01-18
 */
@isTest
private class BulkProcessingOptimizerTest {
    
    @testSetup
    static void setup() {
        // Create test cases
        List<Case> testCases = new List<Case>();
        
        // High priority cases
        for (Integer i = 0; i < 100; i++) {
            testCases.add(new Case(
                Subject = 'High Priority Case ' + i,
                Priority = 'High',
                Status = 'New',
                AI_Processing_Status__c = 'Pending'
            ));
        }
        
        // Medium priority cases
        for (Integer i = 0; i < 200; i++) {
            testCases.add(new Case(
                Subject = 'Medium Priority Case ' + i,
                Priority = 'Medium',
                Status = 'New',
                AI_Processing_Status__c = 'Pending'
            ));
        }
        
        // Low priority cases
        for (Integer i = 0; i < 300; i++) {
            testCases.add(new Case(
                Subject = 'Low Priority Case ' + i,
                Priority = 'Low',
                Status = 'New',
                AI_Processing_Status__c = 'New'
            ));
        }
        
        insert testCases;
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testOptimizeBulkProcessingNormalVolume() {
        List<Case> cases = [SELECT Id FROM Case LIMIT 500];
        List<Id> caseIds = new List<Id>();
        for (Case c : cases) {
            caseIds.add(c.Id);
        }
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        List<Id> jobIds = BulkProcessingOptimizer.optimizeBulkProcessing(caseIds);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        System.assert(jobIds.size() > 0, 'Should create at least one job');
        System.assert(jobIds.size() <= 5, 'Should not exceed max concurrent jobs');
        
        // Verify optimization metrics were logged
        List<AI_Optimization_Metrics__c> metrics = [
            SELECT Total_Cases__c, Jobs_Queued__c, Optimization_Type__c
            FROM AI_Optimization_Metrics__c
            WHERE Optimization_Type__c = 'Bulk Processing'
        ];
        
        System.assertEquals(1, metrics.size(), 'Should create optimization metrics');
        System.assertEquals(500, metrics[0].Total_Cases__c, 'Should log total cases');
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testOptimizeBulkProcessingExtremeVolume() {
        // Create case IDs for extreme volume (>10K)
        List<Id> extremeVolumeCaseIds = new List<Id>();
        List<Case> cases = [SELECT Id FROM Case];
        
        // Simulate 11K cases by duplicating IDs
        for (Integer i = 0; i < 20; i++) {
            for (Case c : cases) {
                if (extremeVolumeCaseIds.size() < 11000) {
                    extremeVolumeCaseIds.add(c.Id);
                }
            }
        }
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        List<Id> jobIds = BulkProcessingOptimizer.optimizeBulkProcessing(extremeVolumeCaseIds);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // For extreme volumes, platform events are used instead of jobs
        // Verify no jobs were created (platform events used instead)
        System.assertEquals(0, jobIds.size(), 'Should use platform events for extreme volume');
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testPartitioningByPriority() {
        List<Case> allCases = [SELECT Id, Priority FROM Case];
        List<Id> caseIds = new List<Id>();
        Map<String, Integer> priorityCounts = new Map<String, Integer>{
            'High' => 0,
            'Medium' => 0,
            'Low' => 0
        };
        
        for (Case c : allCases) {
            caseIds.add(c.Id);
            priorityCounts.put(c.Priority, priorityCounts.get(c.Priority) + 1);
        }
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        List<Id> jobIds = BulkProcessingOptimizer.optimizeBulkProcessing(caseIds);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify partitioning worked (different priorities should create different jobs)
        System.assert(jobIds.size() >= 2, 'Should create multiple jobs for different priorities');
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testQueueCapacityHandling() {
        // Simulate full queue by creating dummy jobs
        List<AsyncApexJob> currentJobs = [
            SELECT Id FROM AsyncApexJob 
            WHERE Status IN ('Holding', 'Queued', 'Processing')
            AND JobType = 'Queueable'
        ];
        
        Integer slotsToFill = 5 - currentJobs.size();
        
        // Fill up queue slots
        for (Integer i = 0; i < slotsToFill; i++) {
            System.enqueueJob(new TestQueueable());
        }
        
        List<Case> cases = [SELECT Id FROM Case LIMIT 100];
        List<Id> caseIds = new List<Id>();
        for (Case c : cases) {
            caseIds.add(c.Id);
        }
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        List<Id> jobIds = BulkProcessingOptimizer.optimizeBulkProcessing(caseIds);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Should queue to staging table when capacity is full
        List<AI_Processing_Queue__c> stagedCases = [
            SELECT Id FROM AI_Processing_Queue__c
            WHERE Status__c = 'Pending'
        ];
        
        System.assert(stagedCases.size() > 0 || jobIds.size() == 0, 
            'Should either stage cases or return no jobs when queue is full');
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testInitializeHighVolumeCache() {
        // Create cache partition in test context
        // Note: Platform Cache testing requires specific setup
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        try {
            BulkProcessingOptimizer.initializeHighVolumeCache();
            System.assert(true, 'Cache initialization should complete');
        } catch (BulkProcessingOptimizer.OptimizationException e) {
            // Expected in test context without cache partition
            System.assert(e.getMessage().contains('cache partition'), 
                'Should throw cache partition error in test');
        }
        
        Test.stopTest();
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testAutoScaleProcessing() {
        // Create test metrics
        List<AI_Bulk_Processing_Metrics__c> testMetrics = new List<AI_Bulk_Processing_Metrics__c>();
        
        // Slow processing metrics
        for (Integer i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
            testMetrics.add(new AI_Bulk_Processing_Metrics__c(
                Total_Requests__c = 100,
                Processing_Time_Ms__c = 150000, // 150 seconds
                Average_Time_Per_Request__c = 1500 // 1.5 seconds per request
            ));
        }
        
        insert testMetrics;
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        BulkProcessingOptimizer.autoScaleProcessing();
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify auto-scaling logic executed
        // In production, this would adjust batch sizes in cache
        System.assert(true, 'Auto-scaling should complete without errors');
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testErrorHandling() {
        // Create invalid case IDs
        List<Id> invalidIds = new List<Id>{
            '500000000000000AAA',
            '500000000000001AAA'
        };
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        try {
            BulkProcessingOptimizer.optimizeBulkProcessing(invalidIds);
            System.assert(false, 'Should throw exception for invalid IDs');
        } catch (BulkProcessingOptimizer.OptimizationException e) {
            System.assert(true, 'Expected exception thrown');
        }
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify error was logged
        List<Error_Log__c> errors = [
            SELECT Class_Name__c, Error_Type__c
            FROM Error_Log__c
            WHERE Class_Name__c LIKE '%BulkProcessingOptimizer%'
        ];
        
        System.assert(errors.size() > 0, 'Should log error');
    }
    
    @isTest
    static void testChunkCreation() {
        List<Case> cases = [SELECT Id FROM Case LIMIT 250];
        List<Id> caseIds = new List<Id>();
        for (Case c : cases) {
            caseIds.add(c.Id);
        }
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        List<Id> jobIds = BulkProcessingOptimizer.optimizeBulkProcessing(caseIds);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // With 250 cases and batch size of 200, should create 2 jobs minimum
        System.assert(jobIds.size() >= 1, 'Should create appropriate number of jobs for chunks');
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test queueable for filling queue slots
     */
    private class TestQueueable implements Queueable {
        public void execute(QueueableContext context) {
            // Do nothing - just hold queue slot
        }
    }
}
```
