```apex
/**
 * @description Comprehensive test suite for achieving 100% code coverage
 * @author RouteLogic Team
 * @date 2025-01-17
 */
@IsTest
public class ComprehensiveTestSuite {
    
    @TestSetup
    static void setupTestData() {
        TestDataFactory.createComprehensiveTestData();
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test bulk case processing with 250+ records
     */
    @IsTest
    static void testBulkCaseProcessing() {
        // Create 250 cases to test bulk processing
        List<Case> cases = TestDataFactory.createBulkCases(250);
        Set<Id> caseIds = new Map<Id, Case>(cases).keySet();
        
        Test.startTest();
        // Process cases in bulk
        CaseService.sendCasesToAI(caseIds);
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify all cases have processing status
        List<AI_Processing_Status__c> statuses = [
            SELECT Id, Case__c, Status__c, AI_Provider__c
            FROM AI_Processing_Status__c 
            WHERE Case__c IN :caseIds
        ];
        
        System.assertEquals(250, statuses.size(), 'All cases should have processing status');
        
        for (AI_Processing_Status__c status : statuses) {
            System.assertNotEquals(null, status.Status__c, 'Status should be populated');
            System.assertNotEquals(null, status.AI_Provider__c, 'AI Provider should be set');
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test governor limit handling
     */
    @IsTest
    static void testGovernorLimitHandling() {
        // Consume most DML statements
        List<Account> accounts = new List<Account>();
        for (Integer i = 0; i < 145; i++) {
            accounts.add(new Account(Name = 'Governor Test ' + i));
        }
        insert accounts;
        
        // Verify we're close to DML limit
        Integer dmlBefore = Limits.getDMLStatements();
        System.assert(dmlBefore > 140, 'Should have consumed most DML statements');
        
        Test.startTest();
        // This should handle remaining DML gracefully
        List<Case> cases = TestDataFactory.createBulkCases(10);
        try {
            CaseService.sendCasesToAI(new Map<Id, Case>(cases).keySet());
            // Verify graceful handling
            System.assert(true, 'Should handle governor limits gracefully');
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.assert(false, 'Should not throw exception: ' + e.getMessage());
        }
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify we didn't exceed limits
        System.assert(Limits.getDMLStatements() < Limits.getLimitDMLStatements(), 
                     'Should stay within DML limits');
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test Platform Event publishing limits
     */
    @IsTest
    static void testPlatformEventLimits() {
        List<AI_Case_Request__e> events = new List<AI_Case_Request__e>();
        
        // Create maximum allowed events (platform event limit is typically 2000)
        for (Integer i = 0; i < 2000; i++) {
            events.add(new AI_Case_Request__e(
                CaseId__c = '500' + String.valueOf(i).leftPad(12, '0'),
                Request_Type__c = 'PROCESS',
                Priority__c = 'Medium',
                AI_Provider__c = 'Intercom'
            ));
        }
        
        Test.startTest();
        Database.SaveResult[] results = EventBus.publish(events);
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Count successes and failures
        Integer successes = 0;
        Integer failures = 0;
        
        for (Database.SaveResult sr : results) {
            if (sr.isSuccess()) {
                successes++;
            } else {
                failures++;
                // Log failure reason
                for (Database.Error err : sr.getErrors()) {
                    System.debug('Platform Event Error: ' + err.getMessage());
                }
            }
        }
        
        System.assert(successes > 0, 'Some events should publish successfully');
        System.debug('Platform Events - Success: ' + successes + ', Failures: ' + failures);
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test multi-currency support
     */
    @IsTest
    static void testMultiCurrencySupport() {
        // Skip if not multi-currency org
        if (!UserInfo.isMultiCurrencyOrganization()) {
            System.debug('Skipping multi-currency test - not a multi-currency org');
            return;
        }
        
        // Create account with EUR currency
        Account eurAccount = new Account(Name = 'EUR Test Account');
        eurAccount.put('CurrencyIsoCode', 'EUR');
        insert eurAccount;
        
        // Create case with EUR currency
        Case eurCase = new Case(
            Subject = 'EUR Currency Test',
            AccountId = eurAccount.Id,
            Priority = 'High'
        );
        eurCase.put('CurrencyIsoCode', 'EUR');
        insert eurCase;
        
        Test.startTest();
        // Enrich case with CRM data
        SalesforceDataEnrichmentService.CustomerContext context = 
            SalesforceDataEnrichmentService.enrichCaseWithCRMData(eurCase);
        Test.stopTest();
        
        System.assertNotEquals(null, context, 'Context should be created');
        System.assertEquals('EUR', context.currencyCode, 'Currency should be preserved');
        System.assertEquals(eurAccount.Id, context.accountId, 'Account should be linked');
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test negative scenarios and error handling
     */
    @IsTest
    static void testNegativeScenarios() {
        // Test null case processing
        try {
            CaseService.processAIResponse(null);
            System.assert(false, 'Should throw exception for null response');
        } catch (AIException e) {
            System.assert(e.getMessage().contains('null'), 'Should indicate null input');
        }
        
        // Test invalid AI provider
        try {
            AIAPIClient.sendRequest('InvalidProvider', 'test request');
            System.assert(false, 'Should throw exception for invalid provider');
        } catch (AIException e) {
            System.assert(e.getMessage().contains('Invalid provider'), 'Should indicate invalid provider');
        }
        
        // Test empty case list
        try {
            CaseService.sendCasesToAI(new Set<Id>());
            // Should handle gracefully
            System.assert(true, 'Should handle empty input gracefully');
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.assert(false, 'Should not throw exception for empty input');
        }
        
        // Test malformed JSON response
        AI_Case_Response__e malformedResponse = new AI_Case_Response__e(
            CaseId__c = TestDataFactory.createCase().Id,
            Response_Data__c = 'Not valid JSON{',
            Provider_Name__c = 'Ada'
        );
        
        try {
            CaseService.processAIResponse(malformedResponse);
            System.assert(false, 'Should throw exception for malformed JSON');
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.assert(e.getMessage().contains('JSON'), 'Should indicate JSON error');
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test circuit breaker functionality
     */
    @IsTest
    static void testCircuitBreaker() {
        String provider = 'Intercom';
        
        // Simulate multiple failures to trip circuit breaker
        for (Integer i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
            AICircuitBreaker.recordFailure(provider);
        }
        
        Test.startTest();
        Boolean isOpen = AICircuitBreaker.isCircuitOpen(provider);
        Test.stopTest();
        
        System.assertEquals(true, isOpen, 'Circuit should be open after multiple failures');
        
        // Test circuit breaker prevents calls
        try {
            AIAPIClient.sendRequest(provider, 'test request');
            System.assert(false, 'Should not allow calls when circuit is open');
        } catch (AIException e) {
            System.assert(e.getMessage().contains('Circuit breaker open'), 
                         'Should indicate circuit breaker is open');
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test async processing with Platform Events
     */
    @IsTest
    static void testAsyncProcessingWithPlatformEvents() {
        Case testCase = TestDataFactory.createCase();
        
        AI_Case_Request__e request = new AI_Case_Request__e(
            CaseId__c = testCase.Id,
            Request_Type__c = 'ANALYZE',
            Priority__c = 'High',
            AI_Provider__c = 'Ada',
            Metadata__c = '{"sentiment": "analyze", "language": "detect"}'
        );
        
        Test.startTest();
        // Publish platform event
        Database.SaveResult sr = EventBus.publish(request);
        Test.stopTest();
        
        System.assertEquals(true, sr.isSuccess(), 'Platform event should publish successfully');
        
        // In real scenario, trigger would process this event
        // For testing, we verify the event structure
        System.assertNotEquals(null, request.CaseId__c, 'Case ID should be set');
        System.assertEquals('ANALYZE', request.Request_Type__c, 'Request type should be ANALYZE');
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test data encryption and decryption
     */
    @IsTest
    static void testDataEncryption() {
        String sensitiveData = 'SSN: 123-45-6789, CC: 4111111111111111';
        
        Test.startTest();
        // Encrypt sensitive data
        String encrypted = SecurityUtils.encryptData(sensitiveData);
        System.assertNotEquals(sensitiveData, encrypted, 'Data should be encrypted');
        System.assertNotEquals(null, encrypted, 'Encrypted data should not be null');
        
        // Decrypt data
        String decrypted = SecurityUtils.decryptData(encrypted);
        System.assertEquals(sensitiveData, decrypted, 'Decrypted data should match original');
        Test.stopTest();
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test security monitoring and threat detection
     */
    @IsTest
    static void testSecurityMonitoring() {
        User testUser = TestDataFactory.createStandardUser();
        
        System.runAs(testUser) {
            // Simulate suspicious activity
            for (Integer i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
                SecurityMonitoringService.logDataExport(testUser.Id, 5000);
            }
            
            Test.startTest();
            // Check if threat was detected
            AI_Security_Event__c securityEvent = [
                SELECT Id, Event_Type__c, Severity__c, User__c
                FROM AI_Security_Event__c
                WHERE User__c = :testUser.Id
                AND Event_Type__c = 'EXCESSIVE_DATA_EXPORT'
                ORDER BY CreatedDate DESC
                LIMIT 1
            ];
            Test.stopTest();
            
            System.assertNotEquals(null, securityEvent, 'Security event should be created');
            System.assertEquals('High', securityEvent.Severity__c, 'Should be high severity');
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test permission and sharing model
     */
    @IsTest
    static void testPermissionsAndSharing() {
        User adminUser = TestDataFactory.createAdminUser();
        User standardUser = TestDataFactory.createStandardUser();
        
        // Create test data as admin
        Case adminCase;
        System.runAs(adminUser) {
            adminCase = TestDataFactory.createCase();
            adminCase.OwnerId = adminUser.Id;
            update adminCase;
        }
        
        Test.startTest();
        // Test standard user access
        System.runAs(standardUser) {
            List<Case> visibleCases = [
                SELECT Id FROM Case WHERE Id = :adminCase.Id
            ];
            
            // Standard user shouldn't see admin's private case
            System.assertEquals(0, visibleCases.size(), 
                               'Standard user should not see admin case without sharing');
            
            // Test CRUD permissions
            try {
                Case newCase = new Case(Subject = 'Test Permission');
                insert newCase;
                System.assert(true, 'Standard user should be able to create cases');
            } catch (DmlException e) {
                System.assert(false, 'Unexpected permission error: ' + e.getMessage());
            }
        }
        Test.stopTest();
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test retry mechanism for failed AI requests
     */
    @IsTest
    static void testRetryMechanism() {
        Case testCase = TestDataFactory.createCase();
        
        // Create failed AI request
        AI_Retry_Request__c retryRequest = new AI_Retry_Request__c(
            Case__c = testCase.Id,
            Provider__c = 'Intercom',
            Request_Data__c = '{"action": "analyze"}',
            Retry_Count__c = 0,
            Max_Retries__c = 3,
            Status__c = 'Pending'
        );
        insert retryRequest;
        
        Test.startTest();
        // Process retry
        AIRetryHandler.processRetries(new List<AI_Retry_Request__c>{retryRequest});
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify retry was attempted
        AI_Retry_Request__c updatedRequest = [
            SELECT Id, Retry_Count__c, Status__c, Last_Retry_Time__c
            FROM AI_Retry_Request__c
            WHERE Id = :retryRequest.Id
        ];
        
        System.assert(updatedRequest.Retry_Count__c > 0, 'Retry count should increase');
        System.assertNotEquals(null, updatedRequest.Last_Retry_Time__c, 'Last retry time should be set');
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test webhook signature validation
     */
    @IsTest
    static void testWebhookSignatureValidation() {
        String payload = '{"event": "case.updated", "caseId": "500000000000001"}';
        String secret = 'test_webhook_secret';
        
        // Generate valid signature
        String validSignature = EncodingUtil.convertToHex(
            Crypto.generateMac('HmacSHA256', Blob.valueOf(payload), Blob.valueOf(secret))
        );
        
        Test.startTest();
        // Test valid signature
        Boolean isValid = SecurityUtils.validateWebhookSignature(payload, validSignature, secret);
        System.assertEquals(true, isValid, 'Valid signature should pass');
        
        // Test invalid signature
        Boolean isInvalid = SecurityUtils.validateWebhookSignature(payload, 'invalid_sig', secret);
        System.assertEquals(false, isInvalid, 'Invalid signature should fail');
        Test.stopTest();
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test audit trail creation
     */
    @IsTest
    static void testAuditTrail() {
        Case testCase = TestDataFactory.createCase();
        
        Test.startTest();
        // Create audit entry
        AuditService.logCaseUpdate(testCase.Id, 'AI Response Applied', 'Sentiment: Positive');
        
        // Verify audit trail
        AI_Audit_Trail__c audit = [
            SELECT Id, Case__c, Event_Type__c, Details__c, User__c
            FROM AI_Audit_Trail__c
            WHERE Case__c = :testCase.Id
            ORDER BY CreatedDate DESC
            LIMIT 1
        ];
        Test.stopTest();
        
        System.assertNotEquals(null, audit, 'Audit trail should be created');
        System.assertEquals('AI Response Applied', audit.Event_Type__c, 'Event type should match');
        System.assertEquals(UserInfo.getUserId(), audit.User__c, 'User should be current user');
    }
}
```

## 📄 FILE: force-app/main/default/classes/ConfigManager.cls

```apex
/**
 * @description Configuration manager for AI processing settings
 * @author RouteLogic Team
 * @date 2025-01-20
 */
@namespaceAccessible
public with sharing class ConfigManager {
    
    private static AI_Processing_Config__mdt configCache;
    
    /**
     * @description Get AI processing configuration
     * @return Configuration metadata record
     */
    public static AI_Processing_Config__mdt getConfig() {
        if (configCache == null) {
            configCache = getConfigFromMetadata();
        }
        return configCache;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Load configuration from custom metadata
     */
    private static AI_Processing_Config__mdt getConfigFromMetadata() {
        List<AI_Processing_Config__mdt> configs = [
            SELECT Default_Batch_Size__c, Max_Concurrent_Jobs__c, 
                   Retry_Delay_Minutes__c, Max_Retry_Attempts__c,
                   Callout_Timeout_Ms__c, Enable_Request_Compression__c,
                   Rate_Limit_TTL_Seconds__c, Compression_Threshold_Bytes__c,
                   Max_Rate_Limit_Retries__c, Enable_IP_Anonymization__c,
                   Error_Log_Retention_Days__c, Audit_Log_Retention_Days__c,
                   Enable_Retention_Notifications__c, Enable_PII_Masking__c,
                   PII_Masking_Regions__c
            FROM AI_Processing_Config__mdt
            WHERE DeveloperName = 'Default'
            LIMIT 1
        ];
        
        if (!configs.isEmpty()) {
            return configs[0];
        }
        
        // Return default values if no metadata record exists
        return createDefaultConfig();
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Create default configuration
     */
    private static AI_Processing_Config__mdt createDefaultConfig() {
        AI_Processing_Config__mdt config = new AI_Processing_Config__mdt();
        config.Default_Batch_Size__c = Constants.DEFAULT_BATCH_SIZE;
        config.Max_Concurrent_Jobs__c = Constants.MAX_CONCURRENT_JOBS;
        config.Retry_Delay_Minutes__c = Constants.RETRY_DELAY_MINUTES;
        config.Max_Retry_Attempts__c = Constants.RETRY_ATTEMPTS;
        config.Callout_Timeout_Ms__c = Constants.MAX_CALLOUT_TIME;
        config.Enable_Request_Compression__c = true;
        config.Rate_Limit_TTL_Seconds__c = Constants.DEFAULT_TTL;
        config.Enable_IP_Anonymization__c = false;
        return config;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Get default batch size
     */
    public static Integer getDefaultBatchSize() {
        AI_Processing_Config__mdt config = getConfig();
        return config.Default_Batch_Size__c != null ? 
            Integer.valueOf(config.Default_Batch_Size__c) : Constants.DEFAULT_BATCH_SIZE;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Get max concurrent jobs
     */
    public static Integer getMaxConcurrentJobs() {
        AI_Processing_Config__mdt config = getConfig();
        return config.Max_Concurrent_Jobs__c != null ? 
            Integer.valueOf(config.Max_Concurrent_Jobs__c) : Constants.MAX_CONCURRENT_JOBS;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Get retry delay in minutes
     */
    public static Integer getRetryDelayMinutes() {
        AI_Processing_Config__mdt config = getConfig();
        return config.Retry_Delay_Minutes__c != null ? 
            Integer.valueOf(config.Retry_Delay_Minutes__c) : Constants.RETRY_DELAY_MINUTES;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Get max retry attempts
     */
    public static Integer getMaxRetryAttempts() {
        AI_Processing_Config__mdt config = getConfig();
        return config.Max_Retry_Attempts__c != null ? 
            Integer.valueOf(config.Max_Retry_Attempts__c) : Constants.RETRY_ATTEMPTS;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Get callout timeout in milliseconds
     */
    public static Integer getCalloutTimeoutMs() {
        AI_Processing_Config__mdt config = getConfig();
        return config.Callout_Timeout_Ms__c != null ? 
            Integer.valueOf(config.Callout_Timeout_Ms__c) : Constants.MAX_CALLOUT_TIME;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Check if request compression is enabled
     */
    public static Boolean isCompressionEnabled() {
        AI_Processing_Config__mdt config = getConfig();
        return config.Enable_Request_Compression__c != null ? 
            config.Enable_Request_Compression__c : true;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Get rate limit TTL in seconds
     */
    public static Integer getRateLimitTTL() {
        AI_Processing_Config__mdt config = getConfig();
        return config.Rate_Limit_TTL_Seconds__c != null ? 
            Integer.valueOf(config.Rate_Limit_TTL_Seconds__c) : Constants.DEFAULT_TTL;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Get compression threshold in bytes
     */
    public static Integer getCompressionThreshold() {
        AI_Processing_Config__mdt config = getConfig();
        return config.Compression_Threshold_Bytes__c != null ? 
            Integer.valueOf(config.Compression_Threshold_Bytes__c) : 5120; // Default 5KB
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Get max rate limit retries
     */
    public static Integer getMaxRateLimitRetries() {
        AI_Processing_Config__mdt config = getConfig();
        return config.Max_Rate_Limit_Retries__c != null ? 
            Integer.valueOf(config.Max_Rate_Limit_Retries__c) : 3;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Check if IP anonymization is enabled
     */
    public static Boolean isIPAnonymizationEnabled() {
        AI_Processing_Config__mdt config = getConfig();
        return config.Enable_IP_Anonymization__c != null ? 
            config.Enable_IP_Anonymization__c : false;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Get error log retention days
     */
    public static Integer getErrorLogRetentionDays() {
        AI_Processing_Config__mdt config = getConfig();
        return config.Error_Log_Retention_Days__c != null ? 
            Integer.valueOf(config.Error_Log_Retention_Days__c) : 30;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Get audit log retention days
     */
    public static Integer getAuditLogRetentionDays() {
        AI_Processing_Config__mdt config = getConfig();
        return config.Audit_Log_Retention_Days__c != null ? 
            Integer.valueOf(config.Audit_Log_Retention_Days__c) : 365;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Check if retention notifications are enabled
     */
    public static Boolean isRetentionNotificationEnabled() {
        AI_Processing_Config__mdt config = getConfig();
        return config.Enable_Retention_Notifications__c != null ? 
            config.Enable_Retention_Notifications__c : true;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Check if PII masking is enabled
     */
    public static Boolean isPIIMaskingEnabled() {
        AI_Processing_Config__mdt config = getConfig();
        return config.Enable_PII_Masking__c != null ? 
            config.Enable_PII_Masking__c : false;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Get PII masking regions
     */
    public static Set<String> getPIIMaskingRegions() {
        AI_Processing_Config__mdt config = getConfig();
        Set<String> regions = new Set<String>();
        
        if (String.isNotBlank(config.PII_Masking_Regions__c)) {
            for (String region : config.PII_Masking_Regions__c.split(',')) {
                regions.add(region.trim().toUpperCase());
            }
        }
        
        return regions;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Clear configuration cache
     */
    @TestVisible
    private static void clearCache() {
        configCache = null;
    }
}
```

```apex
/**
 * @description Centralized constants for RouteLogic Enhanced application
 * @author RouteLogic Team
 * @date 2025-01-20
 */
@namespaceAccessible
public with sharing class Constants {
    
    // Batch Processing Constants
    public static final Integer DEFAULT_BATCH_SIZE = 200;
    public static final Integer OPTIMAL_BATCH_SIZE = 200;
    public static final Integer MAX_BATCH_SIZE = 2000;
    public static final Integer QUERY_CHUNK_SIZE = 2000;
    public static final Integer PLATFORM_EVENT_BATCH_SIZE = 1000;
    public static final Integer BATCH_THRESHOLD = 50;
    
    // Concurrent Processing Constants
    public static final Integer MAX_CONCURRENT_JOBS = 5;
    
    // Retry Configuration
    public static final Integer RETRY_ATTEMPTS = 3;
    public static final Integer RETRY_DELAY_MINUTES = 5;
    
    // Timeout Configuration
    public static final Integer MAX_CALLOUT_TIME = 30000; // 30 seconds
    public static final Integer SESSION_TIMEOUT_MINUTES = 30;
    
    // Rate Limiting Configuration
    public static final String CACHE_PARTITION = 'AIRateLimit';
    public static final Integer DEFAULT_TTL = 3600; // 1 hour
    public static final Integer CACHE_PARTITION_SIZE_MB = 10;
    
    // Security Configuration
    public static final Integer KEY_SIZE = 256;
    public static final Integer KEY_ROTATION_DAYS = 90;
    public static final Integer KEY_RETENTION_DAYS = 365;
    
    // String Length Limits
    public static final Integer MAX_MESSAGE_LENGTH = 255;
    public static final Integer MAX_STACK_TRACE_LENGTH = 32768;
    
    // Orphaned Case Detection
    public static final Integer ORPHANED_THRESHOLD_HOURS = 24;
    public static final String ORPHANED_STATUS = 'AI Processing Orphaned';
    
    // Conversation Service
    public static final Integer MAX_ENTRIES_PER_SESSION = 1000;
    
    // Trigger Control
    public static final Integer MAX_TRIGGER_EXECUTIONS = 5;
    
    // Package Configuration
    public static final String PACKAGE_NAMESPACE = 'routelogic';
    
    // Provider Names
    public static final String PROVIDER_ADA = 'Ada';
    public static final String PROVIDER_INTERCOM = 'Intercom';
    public static final String PROVIDER_OPENAI = 'OpenAI';
    public static final String PROVIDER_AZURE = 'Azure_Cognitive';
    public static final String PROVIDER_AWS = 'AWS_Comprehend';
    
    // Provider Rate Limits
    public static final Map<String, RateLimitConfig> PROVIDER_RATE_LIMITS = new Map<String, RateLimitConfig>{
        PROVIDER_ADA => new RateLimitConfig(100, 3600), // 100 requests per hour
        PROVIDER_INTERCOM => new RateLimitConfig(83, 10), // 83 requests per 10 seconds
        PROVIDER_OPENAI => new RateLimitConfig(60, 60), // 60 requests per minute
        PROVIDER_AZURE => new RateLimitConfig(100, 60), // 100 requests per minute
        PROVIDER_AWS => new RateLimitConfig(50, 60) // 50 requests per minute
    };
    
    // Audit Event Types
    public static final String EVENT_KEY_ROTATION = 'KEY_ROTATION';
    public static final String EVENT_EMERGENCY_KEY_ROTATION = 'EMERGENCY_KEY_ROTATION';
    public static final String EVENT_KEY_CLEANUP = 'KEY_CLEANUP';
    public static final String EVENT_ACCESS_VIOLATION = 'ACCESS_VIOLATION';
    public static final String EVENT_DATA_EXPORT = 'DATA_EXPORT';
    public static final String EVENT_PERMISSION_CHANGE = 'PERMISSION_CHANGE';
    public static final String EVENT_FAILED_LOGIN = 'FAILED_LOGIN';
    public static final String EVENT_API_ACCESS = 'API_ACCESS';
    
    // Error Codes
    public static final String RATE_LIMIT_ERROR = 'AI_RATE_LIMIT';
    public static final String AUTHENTICATION_ERROR = 'AI_AUTH_ERROR';
    public static final String VALIDATION_ERROR = 'AI_VALIDATION_ERROR';
    public static final String PROVIDER_ERROR = 'AI_PROVIDER_ERROR';
    public static final String CONFIGURATION_ERROR = 'AI_CONFIG_ERROR';
    public static final String SECURITY_ERROR = 'AI_SECURITY_ERROR';
    public static final String PROCESSING_ERROR = 'AI_PROCESSING_ERROR';
    public static final String TIMEOUT_ERROR = 'AI_TIMEOUT_ERROR';
    
    // HTTP Status Codes
    public static final Integer HTTP_OK = 200;
    public static final Integer HTTP_CREATED = 201;
    public static final Integer HTTP_ACCEPTED = 202;
    public static final Integer HTTP_BAD_REQUEST = 400;
    public static final Integer HTTP_UNAUTHORIZED = 401;
    public static final Integer HTTP_FORBIDDEN = 403;
    public static final Integer HTTP_NOT_FOUND = 404;
    public static final Integer HTTP_TOO_MANY_REQUESTS = 429;
    public static final Integer HTTP_INTERNAL_ERROR = 500;
    public static final Integer HTTP_SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE = 503;
    
    // Retry Status Codes
    public static final Set<Integer> RETRYABLE_STATUS_CODES = new Set<Integer>{
        HTTP_TOO_MANY_REQUESTS,
        HTTP_INTERNAL_ERROR,
        HTTP_SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE,
        408, // Request Timeout
        502, // Bad Gateway
        504  // Gateway Timeout
    };
    
    /**
     * @description Rate limit configuration for providers
     */
    public class RateLimitConfig {
        public Integer requests { get; private set; }
        public Integer windowSeconds { get; private set; }
        
        public RateLimitConfig(Integer requests, Integer windowSeconds) {
            this.requests = requests;
            this.windowSeconds = windowSeconds;
        }
    }
}
```

## 📄 FILE: force-app/main/default/classes/ConversationHistoryMigrationBatch.cls

```apex
/**
 * @description Batch job to migrate existing conversation history to parent-child model
 * @author RouteLogic Team
 * @date 2025-01-17
 */
public class ConversationHistoryMigrationBatch implements Database.Batchable<SObject>, Database.Stateful {
    
    private Integer recordsProcessed = 0;
    private Integer recordsFailed = 0;
    private List<String> errors = new List<String>();
    
    /**
     * @description Start method to query old conversation history records
     */
    public Database.QueryLocator start(Database.BatchableContext bc) {
        // Query old conversation history records that haven't been migrated
        return Database.getQueryLocator([
            SELECT Id, Case__c, Conversation_Data__c, Start_Time__c, End_Time__c, 
                   Message_Count__c, Provider__c, Is_Migrated__c
            FROM AI_Conversation_History__c
            WHERE Is_Migrated__c = false
            AND Conversation_Data__c != null
            WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED
            ORDER BY CreatedDate ASC
        ]);
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Execute method to process batch of records
     */
    public void execute(Database.BatchableContext bc, List<AI_Conversation_History__c> scope) {
        List<AI_Conversation_Session__c> sessionsToInsert = new List<AI_Conversation_Session__c>();
        List<AI_Conversation_Entry__c> entriesToInsert = new List<AI_Conversation_Entry__c>();
        List<AI_Conversation_History__c> historyToUpdate = new List<AI_Conversation_History__c>();
        
        for (AI_Conversation_History__c history : scope) {
            try {
                // Create session
                AI_Conversation_Session__c session = new AI_Conversation_Session__c(
                    Case__c = history.Case__c,
                    Start_Time__c = history.Start_Time__c != null ? history.Start_Time__c : history.CreatedDate,
                    End_Time__c = history.End_Time__c,
                    Status__c = history.End_Time__c != null ? 'Completed' : 'Migrated',
                    Total_Messages__c = history.Message_Count__c != null ? history.Message_Count__c : 0,
                    AI_Provider__c = history.Provider__c != null ? history.Provider__c : 'Unknown'
                );
                
                sessionsToInsert.add(session);
                
            } catch (Exception e) {
                recordsFailed++;
                errors.add('Failed to process history ' + history.Id + ': ' + e.getMessage());
            }
        }
        
        // Insert sessions
        if (!sessionsToInsert.isEmpty()) {
            // Apply FLS before insert
            sessionsToInsert = SecurityUtils.stripInaccessibleRecords(
                AccessType.CREATABLE,
                sessionsToInsert
            );
            
            Database.SaveResult[] sessionResults = Database.insert(sessionsToInsert, false);
            
            // Process session results and create entries
            for (Integer i = 0; i < sessionResults.size(); i++) {
                if (sessionResults[i].isSuccess()) {
                    AI_Conversation_Session__c session = sessionsToInsert[i];
                    AI_Conversation_History__c history = scope[i];
                    
                    try {
                        // Parse conversation data and create entries
                        List<ConversationMessage> messages = parseConversationData(history.Conversation_Data__c);
                        Integer entryNumber = 1;
                        
                        for (ConversationMessage msg : messages) {
                            AI_Conversation_Entry__c entry = new AI_Conversation_Entry__c(
                                Session__c = session.Id,
                                Entry_Number__c = entryNumber++,
                                Timestamp__c = msg.timestamp != null ? msg.timestamp : DateTime.now(),
                                Message_Type__c = msg.messageType,
                                Message_Content__c = msg.content,
                                Metadata__c = msg.metadata != null ? JSON.serialize(msg.metadata) : null
                            );
                            
                            entriesToInsert.add(entry);
                        }
                        
                        // Mark history as migrated
                        history.Is_Migrated__c = true;
                        history.Migration_Date__c = DateTime.now();
                        historyToUpdate.add(history);
                        
                        recordsProcessed++;
                        
                    } catch (Exception e) {
                        recordsFailed++;
                        errors.add('Failed to create entries for session ' + session.Id + ': ' + e.getMessage());
                    }
                } else {
                    recordsFailed++;
                    errors.add('Failed to create session: ' + sessionResults[i].getErrors()[0].getMessage());
                }
            }
        }
        
        // Insert entries
        if (!entriesToInsert.isEmpty()) {
            // Apply FLS before insert
            entriesToInsert = SecurityUtils.stripInaccessibleRecords(
                AccessType.CREATABLE,
                entriesToInsert
            );
            
            Database.SaveResult[] entryResults = Database.insert(entriesToInsert, false);
            
            // Log any entry insertion failures
            for (Database.SaveResult sr : entryResults) {
                if (!sr.isSuccess()) {
                    errors.add('Failed to insert entry: ' + sr.getErrors()[0].getMessage());
                }
            }
        }
        
        // Update migrated history records
        if (!historyToUpdate.isEmpty()) {
            // Apply FLS before update
            historyToUpdate = SecurityUtils.stripInaccessibleRecords(
                AccessType.UPDATABLE,
                historyToUpdate
            );
            
            Database.update(historyToUpdate, false);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Finish method to send summary email
     */
    public void finish(Database.BatchableContext bc) {
        // Send summary email
        AsyncApexJob job = [
            SELECT Id, Status, NumberOfErrors, JobItemsProcessed, TotalJobItems
            FROM AsyncApexJob
            WHERE Id = :bc.getJobId()
        ];
        
        String subject = 'Conversation History Migration ' + 
                        (job.NumberOfErrors > 0 ? 'Completed with Errors' : 'Completed Successfully');
        
        String body = 'Migration Summary:\n\n' +
                     'Total Records: ' + job.TotalJobItems + '\n' +
                     'Records Processed: ' + recordsProcessed + '\n' +
                     'Records Failed: ' + recordsFailed + '\n' +
                     'Job Errors: ' + job.NumberOfErrors + '\n\n';
        
        if (!errors.isEmpty()) {
            body += 'Errors (first 100):\n';
            for (Integer i = 0; i < Math.min(errors.size(), 100); i++) {
                body += errors[i] + '\n';
            }
        }
        
        Messaging.SingleEmailMessage email = new Messaging.SingleEmailMessage();
        email.setToAddresses(new String[]{UserInfo.getUserEmail()});
        email.setSubject(subject);
        email.setPlainTextBody(body);
        email.setSaveAsActivity(false);
        
        Messaging.sendEmail(new List<Messaging.SingleEmailMessage>{email});
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Parse conversation data from JSON
     */
    private List<ConversationMessage> parseConversationData(String jsonData) {
        List<ConversationMessage> messages = new List<ConversationMessage>();
        
        try {
            List<Object> jsonList = (List<Object>) JSON.deserializeUntyped(jsonData);
            
            for (Object obj : jsonList) {
                Map<String, Object> msgMap = (Map<String, Object>) obj;
                
                ConversationMessage msg = new ConversationMessage();
                
                // Parse timestamp
                if (msgMap.containsKey('timestamp')) {
                    Object timestampObj = msgMap.get('timestamp');
                    if (timestampObj instanceof Long) {
                        msg.timestamp = DateTime.newInstance((Long)timestampObj);
                    } else if (timestampObj instanceof String) {
                        msg.timestamp = DateTime.parse((String)timestampObj);
                    }
                }
                
                // Parse message type
                msg.messageType = msgMap.containsKey('type') ? 
                    capitalizeMessageType((String)msgMap.get('type')) : 'User';
                
                // Parse content
                msg.content = msgMap.containsKey('message') ? 
                    (String)msgMap.get('message') : 
                    (msgMap.containsKey('content') ? (String)msgMap.get('content') : '');
                
                // Store remaining fields as metadata
                Map<String, Object> metadata = new Map<String, Object>();
                for (String key : msgMap.keySet()) {
                    if (!new Set<String>{'timestamp', 'type', 'message', 'content'}.contains(key)) {
                        metadata.put(key, msgMap.get(key));
                    }
                }
                
                if (!metadata.isEmpty()) {
                    msg.metadata = metadata;
                }
                
                messages.add(msg);
            }
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            // If parsing fails, create a single entry with the raw data
            ConversationMessage msg = new ConversationMessage();
            msg.timestamp = DateTime.now();
            msg.messageType = 'System';
            msg.content = 'Migrated conversation data';
            msg.metadata = new Map<String, Object>{'raw_data' => jsonData};
            messages.add(msg);
        }
        
        return messages;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Capitalize message type for picklist value
     */
    private String capitalizeMessageType(String type) {
        if (String.isBlank(type)) {
            return 'User';
        }
        
        String lowerType = type.toLowerCase();
        switch on lowerType {
            when 'user' { return 'User'; }
            when 'ai' { return 'AI'; }
            when 'system' { return 'System'; }
            when 'agent' { return 'Agent'; }
            when 'bot' { return 'Bot'; }
            when else { return 'User'; }
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Inner class for conversation message
     */
    private class ConversationMessage {
        public DateTime timestamp;
        public String messageType;
        public String content;
        public Map<String, Object> metadata;
    }
}
```

## 📄 FILE: force-app/main/default/classes/ConversationService.cls

```apex
/**
 * @description Service class for managing AI conversation sessions and entries
 * @author RouteLogic Team
 * @date 2025-01-17
 */
public with sharing class ConversationService {
    
    // Using centralized constants to avoid naming collisions
    
    /**
     * @description Create or get active conversation session for a case
     * @param caseId The case ID
     * @param provider The AI provider
     * @return The conversation session
     */
    public static AI_Conversation_Session__c getOrCreateSession(Id caseId, String provider) {
        if (caseId == null || String.isBlank(provider)) {
            throw new AIException('Case ID and provider are required');
        }
        
        // Look for active session
        List<AI_Conversation_Session__c> activeSessions = [
            SELECT Id, Case__c, AI_Provider__c, Total_Messages__c, Start_Time__c
            FROM AI_Conversation_Session__c
            WHERE Case__c = :caseId
            AND AI_Provider__c = :provider
            AND Status__c = 'Active'
            AND Start_Time__c >= :DateTime.now().addMinutes(-Constants.SESSION_TIMEOUT_MINUTES)
            WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED
            ORDER BY CreatedDate DESC
            LIMIT 1
        ];
        
        if (!activeSessions.isEmpty()) {
            return activeSessions[0];
        }
        
        // Create new session
        return createNewSession(caseId, provider);
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Create new conversation session
     */
    private static AI_Conversation_Session__c createNewSession(Id caseId, String provider) {
        // Close any existing active sessions
        closeActiveSessions(caseId, provider);
        
        // Create new session
        AI_Conversation_Session__c session = new AI_Conversation_Session__c(
            Case__c = caseId,
            AI_Provider__c = provider,
            Status__c = 'Active',
            Start_Time__c = DateTime.now(),
            Total_Messages__c = 0
        );
        
        insert SecurityUtils.stripInaccessibleRecords(
            AccessType.CREATABLE,
            new List<AI_Conversation_Session__c>{session}
        )[0];
        
        return session;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Add entry to conversation
     * @param sessionId The session ID
     * @param messageType Type of message
     * @param content Message content
     * @param metadata Additional metadata
     * @return The created entry
     */
    public static AI_Conversation_Entry__c addEntry(
        Id sessionId, 
        String messageType, 
        String content, 
        Map<String, Object> metadata
    ) {
        if (sessionId == null || String.isBlank(messageType) || String.isBlank(content)) {
            throw new AIException('Session ID, message type, and content are required');
        }
        
        // Get current session
        AI_Conversation_Session__c session = [
            SELECT Id, Total_Messages__c, Status__c
            FROM AI_Conversation_Session__c
            WHERE Id = :sessionId
            WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED
            LIMIT 1
        ];
        
        // Check if session is still active
        if (session.Status__c != 'Active') {
            throw new AIException('Cannot add entry to inactive session');
        }
        
        // Check if session has reached max entries
        if (session.Total_Messages__c >= Constants.MAX_ENTRIES_PER_SESSION) {
            // Create new session and add entry there
            AI_Conversation_Session__c newSession = createContinuationSession(session);
            return addEntry(newSession.Id, messageType, content, metadata);
        }
        
        // Create entry
        AI_Conversation_Entry__c entry = new AI_Conversation_Entry__c(
            Session__c = sessionId,
            Entry_Number__c = session.Total_Messages__c + 1,
            Message_Type__c = messageType,
            Message_Content__c = content,
            Timestamp__c = DateTime.now()
        );
        
        // Add metadata if provided
        if (metadata != null && !metadata.isEmpty()) {
            entry.Metadata__c = JSON.serialize(metadata);
        }
        
        // Insert entry
        insert SecurityUtils.stripInaccessibleRecords(
            AccessType.CREATABLE,
            new List<AI_Conversation_Entry__c>{entry}
        )[0];
        
        // Update session message count
        session.Total_Messages__c = session.Total_Messages__c + 1;
        update SecurityUtils.stripInaccessibleRecords(
            AccessType.UPDATABLE,
            new List<AI_Conversation_Session__c>{session}
        )[0];
        
        return entry;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Get conversation history for a case
     * @param caseId The case ID
     * @param limitCount Maximum number of entries to return
     * @return List of conversation entries
     */
    public static List<ConversationEntry> getConversationHistory(Id caseId, Integer limitCount) {
        if (caseId == null) {
            throw new AIException('Case ID is required');
        }
        
        limitCount = limitCount != null ? Math.min(limitCount, 500) : 100;
        
        List<ConversationEntry> history = new List<ConversationEntry>();
        
        // Get recent sessions
        List<AI_Conversation_Session__c> sessions = [
            SELECT Id, Start_Time__c, End_Time__c, Status__c, AI_Provider__c,
                (SELECT Id, Entry_Number__c, Timestamp__c, Message_Type__c, 
                        Message_Content__c, Metadata__c
                 FROM Conversation_Entries__r
                 ORDER BY Entry_Number__c DESC)
            FROM AI_Conversation_Session__c
            WHERE Case__c = :caseId
            WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED
            ORDER BY Start_Time__c DESC
            LIMIT 10
        ];
        
        // Build conversation history
        Integer entryCount = 0;
        for (AI_Conversation_Session__c session : sessions) {
            for (AI_Conversation_Entry__c entry : session.Conversation_Entries__r) {
                if (entryCount >= limitCount) {
                    break;
                }
                
                ConversationEntry ce = new ConversationEntry();
                ce.sessionId = session.Id;
                ce.entryId = entry.Id;
                ce.timestamp = entry.Timestamp__c;
                ce.messageType = entry.Message_Type__c;
                ce.content = entry.Message_Content__c;
                ce.provider = session.AI_Provider__c;
                ce.entryNumber = entry.Entry_Number__c;
                
                // Parse metadata
                if (String.isNotBlank(entry.Metadata__c)) {
                    try {
                        ce.metadata = (Map<String, Object>) JSON.deserializeUntyped(entry.Metadata__c);
                    } catch (Exception e) {
                        // Log but don't fail
                        System.debug('Failed to parse metadata: ' + e.getMessage());
                    }
                }
                
                history.add(ce);
                entryCount++;
            }
            
            if (entryCount >= limitCount) {
                break;
            }
        }
        
        return history;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Close conversation session
     * @param sessionId The session ID
     * @param status Final status
     */
    public static void closeSession(Id sessionId, String status) {
        if (sessionId == null) {
            return;
        }
        
        AI_Conversation_Session__c session = new AI_Conversation_Session__c(
            Id = sessionId,
            Status__c = String.isNotBlank(status) ? status : 'Completed',
            End_Time__c = DateTime.now()
        );
        
        update SecurityUtils.stripInaccessibleRecords(
            AccessType.UPDATABLE,
            new List<AI_Conversation_Session__c>{session}
        )[0];
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Archive old conversations
     * @param daysToKeep Number of days to keep conversations
     */
    @future
    public static void archiveOldConversations(Integer daysToKeep) {
        DateTime cutoffDate = DateTime.now().addDays(-daysToKeep);
        
        // Get old sessions
        List<AI_Conversation_Session__c> oldSessions = [
            SELECT Id
            FROM AI_Conversation_Session__c
            WHERE End_Time__c < :cutoffDate
            AND Status__c IN ('Completed', 'Abandoned', 'Error')
            WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED
            LIMIT 10000
        ];
        
        if (!oldSessions.isEmpty()) {
            // Delete old sessions (cascade delete will remove entries)
            delete SecurityUtils.stripInaccessibleRecords(
                AccessType.DELETABLE,
                oldSessions
            );
        }
    }
    
    // Helper methods
    
    /**
     * @description Close active sessions for a case
     */
    private static void closeActiveSessions(Id caseId, String provider) {
        List<AI_Conversation_Session__c> activeSessions = [
            SELECT Id
            FROM AI_Conversation_Session__c
            WHERE Case__c = :caseId
            AND AI_Provider__c = :provider
            AND Status__c = 'Active'
            WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED
        ];
        
        for (AI_Conversation_Session__c session : activeSessions) {
            session.Status__c = 'Completed';
            session.End_Time__c = DateTime.now();
        }
        
        if (!activeSessions.isEmpty()) {
            update SecurityUtils.stripInaccessibleRecords(
                AccessType.UPDATABLE,
                activeSessions
            );
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Create continuation session when current session is full
     */
    private static AI_Conversation_Session__c createContinuationSession(AI_Conversation_Session__c currentSession) {
        // Close current session
        closeSession(currentSession.Id, 'Completed');
        
        // Get case info from current session
        AI_Conversation_Session__c sessionWithCase = [
            SELECT Case__c, AI_Provider__c
            FROM AI_Conversation_Session__c
            WHERE Id = :currentSession.Id
            WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED
            LIMIT 1
        ];
        
        // Create new session
        return createNewSession(sessionWithCase.Case__c, sessionWithCase.AI_Provider__c);
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Inner class for conversation entry
     */
    public class ConversationEntry {
        @AuraEnabled public Id sessionId { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Id entryId { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public DateTime timestamp { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public String messageType { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public String content { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public String provider { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Decimal entryNumber { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Map<String, Object> metadata { get; set; }
    }
}
```

## 📄 FILE: force-app/main/default/classes/EncryptionKeyRotationSchedule.cls

```apex
/**
 * @description DEPRECATED - Scheduled job for automatic encryption key rotation every 90 days
 * @author RouteLogic Team
 * @date 2025-01-17
 * @deprecated This class is deprecated as of RouteLogic v3.3.0. Use Salesforce Shield Platform Encryption instead.
 * 
 * MIGRATION NOTICE:
 * RouteLogic now leverages native Salesforce Shield Platform Encryption which handles
 * key rotation automatically without requiring custom scheduled jobs.
 * 
 * To migrate:
 * 1. Enable Salesforce Shield Platform Encryption
 * 2. Remove this scheduled job from your org
 * 3. Configure automatic key rotation through Shield settings
 */
@Deprecated
global class EncryptionKeyRotationSchedule implements Schedulable {
    
    /**
     * @description Execute scheduled key rotation
     * @param ctx Schedulable context
     */
    global void execute(SchedulableContext ctx) {
        try {
            // Check if rotation is due
            if (SecurityKeyManager.isRotationDue()) {
                // Perform key rotation
                SecurityKeyManager.rotateEncryptionKeys();
                
                // Log successful execution
                System.debug('Encryption key rotation completed successfully');
            } else {
                // Log skip
                System.debug('Encryption key rotation not due yet');
            }
            
            // Schedule next check
            scheduleNextRotation();
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            // Log error but don't throw to prevent job failure
            ErrorLogService.logError('EncryptionKeyRotationSchedule.execute', e, ctx.getTriggerId());
            
            // Still schedule next attempt
            scheduleNextRotation();
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Schedule the next rotation check
     */
    private void scheduleNextRotation() {
        // Check if job already scheduled
        List<CronTrigger> existingJobs = [
            SELECT Id, NextFireTime
            FROM CronTrigger
            WHERE CronJobDetail.Name = 'Encryption Key Rotation Check'
            AND State != 'DELETED'
            LIMIT 1
        ];
        
        if (!existingJobs.isEmpty()) {
            // Job already scheduled
            return;
        }
        
        // Schedule for tomorrow at 2 AM
        DateTime tomorrow = DateTime.now().addDays(1);
        String cronExp = '0 0 2 ' + tomorrow.day() + ' ' + tomorrow.month() + ' ? ' + tomorrow.year();
        
        System.schedule('Encryption Key Rotation Check', cronExp, new EncryptionKeyRotationSchedule());
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Schedule the job for the first time
     * Call this method once during initial setup
     */
    public static void scheduleJob() {
        // Remove existing job if any
        List<CronTrigger> existingJobs = [
            SELECT Id
            FROM CronTrigger
            WHERE CronJobDetail.Name LIKE 'Encryption Key Rotation%'
            AND State != 'DELETED'
        ];
        
        for (CronTrigger job : existingJobs) {
            System.abortJob(job.Id);
        }
        
        // Schedule daily check at 2 AM
        String cronExp = '0 0 2 * * ?'; // Every day at 2 AM
        System.schedule('Encryption Key Rotation Daily Check', cronExp, new EncryptionKeyRotationSchedule());
        
        System.debug('Encryption key rotation job scheduled successfully');
    }
}
```

## 📄 FILE: force-app/main/default/classes/ErrorLogService.cls

```apex
/**
 * @description Centralized error logging service
 * @author RouteLogic Team
 * @date 2025-01-17
 */
public with sharing class ErrorLogService {
    
    private static final Integer ERROR_LOG_MAX_MESSAGE_LENGTH = 255;
    private static final Integer ERROR_LOG_MAX_STACK_TRACE_LENGTH = 32768;
    
    /**
     * @description Log an error with exception
     * @param className The class where error occurred
     * @param ex The exception that was caught
     * @param additionalInfo Additional context information
     */
    public static void logError(String className, Exception ex, String additionalInfo) {
        if (ex != null) {
            createErrorLog(
                className,
                ex.getTypeName(),
                ex.getMessage(),
                ex.getStackTraceString(),
                additionalInfo
            );
        } else {
            createErrorLog(
                className,
                'Unknown',
                'No exception provided',
                null,
                additionalInfo
            );
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Log an error without exception
     * @param className The class where error occurred
     * @param errorType Type of error
     * @param errorMessage Error message
     */
    public static void logError(String className, String errorType, String errorMessage) {
        createErrorLog(
            className,
            errorType,
            errorMessage,
            null,
            null
        );
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Create error log record
     */
    private static void createErrorLog(
        String className,
        String errorType,
        String errorMessage,
        String stackTrace,
        String additionalInfo
    ) {
        try {
            Error_Log__c errorLog = new Error_Log__c(
                Class_Name__c = truncateString(className, ERROR_LOG_MAX_MESSAGE_LENGTH),
                Error_Type__c = truncateString(errorType, ERROR_LOG_MAX_MESSAGE_LENGTH),
                Error_Message__c = errorMessage,
                Stack_Trace__c = truncateString(stackTrace, ERROR_LOG_MAX_STACK_TRACE_LENGTH),
                Additional_Info__c = truncateString(additionalInfo, ERROR_LOG_MAX_STACK_TRACE_LENGTH),
                User__c = UserInfo.getUserId(),
                Timestamp__c = DateTime.now()
            );
            
            // Apply FLS before insert
            List<Error_Log__c> logsToInsert = new List<Error_Log__c>{errorLog};
            logsToInsert = SecurityUtils.stripInaccessibleRecords(
                AccessType.CREATABLE,
                logsToInsert
            );
            
            // Use Database.insert with partial success to ensure logging doesn't fail
            Database.SaveResult result = Database.insert(logsToInsert[0], false);
            
            if (!result.isSuccess()) {
                // If we can't log to database, at least log to debug
                System.debug(LoggingLevel.ERROR, 'Failed to create error log: ' + result.getErrors());
                System.debug(LoggingLevel.ERROR, formatDebugMessage(
                    className, errorType, errorMessage, stackTrace, additionalInfo
                ));
            }
        } catch (Exception e) {
            // Fallback to debug logging if database logging fails
            System.debug(LoggingLevel.ERROR, 'Error logging service failed: ' + e.getMessage());
            System.debug(LoggingLevel.ERROR, formatDebugMessage(
                className, errorType, errorMessage, stackTrace, additionalInfo
            ));
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Truncate string to specified length
     */
    private static String truncateString(String value, Integer maxLength) {
        if (String.isBlank(value)) {
            return null;
        }
        
        if (value.length() <= maxLength) {
            return value;
        }
        
        return value.substring(0, maxLength - 3) + '...';
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Format error message for debug logging
     */
    private static String formatDebugMessage(
        String className,
        String errorType,
        String errorMessage,
        String stackTrace,
        String additionalInfo
    ) {
        List<String> parts = new List<String>();
        
        parts.add('=== ERROR LOG ===');
        parts.add('Class: ' + className);
        parts.add('Type: ' + errorType);
        parts.add('Message: ' + errorMessage);
        
        if (String.isNotBlank(stackTrace)) {
            parts.add('Stack Trace: ' + stackTrace);
        }
        
        if (String.isNotBlank(additionalInfo)) {
            parts.add('Additional Info: ' + additionalInfo);
        }
        
        parts.add('User: ' + UserInfo.getUserName());
        parts.add('Time: ' + DateTime.now().format());
        parts.add('================');
        
        return String.join(parts, '\n');
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Batch delete old error logs
     * @param daysToKeep Number of days to keep error logs
     */
    public static void cleanupOldLogs(Integer daysToKeep) {
        if (daysToKeep == null || daysToKeep < 1) {
            daysToKeep = 30; // Default retention period
        }
        
        DateTime cutoffDate = DateTime.now().addDays(-daysToKeep);
        
        List<Error_Log__c> logsToDelete = [
            SELECT Id
            FROM Error_Log__c
            WHERE Timestamp__c < :cutoffDate
            WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED
            LIMIT 10000
        ];
        
        if (!logsToDelete.isEmpty()) {
            delete SecurityUtils.stripInaccessibleRecords(
                AccessType.DELETABLE,
                logsToDelete
            );
        }
    }
}
```

```apex
/**
 * @description Test class for ErrorLogService
 * @author RouteLogic Team
 * @date 2025-01-17
 */
@IsTest
private class ErrorLogServiceTest {
    
    @IsTest
    static void testLogErrorWithException() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        try {
            // Generate a test exception
            Integer result = 10 / 0;
        } catch (Exception e) {
            // Log the exception
            ErrorLogService.logError('TestClass', e, 'Test additional info');
        }
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify error log was created
        List<Error_Log__c> errorLogs = [
            SELECT Id, Class_Name__c, Error_Type__c, Error_Message__c, 
                   Additional_Info__c, User__c, Timestamp__c
            FROM Error_Log__c
        ];
        
        System.assertEquals(1, errorLogs.size(), 'Should create 1 error log');
        
        Error_Log__c log = errorLogs[0];
        System.assertEquals('TestClass', log.Class_Name__c, 'Should set class name');
        System.assertEquals('MathException', log.Error_Type__c, 'Should set error type');
        System.assert(log.Error_Message__c.contains('Divide by 0'), 'Should contain error message');
        System.assertEquals('Test additional info', log.Additional_Info__c, 'Should set additional info');
        System.assertEquals(UserInfo.getUserId(), log.User__c, 'Should set user ID');
        System.assertNotEquals(null, log.Timestamp__c, 'Should set timestamp');
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testLogErrorWithoutException() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Log error without exception
        ErrorLogService.logError('TestClass', 'CustomError', 'Test error message');
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify error log was created
        List<Error_Log__c> errorLogs = [
            SELECT Id, Class_Name__c, Error_Type__c, Error_Message__c
            FROM Error_Log__c
        ];
        
        System.assertEquals(1, errorLogs.size(), 'Should create 1 error log');
        
        Error_Log__c log = errorLogs[0];
        System.assertEquals('TestClass', log.Class_Name__c, 'Should set class name');
        System.assertEquals('CustomError', log.Error_Type__c, 'Should set error type');
        System.assertEquals('Test error message', log.Error_Message__c, 'Should set error message');
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testLogErrorWithNullException() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Log error with null exception
        ErrorLogService.logError('TestClass', null, 'Additional info only');
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify error log was created with default values
        List<Error_Log__c> errorLogs = [
            SELECT Id, Class_Name__c, Error_Type__c, Error_Message__c, Additional_Info__c
            FROM Error_Log__c
        ];
        
        System.assertEquals(1, errorLogs.size(), 'Should create 1 error log');
        
        Error_Log__c log = errorLogs[0];
        System.assertEquals('TestClass', log.Class_Name__c, 'Should set class name');
        System.assertEquals('Unknown', log.Error_Type__c, 'Should set default error type');
        System.assertEquals('No exception provided', log.Error_Message__c, 'Should set default message');
        System.assertEquals('Additional info only', log.Additional_Info__c, 'Should set additional info');
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testStringTruncation() {
        // Create very long strings
        String longClassName = 'A'.repeat(300);
        String longErrorMessage = 'B'.repeat(300);
        String longAdditionalInfo = 'C'.repeat(40000);
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Log error with long strings
        ErrorLogService.logError(longClassName, 'LongStringTest', longErrorMessage);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify strings were truncated
        List<Error_Log__c> errorLogs = [
            SELECT Id, Class_Name__c, Error_Message__c
            FROM Error_Log__c
        ];
        
        System.assertEquals(1, errorLogs.size(), 'Should create 1 error log');
        
        Error_Log__c log = errorLogs[0];
        System.assert(log.Class_Name__c.length() <= 255, 'Class name should be truncated');
        System.assert(log.Error_Message__c.length() <= 255, 'Error message should be truncated');
        System.assert(log.Class_Name__c.endsWith('...'), 'Truncated class name should end with ...');
        System.assert(log.Error_Message__c.endsWith('...'), 'Truncated error message should end with ...');
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testStringTruncationWithNullValues() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Log error with null values
        ErrorLogService.logError(null, 'NullTest', null);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify null values are handled
        List<Error_Log__c> errorLogs = [
            SELECT Id, Class_Name__c, Error_Message__c
            FROM Error_Log__c
        ];
        
        System.assertEquals(1, errorLogs.size(), 'Should create 1 error log');
        
        Error_Log__c log = errorLogs[0];
        System.assertEquals(null, log.Class_Name__c, 'Null class name should remain null');
        System.assertEquals(null, log.Error_Message__c, 'Null error message should remain null');
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testBulkErrorLogging() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Log multiple errors
        for (Integer i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
            ErrorLogService.logError('BulkTestClass' + i, 'BulkError', 'Bulk error message ' + i);
        }
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify all error logs were created
        List<Error_Log__c> errorLogs = [
            SELECT Id, Class_Name__c, Error_Message__c
            FROM Error_Log__c
            ORDER BY Class_Name__c
        ];
        
        System.assertEquals(10, errorLogs.size(), 'Should create 10 error logs');
        
        // Verify each error log
        for (Integer i = 0; i < errorLogs.size(); i++) {
            Error_Log__c log = errorLogs[i];
            System.assert(log.Class_Name__c.contains('BulkTestClass'), 'Should contain bulk test class name');
            System.assert(log.Error_Message__c.contains('Bulk error message'), 'Should contain bulk error message');
        }
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testCleanupOldLogs() {
        // Create test error logs (we can't set CreatedDate in test, so this tests the logic)
        List<Error_Log__c> testLogs = new List<Error_Log__c>();
        for (Integer i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
            testLogs.add(new Error_Log__c(
                Class_Name__c = 'CleanupTest' + i,
                Error_Type__c = 'CleanupError',
                Error_Message__c = 'Test cleanup message ' + i,
                User__c = UserInfo.getUserId(),
                Timestamp__c = DateTime.now()
            ));
        }
        insert testLogs;
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Test cleanup with default retention period
        ErrorLogService.cleanupOldLogs(null);
        
        // Test cleanup with specific retention period
        ErrorLogService.cleanupOldLogs(7);
        
        // Test cleanup with invalid retention period
        ErrorLogService.cleanupOldLogs(-5);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // In test context, no records will be deleted due to date filtering
        // This tests that the method executes without errors
        List<Error_Log__c> remainingLogs = [SELECT Id FROM Error_Log__c];
        System.assert(remainingLogs.size() >= 0, 'Cleanup should execute without errors');
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testCleanupOldLogsWithZeroRetention() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Test cleanup with zero retention period (should default to 30)
        ErrorLogService.cleanupOldLogs(0);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Should execute without errors
        System.assert(true, 'Cleanup with zero retention should work');
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testExceptionHandlingInLogging() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        // This test verifies that logging failures don't throw exceptions
        try {
            // Force a potential logging error by using invalid data
            String invalidClassName = null;
            ErrorLogService.logError(invalidClassName, 'TestError', 'Test message');
            
            // Should not throw any exceptions
            System.assert(true, 'Error logging should handle errors gracefully');
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.assert(false, 'Error logging should not throw exceptions: ' + e.getMessage());
        }
        
        Test.stopTest();
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testStackTraceLogging() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        try {
            // Generate an exception with stack trace
            List<String> testList = new List<String>();
            String value = testList[5]; // This will cause IndexOutOfBoundsException
        } catch (Exception e) {
            // Log the exception with stack trace
            ErrorLogService.logError('StackTraceTest', e, 'Testing stack trace logging');
        }
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify stack trace was logged
        List<Error_Log__c> errorLogs = [
            SELECT Id, Error_Type__c, Stack_Trace__c
            FROM Error_Log__c
        ];
        
        System.assertEquals(1, errorLogs.size(), 'Should create 1 error log');
        
        Error_Log__c log = errorLogs[0];
        System.assertEquals('ListException', log.Error_Type__c, 'Should log ListException');
        System.assertNotEquals(null, log.Stack_Trace__c, 'Should log stack trace');
        System.assert(log.Stack_Trace__c.contains('StackTraceTest'), 'Stack trace should contain test class');
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testLongStackTraceHandling() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        try {
            // Create a deep call stack to generate long stack trace
            deepMethod1();
        } catch (Exception e) {
            // Log the exception
            ErrorLogService.logError('LongStackTraceTest', e, 'Testing long stack trace');
        }
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify stack trace was truncated if necessary
        List<Error_Log__c> errorLogs = [
            SELECT Id, Stack_Trace__c
            FROM Error_Log__c
        ];
        
        System.assertEquals(1, errorLogs.size(), 'Should create 1 error log');
        
        Error_Log__c log = errorLogs[0];
        System.assertNotEquals(null, log.Stack_Trace__c, 'Should log stack trace');
        System.assert(log.Stack_Trace__c.length() <= 32768, 'Stack trace should be within limits');
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testConcurrentErrorLogging() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Simulate concurrent error logging
        List<String> classNames = new List<String>();
        for (Integer i = 0; i < 20; i++) {
            classNames.add('ConcurrentTest' + i);
        }
        
        // Log errors concurrently (simulated)
        for (String className : classNames) {
            ErrorLogService.logError(className, 'ConcurrentError', 'Concurrent test message');
        }
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify all logs were created
        List<Error_Log__c> errorLogs = [
            SELECT Id, Class_Name__c
            FROM Error_Log__c
            WHERE Class_Name__c LIKE 'ConcurrentTest%'
        ];
        
        System.assertEquals(20, errorLogs.size(), 'Should create all concurrent logs');
    }
    
    // Helper methods for testing

    }

        throw new CustomException('Deep stack trace test');
    }
    
    public class CustomException extends Exception {}
```

## 📄 FILE: force-app/main/default/classes/IAIProviderAdapter.cls

```apex
/**
 * @description Interface for AI provider-specific adapter implementations
 * @author RouteLogic Team
 * @date 2025-01-21
 * @version 2.0
 * 
 * This interface defines the adapter pattern for integrating with different AI providers
 * while maintaining separation between core routing logic and provider-specific implementations.
 */
public interface IAIProviderAdapter {
    
    /**
     * @description Prepare provider-specific request based on routing decision
     * @param decision The routing decision from AgnosticRoutingEngine
     * @return Provider-specific request object
     */
    Object prepareProviderRequest(AgnosticRoutingEngine.RoutingDecision decision);
    
    /**
     * @description Validate webhook signature
     * @param payload The webhook payload
     * @param signature The signature to validate
     * @return Boolean indicating if signature is valid
     */
    Boolean validateWebhookSignature(String payload, String signature);
    
    /**
     * @description Sanitize request before sending to AI provider
     * @param input The input to sanitize
     * @return Sanitized input
     */
    String sanitizeRequest(String input);
    
    /**
     * @description Mask sensitive data in the input
     * @param input The input containing sensitive data
     * @return Input with sensitive data masked
     */
    String maskSensitiveData(String input);
    
    /**
     * @description Check rate limit for specific operation
     * @param operation The operation to check
     * @return Boolean indicating if request is allowed
     */
    Boolean checkRateLimit(String operation);
    
    /**
     * @description Get security headers for API request
     * @return Map of header name to value
     */
    Map<String, String> getSecurityHeaders();
    
    /**
     * @description Validate API response
     * @param response The API response to validate
     * @return Boolean indicating if response is valid
     */
    Boolean validateResponse(HttpResponse response);
    
    /**
     * @description Get provider-specific configuration
     * @return Map of configuration parameters
     */
    Map<String, Object> getProviderConfig();
}


```

```apex
}
```
