## 📄 FILE: force-app/main/default/classes/RouteLogicRetryHandler.cls

```apex
/**
 * @description Retry handler with exponential backoff for RouteLogic Enhanced v4.0.0
 * @author RouteLogic Team
 * @date 2025-01-21
 * @version 4.0.0
 * 
 * This class implements intelligent retry mechanisms with:
 * - Exponential backoff strategy
 * - Configurable retry limits
 * - Dead letter queue for failed jobs
 * - Retry analytics and monitoring
 */
public with sharing class RouteLogicRetryHandler implements Schedulable {
    
    // Retry configuration constants
    private static final Integer DEFAULT_MAX_RETRIES = 3;
    private static final Integer BASE_DELAY_SECONDS = 30;
    private static final Integer MAX_DELAY_SECONDS = 3600; // 1 hour
    private static final Decimal BACKOFF_MULTIPLIER = 2.0;
    
    // Retry job parameters
    private String jobId;
    private String jobType;
    private List<Id> recordIds;
    private Map<String, Object> jobParameters;
    private Integer retryCount;
    private DateTime originalScheduledTime;
    
    /**
     * @description Constructor for retry handler
     * @param jobId Original job ID
     * @param jobType Type of job to retry
     * @param recordIds List of record IDs to process
     * @param jobParameters Job parameters
     * @param retryCount Current retry count
     */
    public RouteLogicRetryHandler(String jobId, String jobType, List<Id> recordIds, 
                                 Map<String, Object> jobParameters, Integer retryCount) {
        this.jobId = jobId;
        this.jobType = jobType;
        this.recordIds = recordIds != null ? recordIds : new List<Id>();
        this.jobParameters = jobParameters != null ? jobParameters : new Map<String, Object>();
        this.retryCount = retryCount != null ? retryCount : 0;
        this.originalScheduledTime = DateTime.now();
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Execute scheduled retry
     * @param context Schedulable context
     */
    public void execute(SchedulableContext context) {
        try {
            // Log retry attempt
            System.debug(LoggingLevel.INFO, 'Executing retry for job: ' + this.jobId + 
                        ', attempt: ' + this.retryCount);
            
            // Update job status
            RouteLogicJobTracker.updateJobStatus(this.jobId, 'PROCESSING', 
                                                'Retry attempt ' + this.retryCount + ' started');
            
            // Create new queueable job for retry
            RouteLogicQueueableProcessor retryJob = new RouteLogicQueueableProcessor(
                this.jobId, this.jobType, this.recordIds, this.jobParameters, this.retryCount);
            
            // Enqueue the retry job
            System.enqueueJob(retryJob);
            
            // Record retry metrics
            recordRetryMetrics();
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            String errorMessage = 'Retry execution failed: ' + e.getMessage();
            System.debug(LoggingLevel.ERROR, errorMessage + '\n' + e.getStackTraceString());
            
            // Update job status with retry failure
            RouteLogicJobTracker.updateJobStatus(this.jobId, 'RETRY_FAILED', errorMessage);
            
            // Check if we should attempt another retry or move to dead letter queue
            handleRetryFailure(errorMessage);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Schedule a retry with exponential backoff
     * @param jobId Original job ID
     * @param jobType Type of job to retry
     * @param recordIds List of record IDs to process
     * @param jobParameters Job parameters
     * @param retryCount Current retry count
     * @param baseDelaySeconds Base delay in seconds
     */
    public static void scheduleRetry(String jobId, String jobType, List<Id> recordIds, 
                                   Map<String, Object> jobParameters, Integer retryCount, 
                                   Integer baseDelaySeconds) {
        if (String.isBlank(jobId) || String.isBlank(jobType)) {
            throw new IllegalArgumentException('Job ID and job type cannot be null or empty');
        }
        
        try {
            // Calculate delay with exponential backoff
            Integer delaySeconds = calculateRetryDelay(retryCount, baseDelaySeconds);
            
            // Create retry handler
            RouteLogicRetryHandler retryHandler = new RouteLogicRetryHandler(
                jobId, jobType, recordIds, jobParameters, retryCount);
            
            // Schedule the retry
            DateTime scheduleTime = DateTime.now().addSeconds(delaySeconds);
            String cronExpression = buildCronExpression(scheduleTime);
            String jobName = 'RouteLogic_Retry_' + jobId + '_' + retryCount;
            
            System.schedule(jobName, cronExpression, retryHandler);
            
            // Log retry scheduling
            System.debug(LoggingLevel.INFO, 'Scheduled retry for job: ' + jobId + 
                        ', attempt: ' + retryCount + ', delay: ' + delaySeconds + ' seconds');
            
            // Record retry scheduling metrics
            recordRetrySchedulingMetrics(jobId, jobType, retryCount, delaySeconds);
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            String errorMessage = 'Failed to schedule retry: ' + e.getMessage();
            System.debug(LoggingLevel.ERROR, errorMessage);
            
            // Update job status with scheduling failure
            RouteLogicJobTracker.updateJobStatus(jobId, 'RETRY_SCHEDULE_FAILED', errorMessage);
            
            // Move to dead letter queue if scheduling fails
            moveToDeadLetterQueue(jobId, jobType, recordIds, jobParameters, errorMessage);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Calculate retry delay with exponential backoff
     * @param retryCount Current retry count
     * @param baseDelaySeconds Base delay in seconds
     * @return Calculated delay in seconds
     */
    private static Integer calculateRetryDelay(Integer retryCount, Integer baseDelaySeconds) {
        if (retryCount == null || retryCount <= 0) {
            return baseDelaySeconds != null ? baseDelaySeconds : BASE_DELAY_SECONDS;
        }
        
        Integer baseDelay = baseDelaySeconds != null ? baseDelaySeconds : BASE_DELAY_SECONDS;
        
        // Calculate exponential backoff: baseDelay * (multiplier ^ (retryCount - 1))
        Decimal delay = baseDelay * Math.pow(BACKOFF_MULTIPLIER, retryCount - 1);
        
        // Cap at maximum delay
        Integer delaySeconds = Integer.valueOf(Math.min(delay, MAX_DELAY_SECONDS));
        
        // Add jitter to prevent thundering herd (±25% random variation)
        Decimal jitterFactor = 0.75 + (Math.random() * 0.5); // 0.75 to 1.25
        delaySeconds = Integer.valueOf(delaySeconds * jitterFactor);
        
        return Math.max(delaySeconds, 1); // Minimum 1 second delay
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Build cron expression for scheduled time
     * @param scheduleTime DateTime to schedule
     * @return Cron expression string
     */
    private static String buildCronExpression(DateTime scheduleTime) {
        return scheduleTime.second() + ' ' + 
               scheduleTime.minute() + ' ' + 
               scheduleTime.hour() + ' ' + 
               scheduleTime.day() + ' ' + 
               scheduleTime.month() + ' ' + 
               '? ' + 
               scheduleTime.year();
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Handle retry failure
     * @param errorMessage Error message from retry failure
     */
    private void handleRetryFailure(String errorMessage) {
        if (this.retryCount >= DEFAULT_MAX_RETRIES) {
            // Max retries exceeded, move to dead letter queue
            moveToDeadLetterQueue(this.jobId, this.jobType, this.recordIds, 
                                this.jobParameters, errorMessage);
        } else {
            // Schedule another retry
            scheduleRetry(this.jobId, this.jobType, this.recordIds, 
                         this.jobParameters, this.retryCount + 1, BASE_DELAY_SECONDS);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Move failed job to dead letter queue
     * @param jobId Job identifier
     * @param jobType Type of job
     * @param recordIds List of record IDs
     * @param jobParameters Job parameters
     * @param errorMessage Final error message
     */
    private static void moveToDeadLetterQueue(String jobId, String jobType, List<Id> recordIds, 
                                            Map<String, Object> jobParameters, String errorMessage) {
        try {
            // Create dead letter queue entry
            DeadLetterQueueEntry dlqEntry = new DeadLetterQueueEntry();
            dlqEntry.jobId = jobId;
            dlqEntry.jobType = jobType;
            dlqEntry.recordIds = recordIds;
            dlqEntry.jobParameters = jobParameters;
            dlqEntry.errorMessage = RouteLogicSecurityUtils.sanitizeInput(errorMessage);
            dlqEntry.createdDate = DateTime.now();
            dlqEntry.retryCount = DEFAULT_MAX_RETRIES;
            
            // In a real implementation, this would persist to a custom object
            // For now, we'll log and publish an event
            System.debug(LoggingLevel.ERROR, 'Job moved to dead letter queue: ' + JSON.serialize(dlqEntry));
            
            // Update job status
            RouteLogicJobTracker.failJob(jobId, 'Max retries exceeded, moved to dead letter queue: ' + errorMessage);
            
            // Publish dead letter queue event
            publishDeadLetterQueueEvent(dlqEntry);
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.debug(LoggingLevel.ERROR, 'Failed to move job to dead letter queue: ' + e.getMessage());
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Publish dead letter queue event
     * @param dlqEntry Dead letter queue entry
     */
    private static void publishDeadLetterQueueEvent(DeadLetterQueueEntry dlqEntry) {
        try {
            // Create platform event for dead letter queue monitoring
            RouteLogic_Dead_Letter_Queue__e dlqEvent = new RouteLogic_Dead_Letter_Queue__e();
            dlqEvent.Job_Id__c = dlqEntry.jobId;
            dlqEvent.Job_Type__c = dlqEntry.jobType;
            dlqEvent.Record_Count__c = dlqEntry.recordIds != null ? dlqEntry.recordIds.size() : 0;
            dlqEvent.Error_Message__c = dlqEntry.errorMessage;
            dlqEvent.Retry_Count__c = dlqEntry.retryCount;
            
            // Publish event
            EventBus.publish(dlqEvent);
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.debug(LoggingLevel.ERROR, 'Failed to publish dead letter queue event: ' + e.getMessage());
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Record retry metrics
     */
    private void recordRetryMetrics() {
        try {
            // Create retry metrics event
            RouteLogic_Retry_Metrics__e retryEvent = new RouteLogic_Retry_Metrics__e();
            retryEvent.Job_Id__c = this.jobId;
            retryEvent.Job_Type__c = this.jobType;
            retryEvent.Retry_Count__c = this.retryCount;
            retryEvent.Record_Count__c = this.recordIds != null ? this.recordIds.size() : 0;
            retryEvent.Scheduled_Time__c = this.originalScheduledTime;
            retryEvent.Execution_Time__c = DateTime.now();
            
            // Calculate delay accuracy
            if (this.originalScheduledTime != null) {
                Long delayMs = DateTime.now().getTime() - this.originalScheduledTime.getTime();
                retryEvent.Actual_Delay_Seconds__c = Integer.valueOf(delayMs / 1000);
            }
            
            // Publish event
            EventBus.publish(retryEvent);
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.debug(LoggingLevel.ERROR, 'Failed to record retry metrics: ' + e.getMessage());
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Record retry scheduling metrics
     * @param jobId Job identifier
     * @param jobType Job type
     * @param retryCount Retry count
     * @param delaySeconds Scheduled delay
     */
    private static void recordRetrySchedulingMetrics(String jobId, String jobType, 
                                                   Integer retryCount, Integer delaySeconds) {
        try {
            // Create retry scheduling metrics event
            RouteLogic_Retry_Scheduled__e scheduleEvent = new RouteLogic_Retry_Scheduled__e();
            scheduleEvent.Job_Id__c = jobId;
            scheduleEvent.Job_Type__c = jobType;
            scheduleEvent.Retry_Count__c = retryCount;
            scheduleEvent.Scheduled_Delay_Seconds__c = delaySeconds;
            scheduleEvent.Scheduled_Time__c = DateTime.now();
            
            // Publish event
            EventBus.publish(scheduleEvent);
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.debug(LoggingLevel.ERROR, 'Failed to record retry scheduling metrics: ' + e.getMessage());
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Get retry statistics
     * @param hoursBack Number of hours to analyze
     * @return RetryStatistics object
     */
    public static RetryStatistics getRetryStatistics(Integer hoursBack) {
        RetryStatistics stats = new RetryStatistics();
        
        // In a real implementation, this would query from persistent storage
        // For now, return placeholder data
        stats.totalRetries = 0;
        stats.successfulRetries = 0;
        stats.failedRetries = 0;
        stats.deadLetterQueueEntries = 0;
        stats.averageRetryDelay = 0;
        stats.retrySuccessRate = 0;
        
        return stats;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Process dead letter queue entries manually
     * @param maxEntries Maximum number of entries to process
     * @return Number of entries processed
     */
    public static Integer processDeadLetterQueue(Integer maxEntries) {
        // In a real implementation, this would query and reprocess dead letter queue entries
        // This could be called manually by administrators or scheduled periodically
        
        Integer processedEntries = 0;
        
        try {
            // Query dead letter queue entries
            // Attempt to reprocess them
            // Update their status
            
            System.debug(LoggingLevel.INFO, 'Processed ' + processedEntries + ' dead letter queue entries');
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.debug(LoggingLevel.ERROR, 'Failed to process dead letter queue: ' + e.getMessage());
        }
        
        return processedEntries;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Cancel scheduled retries for a job
     * @param jobId Job identifier
     */
    public static void cancelScheduledRetries(String jobId) {
        if (String.isBlank(jobId)) {
            return;
        }
        
        try {
            // Find and abort scheduled jobs for this job ID
            List<CronTrigger> scheduledJobs = [
                SELECT Id, CronJobDetail.Name
                FROM CronTrigger
                WHERE CronJobDetail.Name LIKE :('RouteLogic_Retry_' + jobId + '%')
                AND State = 'WAITING'
                WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED
            ];
            
            for (CronTrigger job : scheduledJobs) {
                System.abortJob(job.Id);
            }
            
            System.debug(LoggingLevel.INFO, 'Cancelled ' + scheduledJobs.size() + 
                        ' scheduled retries for job: ' + jobId);
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.debug(LoggingLevel.ERROR, 'Failed to cancel scheduled retries: ' + e.getMessage());
        }
    }
    
    // Inner classes
    
    /**
     * @description Dead letter queue entry container
     */
    public class DeadLetterQueueEntry {
        public String jobId;
        public String jobType;
        public List<Id> recordIds;
        public Map<String, Object> jobParameters;
        public String errorMessage;
        public DateTime createdDate;
        public Integer retryCount;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Retry statistics container
     */
    public class RetryStatistics {
        public Integer totalRetries;
        public Integer successfulRetries;
        public Integer failedRetries;
        public Integer deadLetterQueueEntries;
        public Integer averageRetryDelay;
        public Decimal retrySuccessRate;
    }
}
```

## 📄 FILE: force-app/main/default/classes/RouteLogicSecurityUtils.cls

```apex
/**
 * @description Security utility class for RouteLogic Enhanced v4.0.0
 * @author RouteLogic Team
 * @date 2025-01-21
 * @version 4.0.0
 * 
 * This class provides comprehensive security utilities including:
 * - Field-Level Security validation
 * - Input sanitization and XSS prevention
 * - Cryptographic utilities
 * - Access control validation
 */
public with sharing class RouteLogicSecurityUtils {
    
    // Security constants
    private static final String XSS_PATTERN = '(?i)<script[^>]*>.*?</script>|javascript:|on\\w+\\s*=';
    private static final String SQL_INJECTION_PATTERN = '(?i)(union|select|insert|update|delete|drop|create|alter|exec|execute)\\s';
    private static final Integer MAX_INPUT_LENGTH = 32768; // 32KB max input
    
    // Cache for field accessibility checks
    private static Map<String, Map<String, Boolean>> fieldAccessibilityCache = new Map<String, Map<String, Boolean>>();
    
    /**
     * @description Validate field-level security for object fields
     * @param objectName The SObject API name
     * @param fieldNames Set of field API names to validate
     * @param accessType The type of access (READ, CREATE, UPDATE)
     * @return Map of field name to accessibility boolean
     * @throws SecurityException if any field is not accessible
     */
    public static Map<String, Boolean> validateFieldAccess(String objectName, Set<String> fieldNames, AccessType accessType) {
        if (String.isBlank(objectName) || fieldNames == null || fieldNames.isEmpty()) {
            throw new IllegalArgumentException('Object name and field names cannot be null or empty');
        }
        
        Map<String, Boolean> accessibilityMap = new Map<String, Boolean>();
        String cacheKey = objectName + '_' + accessType.name();
        
        // Check cache first
        if (fieldAccessibilityCache.containsKey(cacheKey)) {
            Map<String, Boolean> cachedAccess = fieldAccessibilityCache.get(cacheKey);
            for (String fieldName : fieldNames) {
                if (cachedAccess.containsKey(fieldName)) {
                    accessibilityMap.put(fieldName, cachedAccess.get(fieldName));
                }
            }
            
            // If all fields found in cache, return
            if (accessibilityMap.size() == fieldNames.size()) {
                return accessibilityMap;
            }
        }
        
        try {
            // Get object describe
            Schema.SObjectType objectType = Schema.getGlobalDescribe().get(objectName);
            if (objectType == null) {
                throw new SecurityException('Object not found or not accessible: ' + objectName);
            }
            
            Schema.DescribeSObjectResult objectDescribe = objectType.getDescribe();
            Map<String, Schema.SObjectField> fieldMap = objectDescribe.fields.getMap();
            
            // Validate each field
            for (String fieldName : fieldNames) {
                Schema.SObjectField field = fieldMap.get(fieldName);
                if (field == null) {
                    accessibilityMap.put(fieldName, false);
                    continue;
                }
                
                Schema.DescribeFieldResult fieldDescribe = field.getDescribe();
                Boolean isAccessible = false;
                
                switch on accessType {
                    when READABLE {
                        isAccessible = fieldDescribe.isAccessible();
                    }
                    when CREATABLE {
                        isAccessible = fieldDescribe.isCreateable();
                    }
                    when UPDATABLE {
                        isAccessible = fieldDescribe.isUpdateable();
                    }
                }
                
                accessibilityMap.put(fieldName, isAccessible);
                
                // Cache the result
                if (!fieldAccessibilityCache.containsKey(cacheKey)) {
                    fieldAccessibilityCache.put(cacheKey, new Map<String, Boolean>());
                }
                fieldAccessibilityCache.get(cacheKey).put(fieldName, isAccessible);
            }
            
            // Check for any inaccessible fields
            List<String> inaccessibleFields = new List<String>();
            for (String fieldName : fieldNames) {
                if (!accessibilityMap.get(fieldName)) {
                    inaccessibleFields.add(fieldName);
                }
            }
            
            if (!inaccessibleFields.isEmpty()) {
                throw new SecurityException('Insufficient permissions for fields: ' + String.join(inaccessibleFields, ', ') + 
                                          ' on object: ' + objectName + ' for access type: ' + accessType.name());
            }
            
            return accessibilityMap;
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            if (e instanceof SecurityException) {
                throw e;
            }
            throw new SecurityException('Field access validation failed: ' + e.getMessage());
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Sanitize input to prevent XSS and injection attacks
     * @param input The input string to sanitize
     * @return Sanitized input string
     */
    public static String sanitizeInput(String input) {
        if (String.isBlank(input)) {
            return input;
        }
        
        // Check input length
        if (input.length() > MAX_INPUT_LENGTH) {
            throw new SecurityException('Input exceeds maximum allowed length: ' + MAX_INPUT_LENGTH);
        }
        
        String sanitized = input;
        
        // Remove potential XSS patterns
        sanitized = sanitized.replaceAll(XSS_PATTERN, '');
        
        // Remove potential SQL injection patterns
        sanitized = sanitized.replaceAll(SQL_INJECTION_PATTERN, '');
        
        // HTML encode special characters
        sanitized = sanitized.replace('&', '&amp;')
                            .replace('<', '&lt;')
                            .replace('>', '&gt;')
                            .replace('"', '&quot;')
                            .replace('\'', '&#x27;')
                            .replace('/', '&#x2F;');
        
        return sanitized;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Validate and sanitize SOQL query parameters
     * @param queryParams Map of parameter names to values
     * @return Map of sanitized parameters
     */
    public static Map<String, Object> sanitizeQueryParameters(Map<String, Object> queryParams) {
        if (queryParams == null || queryParams.isEmpty()) {
            return queryParams;
        }
        
        Map<String, Object> sanitizedParams = new Map<String, Object>();
        
        for (String paramName : queryParams.keySet()) {
            Object paramValue = queryParams.get(paramName);
            
            if (paramValue instanceof String) {
                sanitizedParams.put(paramName, sanitizeInput((String) paramValue));
            } else if (paramValue instanceof List<String>) {
                List<String> stringList = (List<String>) paramValue;
                List<String> sanitizedList = new List<String>();
                for (String str : stringList) {
                    sanitizedList.add(sanitizeInput(str));
                }
                sanitizedParams.put(paramName, sanitizedList);
            } else {
                // For non-string types, validate they are safe types
                if (paramValue instanceof Id || paramValue instanceof Integer || 
                    paramValue instanceof Decimal || paramValue instanceof Boolean || 
                    paramValue instanceof Date || paramValue instanceof DateTime) {
                    sanitizedParams.put(paramName, paramValue);
                } else {
                    throw new SecurityException('Unsupported parameter type for: ' + paramName);
                }
            }
        }
        
        return sanitizedParams;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Generate secure hash for data integrity
     * @param data The data to hash
     * @param salt Optional salt for additional security
     * @return SHA-256 hash as hex string
     */
    public static String generateSecureHash(String data, String salt) {
        if (String.isBlank(data)) {
            throw new IllegalArgumentException('Data cannot be null or empty');
        }
        
        String hashInput = data;
        if (String.isNotBlank(salt)) {
            hashInput = salt + data + salt;
        }
        
        Blob hashBlob = Crypto.generateDigest('SHA-256', Blob.valueOf(hashInput));
        return EncodingUtil.convertToHex(hashBlob);
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Validate HMAC signature for webhook security
     * @param payload The webhook payload
     * @param signature The provided signature
     * @param secret The webhook secret
     * @return True if signature is valid
     */
    public static Boolean validateHMACSignature(String payload, String signature, String secret) {
        if (String.isBlank(payload) || String.isBlank(signature) || String.isBlank(secret)) {
            return false;
        }
        
        try {
            Blob hmac = Crypto.generateMac('HmacSHA256', Blob.valueOf(payload), Blob.valueOf(secret));
            String expectedSignature = EncodingUtil.convertToHex(hmac);
            
            return Crypto.equals(signature, expectedSignature);
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.debug(LoggingLevel.ERROR, 'HMAC validation failed: ' + e.getMessage());
            return false;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Check if current user has object-level access
     * @param objectName The SObject API name
     * @param accessType The type of access required
     * @return True if user has access
     */
    public static Boolean hasObjectAccess(String objectName, AccessType accessType) {
        if (String.isBlank(objectName)) {
            return false;
        }
        
        try {
            Schema.SObjectType objectType = Schema.getGlobalDescribe().get(objectName);
            if (objectType == null) {
                return false;
            }
            
            Schema.DescribeSObjectResult objectDescribe = objectType.getDescribe();
            
            switch on accessType {
                when READABLE {
                    return objectDescribe.isAccessible();
                }
                when CREATABLE {
                    return objectDescribe.isCreateable();
                }
                when UPDATABLE {
                    return objectDescribe.isUpdateable();
                }
                when DELETABLE {
                    return objectDescribe.isDeletable();
                }
            }
            
            return false;
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.debug(LoggingLevel.ERROR, 'Object access check failed: ' + e.getMessage());
            return false;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Strip inaccessible fields from SObject records
     * @param accessType The type of access being performed
     * @param records List of SObject records to strip
     * @return List of records with inaccessible fields removed
     */
    public static List<SObject> stripInaccessibleFields(AccessType accessType, List<SObject> records) {
        if (records == null || records.isEmpty()) {
            return records;
        }
        
        try {
            return Security.stripInaccessible(accessType, records).getRecords();
        } catch (Exception e) {
            throw new SecurityException('Failed to strip inaccessible fields: ' + e.getMessage());
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Clear security cache (useful for testing)
     */
    @TestVisible
    private static void clearSecurityCache() {
        fieldAccessibilityCache.clear();
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Custom exception for security violations
     */
    public class SecurityException extends Exception {}
    
    /**
     * @description Enum for access types
     */
    public enum AccessType {
        READABLE,
        CREATABLE, 
        UPDATABLE,
        DELETABLE
    }
}
```

## 📄 FILE: force-app/main/default/classes/RoutingLedgerTriggerHandler.cls

```apex
/**
 * @description Handler for Routing_Ledger__c trigger to enforce immutability and security
 * @author RouteLogic Team
 * @date 2025-01-21
 * @version 1.0
 * 
 * This handler ensures the immutability of routing ledger entries through cryptographic
 * verification and prevents any unauthorized modifications or deletions.
 */
public with sharing class RoutingLedgerTriggerHandler {
    
    private static final String IMMUTABILITY_ERROR = 'Routing Ledger entries are immutable and cannot be modified or deleted';
    private static final String HASH_VERIFICATION_ERROR = 'Security hash verification failed - data integrity compromised';
    
    /**
     * @description Handle before insert operations
     * @param newRecords List of new Routing_Ledger__c records
     */
    public static void handleBeforeInsert(List<Routing_Ledger__c> newRecords) {
        for (Routing_Ledger__c ledger : newRecords) {
            // Generate security hash for immutability
            ledger.Security_Hash__c = generateSecurityHash(ledger);
            
            // Set handoff timestamp if not already set
            if (ledger.Handoff_Timestamp__c == null) {
                ledger.Handoff_Timestamp__c = DateTime.now();
            }
            
            // Validate required fields
            validateRequiredFields(ledger);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Handle before update operations - prevent all updates
     * @param newRecords List of updated Routing_Ledger__c records
     * @param oldRecordsMap Map of old record values
     */
    public static void handleBeforeUpdate(List<Routing_Ledger__c> newRecords, Map<Id, Routing_Ledger__c> oldRecordsMap) {
        // Routing ledger entries are immutable - no updates allowed
        for (Routing_Ledger__c ledger : newRecords) {
            Routing_Ledger__c oldRecord = oldRecordsMap.get(ledger.Id);
            
            // Check if any field has been modified
            if (hasFieldsChanged(ledger, oldRecord)) {
                ledger.addError(IMMUTABILITY_ERROR);
            }
            
            // Verify security hash integrity
            String expectedHash = generateSecurityHash(oldRecord);
            if (!Crypto.equals(oldRecord.Security_Hash__c, expectedHash)) {
                ledger.addError(HASH_VERIFICATION_ERROR);
            }
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Handle before delete operations - prevent all deletions
     * @param oldRecords List of Routing_Ledger__c records being deleted
     */
    public static void handleBeforeDelete(List<Routing_Ledger__c> oldRecords) {
        // Routing ledger entries are immutable - no deletions allowed
        for (Routing_Ledger__c ledger : oldRecords) {
            ledger.addError(IMMUTABILITY_ERROR);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Generate SHA-256 security hash for a routing ledger entry
     * @param ledger The routing ledger record
     * @return SHA-256 hash string
     */
    public static String generateSecurityHash(Routing_Ledger__c ledger) {
        // Create hash input from critical fields
        List<String> hashComponents = new List<String>{
            String.valueOf(ledger.Case__c),
            ledger.Initial_AI_Provider__c,
            ledger.Routing_Engine_Decision__c,
            ledger.Handoff_Status__c,
            String.valueOf(ledger.Handoff_Timestamp__c),
            UserInfo.getOrganizationId(), // Include org ID for uniqueness
            String.valueOf(DateTime.now().getTime()) // Include timestamp for uniqueness
        };
        
        // Join components and generate hash
        String hashInput = String.join(hashComponents, '|');
        Blob hashBlob = Crypto.generateDigest('SHA-256', Blob.valueOf(hashInput));
        
        return EncodingUtil.convertToHex(hashBlob);
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Validate required fields for routing ledger entry
     * @param ledger The routing ledger record
     */
    private static void validateRequiredFields(Routing_Ledger__c ledger) {
        List<String> errors = new List<String>();
        
        if (String.isBlank(ledger.Initial_AI_Provider__c)) {
            errors.add('Initial AI Provider is required');
        }
        
        if (String.isBlank(ledger.Handoff_Status__c)) {
            errors.add('Handoff Status is required');
        }
        
        if (ledger.Handoff_Timestamp__c == null) {
            errors.add('Handoff Timestamp is required');
        }
        
        if (String.isBlank(ledger.Routing_Engine_Decision__c)) {
            errors.add('Routing Engine Decision is required');
        }
        
        if (!errors.isEmpty()) {
            ledger.addError('Validation failed: ' + String.join(errors, '; '));
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Check if any fields have changed between old and new records
     * @param newRecord The new record
     * @param oldRecord The old record
     * @return True if any fields have changed
     */
    private static Boolean hasFieldsChanged(Routing_Ledger__c newRecord, Routing_Ledger__c oldRecord) {
        // Check all critical fields for changes
        return newRecord.Case__c != oldRecord.Case__c ||
               newRecord.Initial_AI_Provider__c != oldRecord.Initial_AI_Provider__c ||
               newRecord.Routing_Engine_Decision__c != oldRecord.Routing_Engine_Decision__c ||
               newRecord.Handoff_Status__c != oldRecord.Handoff_Status__c ||
               newRecord.Handoff_Timestamp__c != oldRecord.Handoff_Timestamp__c ||
               newRecord.Security_Hash__c != oldRecord.Security_Hash__c;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Create routing ledger entry from routing decision
     * @param decision The routing decision from AgnosticRoutingEngine
     * @param aiProvider The AI provider that initiated the handoff
     * @return Routing_Ledger__c record ready for insert
     */
    public static Routing_Ledger__c createLedgerEntry(AgnosticRoutingEngine.RoutingDecision decision, String aiProvider) {
        Routing_Ledger__c ledger = new Routing_Ledger__c();
        
        // Map routing decision to ledger fields
        ledger.Case__c = decision.caseId;
        ledger.Initial_AI_Provider__c = aiProvider;
        ledger.Routing_Engine_Decision__c = JSON.serialize(decision);
        ledger.Handoff_Status__c = 'Initiated';
        ledger.Handoff_Timestamp__c = decision.routingTimestamp != null ? 
                                      decision.routingTimestamp : DateTime.now();
        
        return ledger;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Verify the integrity of a routing ledger entry
     * @param ledger The routing ledger record to verify
     * @return True if the record integrity is valid
     */
    public static Boolean verifyLedgerIntegrity(Routing_Ledger__c ledger) {
        if (ledger == null || String.isBlank(ledger.Security_Hash__c)) {
            return false;
        }
        
        // Create a copy without the security hash for verification
        Routing_Ledger__c verificationCopy = ledger.clone(false, false, false, false);
        verificationCopy.Security_Hash__c = null;
        
        // Generate expected hash
        String expectedHash = generateSecurityHash(verificationCopy);
        
        // Compare with stored hash using timing-safe comparison
        return Crypto.equals(ledger.Security_Hash__c, expectedHash);
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Query interface for audit trail retrieval
     * @param caseId The case ID to retrieve audit trail for
     * @return List of routing ledger entries for the case
     */
    public static List<Routing_Ledger__c> getAuditTrailForCase(Id caseId) {
        if (caseId == null) {
            return new List<Routing_Ledger__c>();
        }
        
        return [
            SELECT Id, Name, Case__c, Initial_AI_Provider__c, Routing_Engine_Decision__c,
                   Handoff_Status__c, Handoff_Timestamp__c, Security_Hash__c,
                   CreatedDate, CreatedById
            FROM Routing_Ledger__c
            WHERE Case__c = :caseId
            WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED
            ORDER BY Handoff_Timestamp__c ASC
        ];
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Query interface for audit trail retrieval by date range
     * @param startDate Start date for audit trail
     * @param endDate End date for audit trail
     * @return List of routing ledger entries within date range
     */
    public static List<Routing_Ledger__c> getAuditTrailByDateRange(DateTime startDate, DateTime endDate) {
        if (startDate == null || endDate == null) {
            return new List<Routing_Ledger__c>();
        }
        
        return [
            SELECT Id, Name, Case__c, Initial_AI_Provider__c, Routing_Engine_Decision__c,
                   Handoff_Status__c, Handoff_Timestamp__c, Security_Hash__c,
                   CreatedDate, CreatedById
            FROM Routing_Ledger__c
            WHERE Handoff_Timestamp__c >= :startDate
            AND Handoff_Timestamp__c <= :endDate
            WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED
            ORDER BY Handoff_Timestamp__c DESC
            LIMIT 10000
        ];
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Query interface for failed handoffs (Black Hole cases)
     * @param hoursBack Number of hours to look back
     * @return List of failed handoff entries
     */
    public static List<Routing_Ledger__c> getBlackHoleCases(Integer hoursBack) {
        DateTime cutoffTime = DateTime.now().addHours(-hoursBack);
        
        return [
            SELECT Id, Name, Case__c, Initial_AI_Provider__c, Routing_Engine_Decision__c,
                   Handoff_Status__c, Handoff_Timestamp__c, Security_Hash__c,
                   CreatedDate, CreatedById
            FROM Routing_Ledger__c
            WHERE Handoff_Status__c = 'Black_Hole'
            AND Handoff_Timestamp__c >= :cutoffTime
            WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED
            ORDER BY Handoff_Timestamp__c DESC
        ];
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Get handoff success rate metrics
     * @param hoursBack Number of hours to analyze
     * @return Map containing success rate metrics
     */
    public static Map<String, Object> getHandoffSuccessMetrics(Integer hoursBack) {
        DateTime cutoffTime = DateTime.now().addHours(-hoursBack);
        
        List<AggregateResult> results = [
            SELECT Handoff_Status__c, COUNT(Id) totalCount
            FROM Routing_Ledger__c
            WHERE Handoff_Timestamp__c >= :cutoffTime
            WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED
            GROUP BY Handoff_Status__c
        ];
        
        Map<String, Object> metrics = new Map<String, Object>();
        Integer totalHandoffs = 0;
        Integer successfulHandoffs = 0;
        Integer failedHandoffs = 0;
        Integer blackHoleHandoffs = 0;
        
        for (AggregateResult result : results) {
            String status = (String) result.get('Handoff_Status__c');
            Integer count = (Integer) result.get('totalCount');
            totalHandoffs += count;
            
            if (status == 'Completed') {
                successfulHandoffs += count;
            } else if (status == 'Failed') {
                failedHandoffs += count;
            } else if (status == 'Black_Hole') {
                blackHoleHandoffs += count;
            }
        }
        
        metrics.put('totalHandoffs', totalHandoffs);
        metrics.put('successfulHandoffs', successfulHandoffs);
        metrics.put('failedHandoffs', failedHandoffs);
        metrics.put('blackHoleHandoffs', blackHoleHandoffs);
        metrics.put('successRate', totalHandoffs > 0 ? 
                   (Decimal.valueOf(successfulHandoffs) / Decimal.valueOf(totalHandoffs)) * 100 : 0);
        metrics.put('failureRate', totalHandoffs > 0 ? 
                   (Decimal.valueOf(failedHandoffs + blackHoleHandoffs) / Decimal.valueOf(totalHandoffs)) * 100 : 0);
        
        return metrics;
    }
}
```

## 📄 FILE: force-app/main/default/classes/SecurityKeyManager.cls

```apex
/**
 * @description DEPRECATED - Manages encryption key lifecycle including generation, rotation, and archival
 * @author RouteLogic Team
 * @date 2025-01-17
 * @deprecated This class is deprecated as of RouteLogic v3.3.0. Use Salesforce Shield Platform Encryption instead.
 * 
 * MIGRATION NOTICE:
 * RouteLogic now leverages native Salesforce Shield Platform Encryption for all data protection needs.
 * This provides enterprise-grade security with zero custom code maintenance overhead.
 * 
 * To migrate:
 * 1. Enable Salesforce Shield Platform Encryption in your org
 * 2. Configure field-level encryption for sensitive data
 * 3. Remove dependencies on this class
 * 4. Use SecurityUtils.stripInaccessibleRecords() for CRUD security
 */
@Deprecated
public with sharing class SecurityKeyManager {
    
    private static final Integer SECURITY_KEY_SIZE = 256;
    private static final Integer KEY_ROTATION_DAYS = 90;
    private static final Integer KEY_RETENTION_DAYS = 365;
    
    /**
     * @description Rotate encryption keys automatically
     * This method is called by scheduled job every 90 days
     */
    @future
    public static void rotateEncryptionKeys() {
        try {
            // Generate new AES-256 key
            Blob newKey = Crypto.generateAesKey(SECURITY_KEY_SIZE);
            
            // Get current settings
            AI_Security_Settings__c settings = AI_Security_Settings__c.getOrgDefaults();
            if (settings.Id == null) {
                settings = initializeSecuritySettings();
            }
            
            Integer currentVersion = settings.Key_Version__c != null ? 
                Integer.valueOf(settings.Key_Version__c) : 0;
            
            // Create new key version using enhanced versioning
            KeyVersionManager.KeyVersion newKeyVersion = KeyVersionManager.createKeyVersion(newKey);
            
            // Validate key transition
            if (currentVersion > 0 && !KeyVersionManager.validateKeyTransition(currentVersion, newKeyVersion.version)) {
                throw new SecurityException('Invalid key version transition');
            }
            
            // Store new key version
            KeyVersionManager.storeKeyVersion(newKeyVersion, newKey);
            
            // Archive current key
            if (currentVersion > 0) {
                archiveCurrentKey(settings, currentVersion);
            }
            
            // Store new key (legacy support)
            storeNewKey(settings, newKey, newKeyVersion.version);
            
            // Update settings
            settings.Key_Version__c = newKeyVersion.version;
            settings.Last_Rotation_Date__c = DateTime.now();
            settings.Next_Rotation_Date__c = DateTime.now().addDays(KEY_ROTATION_DAYS);
            settings.Active__c = true;
            
            // Apply FLS before upsert
            List<AI_Security_Settings__c> settingsToUpsert = new List<AI_Security_Settings__c>{settings};
            settingsToUpsert = SecurityUtils.stripInaccessibleRecords(
                AccessType.UPSERTABLE,
                settingsToUpsert
            );
            
            upsert settingsToUpsert[0];
            
            // Log rotation event with enhanced details
            AuditService.logSecurityEvent(
                'KEY_ROTATION',
                'Encryption key rotated to version ' + newKeyVersion.version + ' (ID: ' + newKeyVersion.keyId + ')',
                'Success'
            );
            
            // Schedule re-encryption of existing data
            if (currentVersion > 0) {
                System.enqueueJob(new DataReEncryptionQueueable(newKeyVersion.version, currentVersion));
            }
            
            // Notify administrators
            notifyAdministrators('Encryption key rotation completed successfully. New version: ' + newKeyVersion.version + ' (ID: ' + newKeyVersion.keyId + ')');
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            // Log failure and create security incident
            handleKeyRotationFailure(e);
            throw new SecurityException('Key rotation failed: ' + e.getMessage());
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Initialize security settings if not exists
     */
    private static AI_Security_Settings__c initializeSecuritySettings() {
        AI_Security_Settings__c settings = new AI_Security_Settings__c(
            SetupOwnerId = UserInfo.getOrganizationId(),
            Enable_Encryption__c = true,
            Enable_Key_Rotation__c = true,
            Key_Version__c = 0,
            Active__c = true
        );
        
        // Apply FLS before insert
        List<AI_Security_Settings__c> settingsToInsert = new List<AI_Security_Settings__c>{settings};
        settingsToInsert = SecurityUtils.stripInaccessibleRecords(
            AccessType.CREATABLE,
            settingsToInsert
        );
        
        insert settingsToInsert[0];
        return settings;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Archive the current encryption key
     */
    private static void archiveCurrentKey(AI_Security_Settings__c settings, Integer version) {
        String currentKeyField = 'Encryption_Key_v' + version + '__c';
        String archiveKeyField = 'Archive_Key_v' + version + '__c';
        String archiveDateField = 'Archive_Date_v' + version + '__c';
        
        // Move current key to archive
        if (settings.get(currentKeyField) != null) {
            settings.put(archiveKeyField, settings.get(currentKeyField));
            settings.put(archiveDateField, DateTime.now());
            
            // Clear current key field
            settings.put(currentKeyField, null);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Store new encryption key
     */
    private static void storeNewKey(AI_Security_Settings__c settings, Blob newKey, Integer version) {
        String keyField = 'Encryption_Key_v' + version + '__c';
        String createdDateField = 'Key_Created_Date_v' + version + '__c';
        
        // Encode and store key
        String encodedKey = EncodingUtil.base64Encode(newKey);
        settings.put(keyField, encodedKey);
        settings.put(createdDateField, DateTime.now());
        
        // Generate key metadata
        Map<String, Object> keyMetadata = new Map<String, Object>{
            'version' => version,
            'algorithm' => 'AES256',
            'keySize' => SECURITY_KEY_SIZE,
            'created' => DateTime.now().format(),
            'createdBy' => UserInfo.getUserId()
        };
        
        settings.Key_Metadata__c = JSON.serialize(keyMetadata);
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Get current encryption key
     */
    public static Blob getCurrentKey() {
        AI_Security_Settings__c settings = AI_Security_Settings__c.getOrgDefaults();
        
        if (settings.Id == null || settings.Key_Version__c == null) {
            throw new SecurityException('Encryption not initialized');
        }
        
        Integer currentVersion = Integer.valueOf(settings.Key_Version__c);
        
        try {
            // Try to get key from enhanced version manager first
            return KeyVersionManager.getKeyByVersion(currentVersion);
        } catch (Exception e) {
            // Fallback to legacy method
            String keyField = 'Encryption_Key_v' + currentVersion + '__c';
            
            String encodedKey = (String)settings.get(keyField);
            if (String.isBlank(encodedKey)) {
                throw new SecurityException('Current encryption key not found');
            }
            
            return EncodingUtil.base64Decode(encodedKey);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Get key for specific version (for decryption)
     */
    public static Blob getKeyForVersion(Integer version) {
        try {
            // Try to get key from enhanced version manager first
            return KeyVersionManager.getKeyByVersion(version);
        } catch (Exception e) {
            // Fallback to legacy method
            AI_Security_Settings__c settings = AI_Security_Settings__c.getOrgDefaults();
            
            if (settings.Id == null) {
                throw new SecurityException('Encryption not initialized');
            }
            
            Integer currentVersion = Integer.valueOf(settings.Key_Version__c);
            
            // Check if requesting current key
            if (version == currentVersion) {
                return getCurrentKey();
            }
            
            // Check archived keys
            String archiveKeyField = 'Archive_Key_v' + version + '__c';
            String encodedKey = (String)settings.get(archiveKeyField);
            
            if (String.isBlank(encodedKey)) {
                throw new SecurityException('Encryption key for version ' + version + ' not found');
            }
            
            // Verify key hasn't exceeded retention period
            String archiveDateField = 'Archive_Date_v' + version + '__c';
            DateTime archiveDate = (DateTime)settings.get(archiveDateField);
            
            if (archiveDate != null && archiveDate.addDays(KEY_RETENTION_DAYS) < DateTime.now()) {
                throw new SecurityException('Encryption key for version ' + version + ' has expired');
            }
            
            return EncodingUtil.base64Decode(encodedKey);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Check if key rotation is due
     */
    public static Boolean isRotationDue() {
        AI_Security_Settings__c settings = AI_Security_Settings__c.getOrgDefaults();
        
        if (settings.Id == null || settings.Last_Rotation_Date__c == null) {
            return true; // First time setup
        }
        
        if (!settings.Enable_Key_Rotation__c) {
            return false; // Rotation disabled
        }
        
        DateTime lastRotation = settings.Last_Rotation_Date__c;
        return lastRotation.addDays(KEY_ROTATION_DAYS) <= DateTime.now();
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Emergency key rotation (manual trigger)
     */
    public static void emergencyKeyRotation(String reason) {
        // Verify admin permissions
        if (!FeatureManagement.checkPermission('AI_Security_Admin')) {
            throw new InsufficientPrivilegesException('Security admin permission required');
        }
        
        // Log emergency rotation request
        AuditService.logSecurityEvent(
            'EMERGENCY_KEY_ROTATION',
            'Emergency key rotation requested. Reason: ' + reason,
            'Initiated'
        );
        
        // Perform rotation
        rotateEncryptionKeys();
        
        // Create security incident
        AI_Security_Incident__c incident = new AI_Security_Incident__c(
            Type__c = 'Emergency Key Rotation',
            Severity__c = 'High',
            Status__c = 'Resolved',
            Description__c = reason,
            Resolution__c = 'Keys rotated successfully',
            Reported_By__c = UserInfo.getUserId(),
            Resolved_Date__c = DateTime.now()
        );
        
        // Apply FLS before insert
        List<AI_Security_Incident__c> incidentsToInsert = new List<AI_Security_Incident__c>{incident};
        incidentsToInsert = SecurityUtils.stripInaccessibleRecords(
            AccessType.CREATABLE,
            incidentsToInsert
        );
        
        insert incidentsToInsert[0];
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Clean up expired keys
     */
    @future
    public static void cleanupExpiredKeys() {
        AI_Security_Settings__c settings = AI_Security_Settings__c.getOrgDefaults();
        
        if (settings.Id == null) {
            return;
        }
        
        Integer currentVersion = Integer.valueOf(settings.Key_Version__c);
        DateTime cutoffDate = DateTime.now().addDays(-KEY_RETENTION_DAYS);
        
        // Check each archived key
        for (Integer version = 1; version < currentVersion; version++) {
            String archiveDateField = 'Archive_Date_v' + version + '__c';
            DateTime archiveDate = (DateTime)settings.get(archiveDateField);
            
            if (archiveDate != null && archiveDate < cutoffDate) {
                // Clear expired key
                String archiveKeyField = 'Archive_Key_v' + version + '__c';
                settings.put(archiveKeyField, null);
                settings.put(archiveDateField, null);
                
                // Log cleanup
                AuditService.logSecurityEvent(
                    'KEY_CLEANUP',
                    'Expired key removed. Version: ' + version,
                    'Success'
                );
            }
        }
        
        // Apply FLS before update
        List<AI_Security_Settings__c> settingsToUpdate = new List<AI_Security_Settings__c>{settings};
        settingsToUpdate = SecurityUtils.stripInaccessibleRecords(
            AccessType.UPDATABLE,
            settingsToUpdate
        );
        
        update settingsToUpdate[0];
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Handle key rotation failure
     */
    private static void handleKeyRotationFailure(Exception e) {
        // Log error
        ErrorLogService.logError('SecurityKeyManager.rotateEncryptionKeys', e, null);
        
        // Create critical security incident
        AI_Security_Incident__c incident = new AI_Security_Incident__c(
            Type__c = 'Key Rotation Failure',
            Severity__c = 'Critical',
            Status__c = 'Open',
            Description__c = 'Automatic key rotation failed: ' + e.getMessage(),
            Stack_Trace__c = e.getStackTraceString(),
            Reported_By__c = UserInfo.getUserId()
        );
        
        // Apply FLS before insert
        List<AI_Security_Incident__c> incidentsToInsert = new List<AI_Security_Incident__c>{incident};
        incidentsToInsert = SecurityUtils.stripInaccessibleRecords(
            AccessType.CREATABLE,
            incidentsToInsert
        );
        
        insert incidentsToInsert[0];
        
        // Send emergency notification
        Messaging.SingleEmailMessage email = new Messaging.SingleEmailMessage();
        email.setToAddresses(getSecurityTeamEmails());
        email.setSubject('CRITICAL: Encryption Key Rotation Failed');
        email.setHtmlBody(
            '<p>Automatic encryption key rotation has failed.</p>' +
            '<p><b>Error:</b> ' + e.getMessage() + '</p>' +
            '<p><b>Time:</b> ' + DateTime.now().format() + '</p>' +
            '<p><b>Incident ID:</b> ' + incident.Id + '</p>' +
            '<p>Please investigate immediately.</p>'
        );
        email.setSaveAsActivity(false);
        
        Messaging.sendEmail(new List<Messaging.SingleEmailMessage>{email});
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Notify administrators of key rotation
     */
    private static void notifyAdministrators(String message) {
        List<User> admins = [
            SELECT Id, Email, Name
            FROM User
            WHERE Profile.Name = 'System Administrator'
            AND IsActive = true
            LIMIT 10
        ];
        
        if (admins.isEmpty()) {
            return;
        }
        
        List<Messaging.SingleEmailMessage> emails = new List<Messaging.SingleEmailMessage>();
        
        for (User admin : admins) {
            Messaging.SingleEmailMessage email = new Messaging.SingleEmailMessage();
            email.setToAddresses(new List<String>{admin.Email});
            email.setSubject('RouteLogic: Encryption Key Rotation Completed');
            email.setHtmlBody(
                '<p>Dear ' + admin.Name + ',</p>' +
                '<p>' + message + '</p>' +
                '<p><b>Time:</b> ' + DateTime.now().format() + '</p>' +
                '<p><b>Next rotation:</b> ' + DateTime.now().addDays(KEY_ROTATION_DAYS).format() + '</p>' +
                '<p>No action required. This is an automated notification.</p>' +
                '<br/>' +
                '<p>Best regards,<br/>RouteLogic Security Team</p>'
            );
            email.setSaveAsActivity(false);
            emails.add(email);
        }
        
        if (!emails.isEmpty()) {
            Messaging.sendEmail(emails);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Get security team emails for critical notifications
     */
    private static List<String> getSecurityTeamEmails() {
        // Get from custom metadata or settings
        List<String> emails = new List<String>();
        
        // Add configured security team emails
        AI_Security_Config__mdt config = [
            SELECT Security_Team_Emails__c
            FROM AI_Security_Config__mdt
            WHERE DeveloperName = 'Default'
            LIMIT 1
        ];
        
        if (config != null && String.isNotBlank(config.Security_Team_Emails__c)) {
            emails.addAll(config.Security_Team_Emails__c.split(','));
        }
        
        // Fallback to system admins
        if (emails.isEmpty()) {
            List<User> admins = [
                SELECT Email
                FROM User
                WHERE Profile.Name = 'System Administrator'
                AND IsActive = true
                LIMIT 5
            ];
            
            for (User admin : admins) {
                emails.add(admin.Email);
            }
        }
        
        return emails;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Get key rotation status for monitoring
     */
    public static KeyRotationStatus getRotationStatus() {
        KeyRotationStatus status = new KeyRotationStatus();
        
        try {
            AI_Security_Settings__c settings = AI_Security_Settings__c.getOrgDefaults();
            
            if (settings.Id == null) {
                status.isInitialized = false;
                status.message = 'Encryption not initialized';
                return status;
            }
            
            status.isInitialized = true;
            status.currentVersion = Integer.valueOf(settings.Key_Version__c);
            status.lastRotationDate = settings.Last_Rotation_Date__c;
            status.nextRotationDate = settings.Next_Rotation_Date__c;
            status.isRotationDue = isRotationDue();
            status.rotationEnabled = settings.Enable_Key_Rotation__c;
            
            // Get enhanced version information
            try {
                KeyVersionManager.KeyVersion currentKeyVersion = KeyVersionManager.getCurrentKeyVersion();
                status.currentKeyId = currentKeyVersion.keyId;
                status.keyAlgorithm = currentKeyVersion.algorithm;
                status.keyExpiryDate = currentKeyVersion.expiryDate;
                
                // Get all versions for history
                List<KeyVersionManager.KeyVersion> allVersions = KeyVersionManager.getAllKeyVersions();
                status.totalVersions = allVersions.size();
                status.activeVersions = 0;
                status.expiredVersions = 0;
                
                for (KeyVersionManager.KeyVersion kv : allVersions) {
                    if (kv.status == 'ACTIVE') {
                        status.activeVersions++;
                    } else if (kv.status == 'EXPIRED') {
                        status.expiredVersions++;
                    }
                }
            } catch (Exception e) {
                // Enhanced versioning not available yet
                System.debug('Enhanced key versioning not available: ' + e.getMessage());
            }
            
            if (status.isRotationDue) {
                status.message = 'Key rotation is overdue';
            } else if (status.nextRotationDate != null) {
                Integer daysUntilRotation = DateTime.now().date().daysBetween(status.nextRotationDate.date());
                status.message = 'Next rotation in ' + daysUntilRotation + ' days';
            }
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            status.hasError = true;
            status.message = 'Error retrieving rotation status: ' + e.getMessage();
        }
        
        return status;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Key rotation status class
     */
    @namespaceAccessible
    public class KeyRotationStatus {
        @AuraEnabled public Boolean isInitialized { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Integer currentVersion { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public DateTime lastRotationDate { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public DateTime nextRotationDate { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Boolean isRotationDue { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Boolean rotationEnabled { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public String message { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Boolean hasError { get; set; }
        // Enhanced versioning fields
        @AuraEnabled public String currentKeyId { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public String keyAlgorithm { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public DateTime keyExpiryDate { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Integer totalVersions { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Integer activeVersions { get; set; }
        @AuraEnabled public Integer expiredVersions { get; set; }
        
        public KeyRotationStatus() {
            this.hasError = false;
            this.isInitialized = false;
            this.totalVersions = 0;
            this.activeVersions = 0;
            this.expiredVersions = 0;
        }
    }
}
```

```apex
/**
 * @description Negative test cases for SecurityKeyManager
 * @author RouteLogic Team
 * @date 2025-01-20
 */
@isTest
@namespaceAccessible
public with sharing class SecurityKeyManagerNegativeTest {
    
    @TestSetup
    static void setup() {
        // Create test metadata records
        AI_Provider_Settings__mdt testSettings = new AI_Provider_Settings__mdt(
            DeveloperName = 'Test_Provider',
            Label = 'Test Provider',
            Provider_Name__c = 'TestProvider',
            Endpoint_URL__c = 'https://test.example.com/api',
            Authentication_Type__c = 'OAuth2',
            Named_Credential__c = 'Test_API',
            Is_Active__c = true
        );
        
        // Create security settings
        AI_Security_Settings__c secSettings = AI_Security_Settings__c.getOrgDefaults();
        secSettings.Key_Version__c = '1';
        secSettings.Encryption_Algorithm__c = 'AES256';
        secSettings.Key_Rotation_Days__c = 90;
        upsert secSettings;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test unauthorized key rotation attempts
     */
    @isTest
    static void testUnauthorizedKeyRotation() {
        // Create a user without Manage Encryption Keys permission
        Profile stdProfile = [SELECT Id FROM Profile WHERE Name = 'Standard User' LIMIT 1];
        User stdUser = new User(
            Alias = 'stdkey',
            Email = 'stdkey@test.com',
            EmailEncodingKey = 'UTF-8',
            LastName = 'StandardKey',
            LanguageLocaleKey = 'en_US',
            LocaleSidKey = 'en_US',
            ProfileId = stdProfile.Id,
            TimeZoneSidKey = 'America/Los_Angeles',
            UserName = 'stdkey@routelogic.test.unique'
        );
        insert stdUser;
        
        Test.startTest();
        System.runAs(stdUser) {
            try {
                SecurityKeyManager keyManager = new SecurityKeyManager();
                keyManager.rotateKeys();
                System.assert(false, 'Expected exception for unauthorized key rotation');
            } catch (Exception e) {
                System.assert(
                    e.getMessage().contains('permission') || 
                    e.getMessage().contains('Unauthorized') ||
                    e.getMessage().contains('INSUFFICIENT'),
                    'Expected permission error, got: ' + e.getMessage()
                );
            }
        }
        Test.stopTest();
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test tampering with key checksums
     */
    @isTest
    static void testKeyChecksumTampering() {
        Test.startTest();
        try {
            // Create a key version with tampered checksum
            AI_Key_Version__c keyVersion = new AI_Key_Version__c(
                Key_ID__c = 'KEY-V1-TAMPERED',
                Version_Number__c = 999,
                Algorithm__c = 'AES256',
                Key_Size__c = 256,
                Status__c = 'ACTIVE',
                Checksum__c = 'INVALID_CHECKSUM',
                Created_Date__c = DateTime.now(),
                Expiry_Date__c = DateTime.now().addDays(90)
            );
            insert keyVersion;
            
            // Attempt to use the tampered key
            KeyVersionManager.KeyVersion kv = new KeyVersionManager.KeyVersion();
            kv.keyId = keyVersion.Key_ID__c;
            kv.checksum = keyVersion.Checksum__c;
            
            // Verify integrity check should fail
            Boolean isValid = KeyVersionManager.verifyKeyIntegrity(kv);
            System.assert(!isValid, 'Tampered key should fail integrity check');
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            // Expected if integrity checks prevent insertion
            System.assert(true, 'Key integrity protection working');
        }
        Test.stopTest();
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test accessing expired encryption keys
     */
    @isTest
    static void testExpiredKeyAccess() {
        // Create an expired key version
        AI_Key_Version__c expiredKey = new AI_Key_Version__c(
            Key_ID__c = 'KEY-V1-EXPIRED',
            Version_Number__c = 1,
            Algorithm__c = 'AES256',
            Key_Size__c = 256,
            Status__c = 'EXPIRED',
            Created_Date__c = DateTime.now().addDays(-180),
            Expiry_Date__c = DateTime.now().addDays(-90),
            Checksum__c = 'ABC12345'
        );
        insert expiredKey;
        
        Test.startTest();
        try {
            SecurityKeyManager keyManager = new SecurityKeyManager();
            // Attempt to decrypt with expired key
            Blob testData = Blob.valueOf('test data');
            String encrypted = EncodingUtil.base64Encode(testData);
            
            // This should fail as the key is expired
            Blob decrypted = keyManager.decryptData(encrypted);
            System.assert(false, 'Should not be able to use expired keys');
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.assert(
                e.getMessage().contains('expired') || 
                e.getMessage().contains('Expired') ||
                e.getMessage().contains('invalid'),
                'Expected expired key error'
            );
        }
        Test.stopTest();
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test metadata injection attacks
     */
    @isTest
    static void testMetadataInjection() {
        Test.startTest();
        try {
            // Attempt to inject malicious metadata
            String maliciousMetadata = '{"keyId": "../../admin/keys", "action": "extract"}';
            
            AI_Processing_Status__c status = new AI_Processing_Status__c(
                Case__c = [SELECT Id FROM Case LIMIT 1].Id,
                AI_Provider__c = 'Test',
                Status__c = 'Pending',
                Metadata__c = maliciousMetadata
            );
            insert status;
            
            // Verify metadata is sanitized when processed
            AI_Processing_Status__c retrieved = [
                SELECT Metadata__c 
                FROM AI_Processing_Status__c 
                WHERE Id = :status.Id
            ];
            
            // Parse metadata and check for path traversal
            Map<String, Object> metadata = (Map<String, Object>) JSON.deserializeUntyped(retrieved.Metadata__c);
            String keyId = (String) metadata.get('keyId');
            
            System.assert(!keyId.contains('../'), 'Path traversal should be prevented');
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            // Expected if validation prevents malicious input
            System.assert(true, 'Metadata validation working');
        }
        Test.stopTest();
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test concurrent key rotation race conditions
     */
    @isTest
    static void testConcurrentKeyRotation() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Simulate concurrent key rotation attempts
        List<Database.SaveResult> results = new List<Database.SaveResult>();
        
        // Create multiple key versions with same version number
        List<AI_Key_Version__c> keys = new List<AI_Key_Version__c>();
        for (Integer i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
            keys.add(new AI_Key_Version__c(
                Key_ID__c = 'KEY-V2-CONCURRENT-' + i,
                Version_Number__c = 2, // Same version number
                Algorithm__c = 'AES256',
                Key_Size__c = 256,
                Status__c = 'ACTIVE',
                Created_Date__c = DateTime.now(),
                Expiry_Date__c = DateTime.now().addDays(90),
                Checksum__c = 'CHK' + i
            ));
        }
        
        results = Database.insert(keys, false);
        
        // Verify only one succeeded (or none if unique constraint exists)
        Integer successCount = 0;
        for (Database.SaveResult sr : results) {
            if (sr.isSuccess()) {
                successCount++;
            }
        }
        
        System.assert(successCount <= 1, 'Concurrent key creation should be prevented');
        
        Test.stopTest();
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test invalid state transitions for keys
     */
    @isTest
    static void testInvalidKeyStateTransitions() {
        // Create a compromised key
        AI_Key_Version__c compromisedKey = new AI_Key_Version__c(
            Key_ID__c = 'KEY-V1-COMPROMISED',
            Version_Number__c = 1,
            Algorithm__c = 'AES256',
            Key_Size__c = 256,
            Status__c = 'COMPROMISED',
            Created_Date__c = DateTime.now().addDays(-30),
            Expiry_Date__c = DateTime.now().addDays(60),
            Checksum__c = 'COMP123'
        );
        insert compromisedKey;
        
        Test.startTest();
        try {
            // Attempt to reactivate compromised key
            compromisedKey.Status__c = 'ACTIVE';
            update compromisedKey;
            
            System.assert(false, 'Should not be able to reactivate compromised key');
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.assert(
                e.getMessage().contains('Invalid') || 
                e.getMessage().contains('transition') ||
                e.getMessage().contains('compromised'),
                'Expected state transition error'
            );
        }
        Test.stopTest();
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test encryption with null or empty data
     */
    @isTest
    static void testEncryptionWithInvalidData() {
        SecurityKeyManager keyManager = new SecurityKeyManager();
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Test null data
        try {
            String encrypted = keyManager.encryptData(null);
            System.assert(false, 'Should not encrypt null data');
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.assert(e.getMessage().contains('null') || 
                         e.getMessage().contains('empty') ||
                         e.getMessage().contains('Invalid'),
                         'Expected null data error');
        }
        
        // Test empty blob
        try {
            String encrypted = keyManager.encryptData(Blob.valueOf(''));
            // Some systems might allow empty encryption
            if (encrypted != null) {
                // Try to decrypt
                Blob decrypted = keyManager.decryptData(encrypted);
                System.assertEquals(0, decrypted.size(), 'Empty data should decrypt to empty');
            }
        } catch (Exception e) {
            // Also acceptable to throw error for empty data
            System.assert(true, 'Empty data validation working');
        }
        
        Test.stopTest();
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test key version rollback attempts
     */
    @isTest
    static void testKeyVersionRollback() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Get current key version
        AI_Security_Settings__c settings = AI_Security_Settings__c.getOrgDefaults();
        Decimal currentVersion = settings.Key_Version__c != null ? settings.Key_Version__c : 1;
        
        try {
            // Attempt to set an older version
            settings.Key_Version__c = currentVersion - 1;
            update settings;
            
            // Verify rollback prevention
            AI_Security_Settings__c updatedSettings = AI_Security_Settings__c.getOrgDefaults();
            System.assert(updatedSettings.Key_Version__c >= currentVersion, 
                         'Key version rollback should be prevented');
                         
        } catch (Exception e) {
            // Expected if validation prevents rollback
            System.assert(e.getMessage().contains('rollback') || 
                         e.getMessage().contains('version') ||
                         e.getMessage().contains('Invalid'),
                         'Expected version rollback error');
        }
        
        Test.stopTest();
    }
}
```
