```apex
/**
 * @description Negative security test cases to verify security controls
 * @author RouteLogic Team
 * @date 2025-01-20
 */
@isTest
@namespaceAccessible
public with sharing class SecurityNegativeTest {
    
    @TestSetup
    static void setup() {
        // Create test users with different permission levels
        Profile standardProfile = [SELECT Id FROM Profile WHERE Name = 'Standard User' LIMIT 1];
        Profile minAccessProfile = [SELECT Id FROM Profile WHERE Name = 'Minimum Access - Salesforce' LIMIT 1];
        
        User adminUser = new User(
            Alias = 'admin',
            Email = 'admin@routelogic.test',
            EmailEncodingKey = 'UTF-8',
            LastName = 'Admin',
            LanguageLocaleKey = 'en_US',
            LocaleSidKey = 'en_US',
            ProfileId = UserInfo.getProfileId(),
            TimeZoneSidKey = 'America/Los_Angeles',
            UserName = 'admin@routelogic.test.org'
        );
        insert adminUser;
        
        User standardUser = new User(
            Alias = 'stdusr',
            Email = 'standard@routelogic.test',
            EmailEncodingKey = 'UTF-8',
            LastName = 'Standard',
            LanguageLocaleKey = 'en_US',
            LocaleSidKey = 'en_US',
            ProfileId = standardProfile.Id,
            TimeZoneSidKey = 'America/Los_Angeles',
            UserName = 'standard@routelogic.test.org'
        );
        insert standardUser;
        
        User restrictedUser = new User(
            Alias = 'restr',
            Email = 'restricted@routelogic.test',
            EmailEncodingKey = 'UTF-8',
            LastName = 'Restricted',
            LanguageLocaleKey = 'en_US',
            LocaleSidKey = 'en_US',
            ProfileId = minAccessProfile.Id,
            TimeZoneSidKey = 'America/Los_Angeles',
            UserName = 'restricted@routelogic.test.org'
        );
        insert restrictedUser;
        
        // Create test data
        System.runAs(adminUser) {
            // Create cases
            List<Case> cases = new List<Case>();
            for (Integer i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
                cases.add(new Case(
                    Subject = 'Test Case ' + i,
                    Priority = 'High',
                    AI_Processing_Status__c = 'Pending'
                ));
            }
            insert cases;
            
            // Create AI settings
            AI_Security_Settings__c settings = new AI_Security_Settings__c(
                Key_Version__c = '1',
                Encryption_Algorithm__c = 'AES256',
                Key_Rotation_Days__c = 90
            );
            insert settings;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test unauthorized access to AI bulk processing
     */
    @isTest
    static void testUnauthorizedBulkProcessingAccess() {
        User restrictedUser = [SELECT Id FROM User WHERE UserName = 'restricted@routelogic.test.org' LIMIT 1];
        List<Case> cases = [SELECT Id FROM Case LIMIT 5];
        List<Id> caseIds = new List<Id>();
        for (Case c : cases) {
            caseIds.add(c.Id);
        }
        
        Test.startTest();
        System.runAs(restrictedUser) {
            try {
                // Attempt to process cases without proper permissions
                AIBulkProcessingController.processCases(caseIds, 'Ada');
                System.assert(false, 'Expected exception for unauthorized access');
            } catch (Exception e) {
                // Expected behavior - should throw exception
                System.assert(e.getMessage().contains('Insufficient') || 
                             e.getMessage().contains('permission') ||
                             e.getMessage().contains('License'), 
                             'Expected permission/license error, got: ' + e.getMessage());
            }
        }
        Test.stopTest();
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test CRUD permission bypass attempts
     */
    @isTest
    static void testCRUDPermissionBypass() {
        User restrictedUser = [SELECT Id FROM User WHERE UserName = 'restricted@routelogic.test.org' LIMIT 1];
        
        Test.startTest();
        System.runAs(restrictedUser) {
            // Attempt to create AI_Processing_Status__c without permissions
            AI_Processing_Status__c status = new AI_Processing_Status__c(
                Case__c = [SELECT Id FROM Case LIMIT 1].Id,
                AI_Provider__c = 'Ada',
                Status__c = 'Pending'
            );
            
            try {
                insert status;
                // If insert succeeds, check if FLS was enforced
                List<AI_Processing_Status__c> statuses = [
                    SELECT Id, Case__c, AI_Provider__c 
                    FROM AI_Processing_Status__c 
                    WHERE Id = :status.Id
                ];
                System.assert(statuses.isEmpty() || statuses[0].Id == null, 
                             'Security.stripInaccessible should have prevented insert');
            } catch (Exception e) {
                // Expected - insufficient permissions
                System.assert(e.getMessage().contains('INSUFFICIENT') || 
                             e.getMessage().contains('permission'), 
                             'Expected permission error');
            }
        }
        Test.stopTest();
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test FLS enforcement on query results
     */
    @isTest
    static void testFLSEnforcementOnQueries() {
        User standardUser = [SELECT Id FROM User WHERE UserName = 'standard@routelogic.test.org' LIMIT 1];
        
        Test.startTest();
        System.runAs(standardUser) {
            try {
                // Attempt to query sensitive fields without FLS permissions
                List<AI_Security_Settings__c> settings = [
                    SELECT Id, Key_Version__c, Encryption_Algorithm__c
                    FROM AI_Security_Settings__c
                    WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED
                ];
                
                // If query succeeds, verify FLS was applied
                if (!settings.isEmpty()) {
                    System.assert(settings[0].Key_Version__c == null || 
                                 String.isBlank(String.valueOf(settings[0].Key_Version__c)), 
                                 'Sensitive field should be stripped by FLS');
                }
            } catch (Exception e) {
                // Expected if user lacks read permissions
                System.assert(e.getMessage().contains('INSUFFICIENT') || 
                             e.getMessage().contains('WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED'), 
                             'Expected security enforcement error');
            }
        }
        Test.stopTest();
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test trigger recursion attack prevention
     */
    @isTest
    static void testTriggerRecursionPrevention() {
        // Attempt to cause infinite recursion through trigger manipulation
        List<Case> cases = [SELECT Id FROM Case LIMIT 1];
        
        Test.startTest();
        try {
            // Simulate multiple rapid updates that could cause recursion
            for (Integer i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
                cases[0].Description = 'Update ' + i;
                update cases[0];
            }
            
            // Verify recursion control kicked in
            List<AI_Error_Log__c> errors = [
                SELECT Id, Error_Message__c 
                FROM AI_Error_Log__c 
                WHERE Class_Name__c = 'TriggerRecursionControl'
            ];
            
            // Should have logged recursion prevention
            System.assert(!errors.isEmpty() || TriggerRecursionControl.hasRun('AI_Case_Request_EventHandler'), 
                         'Recursion control should have activated');
        } catch (Exception e) {
            // Expected if recursion control throws exception
            System.assert(e.getMessage().contains('recursion') || 
                         e.getMessage().contains('execution limit'), 
                         'Expected recursion control error');
        }
        Test.stopTest();
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test license validation bypass attempts
     */
    @isTest
    static void testLicenseValidationBypass() {
        User restrictedUser = [SELECT Id FROM User WHERE UserName = 'restricted@routelogic.test.org' LIMIT 1];
        
        Test.startTest();
        System.runAs(restrictedUser) {
            try {
                // Attempt to access licensed features without proper license
                Boolean hasLicense = LicenseManager.validateLicense();
                
                if (!hasLicense) {
                    // Try to bypass by calling internal methods directly
                    AIBulkProcessingCoordinator.BulkProcessingRequest request = 
                        new AIBulkProcessingCoordinator.BulkProcessingRequest();
                    request.caseIds = new List<Id>{[SELECT Id FROM Case LIMIT 1].Id};
                    request.provider = 'Ada';
                    
                    try {
                        // This should fail due to license check
                        String jobId = AIBulkProcessingCoordinator.initiateBulkProcessing(request);
                        System.assert(false, 'Expected license validation to prevent execution');
                    } catch (Exception e) {
                        System.assert(e.getMessage().contains('License') || 
                                     e.getMessage().contains('license'), 
                                     'Expected license error');
                    }
                }
            } catch (Exception e) {
                // Expected - license validation should fail
                System.assert(true, 'License validation working correctly');
            }
        }
        Test.stopTest();
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test encryption key access control
     */
    @isTest
    static void testEncryptionKeyAccessControl() {
        User restrictedUser = [SELECT Id FROM User WHERE UserName = 'restricted@routelogic.test.org' LIMIT 1];
        
        Test.startTest();
        System.runAs(restrictedUser) {
            try {
                // Attempt to access encryption keys without authorization
                SecurityKeyManager keyManager = new SecurityKeyManager();
                Blob key = keyManager.getEncryptionKey();
                
                // Should not reach here
                System.assert(false, 'Expected security exception for key access');
            } catch (Exception e) {
                // Expected - unauthorized key access
                System.assert(e.getMessage().contains('Unauthorized') || 
                             e.getMessage().contains('permission') ||
                             e.getMessage().contains('INSUFFICIENT'), 
                             'Expected authorization error for key access');
            }
        }
        Test.stopTest();
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test API endpoint authentication bypass
     */
    @isTest
    static void testAPIAuthenticationBypass() {
        // Simulate REST context without proper authentication
        RestRequest req = new RestRequest();
        RestResponse res = new RestResponse();
        
        req.requestURI = '/services/apexrest/ai/webhook';
        req.httpMethod = 'POST';
        req.requestBody = Blob.valueOf('{"test": "data"}');
        
        // Remove authentication headers
        req.headers.clear();
        
        RestContext.request = req;
        RestContext.response = res;
        
        Test.startTest();
        try {
            // Attempt to call webhook without authentication
            AIWebhookService.handleWebhook();
            
            // Check response for authentication error
            System.assert(res.statusCode == 401 || res.statusCode == 403, 
                         'Expected authentication failure status code');
        } catch (Exception e) {
            // Expected - authentication should fail
            System.assert(e.getMessage().contains('Unauthorized') || 
                         e.getMessage().contains('Authentication'), 
                         'Expected authentication error');
        }
        Test.stopTest();
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test SQL injection prevention
     */
    @isTest
    static void testSQLInjectionPrevention() {
        // Attempt SQL injection through dynamic SOQL
        String maliciousInput = '\' OR Id != null OR Subject = \'';
        
        Test.startTest();
        try {
            // This should be prevented by proper query construction
            List<Case> cases = Database.query(
                'SELECT Id FROM Case WHERE Subject = :maliciousInput WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED'
            );
            
            // Should return empty, not all records
            System.assert(cases.isEmpty(), 'SQL injection should be prevented');
        } catch (Exception e) {
            // Expected if query is malformed
            System.assert(true, 'Query protection working');
        }
        Test.stopTest();
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test cross-site scripting (XSS) prevention
     */
    @isTest
    static void testXSSPrevention() {
        String xssPayload = '<script>alert("XSS")</script>';
        Case c = new Case(
            Subject = xssPayload,
            Description = xssPayload
        );
        insert c;
        
        Test.startTest();
        // Verify XSS payload is escaped when retrieved
        Case retrievedCase = [SELECT Subject, Description FROM Case WHERE Id = :c.Id];
        
        // The payload should be stored but escaped when displayed
        System.assert(retrievedCase.Subject.contains(xssPayload), 
                     'XSS payload should be stored as-is');
        
        // When used in contexts, it should be escaped
        String escaped = String.escapeSingleQuotes(retrievedCase.Subject);
        System.assert(!escaped.contains('<script>') || escaped.contains('\\'), 
                     'XSS content should be escaped');
        Test.stopTest();
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Test rate limiting bypass attempts
     */
    @isTest
    static void testRateLimitingBypass() {
        String userId = UserInfo.getUserId();
        String endpoint = 'Ada';
        
        Test.startTest();
        // Attempt to exceed rate limits
        for (Integer i = 0; i < 150; i++) {
            try {
                Boolean allowed = AIRateLimiter.checkRateLimit(userId, endpoint);
                
                if (i > 100) {
                    // Should be rate limited by now
                    System.assert(!allowed, 'Rate limiting should kick in after 100 requests');
                }
            } catch (Exception e) {
                // Expected when rate limit exceeded
                System.assert(e.getMessage().contains('Rate limit') || 
                             e.getMessage().contains('limit exceeded'), 
                             'Expected rate limit error');
                break;
            }
        }
        Test.stopTest();
    }
}
```

## 📄 FILE: force-app/main/default/classes/SecurityUtils.cls

```apex
/**
 * @description Security utility class for field-level security operations
 * @author RouteLogic Team
 * @date 2025-01-17
 */
@namespaceAccessible
public with sharing class SecurityUtils {
    
    /**
     * @description Strip inaccessible records based on access type
     * @param accessType The type of access to check (CREATABLE, UPDATABLE, etc.)
     * @param records List of records to check
     * @return List of accessible records
     */
    public static List<SObject> stripInaccessibleRecords(
        System.AccessType accessType, 
        List<SObject> records
    ) {
        if (records == null || records.isEmpty()) {
            return records;
        }
        
        try {
            SObjectAccessDecision decision = Security.stripInaccessible(
                accessType,
                records
            );
            
            return decision.getRecords();
        } catch (Exception e) {
            // Log security exception
            ErrorLogService.logError(
                'SecurityUtils.stripInaccessibleRecords',
                e,
                'Failed to strip inaccessible records for type: ' + accessType
            );
            throw new SecurityException(
                'Insufficient permissions to access required fields'
            );
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Check if user has read access to specific fields
     * @param objectType The SObject type
     * @param fieldNames Set of field API names
     * @return Boolean indicating if all fields are readable
     */
    public static Boolean hasReadAccess(
        Schema.SObjectType objectType,
        Set<String> fieldNames
    ) {
        Schema.DescribeSObjectResult objectDescribe = objectType.getDescribe();
        Map<String, Schema.SObjectField> fieldMap = objectDescribe.fields.getMap();
        
        for (String fieldName : fieldNames) {
            if (fieldMap.containsKey(fieldName)) {
                Schema.DescribeFieldResult fieldDescribe = fieldMap.get(fieldName).getDescribe();
                if (!fieldDescribe.isAccessible()) {
                    return false;
                }
            }
        }
        
        return true;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Check if user has create access to specific fields
     * @param objectType The SObject type
     * @param fieldNames Set of field API names
     * @return Boolean indicating if all fields are creatable
     */
    public static Boolean hasCreateAccess(
        Schema.SObjectType objectType,
        Set<String> fieldNames
    ) {
        Schema.DescribeSObjectResult objectDescribe = objectType.getDescribe();
        
        if (!objectDescribe.isCreateable()) {
            return false;
        }
        
        Map<String, Schema.SObjectField> fieldMap = objectDescribe.fields.getMap();
        
        for (String fieldName : fieldNames) {
            if (fieldMap.containsKey(fieldName)) {
                Schema.DescribeFieldResult fieldDescribe = fieldMap.get(fieldName).getDescribe();
                if (!fieldDescribe.isCreateable()) {
                    return false;
                }
            }
        }
        
        return true;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Check if user has update access to specific fields
     * @param objectType The SObject type
     * @param fieldNames Set of field API names
     * @return Boolean indicating if all fields are updatable
     */
    public static Boolean hasUpdateAccess(
        Schema.SObjectType objectType,
        Set<String> fieldNames
    ) {
        Schema.DescribeSObjectResult objectDescribe = objectType.getDescribe();
        
        if (!objectDescribe.isUpdateable()) {
            return false;
        }
        
        Map<String, Schema.SObjectField> fieldMap = objectDescribe.fields.getMap();
        
        for (String fieldName : fieldNames) {
            if (fieldMap.containsKey(fieldName)) {
                Schema.DescribeFieldResult fieldDescribe = fieldMap.get(fieldName).getDescribe();
                if (!fieldDescribe.isUpdateable()) {
                    return false;
                }
            }
        }
        
        return true;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Check if user has delete access to object
     * @param objectType The SObject type
     * @return Boolean indicating if object is deletable
     */
    public static Boolean hasDeleteAccess(Schema.SObjectType objectType) {
        return objectType.getDescribe().isDeletable();
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Custom exception for security violations
     */
    public class SecurityException extends Exception {}
}
```

```apex
/**
 * @description Test class for SecurityUtils
 * @author RouteLogic Team
 * @date 2025-01-17
 */
@IsTest
private class SecurityUtilsTest {
    
    @TestSetup
    static void setupTestData() {
        // Create test account
        Account testAccount = new Account(Name = 'Test Account');
        insert testAccount;
        
        // Create test cases
        List<Case> testCases = new List<Case>();
        for (Integer i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
            testCases.add(new Case(
                Subject = 'Test Case ' + i,
                Description = 'Test description ' + i,
                Priority = 'Medium',
                Status = 'New',
                AccountId = testAccount.Id
            ));
        }
        insert testCases;
        
        // Create test AI processing status records
        List<AI_Processing_Status__c> statusRecords = new List<AI_Processing_Status__c>();
        for (Case c : testCases) {
            statusRecords.add(new AI_Processing_Status__c(
                Case__c = c.Id,
                AI_Provider__c = 'TestProvider',
                Status__c = 'Pending',
                Success__c = false
            ));
        }
        insert statusRecords;
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testStripInaccessibleRecordsCreatable() {
        // Get test cases for creating new records
        List<Case> testCases = [SELECT Id FROM Case LIMIT 3];
        
        // Create new AI processing status records
        List<AI_Processing_Status__c> newRecords = new List<AI_Processing_Status__c>();
        for (Case c : testCases) {
            newRecords.add(new AI_Processing_Status__c(
                Case__c = c.Id,
                AI_Provider__c = 'NewProvider',
                Status__c = 'New',
                Success__c = true
            ));
        }
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Strip inaccessible fields for creation
        List<SObject> accessibleRecords = SecurityUtils.stripInaccessibleRecords(
            AccessType.CREATABLE,
            newRecords
        );
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify records are returned
        System.assertNotEquals(null, accessibleRecords, 'Should return accessible records');
        System.assertEquals(3, accessibleRecords.size(), 'Should return all accessible records');
        
        // Verify records can be inserted
        insert accessibleRecords;
        
        // Verify insertion was successful
        List<AI_Processing_Status__c> insertedRecords = [
            SELECT Id, AI_Provider__c
            FROM AI_Processing_Status__c
            WHERE AI_Provider__c = 'NewProvider'
        ];
        System.assertEquals(3, insertedRecords.size(), 'Should insert all records successfully');
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testStripInaccessibleRecordsUpdatable() {
        // Get existing test records
        List<AI_Processing_Status__c> existingRecords = [
            SELECT Id, Status__c, Success__c
            FROM AI_Processing_Status__c
            LIMIT 3
        ];
        
        // Update the records
        for (AI_Processing_Status__c record : existingRecords) {
            record.Status__c = 'Updated';
            record.Success__c = true;
        }
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Strip inaccessible fields for update
        List<SObject> accessibleRecords = SecurityUtils.stripInaccessibleRecords(
            AccessType.UPDATABLE,
            existingRecords
        );
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify records are returned
        System.assertNotEquals(null, accessibleRecords, 'Should return accessible records');
        System.assertEquals(3, accessibleRecords.size(), 'Should return all accessible records');
        
        // Verify records can be updated
        update accessibleRecords;
        
        // Verify update was successful
        List<AI_Processing_Status__c> updatedRecords = [
            SELECT Id, Status__c
            FROM AI_Processing_Status__c
            WHERE Status__c = 'Updated'
        ];
        System.assertEquals(3, updatedRecords.size(), 'Should update all records successfully');
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testStripInaccessibleRecordsEmptyList() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Test with empty list
        List<SObject> result = SecurityUtils.stripInaccessibleRecords(
            AccessType.CREATABLE,
            new List<Case>()
        );
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify empty list is returned
        System.assertNotEquals(null, result, 'Should return empty list, not null');
        System.assertEquals(0, result.size(), 'Should return empty list');
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testStripInaccessibleRecordsNullList() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Test with null list
        List<SObject> result = SecurityUtils.stripInaccessibleRecords(
            AccessType.CREATABLE,
            null
        );
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify null is returned
        System.assertEquals(null, result, 'Should return null for null input');
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testHasReadAccess() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Test read access for Case object fields
        Set<String> caseFields = new Set<String>{'Subject', 'Description', 'Priority', 'Status'};
        Boolean hasAccess = SecurityUtils.hasReadAccess(Case.SObjectType, caseFields);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // In test context, user should have read access to standard Case fields
        System.assertEquals(true, hasAccess, 'Should have read access to standard Case fields');
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testHasReadAccessInvalidField() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Test read access with invalid field
        Set<String> invalidFields = new Set<String>{'InvalidField__c'};
        Boolean hasAccess = SecurityUtils.hasReadAccess(Case.SObjectType, invalidFields);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Should handle invalid fields gracefully
        System.assertEquals(true, hasAccess, 'Should handle invalid fields gracefully');
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testHasCreateAccess() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Test create access for Case object
        Set<String> caseFields = new Set<String>{'Subject', 'Description', 'Priority'};
        Boolean hasAccess = SecurityUtils.hasCreateAccess(Case.SObjectType, caseFields);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // In test context, user should have create access to Case
        System.assertEquals(true, hasAccess, 'Should have create access to Case fields');
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testHasUpdateAccess() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Test update access for Case object
        Set<String> caseFields = new Set<String>{'Subject', 'Description', 'Priority', 'Status'};
        Boolean hasAccess = SecurityUtils.hasUpdateAccess(Case.SObjectType, caseFields);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // In test context, user should have update access to Case
        System.assertEquals(true, hasAccess, 'Should have update access to Case fields');
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testHasDeleteAccess() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Test delete access for Case object
        Boolean hasAccess = SecurityUtils.hasDeleteAccess(Case.SObjectType);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // In test context, user should have delete access to Case
        System.assertEquals(true, hasAccess, 'Should have delete access to Case');
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testSecurityException() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Test SecurityException creation
        SecurityUtils.SecurityException secEx = new SecurityUtils.SecurityException('Test security error');
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify exception properties
        System.assertEquals('Test security error', secEx.getMessage(), 'Should set error message');
        System.assert(secEx instanceof Exception, 'Should be instance of Exception');
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testMultipleObjectTypes() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Test with multiple object types
        Set<String> accountFields = new Set<String>{'Name', 'Type'};
        Set<String> caseFields = new Set<String>{'Subject', 'Status'};
        
        Boolean accountReadAccess = SecurityUtils.hasReadAccess(Account.SObjectType, accountFields);
        Boolean caseReadAccess = SecurityUtils.hasReadAccess(Case.SObjectType, caseFields);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify access for both object types
        System.assertEquals(true, accountReadAccess, 'Should have read access to Account fields');
        System.assertEquals(true, caseReadAccess, 'Should have read access to Case fields');
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testLargeFieldSet() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Test with large field set
        Set<String> largeFieldSet = new Set<String>();
        for (Integer i = 0; i < 50; i++) {
            largeFieldSet.add('Field' + i + '__c');
        }
        
        // Add some valid fields
        largeFieldSet.add('Subject');
        largeFieldSet.add('Description');
        largeFieldSet.add('Status');
        
        Boolean hasAccess = SecurityUtils.hasReadAccess(Case.SObjectType, largeFieldSet);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Should handle large field sets efficiently
        System.assertEquals(true, hasAccess, 'Should handle large field sets');
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testCustomObjectAccess() {
        Test.startTest();
        
        // Test with custom object
        Set<String> customFields = new Set<String>{'Case__c', 'AI_Provider__c', 'Status__c'};
        Boolean hasCreateAccess = SecurityUtils.hasCreateAccess(
            AI_Processing_Status__c.SObjectType,
            customFields
        );
        Boolean hasUpdateAccess = SecurityUtils.hasUpdateAccess(
            AI_Processing_Status__c.SObjectType,
            customFields
        );
        Boolean hasDeleteAccess = SecurityUtils.hasDeleteAccess(AI_Processing_Status__c.SObjectType);
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify access to custom object
        System.assertEquals(true, hasCreateAccess, 'Should have create access to custom object');
        System.assertEquals(true, hasUpdateAccess, 'Should have update access to custom object');
        System.assertEquals(true, hasDeleteAccess, 'Should have delete access to custom object');
    }
    
    @IsTest
    static void testErrorHandlingInStripInaccessible() {
        // Create records that might cause security issues
        List<AI_Processing_Status__c> problematicRecords = new List<AI_Processing_Status__c>();
        
        // Add a record with potentially restricted data
        problematicRecords.add(new AI_Processing_Status__c(
            AI_Provider__c = 'RestrictedProvider',
            Status__c = 'Restricted'
        ));
        
        Test.startTest();
        
        try {
            // This should handle any security exceptions gracefully
            List<SObject> result = SecurityUtils.stripInaccessibleRecords(
                AccessType.CREATABLE,
                problematicRecords
            );
            
            // If no exception, verify result
            System.assertNotEquals(null, result, 'Should return result even with restrictions');
        } catch (SecurityUtils.SecurityException secEx) {
            // Expected security exception
            System.assert(secEx.getMessage().contains('Insufficient permissions'), 
                'Should throw meaningful security exception');
        } catch (Exception e) {
            // Unexpected exception - should be handled by SecurityUtils
            System.assert(false, 'Should handle exceptions gracefully: ' + e.getMessage());
        }
        
        Test.stopTest();
        
        // Verify error logging occurred
        List<Error_Log__c> errorLogs = [
            SELECT Id, Class_Name__c
            FROM Error_Log__c
            WHERE Class_Name__c LIKE '%SecurityUtils%'
        ];
        
        // Error logs may or may not be present depending on execution path
        System.assert(errorLogs.size() >= 0, 'Error logging should work');
    }
}
```

```apex
/**
 * @description Test data factory for creating comprehensive test data
 * @author RouteLogic Team
 * @date 2025-01-17
 */
@IsTest
public class TestDataFactory {
    
    /**
     * @description Create comprehensive test data for all test classes
     */
    public static void createComprehensiveTestData() {
        // Create organization-wide custom settings
        AI_Config__c config = AI_Config__c.getOrgDefaults();
        config.Enable_AI_Processing__c = true;
        config.Enable_Rate_Limiting__c = true;
        config.Default_Rate_Limit__c = 100;
        config.Default_Window_Seconds__c = 3600;
        config.Max_Retry_Attempts__c = 3;
        config.Circuit_Breaker_Threshold__c = 5;
        config.Enable_Webhook_Support__c = true;
        upsert config;
        
        // Create security settings
        AI_Security_Settings__c securitySettings = AI_Security_Settings__c.getOrgDefaults();
        securitySettings.Enable_Security_Monitoring__c = true;
        securitySettings.Log_Rate_Limit_Violations__c = true;
        securitySettings.Enable_Encryption__c = true;
        securitySettings.Key_Rotation_Days__c = 90;
        securitySettings.Enable_Threat_Detection__c = true;
        upsert securitySettings;
        
        // Create provider settings
        AI_Provider_Settings__c providerSettings = AI_Provider_Settings__c.getOrgDefaults();
        providerSettings.Ada_Endpoint__c = 'https://api.ada.cx/v1';
        providerSettings.Intercom_Endpoint__c = 'https://api.intercom.io/v2';
        providerSettings.Default_Provider__c = 'Intercom';
        providerSettings.Enable_Provider_Failover__c = true;
        upsert providerSettings;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Create bulk cases for testing
     * @param count Number of cases to create
     * @return List of created cases
     */
    public static List<Case> createBulkCases(Integer count) {
        // Create accounts and contacts first
        List<Account> accounts = createAccounts(Math.min(count/5, 50));
        List<Contact> contacts = createContacts(accounts);
        
        // Create cases
        List<Case> cases = new List<Case>();
        List<String> priorities = new List<String>{'Low', 'Medium', 'High', 'Urgent'};
        List<String> origins = new List<String>{'Email', 'Phone', 'Web', 'Chat'};
        List<String> statuses = new List<String>{'New', 'Working', 'Escalated'};
        
        for (Integer i = 0; i < count; i++) {
            Account acc = accounts[Math.mod(i, accounts.size())];
            Contact con = contacts[Math.mod(i, contacts.size())];
            
            cases.add(new Case(
                Subject = 'Bulk Test Case ' + i + ' - ' + generateRandomString(10),
                Description = 'Test description for bulk processing. Customer issue related to ' + 
                             generateRandomString(20) + '. This requires AI analysis.',
                AccountId = acc.Id,
                ContactId = con.Id,
                Priority = priorities[Math.mod(i, priorities.size())],
                Origin = origins[Math.mod(i, origins.size())],
                Status = statuses[Math.mod(i, statuses.size())],
                Type = 'Problem',
                Reason = 'Performance',
                SuppliedEmail = 'test' + i + '@example.com',
                SuppliedName = 'Test Customer ' + i
            ));
        }
        
        insert cases;
        
        // Create related records for some cases
        createCaseRelatedRecords(cases);
        
        return cases;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Create a single case with default values
     * @return Created case
     */
    public static Case createCase() {
        Account acc = createAccount('Test Account ' + generateRandomString(5));
        Contact con = createContact(acc);
        
        Case c = new Case(
            Subject = 'Test Case - ' + generateRandomString(10),
            Description = 'Test case for AI processing',
            AccountId = acc.Id,
            ContactId = con.Id,
            Priority = 'Medium',
            Origin = 'Web',
            Status = 'New'
        );
        insert c;
        return c;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Create accounts for testing
     * @param count Number of accounts to create
     * @return List of created accounts
     */
    public static List<Account> createAccounts(Integer count) {
        List<Account> accounts = new List<Account>();
        List<String> industries = new List<String>{'Technology', 'Healthcare', 'Finance', 'Retail', 'Manufacturing'};
        List<String> types = new List<String>{'Customer', 'Partner', 'Prospect'};
        
        for (Integer i = 0; i < count; i++) {
            accounts.add(new Account(
                Name = 'Test Account ' + i + ' - ' + generateRandomString(5),
                Type = types[Math.mod(i, types.size())],
                Industry = industries[Math.mod(i, industries.size())],
                AnnualRevenue = Math.round(Math.random() * 1000000),
                NumberOfEmployees = Integer.valueOf(Math.random() * 1000),
                BillingStreet = i + ' Test Street',
                BillingCity = 'Test City',
                BillingState = 'CA',
                BillingPostalCode = '94000',
                BillingCountry = 'USA',
                Phone = '555-' + String.valueOf(i).leftPad(4, '0'),
                Website = 'https://test' + i + '.example.com'
            ));
        }
        insert accounts;
        return accounts;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Create a single account
     * @param name Account name
     * @return Created account
     */
    public static Account createAccount(String name) {
        Account acc = new Account(
            Name = name,
            Type = 'Customer',
            Industry = 'Technology'
        );
        insert acc;
        return acc;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Create contacts for accounts
     * @param accounts List of accounts
     * @return List of created contacts
     */
    public static List<Contact> createContacts(List<Account> accounts) {
        List<Contact> contacts = new List<Contact>();
        
        for (Account acc : accounts) {
            // Create 2 contacts per account
            for (Integer i = 0; i < 2; i++) {
                contacts.add(new Contact(
                    FirstName = 'Test',
                    LastName = 'Contact ' + acc.Name + ' ' + i,
                    AccountId = acc.Id,
                    Email = 'contact' + acc.Id + '_' + i + '@example.com',
                    Phone = '555-' + String.valueOf(Math.round(Math.random() * 9999)).leftPad(4, '0'),
                    Title = i == 0 ? 'Primary Contact' : 'Secondary Contact',
                    Department = 'Customer Service',
                    MailingStreet = acc.BillingStreet,
                    MailingCity = acc.BillingCity,
                    MailingState = acc.BillingState,
                    MailingPostalCode = acc.BillingPostalCode,
                    MailingCountry = acc.BillingCountry
                ));
            }
        }
        insert contacts;
        return contacts;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Create a single contact
     * @param acc Account to associate with
     * @return Created contact
     */
    public static Contact createContact(Account acc) {
        Contact con = new Contact(
            FirstName = 'Test',
            LastName = 'Contact ' + generateRandomString(5),
            AccountId = acc.Id,
            Email = 'test' + generateRandomString(5) + '@example.com'
        );
        insert con;
        return con;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Create case-related records
     * @param cases List of cases
     */
    private static void createCaseRelatedRecords(List<Case> cases) {
        // Create AI conversation history for some cases
        List<AI_Conversation_History__c> histories = new List<AI_Conversation_History__c>();
        
        for (Integer i = 0; i < Math.min(cases.size(), 20); i++) {
            histories.add(new AI_Conversation_History__c(
                Case__c = cases[i].Id,
                Conversation_Data__c = generateSampleConversation(),
                Start_Time__c = DateTime.now().addHours(-i),
                End_Time__c = DateTime.now().addHours(-i).addMinutes(30),
                Message_Count__c = 5 + Math.round(Math.random() * 10)
            ));
        }
        if (!histories.isEmpty()) {
            insert histories;
        }
        
        // Create AI processing status records
        List<AI_Processing_Status__c> statuses = new List<AI_Processing_Status__c>();
        
        for (Integer i = 0; i < Math.min(cases.size(), 30); i++) {
            statuses.add(new AI_Processing_Status__c(
                Case__c = cases[i].Id,
                Status__c = 'Pending',
                AI_Provider__c = Math.mod(i, 2) == 0 ? 'Intercom' : 'Ada',
                Request_Time__c = DateTime.now().addMinutes(-i),
                Priority__c = cases[i].Priority
            ));
        }
        if (!statuses.isEmpty()) {
            insert statuses;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Create admin user for testing
     * @return Created admin user
     */
    public static User createAdminUser() {
        Profile adminProfile = [SELECT Id FROM Profile WHERE Name = 'System Administrator' LIMIT 1];
        
        User adminUser = new User(
            Alias = 'tadmin',
            Email = 'testadmin@routelogic.test',
            EmailEncodingKey = 'UTF-8',
            LastName = 'TestAdmin',
            LanguageLocaleKey = 'en_US',
            LocaleSidKey = 'en_US',
            ProfileId = adminProfile.Id,
            TimeZoneSidKey = 'America/Los_Angeles',
            UserName = 'testadmin' + DateTime.now().getTime() + '@routelogic.test',
            IsActive = true
        );
        
        // Insert user first
        insert adminUser;
        
        // Assign permission set if available
        try {
            PermissionSet adminPS = [SELECT Id FROM PermissionSet WHERE Name = 'AI_Case_Management_Admin' LIMIT 1];
            insert new PermissionSetAssignment(
                AssigneeId = adminUser.Id,
                PermissionSetId = adminPS.Id
            );
        } catch (Exception e) {
            // Permission set might not exist in test context
            System.debug('Admin permission set not found: ' + e.getMessage());
        }
        
        return adminUser;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Create standard user for testing
     * @return Created standard user
     */
    public static User createStandardUser() {
        Profile standardProfile = [SELECT Id FROM Profile WHERE Name = 'Standard User' LIMIT 1];
        
        User standardUser = new User(
            Alias = 'tuser',
            Email = 'testuser@routelogic.test',
            EmailEncodingKey = 'UTF-8',
            LastName = 'TestUser',
            LanguageLocaleKey = 'en_US',
            LocaleSidKey = 'en_US',
            ProfileId = standardProfile.Id,
            TimeZoneSidKey = 'America/Los_Angeles',
            UserName = 'testuser' + DateTime.now().getTime() + '@routelogic.test',
            IsActive = true
        );
        
        insert standardUser;
        
        // Assign user permission set if available
        try {
            PermissionSet userPS = [SELECT Id FROM PermissionSet WHERE Name = 'AI_Case_Management_User' LIMIT 1];
            insert new PermissionSetAssignment(
                AssigneeId = standardUser.Id,
                PermissionSetId = userPS.Id
            );
        } catch (Exception e) {
            // Permission set might not exist in test context
            System.debug('User permission set not found: ' + e.getMessage());
        }
        
        return standardUser;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Generate random string for test data
     * @param length Length of string to generate
     * @return Random string
     */
    private static String generateRandomString(Integer length) {
        String chars = 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789';
        String randomString = '';
        
        for (Integer i = 0; i < length; i++) {
            Integer idx = Math.mod(Math.abs(Crypto.getRandomInteger()), chars.length());
            randomString += chars.substring(idx, idx + 1);
        }
        
        return randomString;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Generate sample conversation JSON
     * @return Sample conversation data
     */
    private static String generateSampleConversation() {
        List<Map<String, Object>> conversation = new List<Map<String, Object>>();
        
        conversation.add(new Map<String, Object>{
            'timestamp' => DateTime.now().addMinutes(-30).getTime(),
            'type' => 'user',
            'message' => 'I need help with my account settings'
        });
        
        conversation.add(new Map<String, Object>{
            'timestamp' => DateTime.now().addMinutes(-29).getTime(),
            'type' => 'ai',
            'message' => 'I can help you with your account settings. What specific issue are you experiencing?'
        });
        
        conversation.add(new Map<String, Object>{
            'timestamp' => DateTime.now().addMinutes(-28).getTime(),
            'type' => 'user',
            'message' => 'I cannot update my billing information'
        });
        
        conversation.add(new Map<String, Object>{
            'timestamp' => DateTime.now().addMinutes(-27).getTime(),
            'type' => 'ai',
            'message' => 'Let me help you update your billing information. I will need to verify your account first.',
            'sentiment' => 'helpful',
            'confidence' => 0.95
        });
        
        return JSON.serialize(conversation);
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Create test webhook payload
     * @param provider AI provider name
     * @return Webhook payload
     */
    public static String createWebhookPayload(String provider) {
        Map<String, Object> payload = new Map<String, Object>();
        
        if (provider == 'Intercom') {
            payload.put('type', 'conversation.updated');
            payload.put('id', 'conv_' + generateRandomString(10));
            payload.put('data', new Map<String, Object>{
                'conversation_id' => generateRandomString(10),
                'status' => 'resolved',
                'sentiment' => 'positive'
            });
        } else if (provider == 'Ada') {
            payload.put('event', 'message.received');
            payload.put('conversation_id', generateRandomString(10));
            payload.put('message', new Map<String, Object>{
                'text' => 'Customer query resolved',
                'intent' => 'billing_support',
                'confidence' => 0.92
            });
        }
        
        return JSON.serialize(payload);
    }
}
```

## 📄 FILE: force-app/main/default/classes/TriggerRecursionControl.cls

```apex
/**
 * @description Utility class to prevent trigger recursion
 * @author RouteLogic Team
 * @date 2025-01-19
 */
@namespaceAccessible
public with sharing class TriggerRecursionControl {
    
    // Static variables to track trigger execution
    private static Map<String, Boolean> isExecutingMap = new Map<String, Boolean>();
    private static Map<String, Integer> executionCountMap = new Map<String, Integer>();
    private static final Integer TRIGGER_MAX_EXECUTIONS = 5;
    
    /**
     * @description Check if a trigger is currently executing
     * @param triggerName Name of the trigger
     * @return True if trigger is executing, false otherwise
     */
    public static Boolean isExecuting(String triggerName) {
        return isExecutingMap.containsKey(triggerName) && isExecutingMap.get(triggerName);
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Set trigger execution status
     * @param triggerName Name of the trigger
     * @param isExecuting Execution status
     */
    public static void setExecuting(String triggerName, Boolean isExecuting) {
        isExecutingMap.put(triggerName, isExecuting);
        
        if (isExecuting) {
            incrementExecutionCount(triggerName);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Check if trigger has exceeded max executions
     * @param triggerName Name of the trigger
     * @return True if max executions exceeded
     */
    public static Boolean hasExceededMaxExecutions(String triggerName) {
        Integer count = executionCountMap.get(triggerName);
        return count != null && count > TRIGGER_MAX_EXECUTIONS;
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Reset execution tracking for a trigger
     * @param triggerName Name of the trigger
     */
    public static void reset(String triggerName) {
        isExecutingMap.remove(triggerName);
        executionCountMap.remove(triggerName);
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Reset all trigger tracking
     */
    public static void resetAll() {
        isExecutingMap.clear();
        executionCountMap.clear();
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Increment execution count for a trigger
     * @param triggerName Name of the trigger
     */
    private static void incrementExecutionCount(String triggerName) {
        Integer count = executionCountMap.get(triggerName);
        if (count == null) {
            count = 0;
        }
        executionCountMap.put(triggerName, count + 1);
    }
}
```

## 📄 FILE: force-app/main/default/classes/UninstallScript.cls

```apex
/**
 * @description Uninstall script for RouteLogic Enhanced package
 * @author RouteLogic Team
 * @date 2025-01-19
 */
@namespaceAccessible
global with sharing class UninstallScript implements UninstallHandler {
    
    /**
     * @description Called before package uninstallation
     * @param context Uninstall context
     */
    global void onUninstall(UninstallContext context) {
        try {
            // Get uninstall details
            Id organizationId = context.organizationId();
            Id uninstallerId = context.uninstallerId();
            
            // Log uninstallation
            logUninstallation(organizationId, uninstallerId);
            
            // Perform cleanup tasks
            performCleanup();
            
            // Send notification
            sendUninstallNotification(context);
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            // Log error but don't fail uninstallation
            System.debug('Uninstall script error: ' + e.getMessage());
            // Can't use ErrorLogService as it will be deleted
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Log uninstallation details
     */
    private void logUninstallation(Id organizationId, Id uninstallerId) {
        try {
            // Create final audit record before package removal
            AuditService.logEvent(
                'PACKAGE_UNINSTALL',
                'Package uninstalled - Org: ' + organizationId + ', User: ' + uninstallerId,
                'SUCCESS',
                'SYSTEM'
            );
            
            // Publish platform event for external logging if needed
            AI_Critical_Error__e event = new AI_Critical_Error__e(
                Component__c = 'UninstallScript',
                Error_Type__c = 'PACKAGE_UNINSTALL',
                Error_Message__c = 'RouteLogic Enhanced package uninstalled',
                Stack_Trace__c = 'Org: ' + organizationId,
                Severity__c = 'INFO'
            );
            EventBus.publish(event);
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.debug('Failed to log uninstallation: ' + e.getMessage());
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Perform cleanup tasks
     */
    private void performCleanup() {
        try {
            // Cancel scheduled jobs
            cancelScheduledJobs();
            
            // Clear platform cache
            clearPlatformCache();
            
            // Archive critical data if needed
            archiveCriticalData();
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.debug('Cleanup error: ' + e.getMessage());
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Cancel scheduled jobs
     */
    private void cancelScheduledJobs() {
        try {
            // Find and abort scheduled jobs
            List<CronTrigger> jobs = [
                SELECT Id 
                FROM CronTrigger 
                WHERE CronJobDetail.Name LIKE 'RouteLogic%'
                AND State != 'DELETED'
            ];
            
            for (CronTrigger job : jobs) {
                System.abortJob(job.Id);
            }
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.debug('Failed to cancel scheduled jobs: ' + e.getMessage());
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Clear platform cache
     */
    private void clearPlatformCache() {
        try {
            // Clear organization cache partition
            Cache.Org.remove('AIRateLimit');
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.debug('Failed to clear cache: ' + e.getMessage());
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Archive critical data before uninstall
     */
    private void archiveCriticalData() {
        try {
            // Count records that will be deleted
            Integer auditCount = [SELECT COUNT() FROM AI_Audit_Event__c LIMIT 50000];
            Integer metricsCount = [SELECT COUNT() FROM AI_Bulk_Processing_Metrics__c LIMIT 50000];
            
            // Log summary
            String summary = String.format(
                'Data to be deleted - Audit Events: {0}, Processing Metrics: {1}',
                new String[] { String.valueOf(auditCount), String.valueOf(metricsCount) }
            );
            
            System.debug('Uninstall data summary: ' + summary);
            
            // In production, this could export data to an external system
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.debug('Failed to archive data: ' + e.getMessage());
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * @description Send uninstall notification
     */
    private void sendUninstallNotification(UninstallContext context) {
        try {
            // Get uninstaller user
            User uninstaller = [
                SELECT Id, Email, Name 
                FROM User 
                WHERE Id = :context.uninstallerId() 
                LIMIT 1
            ];
            
            // Log uninstaller information
            System.debug('Package uninstalled by: ' + uninstaller.Name + ' (' + uninstaller.Email + ')');
            
            // In production, this could send an email notification
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.debug('Failed to send notification: ' + e.getMessage());
        }
    }
}
```

## 📄 FILE: force-app/main/default/lwc/aiBulkProcessingDashboard/aiBulkProcessingDashboard.css

```css
.status-card {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f8f9fa 0%, #ffffff 100%);
    border: 1px solid #e5e5e5;
    transition: all 0.2s ease;
    min-height: 120px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
}

.status-card:hover {
    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
    transform: translateY(-1px);
}

.progress-success {
    background-color: #04844b;
}

.progress-warning {
    background-color: #fe9339;
}

.progress-danger {
    background-color: #ea001e;
}

.metric-item {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 8px 0;
}

.slds-spinner_container {
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    right: 0;
    bottom: 0;
    background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8);
    z-index: 1000;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
}

/* Animation for progress bar */
.slds-progress-bar__value {
    transition: width 0.5s ease-in-out;
}

/* Status card icons */
.status-card lightning-icon {
    opacity: 0.7;
}

/* Responsive design */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .slds-col {
        margin-bottom: 1rem;
    }
    
    .status-card {
        min-height: 100px;
    }
}
```

## 📄 FILE: force-app/main/default/lwc/aiBulkProcessingDashboard/aiBulkProcessingDashboard.html

```html
<template>
    <lightning-card title="AI Bulk Processing Dashboard" icon-name="custom:custom63">
        <div slot="actions">
            <lightning-button-group>
                <lightning-button 
                    label="Refresh" 
                    icon-name="utility:refresh" 
                    onclick={handleRefresh}>
                </lightning-button>
                <lightning-button 
                    label="Advanced" 
                    variant={showAdvanced ? 'brand' : 'neutral'}
                    onclick={handleToggleAdvanced}>
                </lightning-button>
            </lightning-button-group>
        </div>
        
        <div class="slds-p-horizontal_medium">
            <!-- Status Overview Cards -->
            <div class="slds-grid slds-gutters slds-wrap slds-m-bottom_medium">
                <template for:each={statusCards} for:item="card">
                    <div key={card.id} class="slds-col slds-size_1-of-1 slds-medium-size_1-of-2 slds-large-size_1-of-4">
                        <div class="slds-box slds-text-align_center status-card">
                            <lightning-icon icon-name={card.icon} size="medium" class="slds-m-bottom_x-small"></lightning-icon>
                            <div class="slds-text-heading_large slds-text-color_default">{card.count}</div>
                            <div class="slds-text-body_small slds-text-color_weak">{card.title}</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </template>
            </div>
            
            <!-- Overall Progress -->
            <div class="slds-m-bottom_medium">
                <div class="slds-grid slds-grid_align-spread slds-m-bottom_x-small">
                    <h3 class="slds-text-heading_small">Overall Progress</h3>
                    <span class="slds-text-body_small">{successRate}% Success Rate</span>
                </div>
                <div class="slds-progress-bar" style="height: 8px;">
                    <span class={progressBarClass} style={progressBarStyle}>
                        <span class="slds-assistive-text">Progress: {successRate}%</span>
                    </span>
                </div>
                <div class="slds-text-body_small slds-text-color_weak slds-m-top_x-small">
                    {totalRequests} total requests processed
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <!-- Action Buttons -->
            <div class="slds-grid slds-gutters slds-m-bottom_medium">
                <div class="slds-col">
                    <lightning-button 
                        label="Start Bulk Processing" 
                        variant="brand" 
                        icon-name="utility:play"
                        onclick={handleInitiateProcessing}
                        disabled={isLoading}>
                    </lightning-button>
                </div>
                <div class="slds-col" if:true={retryQueueInfo.hasItems}>
                    <lightning-button 
                        label={retryQueueLabel}
                        variant="neutral" 
                        icon-name="utility:redo"
                        onclick={handleProcessRetries}
                        disabled={isLoading}>
                    </lightning-button>
                </div>
                <div class="slds-col" if:true={activeJobsInfo.hasJobs}>
                    <lightning-button 
                        label="Cancel All Jobs" 
                        variant="destructive-text" 
                        icon-name="utility:stop"
                        onclick={handleCancelJobs}
                        disabled={isLoading}>
                    </lightning-button>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <!-- Advanced Information -->
            <template if:true={showAdvanced}>
                <div class="slds-box slds-theme_shade">
                    <h3 class="slds-text-heading_small slds-m-bottom_medium">Advanced Metrics</h3>
                    
                    <div class="slds-grid slds-gutters slds-wrap">
                        <!-- Active Jobs -->
                        <div class="slds-col slds-size_1-of-1 slds-medium-size_1-of-3">
                            <div class="metric-item">
                                <lightning-icon icon-name="utility:settings" size="small" class="slds-m-right_x-small"></lightning-icon>
                                <div>
                                    <div class="slds-text-body_small slds-text-color_weak">Active Jobs</div>
                                    <div class="slds-text-heading_medium">{activeJobsInfo.count}</div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        
                        <!-- Retry Queue -->
                        <div class="slds-col slds-size_1-of-1 slds-medium-size_1-of-3">
                            <div class="metric-item">
                                <lightning-icon icon-name="utility:redo" size="small" class="slds-m-right_x-small"></lightning-icon>
                                <div>
                                    <div class="slds-text-body_small slds-text-color_weak">Retry Queue</div>
                                    <div class="slds-text-heading_medium">{retryQueueInfo.count}</div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        
                        <!-- Average Processing Time -->
                        <div class="slds-col slds-size_1-of-1 slds-medium-size_1-of-3">
                            <div class="metric-item">
                                <lightning-icon icon-name="utility:clock" size="small" class="slds-m-right_x-small"></lightning-icon>
                                <div>
                                    <div class="slds-text-body_small slds-text-color_weak">Avg Processing Time</div>
                                    <div class="slds-text-heading_medium">{averageProcessingTime}</div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    
                    <!-- System Status -->
                    <div class="slds-m-top_medium">
                        <h4 class="slds-text-heading_small slds-m-bottom_small">System Status</h4>
                        <div class="slds-grid slds-gutters">
                            <div class="slds-col">
                                <lightning-formatted-text 
                                    value="Auto-refresh: Every 30 seconds"
                                    class="slds-text-body_small slds-text-color_weak">
                                </lightning-formatted-text>
                            </div>
                            <div class="slds-col">
                                <template if:true={activeJobsInfo.hasJobs}>
                                    <lightning-badge label="Processing Active" variant="success"></lightning-badge>
                                </template>
                                <template if:false={activeJobsInfo.hasJobs}>
                                    <lightning-badge label="System Idle" variant="lightest"></lightning-badge>
                                </template>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </template>
            
            <!-- Loading Overlay -->
            <template if:true={isLoading}>
                <div class="slds-spinner_container">
                    <div role="status" class="slds-spinner slds-spinner_medium">
                        <span class="slds-assistive-text">Loading</span>
                        <div class="slds-spinner__dot-a"></div>
                        <div class="slds-spinner__dot-b"></div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </template>
        </div>
    </lightning-card>
</template>
```

## 📄 FILE: force-app/main/default/lwc/aiBulkProcessingDashboard/aiBulkProcessingDashboard.js

```javascript
import { LightningElement, track, wire } from 'lwc';
import { refreshApex } from '@salesforce/apex';
import { ShowToastEvent } from 'lightning/platformShowToastEvent';
import getProcessingStatus from '@salesforce/apex/AIBulkProcessingController.getProcessingStatus';
import initiateBulkProcessing from '@salesforce/apex/AIBulkProcessingController.initiateBulkProcessing';
import processRetryQueue from '@salesforce/apex/AIBulkProcessingController.processRetryQueue';
import cancelAllJobs from '@salesforce/apex/AIBulkProcessingController.cancelAllJobs';

export default class AiBulkProcessingDashboard extends LightningElement {
    @track processingData = {};
    @track isLoading = false;
    @track showAdvanced = false;
    
    // Refresh interval (30 seconds)
    refreshInterval = 30000;
    intervalId;
    
    // Wire the processing status
    wiredProcessingResult;
    
    @wire(getProcessingStatus)
    wiredProcessingStatus(result) {
        this.wiredProcessingResult = result;
        if (result.data) {
            this.processingData = result.data;
            this.error = undefined;
        } else if (result.error) {
            this.error = result.error;
            this.processingData = {};
        }
    }
    
    connectedCallback() {
        // Start auto-refresh
        this.startAutoRefresh();
    }
    
    disconnectedCallback() {
        // Clear auto-refresh
        this.stopAutoRefresh();
    }
    
    startAutoRefresh() {
        this.intervalId = setInterval(() => {
            this.refreshData();
        }, this.refreshInterval);
    }
    
    stopAutoRefresh() {
        if (this.intervalId) {
            clearInterval(this.intervalId);
            this.intervalId = null;
        }
    }
    
    async refreshData() {
        try {
            await refreshApex(this.wiredProcessingResult);
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('Error refreshing data:', error);
        }
    }
    
    // Computed properties for UI display
    get totalRequests() {
        return this.processingData.pendingCount + 
               this.processingData.processingCount + 
               this.processingData.completedCount + 
               this.processingData.failedCount || 0;
    }
    
    get successRate() {
        const total = this.totalRequests;
        if (total === 0) return 0;
        return Math.round((this.processingData.completedCount / total) * 100);
    }
    
    get progressBarClass() {
        const rate = this.successRate;
        if (rate >= 80) return 'slds-progress-bar__value progress-success';
        if (rate >= 60) return 'slds-progress-bar__value progress-warning';
        return 'slds-progress-bar__value progress-danger';
    }
    
    get statusCards() {
        return [
            {
                id: 'pending',
                title: 'Pending',
                count: this.processingData.pendingCount || 0,
                icon: 'utility:clock',
                variant: 'base'
            },
            {
                id: 'processing',
                title: 'Processing',
                count: this.processingData.processingCount || 0,
                icon: 'utility:refresh',
                variant: 'base'
            },
            {
                id: 'completed',
                title: 'Completed',
                count: this.processingData.completedCount || 0,
                icon: 'utility:success',
                variant: 'base'
            },
            {
                id: 'failed',
                title: 'Failed',
                count: this.processingData.failedCount || 0,
                icon: 'utility:error',
                variant: 'base'
            }
        ];
    }
    
    get retryQueueInfo() {
        return {
            count: this.processingData.retryQueueCount || 0,
            hasItems: (this.processingData.retryQueueCount || 0) > 0
        };
    }
    
    get activeJobsInfo() {
        return {
            count: this.processingData.activeJobs || 0,
            hasJobs: (this.processingData.activeJobs || 0) > 0
        };
    }
    
    get averageProcessingTime() {
        const time = this.processingData.averageProcessingTime || 0;
        return `${time.toFixed(2)}ms`;
    }
    
    // Event handlers
    async handleInitiateProcessing() {
        this.isLoading = true;
        try {
            const result = await initiateBulkProcessing({ batchSize: 200 });
            if (result) {
                this.showToast('Success', 'Bulk processing initiated successfully', 'success');
                await this.refreshData();
            } else {
                this.showToast('Info', 'No pending requests found', 'info');
            }
        } catch (error) {
            this.showToast('Error', error.body?.message || 'Failed to initiate processing', 'error');
        } finally {
            this.isLoading = false;
        }
    }
    
    async handleProcessRetries() {
        this.isLoading = true;
        try {
            const processedCount = await processRetryQueue();
            this.showToast('Success', `Processed ${processedCount} retry requests`, 'success');
            await this.refreshData();
        } catch (error) {
            this.showToast('Error', error.body?.message || 'Failed to process retries', 'error');
        } finally {
            this.isLoading = false;
        }
    }
    
    async handleCancelJobs() {
        this.isLoading = true;
        try {
            const cancelledCount = await cancelAllJobs();
            this.showToast('Success', `Cancelled ${cancelledCount} active jobs`, 'success');
            await this.refreshData();
        } catch (error) {
            this.showToast('Error', error.body?.message || 'Failed to cancel jobs', 'error');
        } finally {
            this.isLoading = false;
        }
    }
    
    handleRefresh() {
        this.refreshData();
    }
    
    handleToggleAdvanced() {
        this.showAdvanced = !this.showAdvanced;
    }
    
    showToast(title, message, variant) {
        const event = new ShowToastEvent({
            title,
            message,
            variant
        });
        this.dispatchEvent(event);
    }
}
```

```css
.slds-button_brand {
    animation: pulse 2s infinite;
}

@keyframes pulse {
    0% {
        box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(0, 112, 210, 0.7);
    }
    70% {
        box-shadow: 0 0 0 10px rgba(0, 112, 210, 0);
    }
    100% {
        box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(0, 112, 210, 0);
    }
}

.slds-box {
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.slds-box:hover {
    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
}

lightning-tab {
    min-height: 400px;
}

.slds-theme_shade {
    background-color: #f3f2f2;
    opacity: 0.8;
}
```
